authors_text: Pengfei Wei,Lingdong Kong,Xinghua Qu,Yi Ren,Zhiqiang Xu,Jing Jiang,Xiang Yin
title: Unsupervised Video Domain Adaptation for Action Recognition: A Disentanglement Perspective
title_zh: 用于动作识别的无监督视频域适应：解开视角
comment: NeurIPS 2023; 20 pages, 9 figures, 10 tables; Code at https://github.com/ldkong1205/TranSVAE
comments: NeurIPS 2023; 20 pages, 9 figures, 10 tables; Code at https://github.com/ldkong1205/TranSVAE
abstract: Unsupervised video domain adaptation is a practical yet challenging task. In this work, for the first time, we tackle it from a disentanglement view. Our key idea is to handle the spatial and temporal domain divergence separately through disentanglement. Specifically, we consider the generation of cross-domain videos from two sets of latent factors, one encoding the static information and another encoding the dynamic information. A Transfer Sequential VAE (TranSVAE) framework is then developed to model such generation. To better serve for adaptation, we propose several objectives to constrain the latent factors. With these constraints, the spatial divergence can be readily removed by disentangling the static domain-specific information out, and the temporal divergence is further reduced from both frame- and video-levels through adversarial learning. Extensive experiments on the UCF-HMDB, Jester, and Epic-Kitchens datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of TranSVAE compared with several state-of-the-art approaches. Code is publicly available.
summary: Unsupervised video domain adaptation is a practical yet challenging task. In this work, for the first time, we tackle it from a disentanglement view. Our key idea is to handle the spatial and temporal domain divergence separately through disentanglement. Specifically, we consider the generation of cross-domain videos from two sets of latent factors, one encoding the static information and another encoding the dynamic information. A Transfer Sequential VAE (TranSVAE) framework is then developed to model such generation. To better serve for adaptation, we propose several objectives to constrain the latent factors. With these constraints, the spatial divergence can be readily removed by disentangling the static domain-specific information out, and the temporal divergence is further reduced from both frame- and video-levels through adversarial learning. Extensive experiments on the UCF-HMDB, Jester, and Epic-Kitchens datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of TranSVAE compared with several state-of-the-art approaches. Code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 无监督视频域适应是一项实用但具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们第一次从解开的角度来解决这个问题。我们的关键思想是通过解开来分别处理空间域和时间域的分歧。具体来说，我们考虑从两组潜在因素生成跨域视频，一组对静态信息进行编码，另一组对动态信息进行编码。然后开发了传输顺序 VAE (TranSVAE) 框架来对此类生成进行建模。为了更好地服务于适应，我们提出了几个目标来约束潜在因素。有了这些限制，可以通过解开静态域特定信息来轻松消除空间发散，并且通过对抗性学习从帧和视频级别进一步减少时间发散。在 UCF-HMDB、Jester 和 Epic-Kitchens 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了 TranSVAE 与几种最先进方法相比的有效性和优越性。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解耦视角的无监督视频领域自适应方法TranSVAE，用于动作识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理视频领域自适应中的空间和时间差异，本文通过解耦静态与动态信息分别处理两种差异，提升适应效果。
AI.method: 构建TranSVAE框架，利用两个潜在因子分别编码静态和动态信息，并通过对抗学习约束潜在空间以消除领域差异。
AI.result: 在UCF-HMDB、Jester和Epic-Kitchens数据集上验证了TranSVAE优于多个先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦静态动态信息并结合对抗学习，TranSVAE有效减少了跨领域视频的差异，提升了动作识别的适应性。

title: Online Pole Segmentation on Range Images for Long-term LiDAR Localization in Urban Environments
title_zh: 用于城市环境中长期 LiDAR 定位的距离图像的在线极点分割
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.08621
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.08621
abstract: Robust and accurate localization is a basic requirement for mobile autonomous systems. Pole-like objects, such as traffic signs, poles, and lamps are frequently used landmarks for localization in urban environments due to their local distinctiveness and long-term stability. In this paper, we present a novel, accurate, and fast pole extraction approach based on geometric features that runs online and has little computational demands. Our method performs all computations directly on range images generated from 3D LiDAR scans, which avoids processing 3D point clouds explicitly and enables fast pole extraction for each scan. We further use the extracted poles as pseudo labels to train a deep neural network for online range image-based pole segmentation. We test both our geometric and learning-based pole extraction methods for localization on different datasets with different LiDAR scanners, routes, and seasonal changes. The experimental results show that our methods outperform other state-of-the-art approaches. Moreover, boosted with pseudo pole labels extracted from multiple datasets, our learning-based method can run across different datasets and achieve even better localization results compared to our geometry-based method. We released our pole datasets to the public for evaluating the performance of pole extractors, as well as the implementation of our approach.
summary: Robust and accurate localization is a basic requirement for mobile autonomous systems. Pole-like objects, such as traffic signs, poles, and lamps are frequently used landmarks for localization in urban environments due to their local distinctiveness and long-term stability. In this paper, we present a novel, accurate, and fast pole extraction approach based on geometric features that runs online and has little computational demands. Our method performs all computations directly on range images generated from 3D LiDAR scans, which avoids processing 3D point clouds explicitly and enables fast pole extraction for each scan. We further use the extracted poles as pseudo labels to train a deep neural network for online range image-based pole segmentation. We test both our geometric and learning-based pole extraction methods for localization on different datasets with different LiDAR scanners, routes, and seasonal changes. The experimental results show that our methods outperform other state-of-the-art approaches. Moreover, boosted with pseudo pole labels extracted from multiple datasets, our learning-based method can run across different datasets and achieve even better localization results compared to our geometry-based method. We released our pole datasets to the public for evaluating the performance of pole extractors, as well as the implementation of our approach.
abstract_zh: 稳健而准确的定位是移动自主系统的基本要求。杆状物体，如交通标志、杆子和灯，由于其局部独特性和长期稳定性，经常被用作城市环境中定位的地标。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于几何特征的新颖、准确、快速的极点提取方法，该方法在线运行且计算需求很少。我们的方法直接在 3D LiDAR 扫描生成的距离图像上执行所有计算，这避免了显式处理 3D 点云，并支持每次扫描的快速极点提取。我们进一步使用提取的极点作为伪标签来训练深度神经网络，用于基于在线范围图像的极点分割。我们测试了基于几何和学习的极点提取方法，以使用不同的激光雷达扫描仪、路线和季节变化在不同的数据集上进行定位。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于其他最先进的方法。此外，借助从​​多个数据集提取的伪极点标签，我们的基于学习的方法可以跨不同的数据集运行，并且与基于几何的方法相比，可以获得更好的定位结果。我们向公众发布了极点数据集，用于评估极点提取器的性能以及我们方法的实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何特征和深度学习的在线极坐标图像杆状物分割方法，用于提升城市环境中长期LiDAR定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 杆状物（如交通标志、路灯）因局部独特性和长期稳定性，是城市环境定位的重要地标，但现有方法在计算效率和准确性上存在不足。
AI.method: 直接在LiDAR生成的极坐标图像上提取几何特征进行杆状物分割，避免处理3D点云；并利用提取的杆状物作为伪标签训练深度神经网络实现在线分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多数据集、多季节和不同LiDAR设备下均优于现有方法，结合多数据集伪标签的深度学习方法定位效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 几何与学习结合的方法有效提升杆状物分割和定位性能，公开数据集为评估其他方法提供基准。

authors_text: Nolan Wagener,Andrey Kolobov,Felipe Vieira Frujeri,Ricky Loynd,Ching-An Cheng,Matthew Hausknecht
title: MoCapAct: A Multi-Task Dataset for Simulated Humanoid Control
title_zh: MoCapAct：用于模拟人形控制的多任务数据集
comment: Appearing in NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
comments: Appearing in NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
abstract: Simulated humanoids are an appealing research domain due to their physical capabilities. Nonetheless, they are also challenging to control, as a policy must drive an unstable, discontinuous, and high-dimensional physical system. One widely studied approach is to utilize motion capture (MoCap) data to teach the humanoid agent low-level skills (e.g., standing, walking, and running) that can then be re-used to synthesize high-level behaviors. However, even with MoCap data, controlling simulated humanoids remains very hard, as MoCap data offers only kinematic information. Finding physical control inputs to realize the demonstrated motions requires computationally intensive methods like reinforcement learning. Thus, despite the publicly available MoCap data, its utility has been limited to institutions with large-scale compute. In this work, we dramatically lower the barrier for productive research on this topic by training and releasing high-quality agents that can track over three hours of MoCap data for a simulated humanoid in the dm_control physics-based environment. We release MoCapAct (Motion Capture with Actions), a dataset of these expert agents and their rollouts, which contain proprioceptive observations and actions. We demonstrate the utility of MoCapAct by using it to train a single hierarchical policy capable of tracking the entire MoCap dataset within dm_control and show the learned low-level component can be re-used to efficiently learn downstream high-level tasks. Finally, we use MoCapAct to train an autoregressive GPT model and show that it can control a simulated humanoid to perform natural motion completion given a motion prompt. Videos of the results and links to the code and dataset are available at https://microsoft.github.io/MoCapAct.

One widely studied approach is to utilize motion capture (MoCap) data to teach the humanoid agent low-level skills (e.g., standing, walking, and running) that can then be re-used to synthesize high-level behaviors. However, even with MoCap data, controlling simulated humanoids remains very hard, as MoCap data offers only kinematic information. Finding physical control inputs to realize the demonstrated motions requires computationally intensive methods like reinforcement learning. Thus, despite the publicly available MoCap data, its utility has been limited to institutions with large-scale compute. In this work, we dramatically lower the barrier for productive research on this topic by training and releasing high-quality agents that can track over three hours of MoCap data for a simulated humanoid in the dm_control physics-based environment. We release MoCapAct (Motion Capture with Actions), a dataset of these expert agents and their rollouts, which contain proprioceptive observations and actions. We demonstrate the utility of MoCapAct by using it to train a single hierarchical policy capable of tracking the entire MoCap dataset within dm_control and show the learned low-level component can be re-used to efficiently learn downstream high-level tasks. Finally, we use MoCapAct to train an autoregressive GPT model and show that it can control a simulated humanoid to perform natural motion completion given a motion prompt. Videos of the results and links to the code and dataset are available at https://microsoft.github.io/MoCapAct.
abstract_zh: 模拟人形机器人因其身体能力而成为一个颇具吸引力的研究领域。尽管如此，它们也难以控制，因为政策必须驱动不稳定、不连续和高维的物理系统。一种广泛研究的方法是利用动作捕捉 (MoCap) 数据来教授人形代理低级技能（例如站立、行走和跑步），然后可以重新使用这些技能来合成高级行为。然而，即使使用动捕数据，控制模拟人形机器人仍然非常困难，因为动捕数据仅提供运动学信息。寻找物理控制输入来实现演示的运动需要强化学习等计算密集型方法。因此，尽管有公开可用的 MoCap 数据，但其实用性仅限于拥有大规模计算的机构。在这项工作中，我们通过训练和发布高质量的智能体，显着降低了对该主题进行富有成效的研究的障碍，这些智能体可以在 dm_control 基于物理的环境中跟踪模拟人形机器人超过三个小时的 MoCap 数据。我们发布了 MoCapAct（带有动作的动作捕捉），这是这些专家代理及其推出的数据集，其中包含本体感受观察和动作。我们通过使用 MoCapAct 来训练能够跟踪 dm_control 中整个 MoCap 数据集的单个分层策略来展示 MoCapAct 的实用性，并表明学习的低级组件可以重复使用以有效地学习下游高级任务。最后，我们使用 MoCapAct 训练自回归 GPT 模型，并证明它可以控制模拟人形机器人在给定运动提示的情况下执行自然的运动完成。结果视频以及代码和数据集的链接可在 https://microsoft.github.io/MoCapAct 上获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MoCapAct数据集，通过训练高质量代理来跟踪大量动作捕捉数据，以降低模拟人形机器人控制的研究门槛。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在公开的动作捕捉数据，但将其转化为物理控制输入需要大量计算资源，限制了其广泛应用。
AI.method: 训练并发布可在dm_control环境中跟踪三小时动作捕捉数据的专家代理，生成包含本体感觉观测和动作的数据集，并用于训练分层策略和GPT模型。
AI.result: 展示了基于MoCapAct的分层策略可复用低级组件完成高层任务，且GPT模型能根据提示生成自然运动。
AI.conclusion: MoCapAct降低了模拟人形机器人控制的研究门槛，为后续研究提供了高效的数据支持。

search_text: MoCapAct: A Multi-Task Dataset for Simulated Humanoid Control MoCapAct：用于模拟人形控制的多任务数据集 Simulated humanoids are an appealing research domain due to their physical capabilities. Nonetheless, they are also challenging to control, as a policy must drive an unstable, discontinuous, and high-dimensional physical system. One widely studied approach is to utilize motion capture (MoCap) data to teach the humanoid agent low-level skills (e.g., standing, walking, and running) that can then be re-used to synthesize high-level behaviors. However, even with MoCap data, controlling simulated humanoids remains very hard, as MoCap data offers only kinematic information. Finding physical control inputs to realize the demonstrated motions requires computationally intensive methods like reinforcement learning. Thus, despite the publicly available MoCap data, its utility has been limited to institutions with large-scale compute. In this work, we dramatically lower the barrier for productive research on this topic by training and releasing high-quality agents that can track over three hours of MoCap data for a simulated humanoid in the dm_control physics-based environment. We release MoCapAct (Motion Capture with Actions), a dataset of these expert agents and their rollouts, which contain proprioceptive observations and actions. We demonstrate the utility of MoCapAct by using it to train a single hierarchical policy capable of tracking the entire MoCap dataset within dm_control and show the learned low-level component can be re-used to efficiently learn downstream high-level tasks. Finally, we use MoCapAct to train an autoregressive GPT model and show that it can control a simulated humanoid to perform natural motion completion given a motion prompt. Videos of the results and links to the code and dataset are available at https://microsoft.github.io/MoCapAct. 模拟人形机器人因其身体能力而成为一个颇具吸引力的研究领域。尽管如此，它们也难以控制，因为政策必须驱动不稳定、不连续和高维的物理系统。一种广泛研究的方法是利用动作捕捉 (MoCap) 数据来教授人形代理低级技能（例如站立、行走和跑步），然后可以重新使用这些技能来合成高级行为。然而，即使使用动捕数据，控制模拟人形机器人仍然非常困难，因为动捕数据仅提供运动学信息。寻找物理控制输入来实现演示的运动需要强化学习等计算密集型方法。因此，尽管有公开可用的 MoCap 数据，但其实用性仅限于拥有大规模计算的机构。在这项工作中，我们通过训练和发布高质量的智能体，显着降低了对该主题进行富有成效的研究的障碍，这些智能体可以在 dm_control 基于物理的环境中跟踪模拟人形机器人超过三个小时的 MoCap 数据。我们发布了 MoCapAct（带有动作的动作捕捉），这是这些专家代理及其推出的数据集，其中包含本体感受观察和动作。我们通过使用 MoCapAct 来训练能够跟踪 dm_control 中整个 MoCap 数据集的单个分层策略来展示 MoCapAct 的实用性，并表明学习的低级组件可以重复使用以有效地学习下游高级任务。最后，我们使用 MoCapAct 训练自回归 GPT 模型，并证明它可以控制模拟人形机器人在给定运动提示的情况下执行自然的运动完成。结果视频以及代码和数据集的链接可在 https://microsoft.github.io/MoCapAct 上获取。 该论文提出MoCapAct数据集，通过训练高质量代理来跟踪大量动作捕捉数据，以降低模拟人形机器人控制的研究门槛。 Nolan Wagener,Andrey Kolobov,Felipe Vieira Frujeri,Ricky Loynd,Ching-An Cheng,Matthew Hausknecht cs.RO,cs.GR,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Subodh Mishra,Sushruth Nagesh,Sagar Manglani,Graham Mills,Punarjay Chakravarty,Gaurav Pandey
title: Look Both Ways: Bidirectional Visual Sensing for Automatic Multi-Camera Registration
title_zh: 双向观察：用于自动多摄像头配准的双向视觉传感
abstract: This work describes the automatic registration of a large network (approximately 40) of fixed, ceiling-mounted environment cameras spread over a large area (approximately 800 squared meters) using a mobile calibration robot equipped with a single upward-facing fisheye camera and a backlit ArUco marker for easy detection. The fisheye camera is used to do visual odometry (VO), and the ArUco marker facilitates easy detection of the calibration robot in the environment cameras. In addition, the fisheye camera is also able to detect the environment cameras. This two-way, bidirectional detection constrains the pose of the environment cameras to solve an optimization problem. Such an approach can be used to automatically register a large-scale multi-camera system used for surveillance, automated parking, or robotic applications. This VO based multi-camera registration method has been extensively validated using real-world experiments, and also compared against a similar approach which uses a LiDAR - an expensive, heavier and power hungry sensor.
summary: This work describes the automatic registration of a large network (approximately 40) of fixed, ceiling-mounted environment cameras spread over a large area (approximately 800 squared meters) using a mobile calibration robot equipped with a single upward-facing fisheye camera and a backlit ArUco marker for easy detection. The fisheye camera is used to do visual odometry (VO), and the ArUco marker facilitates easy detection of the calibration robot in the environment cameras. In addition, the fisheye camera is also able to detect the environment cameras. This two-way, bidirectional detection constrains the pose of the environment cameras to solve an optimization problem. Such an approach can be used to automatically register a large-scale multi-camera system used for surveillance, automated parking, or robotic applications. This VO based multi-camera registration method has been extensively validated using real-world experiments, and also compared against a similar approach which uses a LiDAR - an expensive, heavier and power hungry sensor.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了使用配备单个朝上鱼眼相机和易于检测的背光 ArUco 标记的移动校准机器人，自动注册分布在大面积（约 800 平方米）上的固定、天花板安装环境摄像机的大型网络（约 40 个）。鱼眼相机用于进行视觉里程计（VO），ArUco标记有助于轻松检测环境相机中的校准机器人。此外，鱼眼摄像头还能够检测环境摄像头。这种双向、双向检测限制环境摄像机的姿态来解决优化问题。这种方法可用于自动注册用于监控、自动停车或机器人应用的大型多摄像头系统。这种基于 VO 的多摄像头配准方法已通过实际实验得到了广泛验证，并且还与使用 LiDAR（一种昂贵、较重且耗电的传感器）的类似方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向视觉感知的自动多摄像头注册方法，利用移动校准机器人和鱼眼相机实现大规模固定摄像头网络的自动标定。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模多摄像头系统需人工标定成本高，而LiDAR等传感器成本高且功耗大，亟需开发低成本自动标定方案。
AI.method: 使用搭载鱼眼相机和背光ArUco标记的移动机器人，通过视觉里程计（VO）实现机器人位姿估计，同时利用双向视觉检测（机器人检测环境摄像头，环境摄像头检测机器人）构建优化问题求解摄像头位姿。
AI.result: 方法在800平方米的实际场景中成功注册40个摄像头，实验验证其效果优于LiDAR方案，且具有更低的成本和功耗。
AI.conclusion: 双向视觉感知方法为大规模多摄像头系统的自动注册提供了高效、低成本的解决方案，可应用于安防、停车和机器人领域。

title: Three New Validators and a Large-Scale Benchmark Ranking for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无监督领域适应的三个新验证器和大规模基准排名
comment: This paper was previously titled Benchmarking Validation Methods for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation. This version contains new experiments, analysis, and figures
comments: This paper was previously titled Benchmarking Validation Methods for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation. This version contains new experiments, analysis, and figures
abstract: Changes to hyperparameters can have a dramatic effect on model accuracy. Thus, the tuning of hyperparameters plays an important role in optimizing machine-learning models. An integral part of the hyperparameter-tuning process is the evaluation of model checkpoints, which is done through the use of "validators". In a supervised setting, these validators evaluate checkpoints by computing accuracy on a validation set that has labels. In contrast, in an unsupervised setting, the validation set has no such labels. Without any labels, it is impossible to compute accuracy, so validators must estimate accuracy instead. But what is the best approach to estimating accuracy? In this paper, we consider this question in the context of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Specifically, we propose three new validators, and we compare and rank them against five other existing validators, on a large dataset of 1,000,000 checkpoints. Extensive experimental results show that two of our proposed validators achieve state-of-the-art performance in various settings. Finally, we find that in many cases, the state-of-the-art is obtained by a simple baseline method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the largest empirical study of UDA validators to date. Code is available at https://www.github.com/KevinMusgrave/powerful-benchmarker.
summary: Changes to hyperparameters can have a dramatic effect on model accuracy. Thus, the tuning of hyperparameters plays an important role in optimizing machine-learning models. An integral part of the hyperparameter-tuning process is the evaluation of model checkpoints, which is done through the use of "validators". In a supervised setting, these validators evaluate checkpoints by computing accuracy on a validation set that has labels. In contrast, in an unsupervised setting, the validation set has no such labels. Without any labels, it is impossible to compute accuracy, so validators must estimate accuracy instead. But what is the best approach to estimating accuracy? In this paper, we consider this question in the context of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Specifically, we propose three new validators, and we compare and rank them against five other existing validators, on a large dataset of 1,000,000 checkpoints. Extensive experimental results show that two of our proposed validators achieve state-of-the-art performance in various settings. Finally, we find that in many cases, the state-of-the-art is obtained by a simple baseline method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the largest empirical study of UDA validators to date. Code is available at https://www.github.com/KevinMusgrave/powerful-benchmarker.
abstract_zh: 超参数的更改会对模型精度产生巨大影响。因此，超参数的调整在优化机器学习模型中起着重要作用。超参数调整过程的一个组成部分是模型检查点的评估，这是通过使用“验证器”来完成的。在监督设置中，这些验证器通过计算具有标签的验证集的准确性来评估检查点。相反，在无监督的设置中，验证集没有这样的标签。如果没有任何标签，就不可能计算准确性，因此验证者必须估计准确性。但是估计准确性的最佳方法是什么？在本文中，我们在无监督域适应（UDA）的背景下考虑这个问题。具体来说，我们提出了三个新的验证器，并在包含 1,000,000 个检查点的大型数据集上将它们与其他五个现有验证器进行比较和排名。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的两个验证器在各种设置中都实现了最先进的性能。最后，我们发现在许多情况下，最先进的技术是通过简单的基线方法获得的。据我们所知，这是迄今为止对 UDA 验证器最大规模的实证研究。代码可在 https://www.github.com/KevinMusgrave/powerful-benchmarker 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出三种新的验证器，并在大规模基准数据集上对它们进行排名，以优化无监督域适应（UDA）中的模型检查点评估。
AI.motivation: 在无监督域适应中，由于目标域无标签，传统验证方法无法直接计算准确率，需依赖估计方法。现有验证器效果有限，亟需更优方案。
AI.method: 设计三种新型验证器，与五种现有方法在包含100万检查点的大规模数据集上进行对比实验，通过全面测试评估性能。
AI.result: 两种新验证器在多种场景下达到最先进水平，且实验发现简单基线方法在部分情况下表现更优，这是目前最大的UDA验证器实证研究。
AI.conclusion: 新验证器有效提升UDA模型评估效果，研究强调基准测试的重要性，并揭示简单方法可能在特定场景下更优。

search_text: Three New Validators and a Large-Scale Benchmark Ranking for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 无监督领域适应的三个新验证器和大规模基准排名 Changes to hyperparameters can have a dramatic effect on model accuracy. Thus, the tuning of hyperparameters plays an important role in optimizing machine-learning models. An integral part of the hyperparameter-tuning process is the evaluation of model checkpoints, which is done through the use of "validators". In a supervised setting, these validators evaluate checkpoints by computing accuracy on a validation set that has labels. In contrast, in an unsupervised setting, the validation set has no such labels. Without any labels, it is impossible to compute accuracy, so validators must estimate accuracy instead. But what is the best approach to estimating accuracy? In this paper, we consider this question in the context of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Specifically, we propose three new validators, and we compare and rank them against five other existing validators, on a large dataset of 1,000,000 checkpoints. Extensive experimental results show that two of our proposed validators achieve state-of-the-art performance in various settings. Finally, we find that in many cases, the state-of-the-art is obtained by a simple baseline method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the largest empirical study of UDA validators to date. Code is available at https://www.github.com/KevinMusgrave/powerful-benchmarker. 超参数的更改会对模型精度产生巨大影响。因此，超参数的调整在优化机器学习模型中起着重要作用。超参数调整过程的一个组成部分是模型检查点的评估，这是通过使用“验证器”来完成的。在监督设置中，这些验证器通过计算具有标签的验证集的准确性来评估检查点。相反，在无监督的设置中，验证集没有这样的标签。如果没有任何标签，就不可能计算准确性，因此验证者必须估计准确性。但是估计准确性的最佳方法是什么？在本文中，我们在无监督域适应（UDA）的背景下考虑这个问题。具体来说，我们提出了三个新的验证器，并在包含 1,000,000 个检查点的大型数据集上将它们与其他五个现有验证器进行比较和排名。大量的实验结果表明，我们提出的两个验证器在各种设置中都实现了最先进的性能。最后，我们发现在许多情况下，最先进的技术是通过简单的基线方法获得的。据我们所知，这是迄今为止对 UDA 验证器最大规模的实证研究。代码可在 https://www.github.com/KevinMusgrave/powerful-benchmarker 获取。 该论文提出三种新的验证器，并在大规模基准数据集上对它们进行排名，以优化无监督域适应（UDA）中的模型检查点评估。 Kevin Musgrave,Serge Belongie,Ser-Nam Lim cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Satoshi Tsutsui,Xizi Wang,Guangyuan Weng,Yayun Zhang,David Crandall,Chen Yu
title: Action Recognition based on Cross-Situational Action-object Statistics
title_zh: 基于跨情境动作对象统计的动作识别
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL) 2022
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL) 2022
abstract: Machine learning models of visual action recognition are typically trained and tested on data from specific situations where actions are associated with certain objects. It is an open question how action-object associations in the training set influence a model's ability to generalize beyond trained situations. We set out to identify properties of training data that lead to action recognition models with greater generalization ability. To do this, we take inspiration from a cognitive mechanism called cross-situational learning, which states that human learners extract the meaning of concepts by observing instances of the same concept across different situations. We perform controlled experiments with various types of action-object associations, and identify key properties of action-object co-occurrence in training data that lead to better classifiers. Given that these properties are missing in the datasets that are typically used to train action classifiers in the computer vision literature, our work provides useful insights on how we should best construct datasets for efficiently training for better generalization.
summary: Machine learning models of visual action recognition are typically trained and tested on data from specific situations where actions are associated with certain objects. It is an open question how action-object associations in the training set influence a model's ability to generalize beyond trained situations. We set out to identify properties of training data that lead to action recognition models with greater generalization ability. To do this, we take inspiration from a cognitive mechanism called cross-situational learning, which states that human learners extract the meaning of concepts by observing instances of the same concept across different situations. We perform controlled experiments with various types of action-object associations, and identify key properties of action-object co-occurrence in training data that lead to better classifiers. Given that these properties are missing in the datasets that are typically used to train action classifiers in the computer vision literature, our work provides useful insights on how we should best construct datasets for efficiently training for better generalization.
abstract_zh: 视觉动作识别的机器学习模型通常根据来自特定情况的数据进行训练和测试，其中动作与某些对象相关联。训练集中的动作-对象关联如何影响模型泛化超出训练情况的能力是一个悬而未决的问题。我们着手确定训练数据的属性，从而产生具有更强泛化能力的动作识别模型。为此，我们从一种称为跨情境学习的认知机制中获得灵感，该机制指出，人类学习者通过观察不同情境中同一概念的实例来提取概念的含义。我们对各种类型的动作-对象关联进行受控实验，并确定训练数据中动作-对象共现的关键属性，从而产生更好的分类器。鉴于计算机视觉文献中通常用于训练动作分类器的数据集中缺少这些属性，我们的工作提供了关于如何最好地构建数据集以进行有效训练以实现更好泛化的有用见解。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究训练数据中动作-物体关联特性对模型泛化能力的影响，并提出改进数据集构建方法以提升动作识别模型的跨情境适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉动作识别模型在特定情境下训练，难以泛化到新情境。受人类跨情境学习机制启发，探索如何通过优化训练数据特性提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 受认知机制'跨情境学习'启发，设计控制实验分析不同动作-物体关联模式，识别训练数据中促进泛化的关键属性。
AI.result: 发现动作-物体共现的多样性与分布特性是影响泛化能力的关键因素，而现有常用数据集普遍缺乏这些特性。
AI.conclusion: 应重新设计动作识别数据集，增加动作-物体关联的跨情境多样性，以提升模型在未知情境下的识别性能。

title: Fair Assortment Planning
title_zh: 公平的品种规划
abstract: Many online platforms, ranging from online retail stores to social media platforms, employ algorithms to optimize their offered assortment of items (e.g., products and contents). These algorithms often focus exclusively on achieving the platforms' objectives, highlighting items with the highest popularity or revenue. This approach, however, can compromise the equality of opportunities for the rest of the items, in turn leading to less content diversity and increased regulatory scrutiny for the platform. Motivated by this, we introduce and study a fair assortment planning problem that enforces equality of opportunities via pairwise fairness, which requires any two items to be offered similar outcomes. We show that the problem can be formulated as a linear program (LP), called (FAIR), that optimizes over the distribution of all feasible assortments. To find a near-optimal solution to (FAIR), we propose a framework based on the Ellipsoid method, which requires a polynomial-time separation oracle to the dual of the LP. We show that finding an optimal separation oracle to the dual problem is an NP-complete problem, and hence we propose a series of approximate separation oracles, which then result in a 1/2-approx. algorithm and an FPTAS for Problem (FAIR). The approximate separation oracles are designed by (i) showing the separation oracle to the dual of the LP is equivalent to solving an infinite series of parameterized knapsack problems, and (ii) leveraging the structure of knapsack problems. Finally, we perform numerical studies on both synthetic data and real-world MovieLens data, showcasing the effectiveness of our algorithms and providing insights into the platform's price of fairness.
summary: Many online platforms, ranging from online retail stores to social media platforms, employ algorithms to optimize their offered assortment of items (e.g., products and contents). These algorithms often focus exclusively on achieving the platforms' objectives, highlighting items with the highest popularity or revenue. This approach, however, can compromise the equality of opportunities for the rest of the items, in turn leading to less content diversity and increased regulatory scrutiny for the platform. Motivated by this, we introduce and study a fair assortment planning problem that enforces equality of opportunities via pairwise fairness, which requires any two items to be offered similar outcomes. We show that the problem can be formulated as a linear program (LP), called (FAIR), that optimizes over the distribution of all feasible assortments. To find a near-optimal solution to (FAIR), we propose a framework based on the Ellipsoid method, which requires a polynomial-time separation oracle to the dual of the LP. We show that finding an optimal separation oracle to the dual problem is an NP-complete problem, and hence we propose a series of approximate separation oracles, which then result in a 1/2-approx. algorithm and an FPTAS for Problem (FAIR). The approximate separation oracles are designed by (i) showing the separation oracle to the dual of the LP is equivalent to solving an infinite series of parameterized knapsack problems, and (ii) leveraging the structure of knapsack problems. Finally, we perform numerical studies on both synthetic data and real-world MovieLens data, showcasing the effectiveness of our algorithms and providing insights into the platform's price of fairness.
abstract_zh: 从在线零售商店到社交媒体平台，许多在线平台都采用算法来优化其提供的商品种类（例如产品和内容）。这些算法通常只专注于实现平台的目标，突出显示最受欢迎或收入最高的项目。然而，这种方法可能会损害其余项目的机会平等，进而导致内容多样性减少并增加对该平台的监管审查。受此启发，我们引入并研究了一个公平分类规划问题，该问题通过成对公平来强制机会均等，这要求任何两个项目提供相似的结果。我们表明，该问题可以表述为线性程序（LP），称为（FAIR），它对所有可行分类的分布进行优化。为了找到接近最优的解决方案（FAIR），我们提出了一个基于椭圆体方法的框架，该框架需要对LP的对偶进行多项式时间分离预言。我们证明，找到对偶问题的最佳分离预言机是一个 NP 完全问题，因此我们提出了一系列近似分离预言机，从而得到 1/2 近似。算法和 FPTAS for Problem (FAIR)。近似分离预言的设计是通过以下方式设计的：(i) 将分离预言显示为 LP 的对偶相当于求解无限级数的参数化背包问题，以及 (ii) 利用背包问题的结构。最后，我们对合成数据和现实世界的 MovieLens 数据进行数值研究，展示我们算法的有效性并提供对平台公平价格的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过成对公平性约束来制定公平的 assortments（商品组合），以确保所有商品获得相似的展示机会。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅关注平台收益或流行度最大化，导致商品多样性降低并引发监管问题，需通过公平性约束解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 将问题建模为线性规划（FAIR），并基于椭球法设计近似分离 oracle，通过参数化背包问题结构实现近似求解。
AI.result: 提出 1/2-近似算法和 FPTAS，实验验证其在合成数据与 MovieLens 数据集上的有效性，并量化公平性代价。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证平台收益的同时实现商品展示公平性，为在线平台提供了兼顾商业目标与社会责任的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过成对公平性约束来制定公平的 assortments（商品组合），以确保所有商品获得相似的展示机会。
ai_content.motivation: 现有算法仅关注平台收益或流行度最大化，导致商品多样性降低并引发监管问题，需通过公平性约束解决这一矛盾。
ai_content.method: 将问题建模为线性规划（FAIR），并基于椭球法设计近似分离 oracle，通过参数化背包问题结构实现近似求解。

search_text: Fair Assortment Planning 公平的品种规划 Many online platforms, ranging from online retail stores to social media platforms, employ algorithms to optimize their offered assortment of items (e.g., products and contents). These algorithms often focus exclusively on achieving the platforms' objectives, highlighting items with the highest popularity or revenue. This approach, however, can compromise the equality of opportunities for the rest of the items, in turn leading to less content diversity and increased regulatory scrutiny for the platform. Motivated by this, we introduce and study a fair assortment planning problem that enforces equality of opportunities via pairwise fairness, which requires any two items to be offered similar outcomes. We show that the problem can be formulated as a linear program (LP), called (FAIR), that optimizes over the distribution of all feasible assortments. To find a near-optimal solution to (FAIR), we propose a framework based on the Ellipsoid method, which requires a polynomial-time separation oracle to the dual of the LP. We show that finding an optimal separation oracle to the dual problem is an NP-complete problem, and hence we propose a series of approximate separation oracles, which then result in a 1/2-approx. algorithm and an FPTAS for Problem (FAIR). The approximate separation oracles are designed by (i) showing the separation oracle to the dual of the LP is equivalent to solving an infinite series of parameterized knapsack problems, and (ii) leveraging the structure of knapsack problems. Finally, we perform numerical studies on both synthetic data and real-world MovieLens data, showcasing the effectiveness of our algorithms and providing insights into the platform's price of fairness. 从在线零售商店到社交媒体平台，许多在线平台都采用算法来优化其提供的商品种类（例如产品和内容）。这些算法通常只专注于实现平台的目标，突出显示最受欢迎或收入最高的项目。然而，这种方法可能会损害其余项目的机会平等，进而导致内容多样性减少并增加对该平台的监管审查。受此启发，我们引入并研究了一个公平分类规划问题，该问题通过成对公平来强制机会均等，这要求任何两个项目提供相似的结果。我们表明，该问题可以表述为线性程序（LP），称为（FAIR），它对所有可行分类的分布进行优化。为了找到接近最优的解决方案（FAIR），我们提出了一个基于椭圆体方法的框架，该框架需要对LP的对偶进行多项式时间分离预言。我们证明，找到对偶问题的最佳分离预言机是一个 NP 完全问题，因此我们提出了一系列近似分离预言机，从而得到 1/2 近似。算法和 FPTAS for Problem (FAIR)。近似分离预言的设计是通过以下方式设计的：(i) 将分离预言显示为 LP 的对偶相当于求解无限级数的参数化背包问题，以及 (ii) 利用背包问题的结构。最后，我们对合成数据和现实世界的 MovieLens 数据进行数值研究，展示我们算法的有效性并提供对平台公平价格的见解。 本文研究了如何通过成对公平性约束来制定公平的 assortments（商品组合），以确保所有商品获得相似的展示机会。 Qinyi Chen,Negin Golrezaei,Fransisca Susan cs.DS,math.OC

title: LLM.int8(): 8-bit Matrix Multiplication for Transformers at Scale
title_zh: LLM.int8()：大规模 Transformer 的 8 位矩阵乘法
abstract: Large language models have been widely adopted but require significant GPU memory for inference. We develop a procedure for Int8 matrix multiplication for feed-forward and attention projection layers in transformers, which cut the memory needed for inference by half while retaining full precision performance. With our method, a 175B parameter 16/32-bit checkpoint can be loaded, converted to Int8, and used immediately without performance degradation. This is made possible by understanding and working around properties of highly systematic emergent features in transformer language models that dominate attention and transformer predictive performance. To cope with these features, we develop a two-part quantization procedure, LLM.int8(). We first use vector-wise quantization with separate normalization constants for each inner product in the matrix multiplication, to quantize most of the features. However, for the emergent outliers, we also include a new mixed-precision decomposition scheme, which isolates the outlier feature dimensions into a 16-bit matrix multiplication while still more than 99.9% of values are multiplied in 8-bit. Using LLM.int8(), we show empirically it is possible to perform inference in LLMs with up to 175B parameters without any performance degradation. This result makes such models much more accessible, for example making it possible to use OPT-175B/BLOOM on a single server with consumer GPUs. We open-source our software.
summary: Large language models have been widely adopted but require significant GPU memory for inference. We develop a procedure for Int8 matrix multiplication for feed-forward and attention projection layers in transformers, which cut the memory needed for inference by half while retaining full precision performance. With our method, a 175B parameter 16/32-bit checkpoint can be loaded, converted to Int8, and used immediately without performance degradation. This is made possible by understanding and working around properties of highly systematic emergent features in transformer language models that dominate attention and transformer predictive performance. To cope with these features, we develop a two-part quantization procedure, LLM.int8(). We first use vector-wise quantization with separate normalization constants for each inner product in the matrix multiplication, to quantize most of the features. However, for the emergent outliers, we also include a new mixed-precision decomposition scheme, which isolates the outlier feature dimensions into a 16-bit matrix multiplication while still more than 99.9% of values are multiplied in 8-bit. Using LLM.int8(), we show empirically it is possible to perform inference in LLMs with up to 175B parameters without any performance degradation. This result makes such models much more accessible, for example making it possible to use OPT-175B/BLOOM on a single server with consumer GPUs. We open-source our software.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型已被广泛采用，但需要大量 GPU 内存进行推理。我们为 Transformer 中的前馈和注意力投影层开发了一种 Int8 矩阵乘法程序，它将推理所需的内存减少了一半，同时保留了完整的精度性能。使用我们的方法，可以加载 175B 参数 16/32 位检查点，转换为 Int8，并立即使用，而不会降低性能。这是通过理解和解决 Transformer 语言模型中高度系统化的新兴特征的属性来实现的，这些特征主导了注意力和 Transformer 的预测性能。为了应对这些特征，我们开发了一个由两部分组成的量化过程，LLM.int8()。我们首先使用向量量化，对矩阵乘法中的每个内积使用单独的归一化常数，以量化大多数特征。然而，对于出现的离群值，我们还采用了一种新的混合精度分解方案，它将离群值特征维度隔离为 16 位矩阵乘法，而仍然超过 99.9% 的值以 8 位相乘。使用 LLM.int8()，我们凭经验证明可以在具有多达 175B 个参数的 LLM 中执行推理，而不会降低任何性能。这一结果使此类模型更易于访问，例如可以在具有消费级 GPU 的单个服务器上使用 OPT-175B/BLOOM。我们开源我们的软件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM.int8()方法，通过8位矩阵乘法优化大规模Transformer模型的推理内存占用。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型推理需要大量GPU内存，限制了其在普通硬件上的部署和应用。
AI.method: 开发两阶段量化方案：向量级量化处理常规特征，混合精度分解隔离异常值，保留99.9%的8位计算并辅以16位矩阵处理关键维度。
AI.result: 成功在175B参数模型（如OPT-175B/BLOOM）上实现无性能损失的Int8推理，可在单台消费级GPU服务器运行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低大模型内存需求，提升可及性，开源软件促进技术应用。

authors_text: Marco Huber,Fadi Boutros,Anh Thi Luu,Kiran Raja,Raghavendra Ramachandra,Naser Damer,Pedro C. Neto,Tiago Gonçalves,Ana F. Sequeira,Jaime S. Cardoso,João Tremoço,Miguel Lourenço,Sergio Serra,Eduardo Cermeño,Marija Ivanovska,Borut Batagelj,Andrej Kronovšek,Peter Peer,Vitomir Štruc
title: SYN-MAD 2022: Competition on Face Morphing Attack Detection Based on Privacy-aware Synthetic Training Data
title_zh: SYN-MAD 2022：基于隐私感知综合训练数据的人脸变形攻击检测竞赛
comment: Accepted at International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB) 2022
comments: Accepted at International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB) 2022
abstract: This paper presents a summary of the Competition on Face Morphing Attack Detection Based on Privacy-aware Synthetic Training Data (SYN-MAD) held at the 2022 International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2022). The competition attracted a total of 12 participating teams, both from academia and industry and present in 11 different countries. In the end, seven valid submissions were submitted by the participating teams and evaluated by the organizers. The competition was held to present and attract solutions that deal with detecting face morphing attacks while protecting people's privacy for ethical and legal reasons. To ensure this, the training data was limited to synthetic data provided by the organizers. The submitted solutions presented innovations that led to outperforming the considered baseline in many experimental settings. The evaluation benchmark is now available at: https://github.com/marcohuber/SYN-MAD-2022.
summary: This paper presents a summary of the Competition on Face Morphing Attack Detection Based on Privacy-aware Synthetic Training Data (SYN-MAD) held at the 2022 International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2022). The competition attracted a total of 12 participating teams, both from academia and industry and present in 11 different countries. In the end, seven valid submissions were submitted by the participating teams and evaluated by the organizers. The competition was held to present and attract solutions that deal with detecting face morphing attacks while protecting people's privacy for ethical and legal reasons. To ensure this, the training data was limited to synthetic data provided by the organizers. The submitted solutions presented innovations that led to outperforming the considered baseline in many experimental settings. The evaluation benchmark is now available at: https://github.com/marcohuber/SYN-MAD-2022.
abstract_zh: 本文总结了2022年国际生物识别联合会议（IJCB 2022）上举办的基于隐私感知综合训练数据的人脸变形攻击检测竞赛（SYN-MAD）。本次比赛共吸引了来自11个不同国家的学术界和工业界的12支队伍参赛。最终，参赛队伍提交了7份有效参赛作品，并经主办方评​​审。此次竞赛的目的是展示和吸引解决方案，这些解决方案可以检测面部变形攻击，同时出于道德和法律原因保护人们的隐私。为了确保这一点，培训数据仅限于组织者提供的合成数据。提交的解决方案提出了创新，在许多实验设置中超越了所考虑的基线。评估基准现已发布：https://github.com/marcohuber/SY​​N-MAD-2022。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了2022年国际生物识别会议（IJCB 2022）上举办的基于隐私保护合成训练数据的面部融合攻击检测竞赛（SYN-MAD 2022）。
AI.motivation: 竞赛旨在推动在保护隐私的前提下检测面部融合攻击的技术发展，避免使用真实敏感数据以符合伦理和法律要求。
AI.method: 竞赛通过提供合成训练数据，要求参赛团队提交检测方案并基于隐私保护原则进行评估，最终对比基线模型验证创新方法的有效性。
AI.result: 共有12支来自11个国家的团队参与，7份有效提交方案在多个实验设置中超越了基线模型，评估基准已开源至GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛验证了合成数据在隐私保护场景下的有效性，促进了面部攻击检测技术的创新，并为后续研究提供了可复用的评估框架。

To ensure this, the training data was limited to synthetic data provided by the organizers. The submitted solutions presented innovations that led to outperforming the considered baseline in many experimental settings. The evaluation benchmark is now available at: https://github.com/marcohuber/SYN-MAD-2022. 本文总结了2022年国际生物识别联合会议（IJCB 2022）上举办的基于隐私感知综合训练数据的人脸变形攻击检测竞赛（SYN-MAD）。本次比赛共吸引了来自11个不同国家的学术界和工业界的12支队伍参赛。最终，参赛队伍提交了7份有效参赛作品，并经主办方评​​审。此次竞赛的目的是展示和吸引解决方案，这些解决方案可以检测面部变形攻击，同时出于道德和法律原因保护人们的隐私。为了确保这一点，培训数据仅限于组织者提供的合成数据。提交的解决方案提出了创新，在许多实验设置中超越了所考虑的基线。评估基准现已发布：https://github.com/marcohuber/SY​​N-MAD-2022。 本文总结了2022年国际生物识别会议（IJCB 2022）上举办的基于隐私保护合成训练数据的面部融合攻击检测竞赛（SYN-MAD 2022）。 Marco Huber,Fadi Boutros,Anh Thi Luu,Kiran Raja,Raghavendra Ramachandra,Naser Damer,Pedro C. Neto,Tiago Gonçalves,Ana F. Sequeira,Jaime S. Cardoso,João Tremoço,Miguel Lourenço,Sergio Serra,Eduardo Cermeño,Marija Ivanovska,Borut Batagelj,Andrej Kronovšek,Peter Peer,Vitomir Štruc cs.CV

authors_text: Wenceslao Shaw Cortez,Soumya Vasisht,Aaron Tuor,Ján Drgoňa,Draguna Vrabie
title: Domain-aware Control-oriented Neural Models for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles
title_zh: 自主水下航行器的领域感知控制导向神经模型
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, submitted to 12th IFAC Symposium on Nonlinear Control Systems 2022
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, submitted to 12th IFAC Symposium on Nonlinear Control Systems 2022
abstract: Conventional physics-based modeling is a time-consuming bottleneck in control design for complex nonlinear systems like autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs). In contrast, purely data-driven models, though convenient and quick to obtain, require a large number of observations and lack operational guarantees for safety-critical systems. Data-driven models leveraging available partially characterized dynamics have potential to provide reliable systems models in a typical data-limited scenario for high value complex systems, thereby avoiding months of expensive expert modeling time. In this work we explore this middle-ground between expert-modeled and pure data-driven modeling. We present control-oriented parametric models with varying levels of domain-awareness that exploit known system structure and prior physics knowledge to create constrained deep neural dynamical system models. We employ universal differential equations to construct data-driven blackbox and graybox representations of the AUV dynamics. In addition, we explore a hybrid formulation that explicitly models the residual error related to imperfect graybox models. We compare the prediction performance of the learned models for different distributions of initial conditions and control inputs to assess their accuracy, generalization, and suitability for control.
summary: Conventional physics-based modeling is a time-consuming bottleneck in control design for complex nonlinear systems like autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs). In contrast, purely data-driven models, though convenient and quick to obtain, require a large number of observations and lack operational guarantees for safety-critical systems. Data-driven models leveraging available partially characterized dynamics have potential to provide reliable systems models in a typical data-limited scenario for high value complex systems, thereby avoiding months of expensive expert modeling time. In this work we explore this middle-ground between expert-modeled and pure data-driven modeling. We present control-oriented parametric models with varying levels of domain-awareness that exploit known system structure and prior physics knowledge to create constrained deep neural dynamical system models. We employ universal differential equations to construct data-driven blackbox and graybox representations of the AUV dynamics. In addition, we explore a hybrid formulation that explicitly models the residual error related to imperfect graybox models. We compare the prediction performance of the learned models for different distributions of initial conditions and control inputs to assess their accuracy, generalization, and suitability for control.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于物理的建模是自主水下航行器 (AUV) 等复杂非线性系统控制设计中的耗时瓶颈。相比之下，纯粹的数据驱动模型虽然获取方便快捷，但需要大量的观察，并且缺乏对安全关键系统的运行保障。利用可用的部分特征动力学的数据驱动模型有可能在高价值复杂系统的典型数据有限场景中提供可靠的系统模型，从而避免数月昂贵的专家建模时间。在这项工作中，我们探索专家建模和纯数据驱动建模之间的中间立场。我们提出了具有不同级别领域意识的面向控制的参数模型，利用已知的系统结构和先验物理知识来创建受约束的深层神经动力学系统模型。我们采用通用微分方程来构建 AUV 动力学的数据驱动的黑盒和灰盒表示。此外，我们探索了一种混合公式，可以显式模拟与不完美灰盒模型相关的残差。我们比较学习模型对于初始条件和控制输入的不同分布的预测性能，以评估其准确性、泛化性和控制适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合领域知识与数据驱动的控制导向神经网络模型，用于自主水下航行器的动力学建模。
AI.motivation: 传统物理建模耗时且复杂，纯数据驱动模型需大量数据且缺乏安全性保证，需在数据有限场景下寻找可靠建模方法。
AI.method: 构建具有不同领域意识的参数化模型，结合系统结构与物理知识，利用微分方程建立黑箱/灰箱模型，并设计混合方法处理灰箱残差误差。
AI.result: 通过对比不同初始条件与控制输入下的预测性能，验证模型在准确性、泛化能力及控制适用性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在数据有限场景下可提供可靠动力学模型，有效结合物理先验知识与数据驱动优势，适用于高价值复杂系统的控制设计。

authors_text: Ruining Deng,Can Cui,Lucas W. Remedios,Shunxing Bao,R. Michael Womick,Sophie Chiron,Jia Li,Joseph T. Roland,Ken S. Lau,Qi Liu,Keith T. Wilson,Yaohong Wang,Lori A. Coburn,Bennett A. Landman,Yuankai Huo
title: Cross-scale Attention Guided Multi-instance Learning for Crohn's Disease Diagnosis with Pathological Images
title_zh: 跨尺度注意力引导的多实例学习用于病理图像诊断克罗恩病
abstract: Multi-instance learning (MIL) is widely used in the computer-aided interpretation of pathological Whole Slide Images (WSIs) to solve the lack of pixel-wise or patch-wise annotations. Often, this approach directly applies "natural image driven" MIL algorithms which overlook the multi-scale (i.e. pyramidal) nature of WSIs. Off-the-shelf MIL algorithms are typically deployed on a single-scale of WSIs (e.g., 20x magnification), while human pathologists usually aggregate the global and local patterns in a multi-scale manner (e.g., by zooming in and out between different magnifications). In this study, we propose a novel cross-scale attention mechanism to explicitly aggregate inter-scale interactions into a single MIL network for Crohn's Disease (CD), which is a form of inflammatory bowel disease. The contribution of this paper is two-fold: (1) a cross-scale attention mechanism is proposed to aggregate features from different resolutions with multi-scale interaction; and (2) differential multi-scale attention visualizations are generated to localize explainable lesion patterns. By training ~250,000 H&E-stained Ascending Colon (AC) patches from 20 CD patient and 30 healthy control samples at different scales, our approach achieved a superior Area under the Curve (AUC) score of 0.8924 compared with baseline models. The official implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/hrlblab/CS-MIL.
summary: Multi-instance learning (MIL) is widely used in the computer-aided interpretation of pathological Whole Slide Images (WSIs) to solve the lack of pixel-wise or patch-wise annotations. Often, this approach directly applies "natural image driven" MIL algorithms which overlook the multi-scale (i.e. pyramidal) nature of WSIs. Off-the-shelf MIL algorithms are typically deployed on a single-scale of WSIs (e.g., 20x magnification), while human pathologists usually aggregate the global and local patterns in a multi-scale manner (e.g., by zooming in and out between different magnifications). In this study, we propose a novel cross-scale attention mechanism to explicitly aggregate inter-scale interactions into a single MIL network for Crohn's Disease (CD), which is a form of inflammatory bowel disease. The contribution of this paper is two-fold: (1) a cross-scale attention mechanism is proposed to aggregate features from different resolutions with multi-scale interaction; and (2) differential multi-scale attention visualizations are generated to localize explainable lesion patterns. By training ~250,000 H&E-stained Ascending Colon (AC) patches from 20 CD patient and 30 healthy control samples at different scales, our approach achieved a superior Area under the Curve (AUC) score of 0.8924 compared with baseline models. The official implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/hrlblab/CS-MIL.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习（MIL）广泛应用于病理全切片图像（WSI）的计算机辅助解释，以解决像素级或补丁级注释的缺乏。通常，这种方法直接应用“自然图像驱动”MIL 算法，该算法忽略了 WSI 的多尺度（即金字塔）性质。现成的 MIL 算法通常部署在单尺度的 WSI（例如，20 倍放大倍数）上，而人类病理学家通常以多尺度的方式聚合全局和局部模式（例如，通过在不同放大倍数之间放大和缩小）。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的跨尺度注意力机制，可以将尺度间相互作用明确聚合到单个 MIL 网络中，用于治疗克罗恩病 (CD)，这是一种炎症性肠病。本文的贡献有两个：（1）提出了一种跨尺度注意力机制，通过多尺度交互聚合不同分辨率的特征； (2) 生成差分多尺度注意力可视化以定位可解释的病变模式。通过以不同规模训练来自 20 名 CD 患者和 30 名健康对照样本的约 250,000 个 H&E 染色的升结肠 (AC) 斑块，我们的方法与基线模型相比获得了 0.8924 的优异曲线下面积 (AUC) 分数。官方实现可在 https://github.com/hrlblab/CS-MIL 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨尺度注意力引导的多实例学习方法，用于病理图像中的克罗恩病诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有病理全切片图像（WSI）的多实例学习（MIL）方法通常忽略WSI的多尺度特性，而人类病理学家会通过不同倍数的缩放整合全局与局部信息。
AI.method: 设计跨尺度注意力机制，显式整合不同分辨率的特征交互，并生成差异化的多尺度注意力可视化以定位可解释的病变模式。
AI.result: 在20例克罗恩病患者和30例健康对照样本的25万张H&E染色升结肠图像上，该方法达到0.8924的AUC值，优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 跨尺度注意力机制有效捕捉了WSI的多尺度交互特征，提升了克罗恩病诊断性能并提供了可视化解释。

title: Learn2Trust: A video and streamlit-based educational programme for AI-based medical image analysis targeted towards medical students
title_zh: Learn2Trust：针对医学生的基于人工智能的医学图像分析的视频和基于流式传输的教育计划
abstract: In order to be able to use artificial intelligence (AI) in medicine without scepticism and to recognise and assess its growing potential, a basic understanding of this topic is necessary among current and future medical staff. Under the premise of "trust through understanding", we developed an innovative online course as a learning opportunity within the framework of the German KI Campus (AI campus) project, which is a self-guided course that teaches the basics of AI for the analysis of medical image data. The main goal is to provide a learning environment for a sufficient understanding of AI in medical image analysis so that further interest in this topic is stimulated and inhibitions towards its use can be overcome by means of positive application experience. The focus was on medical applications and the fundamentals of machine learning. The online course was divided into consecutive lessons, which include theory in the form of explanatory videos, practical exercises in the form of Streamlit and practical exercises and/or quizzes to check learning progress. A survey among the participating medical students in the first run of the course was used to analyse our research hypotheses quantitatively.

Under the premise of "trust through understanding", we developed an innovative online course as a learning opportunity within the framework of the German KI Campus (AI campus) project, which is a self-guided course that teaches the basics of AI for the analysis of medical image data. The main goal is to provide a learning environment for a sufficient understanding of AI in medical image analysis so that further interest in this topic is stimulated and inhibitions towards its use can be overcome by means of positive application experience. The focus was on medical applications and the fundamentals of machine learning. The online course was divided into consecutive lessons, which include theory in the form of explanatory videos, practical exercises in the form of Streamlit and practical exercises and/or quizzes to check learning progress. A survey among the participating medical students in the first run of the course was used to analyse our research hypotheses quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 为了能够毫无怀疑地在医学中使用人工智能 (AI)，并认识和评估其不断增长的潜力，当前和未来的医务人员必须对这一主题有基本的了解。在“信任通过理解”的前提下，我们在德国KI Campus（AI Campus）项目框架内开发了创新的在线课程作为学习机会，这是一门自学课程，讲授医学图像数据分析的人工智能基础知识。主要目标是为充分理解医学图像分析中的人工智能提供一个学习环境，从而激发对该主题的进一步兴趣，并通过积极的应用体验克服对其使用的抑制。重点是医疗应用和机器学习的基础知识。在线课程分为连续课程，其中包括讲解视频形式的理论、Streamlit 形式的实践练习以及用于检查学习进度的实践练习和/或测验。在第一轮课程中对参与医学生的调查用于定量分析我们的研究假设。

AI.tldr: 开发一个基于视频和Streamlit的在线教育项目，帮助医学生理解AI在医学图像分析中的应用，以建立信任并减少对其的怀疑。
AI.motivation: 为了使医疗人员能够信任并有效使用AI，需要他们具备AI在医学图像分析中的基本理解，从而克服对AI的疑虑。
AI.method: 通过分阶段的在线课程，结合视频讲解、Streamlit实践操作和测验，教授AI在医学图像分析中的基础理论和应用。
AI.result: 通过调查学生反馈，验证了课程在提升AI医学图像分析理解及信任度方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该课程有效提升了医学生对AI医学图像分析的理解和信任，为未来AI在医疗中的应用奠定了基础。

title: Task Oriented Video Coding: A Survey
title_zh: 面向任务的视频编码：调查
abstract: Video coding technology has been continuously improved for higher compression ratio with higher resolution. However, the state-of-the-art video coding standards, such as H.265/HEVC and Versatile Video Coding, are still designed with the assumption the compressed video will be watched by humans. With the tremendous advance and maturation of deep neural networks in solving computer vision tasks, more and more videos are directly analyzed by deep neural networks without humans' involvement. Such a conventional design for video coding standard is not optimal when the compressed video is used by computer vision applications. While the human visual system is consistently sensitive to the content with high contrast, the impact of pixels on computer vision algorithms is driven by specific computer vision tasks. In this paper, we explore and summarize recent progress on computer vision task oriented video coding and emerging video coding standard, Video Coding for Machines.
summary: Video coding technology has been continuously improved for higher compression ratio with higher resolution. However, the state-of-the-art video coding standards, such as H.265/HEVC and Versatile Video Coding, are still designed with the assumption the compressed video will be watched by humans. With the tremendous advance and maturation of deep neural networks in solving computer vision tasks, more and more videos are directly analyzed by deep neural networks without humans' involvement. Such a conventional design for video coding standard is not optimal when the compressed video is used by computer vision applications. While the human visual system is consistently sensitive to the content with high contrast, the impact of pixels on computer vision algorithms is driven by specific computer vision tasks. In this paper, we explore and summarize recent progress on computer vision task oriented video coding and emerging video coding standard, Video Coding for Machines.
abstract_zh: 视频编码技术不断改进，以实现更高的压缩比和更高分辨率。然而，最先进的视频编码标准，例如 H.265/HEVC 和通用视频编码，仍然是基于人类观看压缩视频的假设而设计的。随着深度神经网络在解决计算机视觉任务方面的巨大进步和成熟，越来越多的视频在无需人类参与的情况下直接由深度神经网络进行分析。当计算机视觉应用使用压缩视频时，这种视频编码标准的传统设计并不是最佳的。虽然人类视觉系统始终对高对比度的内容敏感，但像素对计算机视觉算法的影响是由特定的计算机视觉任务驱动的。在本文中，我们探讨并总结了面向计算机视觉任务的视频编码和新兴视频编码标准“机器视频编码”的最新进展。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了面向计算机视觉任务的视频编码技术进展及新兴标准Video Coding for Machines（VCM）的调研。
AI.motivation: 传统视频编码标准（如H.265/HEVC）基于人类视觉特性设计，但随着深度学习在计算机视觉任务中的广泛应用，传统编码方式无法满足机器对视频内容的特定需求。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和案例分析，总结面向任务的视频编码技术发展现状，并探讨新兴标准VCM的设计理念与实现方法。
AI.result: 明确了传统编码标准在计算机视觉任务中的局限性，梳理了任务导向编码的关键技术，并指出现阶段VCM等新兴标准的研究方向与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 面向任务的视频编码是未来视频压缩技术的重要方向，需结合具体应用需求优化编码策略，推动VCM等标准的成熟与落地。

authors_text: Alessio Sampieri,Guido D'Amely,Andrea Avogaro,Federico Cunico,Geri Skenderi,Francesco Setti,Marco Cristani,Fabio Galasso
title: Pose Forecasting in Industrial Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 工业人机协作中的姿势预测
abstract: Pushing back the frontiers of collaborative robots in industrial environments, we propose a new Separable-Sparse Graph Convolutional Network (SeS-GCN) for pose forecasting. For the first time, SeS-GCN bottlenecks the interaction of the spatial, temporal and channel-wise dimensions in GCNs, and it learns sparse adjacency matrices by a teacher-student framework. Compared to the state-of-the-art, it only uses 1.72% of the parameters and it is ~4 times faster, while still performing comparably in forecasting accuracy on Human3.6M at 1 second in the future, which enables cobots to be aware of human operators. As a second contribution, we present a new benchmark of Cobots and Humans in Industrial COllaboration (CHICO). CHICO includes multi-view videos, 3D poses and trajectories of 20 human operators and cobots, engaging in 7 realistic industrial actions. Additionally, it reports 226 genuine collisions, taking place during the human-cobot interaction. We test SeS-GCN on CHICO for two important perception tasks in robotics: human pose forecasting, where it reaches an average error of 85.3 mm (MPJPE) at 1 sec in the future with a run time of 2.3 msec, and collision detection, by comparing the forecasted human motion with the known cobot motion, obtaining an F1-score of 0.64.
summary: Pushing back the frontiers of collaborative robots in industrial environments, we propose a new Separable-Sparse Graph Convolutional Network (SeS-GCN) for pose forecasting. For the first time, SeS-GCN bottlenecks the interaction of the spatial, temporal and channel-wise dimensions in GCNs, and it learns sparse adjacency matrices by a teacher-student framework. Compared to the state-of-the-art, it only uses 1.72% of the parameters and it is ~4 times faster, while still performing comparably in forecasting accuracy on Human3.6M at 1 second in the future, which enables cobots to be aware of human operators. As a second contribution, we present a new benchmark of Cobots and Humans in Industrial COllaboration (CHICO). CHICO includes multi-view videos, 3D poses and trajectories of 20 human operators and cobots, engaging in 7 realistic industrial actions. Additionally, it reports 226 genuine collisions, taking place during the human-cobot interaction. We test SeS-GCN on CHICO for two important perception tasks in robotics: human pose forecasting, where it reaches an average error of 85.3 mm (MPJPE) at 1 sec in the future with a run time of 2.3 msec, and collision detection, by comparing the forecasted human motion with the known cobot motion, obtaining an F1-score of 0.64.
abstract_zh: 为了推动工业环境中协作机器人的前沿，我们提出了一种用于姿态预测的新的可分离稀疏图卷积网络（SeS-GCN）。 SeS-GCN 首次解决了 GCN 中空间、时间和通道维度相互作用的瓶颈，并通过师生框架学习稀疏邻接矩阵。与最先进的技术相比，它只使用了 1.72% 的参数，速度提高了约 4 倍，同时在未来 1 秒的 Human3.6M 上的预测精度仍具有相当的表现，这使得协作机器人能够意识到人类操作员。作为第二个贡献，我们提出了工业协作中协作机器人和人类 (CHICO) 的新基准。 CHICO 包括 20 名人类操作员和协作机器人的多视图视频、3D 姿势和轨迹，参与 7 种逼真的工业动作。此外，它还报告了人机交互过程中发生的 226 次真实碰撞。我们在 CHICO 上测试 SeS-GCN，用于机器人技术中的两个重要感知任务：人体姿势预测，在未来 1 秒内达到 85.3 毫米（MPJPE）的平均误差，运行时间为 2.3 毫秒；以及碰撞检测，通过将预测的人体运动与已知的协作机器人运动进行比较，获得 0.64 的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SeS-GCN的可分离稀疏图卷积网络用于工业人机协作中的姿态预测，并构建了一个名为CHICO的新基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 工业协作机器人需要准确预测人类操作员的姿态以避免碰撞并提升协作效率，但现有方法在参数量、速度和预测精度上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计SeS-GCN网络通过教师-学生框架学习稀疏邻接矩阵，压缩空间-时间-通道维度交互；构建包含多视角视频、3D姿态和轨迹的CHICO基准数据集，包含20名操作员与机械臂的7种工业动作及226次真实碰撞数据。
AI.result: SeS-GCN参数量仅为SOTA方法的1.72%，速度提升4倍，在Human3.6M数据集上1秒预测误差为85.3mm（MPJPE），CHICO数据集上姿态预测运行时长2.3毫秒，碰撞检测F1分数达0.64。
AI.conclusion: SeS-GCN通过高效网络结构和CHICO基准推动了工业人机协作中姿态预测与碰撞检测的研究，为安全高效的协作场景提供了新方法和评估标准。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SeS-GCN的可分离稀疏图卷积网络用于工业人机协作中的姿态预测，并构建了一个名为CHICO的新基准数据集。
ai_content.motivation: 工业协作机器人需要准确预测人类操作员的姿态以避免碰撞并提升协作效率，但现有方法在参数量、速度和预测精度上存在不足。
ai_content.method: 设计SeS-GCN网络通过教师-学生框架学习稀疏邻接矩阵，压缩空间-时间-通道维度交互；构建包含多视角视频、3D姿态和轨迹的CHICO基准数据集，包含20名操作员与机械臂的7种工业动作及226次真实碰撞数据。
ai_content.result: SeS-GCN参数量仅为SOTA方法的1.72%，速度提升4倍，在Human3.6M数据集上1秒预测误差为85.3mm（MPJPE），CHICO数据集上姿态预测运行时长2.3毫秒，碰撞检测F1分数达0.64。
ai_content.conclusion: SeS-GCN通过高效网络结构和CHICO基准推动了工业人机协作中姿态预测与碰撞检测的研究，为安全高效的协作场景提供了新方法和评估标准。

search_text: Pose Forecasting in Industrial Human-Robot Collaboration 工业人机协作中的姿势预测 Pushing back the frontiers of collaborative robots in industrial environments, we propose a new Separable-Sparse Graph Convolutional Network (SeS-GCN) for pose forecasting. For the first time, SeS-GCN bottlenecks the interaction of the spatial, temporal and channel-wise dimensions in GCNs, and it learns sparse adjacency matrices by a teacher-student framework. Compared to the state-of-the-art, it only uses 1.72% of the parameters and it is ~4 times faster, while still performing comparably in forecasting accuracy on Human3.6M at 1 second in the future, which enables cobots to be aware of human operators. As a second contribution, we present a new benchmark of Cobots and Humans in Industrial COllaboration (CHICO). CHICO includes multi-view videos, 3D poses and trajectories of 20 human operators and cobots, engaging in 7 realistic industrial actions. Additionally, it reports 226 genuine collisions, taking place during the human-cobot interaction. We test SeS-GCN on CHICO for two important perception tasks in robotics: human pose forecasting, where it reaches an average error of 85.3 mm (MPJPE) at 1 sec in the future with a run time of 2.3 msec, and collision detection, by comparing the forecasted human motion with the known cobot motion, obtaining an F1-score of 0.64. 为了推动工业环境中协作机器人的前沿，我们提出了一种用于姿态预测的新的可分离稀疏图卷积网络（SeS-GCN）。 SeS-GCN 首次解决了 GCN 中空间、时间和通道维度相互作用的瓶颈，并通过师生框架学习稀疏邻接矩阵。与最先进的技术相比，它只使用了 1.72% 的参数，速度提高了约 4 倍，同时在未来 1 秒的 Human3.6M 上的预测精度仍具有相当的表现，这使得协作机器人能够意识到人类操作员。作为第二个贡献，我们提出了工业协作中协作机器人和人类 (CHICO) 的新基准。 CHICO 包括 20 名人类操作员和协作机器人的多视图视频、3D 姿势和轨迹，参与 7 种逼真的工业动作。此外，它还报告了人机交互过程中发生的 226 次真实碰撞。我们在 CHICO 上测试 SeS-GCN，用于机器人技术中的两个重要感知任务：人体姿势预测，在未来 1 秒内达到 85.3 毫米（MPJPE）的平均误差，运行时间为 2.3 毫秒；以及碰撞检测，通过将预测的人体运动与已知的协作机器人运动进行比较，获得 0.64 的 F1 分数。 本文提出一种名为SeS-GCN的可分离稀疏图卷积网络用于工业人机协作中的姿态预测，并构建了一个名为CHICO的新基准数据集。 Alessio Sampieri,Guido D'Amely,Andrea Avogaro,Federico Cunico,Geri Skenderi,Francesco Setti,Marco Cristani,Fabio Galasso cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Towards Robust On-Ramp Merging via Augmented Multimodal Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过增强多模态强化学习实现稳健的匝道合并
abstract: Despite the success of AI-enabled onboard perception, on-ramp merging has been one of the main challenges for autonomous driving. Due to limited sensing range of onboard sensors, a merging vehicle can hardly observe main road conditions and merge properly. By leveraging the wireless communications between connected and automated vehicles (CAVs), a merging CAV has potential to proactively obtain the intentions of nearby vehicles. However, CAVs can be prone to inaccurate observations, such as the noisy basic safety messages (BSM) and poor quality surveillance images. In this paper, we present a novel approach for Robust on-ramp merge of CAVs via Augmented and Multi-modal Reinforcement Learning, named by RAMRL. Specifically, we formulate the on-ramp merging problem as a Markov decision process (MDP) by taking driving safety, comfort driving behavior, and traffic efficiency into account. To provide reliable merging maneuvers, we simultaneously leverage BSM and surveillance images for multi-modal observation, which is used to learn a policy model through proximal policy optimization (PPO). Moreover, to improve data efficiency and provide better generalization performance, we train the policy model with augmented data (e.g., noisy BSM and noisy surveillance images). Extensive experiments are conducted with Simulation of Urban MObility (SUMO) platform under two typical merging scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our robust on-ramp merging design.
summary: Despite the success of AI-enabled onboard perception, on-ramp merging has been one of the main challenges for autonomous driving. Due to limited sensing range of onboard sensors, a merging vehicle can hardly observe main road conditions and merge properly. By leveraging the wireless communications between connected and automated vehicles (CAVs), a merging CAV has potential to proactively obtain the intentions of nearby vehicles. However, CAVs can be prone to inaccurate observations, such as the noisy basic safety messages (BSM) and poor quality surveillance images. In this paper, we present a novel approach for Robust on-ramp merge of CAVs via Augmented and Multi-modal Reinforcement Learning, named by RAMRL. Specifically, we formulate the on-ramp merging problem as a Markov decision process (MDP) by taking driving safety, comfort driving behavior, and traffic efficiency into account. To provide reliable merging maneuvers, we simultaneously leverage BSM and surveillance images for multi-modal observation, which is used to learn a policy model through proximal policy optimization (PPO). Moreover, to improve data efficiency and provide better generalization performance, we train the policy model with augmented data (e.g., noisy BSM and noisy surveillance images). Extensive experiments are conducted with Simulation of Urban MObility (SUMO) platform under two typical merging scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our robust on-ramp merging design.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能车载感知取得了成功，但匝道并道一直是自动驾驶面临的主要挑战之一。由于车载传感器感应范围有限，合道车辆很难观察主路情况并正确合道。通过利用联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 之间的无线通信，合并 CAV 有可能主动获取附近车辆的意图。然而，CAV 可能容易出现不准确的观察，例如嘈杂的基本安全信息 (BSM) 和质量差的监控图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过增强和多模态强化学习实现 CAV 鲁棒入口匝道合并的新方法，命名为 RAMRL。具体来说，我们通过考虑驾驶安全性、舒适性驾驶行为和交通效率，将入口匝道合并问题制定为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。为了提供可靠的合并操作，我们同时利用 BSM 和监视图像进行多模态观察，用于通过近端策略优化 (PPO) 来学习策略模型。此外，为了提高数据效率并提供更好的泛化性能，我们使用增强数据（例如，噪声 BSM 和噪声监控图像）来训练策略模型。在两种典型的合并场景下，利用城市交通模拟（SUMO）平台进行了广泛的实验。实验结果证明了我们稳健的入口匝道合流设计的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于增强多模态强化学习（RAMRL）的鲁棒性匝道汇入方法，通过融合车载传感器与通信数据提升自动驾驶车辆的汇入性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆因传感器感知范围有限，难以准确获取主路交通状态，且通信数据存在噪声和图像质量差等问题，导致匝道汇入决策存在挑战。
AI.method: 将汇入问题建模为考虑安全、舒适性与效率的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），结合BSM消息与监控图像多模态观测，采用PPO算法训练策略模型，并通过噪声数据增强提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SUMO平台的两种典型场景实验中，RAMRL方法在汇入成功率、交通效率及鲁棒性指标上均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: RAMRL通过多模态数据融合与数据增强技术，有效提升了复杂环境下自动驾驶车辆的匝道汇入能力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Introducing RISK
title_zh: 风险介绍
comment: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjunction with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages Pages 1284-1286
comments: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjunction with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages Pages 1284-1286
abstract: This extended abstract introduces the initial steps taken to develop a system for Rapid Internal Simulation of Knowledge (RISK). RISK aims to enable more transparency in artificial intelligence systems, especially those created by deep learning networks by allowing real-time simulation of what the system knows. By looking at hypothetical situations based on these simulations a system may make more informed decisions, and produce them for non-expert observers to understand the reasoning behind a given action.
summary: This extended abstract introduces the initial steps taken to develop a system for Rapid Internal Simulation of Knowledge (RISK). RISK aims to enable more transparency in artificial intelligence systems, especially those created by deep learning networks by allowing real-time simulation of what the system knows. By looking at hypothetical situations based on these simulations a system may make more informed decisions, and produce them for non-expert observers to understand the reasoning behind a given action.
abstract_zh: 此扩展摘要介绍了开发知识快速内部模拟 (RISK) 系统所采取的初始步骤。 RISK 旨在通过允许实时模拟系统所知道的内容，提高人工智能系统的透明度，特别是那些由深度学习网络创建的系统。通过查看基于这些模拟的假设情况，系统可以做出更明智的决策，并为非专家观察者提供决策，以了解给定操作背后的推理。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RISK系统的初步开发，旨在通过实时模拟人工智能系统的知识来提高其透明度，特别是深度学习网络的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能系统，尤其是深度学习模型，其决策过程缺乏透明度，导致非专家难以理解其推理依据。
AI.method: 构建快速内部知识模拟框架，通过实时模拟系统知识并生成假设情境以辅助决策解释。
AI.result: 初步验证了RISK系统在模拟知识和生成可解释决策方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: RISK为提升AI透明度提供了新方法，未来需进一步优化模拟精度与应用场景。

tldr: 本文介绍了RISK系统的初步开发，旨在通过实时模拟人工智能系统的知识来提高其透明度，特别是深度学习网络的决策过程。
motivation: 当前人工智能系统，尤其是深度学习模型，其决策过程缺乏透明度，导致非专家难以理解其推理依据。
method: 构建快速内部知识模拟框架，通过实时模拟系统知识并生成假设情境以辅助决策解释。
result: 初步验证了RISK系统在模拟知识和生成可解释决策方面的可行性。
conclusion: RISK为提升AI透明度提供了新方法，未来需进一步优化模拟精度与应用场景。
search_text: Introducing RISK 风险介绍 This extended abstract introduces the initial steps taken to develop a system for Rapid Internal Simulation of Knowledge (RISK). RISK aims to enable more transparency in artificial intelligence systems, especially those created by deep learning networks by allowing real-time simulation of what the system knows. By looking at hypothetical situations based on these simulations a system may make more informed decisions, and produce them for non-expert observers to understand the reasoning behind a given action. 此扩展摘要介绍了开发知识快速内部模拟 (RISK) 系统所采取的初始步骤。 RISK 旨在通过允许实时模拟系统所知道的内容，提高人工智能系统的透明度，特别是那些由深度学习网络创建的系统。通过查看基于这些模拟的假设情况，系统可以做出更明智的决策，并为非专家观察者提供决策，以了解给定操作背后的推理。 本文介绍了RISK系统的初步开发，旨在通过实时模拟人工智能系统的知识来提高其透明度，特别是深度学习网络的决策过程。 Christopher D. Wallbridge,Qiyuan Zhang cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC

title: Vehicle-road Cooperative Simulation and 3D Visualization System
title_zh: 车路协同仿真及3D可视化系统
abstract: The safety of single-vehicle autonomous driving technology is limited due to the limits of perception capability of on-board sensors. In contrast, vehicle-road collaboration technology can overcome those limits and improve the traffic safety and efficiency, by expanding the sensing range, improving the perception accuracy, and reducing the response time. However, such a technology is still under development; it requires rigorous testing and verification methods to ensure the reliability and trustworthiness of the technology. In this thesis, we focus on three major tasks: (1) analyze the functional characteristics related to the scenarios of vehicle-road cooperations, highlightening the differences between vehicle-road cooperative systems and traditional single-vehicle autonomous driving systems; (2) refine and classifiy the functional characteristics of vehicle-road cooperative systems; (3) design and develop a simulation system, and provide a visual interface to facilitate development and analysis. The efficiency and effectiveness the proposed method are verfied by experiments.
summary: The safety of single-vehicle autonomous driving technology is limited due to the limits of perception capability of on-board sensors. In contrast, vehicle-road collaboration technology can overcome those limits and improve the traffic safety and efficiency, by expanding the sensing range, improving the perception accuracy, and reducing the response time. However, such a technology is still under development; it requires rigorous testing and verification methods to ensure the reliability and trustworthiness of the technology. In this thesis, we focus on three major tasks: (1) analyze the functional characteristics related to the scenarios of vehicle-road cooperations, highlightening the differences between vehicle-road cooperative systems and traditional single-vehicle autonomous driving systems; (2) refine and classifiy the functional characteristics of vehicle-road cooperative systems; (3) design and develop a simulation system, and provide a visual interface to facilitate development and analysis. The efficiency and effectiveness the proposed method are verfied by experiments.
abstract_zh: 由于车载传感器感知能力的限制，单车自动驾驶技术的安全性受到限制。相比之下，车路协同技术可以通过扩大感知范围、提高感知精度、缩短响应时间来克服这些限制，提高交通安全和效率。然而，这样的技术仍在开发中；它需要严格的测试和验证方法来确保技术的可靠性和可信度。本论文主要完成三项工作：（1）分析车路协同场景相关的功能特征，突出车路协同系统与传统单车自动驾驶系统的差异； (2)对车路协同系统的功能特征进行细化和分类； (3)设计开发仿真系统，并提供可视化界面，方便开发和分析。通过实验验证了该方法的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦于构建车路协同仿真与三维可视化系统，通过分析场景功能特征、分类系统特性并开发仿真平台，验证方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 单车自动驾驶技术因传感器感知能力有限存在安全隐患，而车路协同技术可通过扩展感知范围、提升精度和响应速度来增强交通安全与效率，但需可靠测试方法确保其可信度。
AI.method: 分析车路协同场景的功能特性差异，分类系统功能特征，并设计开发包含可视化界面的仿真系统以支持开发与分析。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在效率和效果上的可行性，证明了仿真系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的仿真与可视化系统为车路协同技术的开发与验证提供了工具支持，有助于推动更安全高效的交通系统建设。

title: A Simulation Study of Passing Drivers' Responses to the Autonomous Truck-Mounted Attenuator System in Road Maintenance
title_zh: 道路养护中过往驾驶员对自动车载衰减器系统反应的仿真研究
comment: Accepted by TRR journal on Nov 21th
comments: Accepted by TRR journal on Nov 21th
abstract: The Autonomous Truck-Mounted Attenuator (ATMA) system is a lead-follower vehicle system based on autonomous driving and connected vehicle technologies. The lead truck performs maintenance tasks on the road, and the unmanned follower truck alerts passing vehicles about the moving work zone and protects workers and the equipment. While the ATMA has been under testing by transportation maintenance and operations agencies recently, a simulator-based testing capability is a supplement, especially if human subjects are involved. This paper aims to discover how passing drivers perceive, understand, and react to the ATMA system in road maintenance. With the driving simulator developed for this ATMA study, the paper performed a simulation study wherein a screen-based eye tracker collected sixteen subjects' gaze points and pupil diameters. Data analysis evidenced the change in subjects' visual attention patterns while passing the ATMA. On average, the ATMA starts to attract subjects' attention from 500 ft behind the follower truck. Most (87.50%) understood the follower truck's protection purpose, and many (60%) reasoned the association between the two trucks. Nevertheless, nearly half of the participants (43.75%) did not recognize that ATMA is a connected autonomous vehicle system. While all subjects safely changed lanes and attempted to pass the slow-moving ATMA, their inadequate understanding of the ATMA is a potential risk, like cutting into the ATAM. Results implied that transportation maintenance and operations agencies should consider this in establishing the deployment guidance.

This paper aims to discover how passing drivers perceive, understand, and react to the ATMA system in road maintenance. Data analysis evidenced the change in subjects' visual attention patterns while passing the ATMA. On average, the ATMA starts to attract subjects' attention from 500 ft behind the follower truck. Most (87.50%) understood the follower truck's protection purpose, and many (60%) reasoned the association between the two trucks. Nevertheless, nearly half of the participants (43.75%) did not recognize that ATMA is a connected autonomous vehicle system. While all subjects safely changed lanes and attempted to pass the slow-moving ATMA, their inadequate understanding of the ATMA is a potential risk, like cutting into the ATAM. abstract_zh: 自动卡车安装衰减器（ATMA）系统是基于自动驾驶和车联网技术的引导-跟随车辆系统。领头卡车在道路上执行维护任务，无人跟随卡车向过往车辆发出有关移动工作区域的警报，并保护工人和设备。虽然 ATMA 最近一直在接受运输维护和运营机构的测试，但基于模拟器的测试能力是一种补充，特别是在涉及人类受试者的情况下。本文旨在了解过往驾驶员在道路维护中如何感知、理解 ATMA 系统并做出反应。该论文利用为此 ATMA 研究开发的驾驶模拟器进行了一项模拟研究，其中基于屏幕的眼动仪收集了 16 个受试者的注视点和瞳孔直径。数据分析证明了受试者在通过 ATMA 时视觉注意力模式的变化。平均而言，ATMA 从跟随卡车后面 500 英尺处开始吸引受试者的注意力。大多数人（87.50%）了解跟随卡车的保护目的，许多人（60%）推理了两辆卡车之间的关联。尽管如此，近一半的参与者（43.75%）并未认识到 ATMA 是一个联网的自动驾驶汽车系统。虽然所有受试者都安全地改变了车道并试图通过缓慢移动的 ATMA，但他们对 ATMA 的了解不足是一个潜在的风险，比如切入 ATMA。结果表明，运输维护和运营机构在制定部署指南时应考虑这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过模拟实验研究驾驶者对道路维护中自主卡车-mounted衰减器系统（ATMA）的反应。
AI.motivation: 尽管ATMA系统正在测试中，但需通过模拟器补充测试以了解人类驾驶员对其的感知与反应，确保工作区安全。
AI.method: 开发驾驶模拟器，使用基于屏幕的眼动仪收集16名受试者的注视点和瞳孔数据，分析视觉注意模式及理解程度。
AI.result: 受试者平均在跟随卡车后500英尺开始注意ATMA，87.5%理解其保护作用，但43.75%未识别其为联网自动驾驶系统，存在潜在风险。
AI.conclusion: 运输维护机构需在部署指南中考虑驾驶员对ATMA认知不足的问题，以降低安全风险。

title: Elderly Fall Detection Using CCTV Cameras under Partial Occlusion of the Subjects Body
title_zh: 在受试者身体部分遮挡的情况下使用闭路电视摄像机检测老年人跌倒
abstract: One of the possible dangers that older people face in their daily lives is falling. Occlusion is one of the biggest challenges of vision-based fall detection systems and degrades their detection performance considerably. To tackle this problem, we synthesize specifically-designed occluded videos for training fall detection systems using existing datasets. Then, by defining a new cost function, we introduce a framework for weighted training of fall detection models using occluded and un-occluded videos, which can be applied to any learnable fall detection system. Finally, we use both a non-deep and deep model to evaluate the effect of the proposed weighted training method. Experiments show that the proposed method can improve the classification accuracy by 36% for a non-deep model and 55% for a deep model in occlusion conditions. Moreover, it is shown that the proposed training framework can also significantly improve the detection performance of a deep network on normal un-occluded samples.
summary: One of the possible dangers that older people face in their daily lives is falling. Occlusion is one of the biggest challenges of vision-based fall detection systems and degrades their detection performance considerably. To tackle this problem, we synthesize specifically-designed occluded videos for training fall detection systems using existing datasets. Then, by defining a new cost function, we introduce a framework for weighted training of fall detection models using occluded and un-occluded videos, which can be applied to any learnable fall detection system. Finally, we use both a non-deep and deep model to evaluate the effect of the proposed weighted training method. Experiments show that the proposed method can improve the classification accuracy by 36% for a non-deep model and 55% for a deep model in occlusion conditions. Moreover, it is shown that the proposed training framework can also significantly improve the detection performance of a deep network on normal un-occluded samples.
abstract_zh: 老年人在日常生活中可能面临的危险之一就是跌倒。遮挡是基于视觉的跌倒检测系统的最大挑战之一，并大大降低了其检测性能。为了解决这个问题，我们使用现有数据集合成专门设计的遮挡视频来训练跌倒检测系统。然后，通过定义新的成本函数，我们引入了一个使用遮挡和未遮挡视频对跌倒检测模型进行加权训练的框架，该框架可应用于任何可学习的跌倒检测系统。最后，我们使用非深度和深度模型来评估所提出的加权训练方法的效果。实验表明，在遮挡条件下，该方法可以将非深度模型的分类精度提高36%，将深度模型的分类精度提高55%。此外，结果表明，所提出的训练框架还可以显着提高深度网络对正常未遮挡样本的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在部分遮挡情况下利用CCTV摄像头检测老年人跌倒的方法，通过合成遮挡视频和加权训练框架提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的跌倒检测系统在遮挡条件下性能显著下降，亟需有效解决方案以提高对老年人跌倒的识别准确率。
AI.method: 合成特定遮挡视频用于训练，定义新成本函数构建加权训练框架，并在非深度学习和深度学习模型上验证效果。
AI.result: 遮挡条件下非深度模型准确率提升36%，深度模型提升55%；框架对正常样本检测性能也有显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 所提加权训练方法有效缓解遮挡问题，适用于各类跌倒检测模型，且在遮挡与非遮挡场景均表现优异。
