title: Differentiable WORLD Synthesizer-based Neural Vocoder With Application To End-To-End Audio Style Transfer
title_zh: 基于可微分 WORLD 合成器的神经声码器，应用于端到端音频风格传输
comment: A revised version of this work has been accepted to the 154th AES Convention. To cite this work, please refer to the AES manuscript available at https://www.aes.org/e-lib/browse.cfm?elib=22073 ; 12 pages, 4 figures
comments: A revised version of this work has been accepted to the 154th AES Convention. To cite this work, please refer to the AES manuscript available at https://www.aes.org/e-lib/browse.cfm?elib=22073 ; 12 pages, 4 figures
abstract: In this paper, we propose a differentiable WORLD synthesizer and demonstrate its use in end-to-end audio style transfer tasks such as (singing) voice conversion and the DDSP timbre transfer task. Accordingly, our baseline differentiable synthesizer has no model parameters, yet it yields adequate synthesis quality. We can extend the baseline synthesizer by appending lightweight black-box postnets which apply further processing to the baseline output in order to improve fidelity. An alternative differentiable approach considers extraction of the source excitation spectrum directly, which can improve naturalness albeit for a narrower class of style transfer applications. The acoustic feature parameterization used by our approaches has the added benefit that it naturally disentangles pitch and timbral information so that they can be modeled separately. Moreover, as there exists a robust means of estimating these acoustic features from monophonic audio sources, it allows for parameter loss terms to be added to an end-to-end objective function, which can help convergence and/or further stabilize (adversarial) training.
summary: In this paper, we propose a differentiable WORLD synthesizer and demonstrate its use in end-to-end audio style transfer tasks such as (singing) voice conversion and the DDSP timbre transfer task. Accordingly, our baseline differentiable synthesizer has no model parameters, yet it yields adequate synthesis quality. We can extend the baseline synthesizer by appending lightweight black-box postnets which apply further processing to the baseline output in order to improve fidelity. An alternative differentiable approach considers extraction of the source excitation spectrum directly, which can improve naturalness albeit for a narrower class of style transfer applications. The acoustic feature parameterization used by our approaches has the added benefit that it naturally disentangles pitch and timbral information so that they can be modeled separately. Moreover, as there exists a robust means of estimating these acoustic features from monophonic audio sources, it allows for parameter loss terms to be added to an end-to-end objective function, which can help convergence and/or further stabilize (adversarial) training.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种可微分的 WORLD 合成器，并演示了其在端到端音频风格传输任务中的使用，例如（唱歌）语音转换和 DDSP 音色传输任务。因此，我们的基线可微分合成器没有模型参数，但它产生了足够的合成质量。我们可以通过附加轻量级黑盒后网络来扩展基线合成器，这些后网络对基线输出进行进一步处理以提高保真度。另一种可微分方法考虑直接提取源激励光谱，这可以提高自然度，尽管对于较窄类别的风格迁移应用。我们的方法使用的声学特征参数化具有额外的好处，它可以自然地解开音调和音色信息，以便可以单独对它们进行建模。此外，由于存在一种从单声道音频源估计这些声学特征的强大方法，因此它允许将参数损失项添加到端到端目标函数中，这可以帮助收敛和/或进一步稳定（对抗性）训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无参数的可微分WORLD合成器，并将其应用于端到端音频风格迁移任务，如语音转换和音色迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有音频风格迁移方法在参数效率与自然度之间存在权衡，需探索更高效的声学特征建模方式以分离音高与音色信息。
AI.method: 设计无参数基线合成器并扩展轻量级后处理网络；通过直接提取声源激励谱提升自然度；利用分离的音高/音色参数化特征构建端到端损失函数。
AI.result: 基线合成器实现足够质量，后处理网络提升保真度，直接激励谱方法增强自然度但适用性受限，参数化特征有效稳定训练过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为音频风格迁移提供高效可微框架，分离的声学特征参数化有助于独立建模并提升训练稳定性。

title: Debiased Recommendation with Neural Stratification
title_zh: 神经分层的去偏推荐
abstract: Debiased recommender models have recently attracted increasing attention from the academic and industry communities. Existing models are mostly based on the technique of inverse propensity score (IPS). However, in the recommendation domain, IPS can be hard to estimate given the sparse and noisy nature of the observed user-item exposure data. To alleviate this problem, in this paper, we assume that the user preference can be dominated by a small amount of latent factors, and propose to cluster the users for computing more accurate IPS via increasing the exposure densities. Basically, such method is similar with the spirit of stratification models in applied statistics. However, unlike previous heuristic stratification strategy, we learn the cluster criterion by presenting the users with low ranking embeddings, which are future shared with the user representations in the recommender model. At last, we find that our model has strong connections with the previous two types of debiased recommender models. We conduct extensive experiments based on real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Debiased recommender models have recently attracted increasing attention from the academic and industry communities. Existing models are mostly based on the technique of inverse propensity score (IPS). However, in the recommendation domain, IPS can be hard to estimate given the sparse and noisy nature of the observed user-item exposure data. To alleviate this problem, in this paper, we assume that the user preference can be dominated by a small amount of latent factors, and propose to cluster the users for computing more accurate IPS via increasing the exposure densities. Basically, such method is similar with the spirit of stratification models in applied statistics. However, unlike previous heuristic stratification strategy, we learn the cluster criterion by presenting the users with low ranking embeddings, which are future shared with the user representations in the recommender model. At last, we find that our model has strong connections with the previous two types of debiased recommender models. We conduct extensive experiments based on real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，去偏推荐模型越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。现有的模型大多基于逆倾向评分（IPS）技术。然而，在推荐领域，鉴于观察到的用户项目暴露数据的稀疏性和噪声性质，IPS 可能很难估计。为了缓解这个问题，在本文中，我们假设用户偏好可以由少量潜在因素主导，并提出通过增加曝光密度来对用户进行聚类以计算更准确的IPS。基本上，这种方法与应用统计学中的分层模型的精神相似。然而，与之前的启发式分层策略不同，我们通过向用户提供低排名嵌入来学习聚类标准，这些嵌入将来与推荐模型中的用户表示共享。最后，我们发现我们的模型与前两种类型的去偏推荐模型有很强的联系。我们基于真实世界的数据集进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经分层的去偏推荐方法，通过用户聚类提升逆倾向得分（IPS）估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏推荐模型依赖逆倾向得分（IPS），但推荐领域中用户-物品曝光数据稀疏且噪声大，导致IPS估计困难。
AI.method: 假设用户偏好由少量潜在因子主导，通过聚类用户并利用低排名嵌入（与推荐模型共享用户表示）计算更精确的IPS，实现神经分层。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，且发现其与两类现有去偏模型存在强关联。
AI.conclusion: 神经分层策略通过用户聚类优化IPS估计，为解决推荐系统中的数据稀疏性问题提供了新思路。

search_text: Debiased Recommendation with Neural Stratification 神经分层的去偏推荐 Debiased recommender models have recently attracted increasing attention from the academic and industry communities. Existing models are mostly based on the technique of inverse propensity score (IPS). However, in the recommendation domain, IPS can be hard to estimate given the sparse and noisy nature of the observed user-item exposure data. To alleviate this problem, in this paper, we assume that the user preference can be dominated by a small amount of latent factors, and propose to cluster the users for computing more accurate IPS via increasing the exposure densities. Basically, such method is similar with the spirit of stratification models in applied statistics. However, unlike previous heuristic stratification strategy, we learn the cluster criterion by presenting the users with low ranking embeddings, which are future shared with the user representations in the recommender model. At last, we find that our model has strong connections with the previous two types of debiased recommender models. We conduct extensive experiments based on real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 近年来，去偏推荐模型越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。现有的模型大多基于逆倾向评分（IPS）技术。然而，在推荐领域，鉴于观察到的用户项目暴露数据的稀疏性和噪声性质，IPS 可能很难估计。为了缓解这个问题，在本文中，我们假设用户偏好可以由少量潜在因素主导，并提出通过增加曝光密度来对用户进行聚类以计算更准确的IPS。基本上，这种方法与应用统计学中的分层模型的精神相似。然而，与之前的启发式分层策略不同，我们通过向用户提供低排名嵌入来学习聚类标准，这些嵌入将来与推荐模型中的用户表示共享。最后，我们发现我们的模型与前两种类型的去偏推荐模型有很强的联系。我们基于真实世界的数据集进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于神经分层的去偏推荐方法，通过用户聚类提升逆倾向得分（IPS）估计的准确性。 Quanyu Dai,Zhenhua Dong,Xu Chen cs.IR,cs.AI

title: LCSM: A Lightweight Complex Spectral Mapping Framework for Stereophonic Acoustic Echo Cancellation
title_zh: LCSM：用于立体声回声消除的轻量级复杂频谱映射框架
abstract: The traditional adaptive algorithms will face the non-uniqueness problem when dealing with stereophonic acoustic echo cancellation (SAEC). In this paper, we first propose an efficient multi-input and multi-output (MIMO) scheme based on deep learning to filter out echoes from all microphone signals at once. Then, we employ a lightweight complex spectral mapping framework (LCSM) for end-to-end SAEC without decorrelation preprocessing to the loudspeaker signals. Inplace convolution and channel-wise spatial modeling are utilized to ensure the near-end signal information is preserved. Finally, a cross-domain loss function is designed for better generalization capability. Experiments are evaluated on a variety of untrained conditions and results demonstrate that the LCSM significantly outperforms previous methods. Moreover, the proposed causal framework only has 0.55 million parameters, much less than the similar deep learning-based methods, which is important for the resource-limited devices.
summary: The traditional adaptive algorithms will face the non-uniqueness problem when dealing with stereophonic acoustic echo cancellation (SAEC). In this paper, we first propose an efficient multi-input and multi-output (MIMO) scheme based on deep learning to filter out echoes from all microphone signals at once. Then, we employ a lightweight complex spectral mapping framework (LCSM) for end-to-end SAEC without decorrelation preprocessing to the loudspeaker signals. Inplace convolution and channel-wise spatial modeling are utilized to ensure the near-end signal information is preserved. Finally, a cross-domain loss function is designed for better generalization capability. Experiments are evaluated on a variety of untrained conditions and results demonstrate that the LCSM significantly outperforms previous methods. Moreover, the proposed causal framework only has 0.55 million parameters, much less than the similar deep learning-based methods, which is important for the resource-limited devices.
abstract_zh: 传统的自适应算法在处理立体声回声消除(SAEC)时会面临非唯一性问题。在本文中，我们首先提出一种基于深度学习的高效多输入多输出（MIMO）方案，以一次性滤除所有麦克风信号中的回声。然后，我们采用轻量级复杂频谱映射框架（LCSM）进行端到端 SAEC，无需对扬声器信号进行去相关预处理。利用就地卷积和通道空间建模来确保保留近端信号信息。最后，设计了跨域损失函数以获得更好的泛化能力。在各种未经训练的条件下对实验进行了评估，结果表明 LCSM 显着优于以前的方法。此外，所提出的因果框架只有 55 万个参数，远少于类似的基于深度学习的方法，这对于资源有限的设备来说非常重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级复杂频谱映射框架LCSM，用于解决立体声声学回声消除中的非唯一性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应算法在立体声回声消除中存在非唯一性问题，而现有深度学习方法参数量大，难以适配资源受限设备。
AI.method: 设计基于深度学习的多输入多输出（MIMO）方案，结合轻量级复杂频谱映射框架（LCSM），采用in-place卷积和通道级空间建模保留近端信号信息，并引入跨域损失函数提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明LCSM在多种未训练条件下显著优于现有方法，且参数量仅0.55百万，适合资源受限设备部署。
AI.conclusion: LCSM通过轻量化设计和端到端框架有效解决了立体声回声消除问题，在性能和效率上均优于现有方法。

authors_text: Chia Hong Tseng,Jie Zhang,Min-Te Sun,Kazuya Sakai,Wei-Shinn Ku
title: Multi-modal Transformer Path Prediction for Autonomous Vehicle
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的多模态变压器路径预测
abstract: Reasoning about vehicle path prediction is an essential and challenging problem for the safe operation of autonomous driving systems. There exist many research works for path prediction. However, most of them do not use lane information and are not based on the Transformer architecture. By utilizing different types of data collected from sensors equipped on the self-driving vehicles, we propose a path prediction system named Multi-modal Transformer Path Prediction (MTPP) that aims to predict long-term future trajectory of target agents. To achieve more accurate path prediction, the Transformer architecture is adopted in our model. To better utilize the lane information, the lanes which are in opposite direction to target agent are not likely to be taken by the target agent and are consequently filtered out. In addition, consecutive lane chunks are combined to ensure the lane input to be long enough for path prediction. An extensive evaluation is conducted to show the efficacy of the proposed system using nuScene, a real-world trajectory forecasting dataset.
summary: Reasoning about vehicle path prediction is an essential and challenging problem for the safe operation of autonomous driving systems. There exist many research works for path prediction. However, most of them do not use lane information and are not based on the Transformer architecture. By utilizing different types of data collected from sensors equipped on the self-driving vehicles, we propose a path prediction system named Multi-modal Transformer Path Prediction (MTPP) that aims to predict long-term future trajectory of target agents. To achieve more accurate path prediction, the Transformer architecture is adopted in our model. To better utilize the lane information, the lanes which are in opposite direction to target agent are not likely to be taken by the target agent and are consequently filtered out. In addition, consecutive lane chunks are combined to ensure the lane input to be long enough for path prediction. An extensive evaluation is conducted to show the efficacy of the proposed system using nuScene, a real-world trajectory forecasting dataset.
abstract_zh: 车辆路径预测的推理是自动驾驶系统安全运行的一个重要且具有挑战性的问题。已有许多关于路径预测的研究工作。然而，它们大多数不使用车道信息，也不基于 Transformer 架构。通过利用自动驾驶车辆上配备的传感器收集的不同类型的数据，我们提出了一种名为多模态变压器路径预测（MTPP）的路径预测系统，旨在预测目标代理的长期未来轨迹。为了实现更准确的路径预测，我们的模型采用了 Transformer 架构。为了更好地利用车道信息，与目标代理方向相反的车道不太可能被目标代理占用，从而被过滤掉。此外，连续的车道块被组合起来，以确保车道输入足够长以进行路径预测。使用真实世界轨迹预测数据集 nuScene 进行了广泛的评估，以显示所提出系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态数据和Transformer架构的自动驾驶车辆路径预测系统MTPP，用于预测目标车辆的长期轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有路径预测方法大多未有效利用车道信息且未采用Transformer架构，导致预测准确性不足。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构处理传感器数据，过滤反向车道并合并连续车道片段以增强车道信息输入。
AI.result: 在nuScene数据集上的实验验证了MTPP系统在路径预测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合Transformer架构与优化后的车道信息处理方法，MTPP系统显著提升了自动驾驶场景下的路径预测性能。

title: Predicting Pedestrian Crosswalk Behavior Using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络预测行人斑马线行为
abstract: A common yet potentially dangerous task is the act of crossing the street. Pedestrian accidents contribute a significant amount to the high number of annual traffic casualties, which is why it is crucial for pedestrians to use safety measures such as a crosswalk. However, people often forget to activate a crosswalk light or are unable to do so -- such as those who are visually impaired or have occupied hands. Other pedestrians are simply careless and find the crosswalk signals a hassle, which can result in an accident where a car hits them. In this paper, we consider an improvement to the crosswalk system by designing a system that can detect pedestrians and triggering the crosswalk signal automatically. We collect a dataset of images that we then use to train a convolutional neural network to distinguish between pedestrians (including bicycle riders) and various false alarms. The resulting system can capture and evaluate images in real time, and the result can be used to automatically activate systems a crosswalk light. After extensive testing of our system in real-world environments, we conclude that it is feasible as a back-up system that can compliment existing crosswalk buttons, and thereby improve the overall safety of crossing the street.
summary: A common yet potentially dangerous task is the act of crossing the street. Pedestrian accidents contribute a significant amount to the high number of annual traffic casualties, which is why it is crucial for pedestrians to use safety measures such as a crosswalk. However, people often forget to activate a crosswalk light or are unable to do so -- such as those who are visually impaired or have occupied hands. Other pedestrians are simply careless and find the crosswalk signals a hassle, which can result in an accident where a car hits them. In this paper, we consider an improvement to the crosswalk system by designing a system that can detect pedestrians and triggering the crosswalk signal automatically. We collect a dataset of images that we then use to train a convolutional neural network to distinguish between pedestrians (including bicycle riders) and various false alarms. The resulting system can capture and evaluate images in real time, and the result can be used to automatically activate systems a crosswalk light. After extensive testing of our system in real-world environments, we conclude that it is feasible as a back-up system that can compliment existing crosswalk buttons, and thereby improve the overall safety of crossing the street.
abstract_zh: 过马路是一项常见但具有潜在危险的任务。行人事故是每年造成大量交通伤亡的重要原因，因此行人使用人行横道等安全措施至关重要。然而，人们经常忘记激活人行横道灯或无法这样做——例如那些视力障碍或双手被占用的人。其他行人只是粗心，发现人行横道信号很麻烦，这可能会导致汽车撞上他们的事故。在本文中，我们考虑通过设计一个可以检测行人并自动触发人行横道信号的系统来改进人行横道系统。我们收集图像数据集，然后用它来训练卷积神经网络来区分行人（包括骑自行车的人）和各种误报。由此产生的系统可以实时捕获和评估图像，其结果可用于自动激活人行横道灯系统。经过在现实环境中对我们的系统进行广泛测试后，我们得出的结论是，它作为备用系统是可行的，可以补充现有的人行横道按钮，从而提高过马路的整体安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计基于卷积神经网络的系统，通过实时检测行人自动触发人行横道信号，提升过街安全。
AI.motivation: 行人事故是交通伤亡主因，现有横道按钮存在使用障碍（如视障、双手占用）及人为忽视问题，需自动化辅助方案。
AI.method: 构建图像数据集训练卷积神经网络，区分行人（含骑行者）与误报，实现实时图像识别与横道信号自动触发。
AI.result: 实际测试验证系统可行性，可作为现有横道按钮的补充方案，有效降低事故风险。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能提升横道使用安全性，建议作为传统设施的智能辅助方案推广实施。

search_text: Predicting Pedestrian Crosswalk Behavior Using Convolutional Neural Networks 使用卷积神经网络预测行人斑马线行为 A common yet potentially dangerous task is the act of crossing the street. Pedestrian accidents contribute a significant amount to the high number of annual traffic casualties, which is why it is crucial for pedestrians to use safety measures such as a crosswalk. However, people often forget to activate a crosswalk light or are unable to do so -- such as those who are visually impaired or have occupied hands. Other pedestrians are simply careless and find the crosswalk signals a hassle, which can result in an accident where a car hits them. In this paper, we consider an improvement to the crosswalk system by designing a system that can detect pedestrians and triggering the crosswalk signal automatically. We collect a dataset of images that we then use to train a convolutional neural network to distinguish between pedestrians (including bicycle riders) and various false alarms. The resulting system can capture and evaluate images in real time, and the result can be used to automatically activate systems a crosswalk light. After extensive testing of our system in real-world environments, we conclude that it is feasible as a back-up system that can compliment existing crosswalk buttons, and thereby improve the overall safety of crossing the street. 过马路是一项常见但具有潜在危险的任务。行人事故是每年造成大量交通伤亡的重要原因，因此行人使用人行横道等安全措施至关重要。然而，人们经常忘记激活人行横道灯或无法这样做——例如那些视力障碍或双手被占用的人。其他行人只是粗心，发现人行横道信号很麻烦，这可能会导致汽车撞上他们的事故。在本文中，我们考虑通过设计一个可以检测行人并自动触发人行横道信号的系统来改进人行横道系统。我们收集图像数据集，然后用它来训练卷积神经网络来区分行人（包括骑自行车的人）和各种误报。由此产生的系统可以实时捕获和评估图像，其结果可用于自动激活人行横道灯系统。经过在现实环境中对我们的系统进行广泛测试后，我们得出的结论是，它作为备用系统是可行的，可以补充现有的人行横道按钮，从而提高过马路的整体安全性。 本文设计基于卷积神经网络的系统，通过实时检测行人自动触发人行横道信号，提升过街安全。 Eric Liang,Mark Stamp cs.CV

authors_text: Khang Nhut Lam,Nguyen Hoang Huynh,Nguyen Bao Ngoc,To Thi Huynh Nhu,Nguyen Thanh Thao,Pham Hoang Hao,Vo Van Kiet,Bui Xuan Huynh,Jugal Kalita
title: Using Artificial Intelligence and IoT for Constructing a Smart Trash Bin
title_zh: 利用人工智能和物联网构建智能垃圾桶
abstract: The research reported in this paper transforms a normal trash bin into a smarter one by applying computer vision technology. With the support of sensors and actuator devices, the trash bin can automatically classify garbage. In particular, a camera on the trash bin takes pictures of trash, then the central processing unit analyzes and makes decisions regarding which bin to drop trash into. The accuracy of our trash bin system achieves 90%. Besides, our model is connected to the Internet to update the bin status for further management. A mobile application is developed for managing the bin.
summary: The research reported in this paper transforms a normal trash bin into a smarter one by applying computer vision technology. With the support of sensors and actuator devices, the trash bin can automatically classify garbage. In particular, a camera on the trash bin takes pictures of trash, then the central processing unit analyzes and makes decisions regarding which bin to drop trash into. The accuracy of our trash bin system achieves 90%. Besides, our model is connected to the Internet to update the bin status for further management. A mobile application is developed for managing the bin.
abstract_zh: 本文报道的研究通过应用计算机视觉技术将普通垃圾桶变成更智能的垃圾桶。在传感器和执行装置的支持下，垃圾桶可以自动对垃圾进行分类。具体来说，垃圾桶上的摄像头拍摄垃圾的照片，然后中央处理单元分析并决定将垃圾扔进哪个垃圾桶。我们的垃圾桶系统的准确率达到90%。此外，我们的模型连接到互联网以更新垃圾箱状态以进行进一步管理。开发了一个移动应用程序来管理垃圾箱。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人工智能和物联网技术的智能垃圾桶系统，通过计算机视觉实现垃圾自动分类。
AI.motivation: 为提升垃圾分类效率，减少人工干预，推动智慧城市建设。
AI.method: 在垃圾桶中集成摄像头、传感器和执行器，利用计算机视觉技术识别垃圾类型，通过中央处理器决策分类，并通过物联网实现状态更新与移动应用管理。
AI.result: 系统分类准确率达90%，并成功实现垃圾桶状态的联网监控与移动应用管理功能。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了AI与物联网技术在智能垃圾分类中的可行性，为城市垃圾管理提供了创新解决方案。

authors_text: Luke Sperling,Nalini Ratha,Arun Ross,Vishnu Naresh Boddeti
title: HEFT: Homomorphically Encrypted Fusion of Biometric Templates
title_zh: HEFT：生物识别模板的同态加密融合
abstract: This paper proposes a non-interactive end-to-end solution for secure fusion and matching of biometric templates using fully homomorphic encryption (FHE). Given a pair of encrypted feature vectors, we perform the following ciphertext operations, i) feature concatenation, ii) fusion and dimensionality reduction through a learned linear projection, iii) scale normalization to unit $\ell_2$-norm, and iv) match score computation. Our method, dubbed HEFT (Homomorphically Encrypted Fusion of biometric Templates), is custom-designed to overcome the unique constraint imposed by FHE, namely the lack of support for non-arithmetic operations. From an inference perspective, we systematically explore different data packing schemes for computationally efficient linear projection and introduce a polynomial approximation for scale normalization. From a training perspective, we introduce an FHE-aware algorithm for learning the linear projection matrix to mitigate errors induced by approximate normalization. Experimental evaluation for template fusion and matching of face and voice biometrics shows that HEFT (i) improves biometric verification performance by 11.07% and 9.58% AUROC compared to the respective unibiometric representations while compressing the feature vectors by a factor of 16 (512D to 32D), and (ii) fuses a pair of encrypted feature vectors and computes its match score against a gallery of size 1024 in 884 ms. Code and data are available at https://github.com/human-analysis/encrypted-biometric-fusion
summary: This paper proposes a non-interactive end-to-end solution for secure fusion and matching of biometric templates using fully homomorphic encryption (FHE). Given a pair of encrypted feature vectors, we perform the following ciphertext operations, i) feature concatenation, ii) fusion and dimensionality reduction through a learned linear projection, iii) scale normalization to unit $\ell_2$-norm, and iv) match score computation. Our method, dubbed HEFT (Homomorphically Encrypted Fusion of biometric Templates), is custom-designed to overcome the unique constraint imposed by FHE, namely the lack of support for non-arithmetic operations. From an inference perspective, we systematically explore different data packing schemes for computationally efficient linear projection and introduce a polynomial approximation for scale normalization. From a training perspective, we introduce an FHE-aware algorithm for learning the linear projection matrix to mitigate errors induced by approximate normalization. Experimental evaluation for template fusion and matching of face and voice biometrics shows that HEFT (i) improves biometric verification performance by 11.07% and 9.58% AUROC compared to the respective unibiometric representations while compressing the feature vectors by a factor of 16 (512D to 32D), and (ii) fuses a pair of encrypted feature vectors and computes its match score against a gallery of size 1024 in 884 ms. Code and data are available at https://github.com/human-analysis/encrypted-biometric-fusion
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用完全同态加密（FHE）进行生物特征模板安全融合和匹配的非交互式端到端解决方案。给定一对加密的特征向量，我们执行以下密文操作，i）特征串联，ii）通过学习的线性投影进行融合和降维，iii）尺度归一化为单位 $\ell_2$-norm，以及 iv）匹配分数计算。我们的方法被称为 HEFT（生物识别模板的同态加密融合），是专门设计的，旨在克服 FHE 施加的独特约束，即缺乏对非算术运算的支持。从推理的角度来看，我们系统地探索了不同的数据打包方案，以实现计算高效的线性投影，并引入了用于尺度归一化的多项式近似。从训练的角度来看，我们引入了一种 FHE 感知算法来学习线性投影矩阵，以减轻近似归一化引起的误差。对模板融合以及面部和语音生物特征匹配的实验评估表明，HEFT (i) 与各自的单生物特征表示相比，将生物特征验证性能提高了 11.07% 和 9.58% AUROC，同时将特征向量压缩 16 倍（512D 到 32D），并且 (ii) 融合一对加密特征向量，并在 884 毫秒内计算其与大小为 1024 的图库的匹配分数。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/ human-analysis/encrypted-biometric-fusion 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出HEFT方法，利用全同态加密（FHE）实现生物特征模板的安全融合与匹配。
AI.motivation: 传统生物特征系统存在隐私泄露风险，需在加密数据上直接进行安全计算，而FHE能支持加密域运算但面临非算术操作受限的挑战。
AI.method: 设计加密域操作流程：特征拼接、线性投影降维、ℓ₂归一化及匹配得分计算，并引入数据打包方案与FHE感知训练算法以提升效率与精度。
AI.result: 在人脸和语音生物特征实验中，HEFT在保持512D→32D压缩率的同时，验证性能提升11.07%和9.58% AUROC，且1024规模匹配耗时884ms。
AI.conclusion: HEFT通过定制化加密计算流程有效解决了FHE约束，为隐私保护的生物特征系统提供了高效可行的解决方案。

From a training perspective, we introduce an FHE-aware algorithm for learning the linear projection matrix to mitigate errors induced by approximate normalization. Experimental evaluation for template fusion and matching of face and voice biometrics shows that HEFT (i) improves biometric verification performance by 11.07% and 9.58% AUROC compared to the respective unibiometric representations while compressing the feature vectors by a factor of 16 (512D to 32D), and (ii) fuses a pair of encrypted feature vectors and computes its match score against a gallery of size 1024 in 884 ms. Code and data are available at https://github.com/human-analysis/encrypted-biometric-fusion 本文提出了一种使用完全同态加密（FHE）进行生物特征模板安全融合和匹配的非交互式端到端解决方案。给定一对加密的特征向量，我们执行以下密文操作，i）特征串联，ii）通过学习的线性投影进行融合和降维，iii）尺度归一化为单位 $\ell_2$-norm，以及 iv）匹配分数计算。我们的方法被称为 HEFT（生物识别模板的同态加密融合），是专门设计的，旨在克服 FHE 施加的独特约束，即缺乏对非算术运算的支持。从推理的角度来看，我们系统地探索了不同的数据打包方案，以实现计算高效的线性投影，并引入了用于尺度归一化的多项式近似。从训练的角度来看，我们引入了一种 FHE 感知算法来学习线性投影矩阵，以减轻近似归一化引起的误差。对模板融合以及面部和语音生物特征匹配的实验评估表明，HEFT (i) 与各自的单生物特征表示相比，将生物特征验证性能提高了 11.07% 和 9.58% AUROC，同时将特征向量压缩 16 倍（512D 到 32D），并且 (ii) 融合一对加密特征向量，并在 884 毫秒内计算其与大小为 1024 的图库的匹配分数。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/ human-analysis/encrypted-biometric-fusion 获取 本文提出HEFT方法，利用全同态加密（FHE）实现生物特征模板的安全融合与匹配。 Luke Sperling,Nalini Ratha,Arun Ross,Vishnu Naresh Boddeti cs.CV,cs.CR

title: Mono-surrogate vs Multi-surrogate in Multi-objective Bayesian Optimisation
title_zh: 多目标贝叶斯优化中的单代理与多代理
abstract: Bayesian optimisation (BO) has been widely used to solve problems with expensive function evaluations. In multi-objective optimisation problems, BO aims to find a set of approximated Pareto optimal solutions. There are typically two ways to build surrogates in multi-objective BO: One surrogate by aggregating objective functions (by using a scalarising function, also called mono-surrogate approach) and multiple surrogates (for each objective function, also called multi-surrogate approach). In both approaches, an acquisition function (AF) is used to guide the search process. Mono-surrogate has the advantage that only one model is used, however, the approach has two major limitations. Firstly, the fitness landscape of the scalarising function and the objective functions may not be similar. Secondly, the approach assumes that the scalarising function distribution is Gaussian, and thus a closed-form expression of the AF can be used. In this work, we overcome these limitations by building a surrogate model for each objective function and show that the scalarising function distribution is not Gaussian. We approximate the distribution using Generalised extreme value distribution. The results and comparison with existing approaches on standard benchmark and real-world optimisation problems show the potential of the multi-surrogate approach.

In multi-objective optimisation problems, BO aims to find a set of approximated Pareto optimal solutions. There are typically two ways to build surrogates in multi-objective BO: One surrogate by aggregating objective functions (by using a scalarising function, also called mono-surrogate approach) and multiple surrogates (for each objective function, also called multi-surrogate approach). In both approaches, an acquisition function (AF) is used to guide the search process. Mono-surrogate has the advantage that only one model is used, however, the approach has two major limitations. Firstly, the fitness landscape of the scalarising function and the objective functions may not be similar. Secondly, the approach assumes that the scalarising function distribution is Gaussian, and thus a closed-form expression of the AF can be used. In this work, we overcome these limitations by building a surrogate model for each objective function and show that the scalarising function distribution is not Gaussian. We approximate the distribution using Generalised extreme value distribution. The results and comparison with existing approaches on standard benchmark and real-world optimisation problems show the potential of the multi-surrogate approach.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）已被广泛用于解决昂贵的函数评估问题。在多目标优化问题中，BO的目标是找到一组近似Pareto最优解。在多目标 BO 中构建代理通常有两​​种方法：一种是通过聚合目标函数来构建代理（通过使用标量函数，也称为单代理方法），另一种是多个代理（针对每个目标函数，也称为多代理方法）。在这两种方法中，都使用获取函数 (AF) 来指导搜索过程。单代理的优点是仅使用一种模型，但是该方法有两个主要局限性。首先，标量函数和目标函数的适应度景观可能不相似。其次，该方法假设标量函数分布是高斯分布，因此可以使用 AF 的封闭式表达式。在这项工作中，我们通过为每个目标函数构建代理模型来克服这些限制，并表明标量函数分布不是高斯分布。我们使用广义极值分布来近似分布。结果以及与标准基准和现实世界优化问题的现有方法的比较显示了多代理方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多目标贝叶斯优化中单代理模型与多代理模型的性能差异，提出多代理方法能克服单代理方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 单代理方法通过聚合目标函数构建模型，但存在拟合景观不一致和高斯分布假设不成立的问题，限制了其应用效果。
AI.method: 为每个目标函数独立构建代理模型，采用广义极值分布近似标量化函数分布，替代传统高斯假设。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试和实际优化问题中，多代理方法相比现有方法表现出更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 多代理方法能更准确建模多目标优化问题，高斯分布假设不成立，应优先采用多代理策略。

title: ROLAND: Graph Learning Framework for Dynamic Graphs
title_zh: ROLAND：动态图的图学习框架
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been successfully applied to many real-world static graphs. However, the success of static graphs has not fully translated to dynamic graphs due to the limitations in model design, evaluation settings, and training strategies. Concretely, existing dynamic GNNs do not incorporate state-of-the-art designs from static GNNs, which limits their performance. Current evaluation settings for dynamic GNNs do not fully reflect the evolving nature of dynamic graphs. Finally, commonly used training methods for dynamic GNNs are not scalable. Here we propose ROLAND, an effective graph representation learning framework for real-world dynamic graphs. At its core, the ROLAND framework can help researchers easily repurpose any static GNN to dynamic graphs. Our insight is to view the node embeddings at different GNN layers as hierarchical node states and then recurrently update them over time. We then introduce a live-update evaluation setting for dynamic graphs that mimics real-world use cases, where GNNs are making predictions and being updated on a rolling basis. Finally, we propose a scalable and efficient training approach for dynamic GNNs via incremental training and meta-learning. We conduct experiments over eight different dynamic graph datasets on future link prediction tasks. Models built using the ROLAND framework achieve on average 62.7% relative mean reciprocal rank (MRR) improvement over state-of-the-art baselines under the standard evaluation settings on three datasets. We find state-of-the-art baselines experience out-of-memory errors for larger datasets, while ROLAND can easily scale to dynamic graphs with 56 million edges. After re-implementing these baselines using the ROLAND training strategy, ROLAND models still achieve on average 15.5% relative MRR improvement over the baselines.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been successfully applied to many real-world static graphs. However, the success of static graphs has not fully translated to dynamic graphs due to the limitations in model design, evaluation settings, and training strategies. Concretely, existing dynamic GNNs do not incorporate state-of-the-art designs from static GNNs, which limits their performance. Current evaluation settings for dynamic GNNs do not fully reflect the evolving nature of dynamic graphs. Finally, commonly used training methods for dynamic GNNs are not scalable. Here we propose ROLAND, an effective graph representation learning framework for real-world dynamic graphs. At its core, the ROLAND framework can help researchers easily repurpose any static GNN to dynamic graphs. Our insight is to view the node embeddings at different GNN layers as hierarchical node states and then recurrently update them over time. We then introduce a live-update evaluation setting for dynamic graphs that mimics real-world use cases, where GNNs are making predictions and being updated on a rolling basis. Finally, we propose a scalable and efficient training approach for dynamic GNNs via incremental training and meta-learning. We conduct experiments over eight different dynamic graph datasets on future link prediction tasks. Models built using the ROLAND framework achieve on average 62.7% relative mean reciprocal rank (MRR) improvement over state-of-the-art baselines under the standard evaluation settings on three datasets. We find state-of-the-art baselines experience out-of-memory errors for larger datasets, while ROLAND can easily scale to dynamic graphs with 56 million edges. After re-implementing these baselines using the ROLAND training strategy, ROLAND models still achieve on average 15.5% relative MRR improvement over the baselines.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成功应用于许多现实世界的静态图。然而，由于模型设计、评估设置和训练策略的限制，静态图的成功尚未完全转化为动态图。具体来说，现有的动态 GNN 并未采用静态 GNN 的最先进设计，这限制了它们的性能。当前动态 GNN 的评估设置并不能完全反映动态图的演化性质。最后，常用的动态 GNN 训练方法不可扩展。在这里，我们提出了 ROLAND，一种针对现实世界动态图的有效图表示学习框架。从本质上讲，ROLAND 框架可以帮助研究人员轻松地将任何静态 GNN 重新用于动态图。我们的见解是将不同 GNN 层的节点嵌入视为分层节点状态，然后随着时间的推移不断更新它们。然后，我们为动态图引入了一种实时更新评估设置，该设置模仿现实世界的用例，其中 GNN 进行预测并滚动更新。最后，我们通过增量训练和元学习提出了一种可扩展且高效的动态 GNN 训练方法。我们针对未来的链接预测任务对八个不同的动态图数据集进行了实验。在三个数据集的标准评估设置下，使用 ROLAND 框架构建的模型比最先进的基线平均提高了 62.7% 的相对平均倒数排名 (MRR)。我们发现，对于较大的数据集，最先进的基线会遇到内存不足错误，而 ROLAND 可以轻松扩展到具有 5600 万条边的动态图。使用 ROLAND 训练策略重新实施这些基线后，ROLAND 模型仍然比基线平均实现 15.5% 的相对 MRR 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROLAND框架，通过改进动态图神经网络的设计、评估和训练策略，提升动态图的表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有动态图神经网络存在模型设计落后、评估设置不合理及训练方法不 scalable 的问题，限制了其性能表现。
AI.method: 将静态GNN的节点嵌入视为分层状态并递归更新，引入模拟真实场景的滚动更新评估设置，结合增量训练与元学习实现高效训练。
AI.result: 在8个动态图数据集上，ROLAND平均提升62.7%的相对MRR指标，且能处理5600万边的大规模图，而基线模型常出现内存溢出。
AI.conclusion: ROLAND通过创新框架设计有效解决了动态图学习的性能瓶颈，为动态图分析提供了可扩展的解决方案。

We find state-of-the-art baselines experience out-of-memory errors for larger datasets, while ROLAND can easily scale to dynamic graphs with 56 million edges. After re-implementing these baselines using the ROLAND training strategy, ROLAND models still achieve on average 15.5% relative MRR improvement over the baselines. 图神经网络（GNN）已成功应用于许多现实世界的静态图。然而，由于模型设计、评估设置和训练策略的限制，静态图的成功尚未完全转化为动态图。具体来说，现有的动态 GNN 并未采用静态 GNN 的最先进设计，这限制了它们的性能。当前动态 GNN 的评估设置并不能完全反映动态图的演化性质。最后，常用的动态 GNN 训练方法不可扩展。在这里，我们提出了 ROLAND，一种针对现实世界动态图的有效图表示学习框架。从本质上讲，ROLAND 框架可以帮助研究人员轻松地将任何静态 GNN 重新用于动态图。我们的见解是将不同 GNN 层的节点嵌入视为分层节点状态，然后随着时间的推移不断更新它们。然后，我们为动态图引入了一种实时更新评估设置，该设置模仿现实世界的用例，其中 GNN 进行预测并滚动更新。最后，我们通过增量训练和元学习提出了一种可扩展且高效的动态 GNN 训练方法。我们针对未来的链接预测任务对八个不同的动态图数据集进行了实验。在三个数据集的标准评估设置下，使用 ROLAND 框架构建的模型比最先进的基线平均提高了 62.7% 的相对平均倒数排名 (MRR)。我们发现，对于较大的数据集，最先进的基线会遇到内存不足错误，而 ROLAND 可以轻松扩展到具有 5600 万条边的动态图。使用 ROLAND 训练策略重新实施这些基线后，ROLAND 模型仍然比基线平均实现 15.5% 的相对 MRR 改进。 本文提出ROLAND框架，通过改进动态图神经网络的设计、评估和训练策略，提升动态图的表示学习效果。 Jiaxuan You,Tianyu Du,Jure Leskovec cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Liang Li,Chenpei Huang,Dian Shi,Hao Wang,Xiangwei Zhou,Minglei Shu,Miao Pan
title: Energy and Spectrum Efficient Federated Learning via High-Precision Over-the-Air Computation
title_zh: 通过高精度无线计算实现能源和频谱高效的联合学习
abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables mobile devices to collaboratively learn a shared prediction model while keeping data locally. However, there are two major research challenges to practically deploy FL over mobile devices: (i) frequent wireless updates of huge size gradients v.s. limited spectrum resources, and (ii) energy-hungry FL communication and local computing during training v.s. battery-constrained mobile devices. To address those challenges, in this paper, we propose a novel multi-bit over-the-air computation (M-AirComp) approach for spectrum-efficient aggregation of local model updates in FL and further present an energy-efficient FL design for mobile devices. Specifically, a high-precision digital modulation scheme is designed and incorporated in the M-AirComp, allowing mobile devices to upload model updates at the selected positions simultaneously in the multi-access channel. Moreover, we theoretically analyze the convergence property of our FL algorithm. Guided by FL convergence analysis, we formulate a joint transmission probability and local computing control optimization, aiming to minimize the overall energy consumption (i.e., iterative local computing + multi-round communications) of mobile devices in FL. Extensive simulation results show that our proposed scheme outperforms existing ones in terms of spectrum utilization, energy efficiency, and learning accuracy.
summary: Federated learning (FL) enables mobile devices to collaboratively learn a shared prediction model while keeping data locally. However, there are two major research challenges to practically deploy FL over mobile devices: (i) frequent wireless updates of huge size gradients v.s. limited spectrum resources, and (ii) energy-hungry FL communication and local computing during training v.s. battery-constrained mobile devices. To address those challenges, in this paper, we propose a novel multi-bit over-the-air computation (M-AirComp) approach for spectrum-efficient aggregation of local model updates in FL and further present an energy-efficient FL design for mobile devices. Specifically, a high-precision digital modulation scheme is designed and incorporated in the M-AirComp, allowing mobile devices to upload model updates at the selected positions simultaneously in the multi-access channel. Moreover, we theoretically analyze the convergence property of our FL algorithm. Guided by FL convergence analysis, we formulate a joint transmission probability and local computing control optimization, aiming to minimize the overall energy consumption (i.e., iterative local computing + multi-round communications) of mobile devices in FL. Extensive simulation results show that our proposed scheme outperforms existing ones in terms of spectrum utilization, energy efficiency, and learning accuracy.
abstract_zh: 联合学习 (FL) 使移动设备能够协作学习共享预测模型，同时将数据保存在本地。然而，在移动设备上实际部署 FL 存在两个主要的研究挑战：（i）大尺寸梯度的频繁无线更新与大尺寸梯度的频繁无线更新。有限的频谱资源，以及 (ii) 训练期间的耗能 FL 通信和本地计算与训练期间的本地计算电池受限的移动设备。为了应对这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多位无线计算（M-AirComp）方法，用于对 FL 中的本地模型更新进行频谱高效聚合，并进一步提出了一种适用于移动设备的节能 FL 设计。具体来说，M-AirComp 中设计并采用了高精度数字调制方案，允许移动设备在多路访问通道中同时上传选定位置的模型更新。此外，我们从理论上分析了 FL 算法的收敛性。在FL收敛分析的指导下，我们制定了联合传输概率和本地计算控制优化，旨在最小化FL中移动设备的整体能耗（即迭代本地计算+多轮通信）。大量的仿真结果表明，我们提出的方案在频谱利用率、能源效率和学习精度方面优于现有方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多比特空中计算（M-AirComp）方法，通过高精度数字调制和联合优化传输概率与本地计算控制，提升联邦学习的频谱效率和能量效率。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在移动端部署面临两大挑战：大规模梯度更新导致的频谱资源紧张，以及通信和计算能耗与电池受限设备之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 设计高精度数字调制方案实现多设备并行上传，结合联邦学习收敛性分析，建立联合优化模型以最小化设备总能耗（包括本地计算和多轮通信）。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方案在频谱利用率、能量效率和学习精度方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的M-AirComp方案有效解决了联邦学习在移动端的频谱与能耗瓶颈，为实际部署提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: DM-NeRF: 3D Scene Geometry Decomposition and Manipulation from 2D Images
title_zh: DM-NeRF：2D 图像的 3D 场景几何分解和操作
comment: ICLR 2023. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/vLAR-group/DM-NeRF
comments: ICLR 2023. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/vLAR-group/DM-NeRF
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of 3D scene geometry decomposition and manipulation from 2D views. By leveraging the recent implicit neural representation techniques, particularly the appealing neural radiance fields, we introduce an object field component to learn unique codes for all individual objects in 3D space only from 2D supervision. The key to this component is a series of carefully designed loss functions to enable every 3D point, especially in non-occupied space, to be effectively optimized even without 3D labels. In addition, we introduce an inverse query algorithm to freely manipulate any specified 3D object shape in the learned scene representation. Notably, our manipulation algorithm can explicitly tackle key issues such as object collisions and visual occlusions. Our method, called DM-NeRF, is among the first to simultaneously reconstruct, decompose, manipulate and render complex 3D scenes in a single pipeline. Extensive experiments on three datasets clearly show that our method can accurately decompose all 3D objects from 2D views, allowing any interested object to be freely manipulated in 3D space such as translation, rotation, size adjustment, and deformation.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of 3D scene geometry decomposition and manipulation from 2D views. By leveraging the recent implicit neural representation techniques, particularly the appealing neural radiance fields, we introduce an object field component to learn unique codes for all individual objects in 3D space only from 2D supervision. The key to this component is a series of carefully designed loss functions to enable every 3D point, especially in non-occupied space, to be effectively optimized even without 3D labels. In addition, we introduce an inverse query algorithm to freely manipulate any specified 3D object shape in the learned scene representation. Notably, our manipulation algorithm can explicitly tackle key issues such as object collisions and visual occlusions. Our method, called DM-NeRF, is among the first to simultaneously reconstruct, decompose, manipulate and render complex 3D scenes in a single pipeline. Extensive experiments on three datasets clearly show that our method can accurately decompose all 3D objects from 2D views, allowing any interested object to be freely manipulated in 3D space such as translation, rotation, size adjustment, and deformation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 2D 视图的 3D 场景几何分解和操作问题。通过利用最近的隐式神经表示技术，特别是有吸引力的神经辐射场，我们引入了一个对象场组件，仅从 2D 监督中学习 3D 空间中所有单个对象的唯一代码。该组件的关键是一系列精心设计的损失函数，即使没有 3D 标签，也能有效优化每个 3D 点，特别是在未占用的空间中。此外，我们引入了逆向查询算法来自由操作所学习的场景表示中的任何指定的 3D 对象形状。值得注意的是，我们的操纵算法可以明确地解决诸如对象碰撞和视觉遮挡等关键问题。我们的方法称为 DM-NeRF，是第一个在单个管道中同时重建、分解、操作和渲染复杂 3D 场景的方法。对三个数据集的大量实验清楚地表明，我们的方法可以准确地从 2D 视图分解所有 3D 对象，允许任何感兴趣的对象在 3D 空间中自由操作，例如平移、旋转、大小调整和变形。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DM-NeRF方法，从2D图像中实现3D场景几何分解与操作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从2D图像中有效分解和操作复杂3D场景，尤其缺乏3D标签时优化困难。
AI.method: 引入对象字段组件与定制损失函数，结合逆查询算法解决碰撞和遮挡问题，实现单一流程的重建、分解、操作与渲染。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上验证，能准确分解3D物体并支持平移、旋转等操作。
AI.conclusion: DM-NeRF是首个单一管道同时处理多任务的方案，为3D场景编辑提供新思路。

title: CIAO! A Contrastive Adaptation Mechanism for Non-Universal Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 再见！非通用面部表情识别的对比适应机制
abstract: Current facial expression recognition systems demand an expensive re-training routine when deployed to different scenarios than they were trained for. Biasing them towards learning specific facial characteristics, instead of performing typical transfer learning methods, might help these systems to maintain high performance in different tasks, but with a reduced training effort. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Inhibitory Adaptati On (CIAO), a mechanism that adapts the last layer of facial encoders to depict specific affective characteristics on different datasets. CIAO presents an improvement in facial expression recognition performance over six different datasets with very unique affective representations, in particular when compared with state-of-the-art models. In our discussions, we make an in-depth analysis of how the learned high-level facial features are represented, and how they contribute to each individual dataset's characteristics. We finalize our study by discussing how CIAO positions itself within the range of recent findings on non-universal facial expressions perception, and its impact on facial expression recognition research.
summary: Current facial expression recognition systems demand an expensive re-training routine when deployed to different scenarios than they were trained for. Biasing them towards learning specific facial characteristics, instead of performing typical transfer learning methods, might help these systems to maintain high performance in different tasks, but with a reduced training effort. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Inhibitory Adaptati On (CIAO), a mechanism that adapts the last layer of facial encoders to depict specific affective characteristics on different datasets. CIAO presents an improvement in facial expression recognition performance over six different datasets with very unique affective representations, in particular when compared with state-of-the-art models. In our discussions, we make an in-depth analysis of how the learned high-level facial features are represented, and how they contribute to each individual dataset's characteristics. We finalize our study by discussing how CIAO positions itself within the range of recent findings on non-universal facial expressions perception, and its impact on facial expression recognition research.
abstract_zh: 当前的面部表情识别系统在部署到与训练时不同的场景时需要昂贵的重新训练程序。让它们偏向于学习特定的面部特征，而不是执行典型的迁移学习方法，可能会帮助这些系统在不同的任务中保持高性能，但会减少训练工作量。在本文中，我们提出了对比抑制适应（CIAO），一种适应最后一层面部编码器来描述不同数据集上特定情感特征的机制。 CIAO 在六个不同的数据集上展示了面部表情识别性能的改进，具有非常独特的情感表征，特别是与最先进的模型相比。在我们的讨论中，我们深入分析了学习到的高级面部特征的表示方式，以及它们如何对每个数据集的特征做出贡献。我们通过讨论 CIAO 如何在非通用面部表情感知的最新发现范围内定位自己及其对面部表情识别研究的影响来完成我们的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIAO机制，通过对比抑制方法适应面部编码器的最后一层，以提升非通用面部表情识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别系统在不同场景部署时需耗费高昂的重新训练成本，而传统迁移学习方法效果有限，需探索更高效的适应策略。
AI.method: 设计对比抑制适应机制（CIAO），针对不同数据集的特定情感特征，调整面部编码器最后一层的表示，减少训练开销。
AI.result: 在六个具有独特情感表达的数据集上，CIAO显著优于现有模型，且深入分析了高层面部特征与数据集特性的关联。
AI.conclusion: CIAO通过针对性适应机制，为非通用面部表情识别提供了高效解决方案，推动了该领域对非普适性感知的研究进展。

search_text: CIAO! A Contrastive Adaptation Mechanism for Non-Universal Facial Expression Recognition 再见！非通用面部表情识别的对比适应机制 Current facial expression recognition systems demand an expensive re-training routine when deployed to different scenarios than they were trained for. Biasing them towards learning specific facial characteristics, instead of performing typical transfer learning methods, might help these systems to maintain high performance in different tasks, but with a reduced training effort. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Inhibitory Adaptati On (CIAO), a mechanism that adapts the last layer of facial encoders to depict specific affective characteristics on different datasets. CIAO presents an improvement in facial expression recognition performance over six different datasets with very unique affective representations, in particular when compared with state-of-the-art models. In our discussions, we make an in-depth analysis of how the learned high-level facial features are represented, and how they contribute to each individual dataset's characteristics. We finalize our study by discussing how CIAO positions itself within the range of recent findings on non-universal facial expressions perception, and its impact on facial expression recognition research. 当前的面部表情识别系统在部署到与训练时不同的场景时需要昂贵的重新训练程序。让它们偏向于学习特定的面部特征，而不是执行典型的迁移学习方法，可能会帮助这些系统在不同的任务中保持高性能，但会减少训练工作量。在本文中，我们提出了对比抑制适应（CIAO），一种适应最后一层面部编码器来描述不同数据集上特定情感特征的机制。 CIAO 在六个不同的数据集上展示了面部表情识别性能的改进，具有非常独特的情感表征，特别是与最先进的模型相比。在我们的讨论中，我们深入分析了学习到的高级面部特征的表示方式，以及它们如何对每个数据集的特征做出贡献。我们通过讨论 CIAO 如何在非通用面部表情感知的最新发现范围内定位自己及其对面部表情识别研究的影响来完成我们的研究。 本文提出CIAO机制，通过对比抑制方法适应面部编码器的最后一层，以提升非通用面部表情识别的性能。 Pablo Barros,Alessandra Sciutti cs.CV

authors_text: Yue Liu,Christos Matsoukas,Fredrik Strand,Hossein Azizpour,Kevin Smith
title: PatchDropout: Economizing Vision Transformers Using Patch Dropout
title_zh: PatchDropout：使用 Patch Dropout 来节约 Vision Transformer
comment: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV)
comments: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV)
abstract: Vision transformers have demonstrated the potential to outperform CNNs in a variety of vision tasks. But the computational and memory requirements of these models prohibit their use in many applications, especially those that depend on high-resolution images, such as medical image classification. Efforts to train ViTs more efficiently are overly complicated, necessitating architectural changes or intricate training schemes. In this work, we show that standard ViT models can be efficiently trained at high resolution by randomly dropping input image patches. This simple approach, PatchDropout, reduces FLOPs and memory by at least 50% in standard natural image datasets such as ImageNet, and those savings only increase with image size. On CSAW, a high-resolution medical dataset, we observe a 5 times savings in computation and memory using PatchDropout, along with a boost in performance. For practitioners with a fixed computational or memory budget, PatchDropout makes it possible to choose image resolution, hyperparameters, or model size to get the most performance out of their model.
summary: Vision transformers have demonstrated the potential to outperform CNNs in a variety of vision tasks. But the computational and memory requirements of these models prohibit their use in many applications, especially those that depend on high-resolution images, such as medical image classification. Efforts to train ViTs more efficiently are overly complicated, necessitating architectural changes or intricate training schemes. In this work, we show that standard ViT models can be efficiently trained at high resolution by randomly dropping input image patches. This simple approach, PatchDropout, reduces FLOPs and memory by at least 50% in standard natural image datasets such as ImageNet, and those savings only increase with image size. On CSAW, a high-resolution medical dataset, we observe a 5 times savings in computation and memory using PatchDropout, along with a boost in performance. For practitioners with a fixed computational or memory budget, PatchDropout makes it possible to choose image resolution, hyperparameters, or model size to get the most performance out of their model.
abstract_zh: 视觉 Transformer 已证明在各种视觉任务中超越 CNN 的潜力。但这些模型的计算和内存要求阻碍了它们在许多应用中的使用，特别是那些依赖高分辨率图像的应用，例如医学图像分类。更有效地培训 ViT 的工作过于复杂，需要进行架构更改或复杂的培训计划。在这项工作中，我们证明了可以通过随机丢弃输入图像块来有效地以高分辨率训练标准 ViT 模型。这种简单的方法 PatchDropout 可在 ImageNet 等标准自然图像数据集中将 FLOP 和内存减少至少 50%，并且这些节省只会随着图像大小的增加而增加。在高分辨率医学数据集 CSAW 上，我们观察到使用 PatchDropout 可节省 5 倍的计算和内存，同时性能也得到提升。对于具有固定计算或内存预算的从业者来说，PatchDropout 可以选择图像分辨率、超参数或模型大小，以获得模型的最大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PatchDropout的方法，通过随机丢弃输入图像块来减少视觉Transformer（ViT）的计算和内存消耗，同时保持或提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: ViT在高分辨率图像任务中面临计算和内存瓶颈，现有优化方法复杂且效果有限，需一种简单高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在训练过程中随机丢弃部分输入图像块（patches），降低模型计算量和内存需求，无需修改网络结构或训练策略。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等自然图像数据集上减少至少50%的FLOPs和内存；在高分辨率医学图像数据集CSAW上实现5倍计算与内存节省，且性能提升。
AI.conclusion: PatchDropout为资源受限场景提供灵活优化方案，允许在固定预算下调整分辨率、模型规模或超参数以最大化性能。

title: Comparison of Forecasting Methods of House Electricity Consumption for Honda Smart Home
title_zh: 本田智能家居房屋用电量预测方法比较
comment: 10th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Soft Computing (AISC 2022) July 30-31, 2022, London, United Kingdom
comments: 10th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Soft Computing (AISC 2022) July 30-31, 2022, London, United Kingdom
abstract: The electricity consumption of buildings composes a major part of the city's energy consumption. Electricity consumption forecasting enables the development of home energy management systems resulting in the future design of more sustainable houses and a decrease in total energy consumption. Energy performance in buildings is influenced by many factors like ambient temperature, humidity, and a variety of electrical devices. Therefore, multivariate prediction methods are preferred rather than univariate. The Honda Smart Home US data set was selected to compare three methods for minimizing forecasting errors, MAE and RMSE: Artificial Neural Networks, Support Vector Regression, and Fuzzy Rule-Based Systems for Regression by constructing many models for each method on a multivariate data set in different time terms. The comparison shows that SVR is a superior method over the alternatives.
summary: The electricity consumption of buildings composes a major part of the city's energy consumption. Electricity consumption forecasting enables the development of home energy management systems resulting in the future design of more sustainable houses and a decrease in total energy consumption. Energy performance in buildings is influenced by many factors like ambient temperature, humidity, and a variety of electrical devices. Therefore, multivariate prediction methods are preferred rather than univariate. The Honda Smart Home US data set was selected to compare three methods for minimizing forecasting errors, MAE and RMSE: Artificial Neural Networks, Support Vector Regression, and Fuzzy Rule-Based Systems for Regression by constructing many models for each method on a multivariate data set in different time terms. The comparison shows that SVR is a superior method over the alternatives.
abstract_zh: 建筑用电是城市能源消耗的主要部分。电力消耗预测有助于家庭能源管理系统的开发，从而实现未来设计更可持续的房屋并减少总能源消耗。建筑物的能源性能受到许多因素的影响，例如环境温度、湿度和各种电气设备。因此，多变量预测方法比单变量预测方法更受青睐。选择本田智能家居美国数据集来比较三种最小化预测误差、MAE 和 RMSE 的方法：人工神经网络、支持向量回归和基于模糊规则的回归系统，方法是在不同时间条件下的多元数据集上为每种方法构建多个模型。比较表明 SVR 是优于替代方法的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种多变量预测方法在本田智能家庭用电量预测中的效果，以最小化预测误差。
AI.motivation: 建筑用电占城市能源消耗的主要部分，准确预测有助于开发节能管理系统，而多变量因素（如温度、湿度和电器）需通过多元方法建模。
AI.method: 基于本田智能家庭美国数据集，构建人工神经网络、支持向量回归和模糊规则回归模型，比较其MAE和RMSE指标。
AI.result: 支持向量回归（SVR）在预测误差指标上优于人工神经网络和模糊规则系统。
AI.conclusion: SVR在家庭用电量预测中表现更优，适合用于智能能源管理系统设计。

Therefore, multivariate prediction methods are preferred rather than univariate. The Honda Smart Home US data set was selected to compare three methods for minimizing forecasting errors, MAE and RMSE: Artificial Neural Networks, Support Vector Regression, and Fuzzy Rule-Based Systems for Regression by constructing many models for each method on a multivariate data set in different time terms. The comparison shows that SVR is a superior method over the alternatives. 建筑用电是城市能源消耗的主要部分。电力消耗预测有助于家庭能源管理系统的开发，从而实现未来设计更可持续的房屋并减少总能源消耗。建筑物的能源性能受到许多因素的影响，例如环境温度、湿度和各种电气设备。因此，多变量预测方法比单变量预测方法更受青睐。选择本田智能家居美国数据集来比较三种最小化预测误差、MAE 和 RMSE 的方法：人工神经网络、支持向量回归和基于模糊规则的回归系统，方法是在不同时间条件下的多元数据集上为每种方法构建多个模型。比较表明 SVR 是优于替代方法的方法。 本文比较了三种多变量预测方法在本田智能家庭用电量预测中的效果，以最小化预测误差。 Farshad Ahmadi Asl,Mehmet Bodur cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xusheng Ai,Victor S. Sheng,Chunhua Li,Zhiming Cui
title: Class-attention Video Transformer for Engagement Intensity Prediction
title_zh: 用于参与强度预测的课堂注意力视频转换器
abstract: In order to deal with variant-length long videos, prior works extract multi-modal features and fuse them to predict students' engagement intensity. In this paper, we present a new end-to-end method Class Attention in Video Transformer (CavT), which involves a single vector to process class embedding and to uniformly perform end-to-end learning on variant-length long videos and fixed-length short videos. Furthermore, to address the lack of sufficient samples, we propose a binary-order representatives sampling method (BorS) to add multiple video sequences of each video to augment the training set. BorS+CavT not only achieves the state-of-the-art MSE (0.0495) on the EmotiW-EP dataset, but also obtains the state-of-the-art MSE (0.0377) on the DAiSEE dataset. The code and models have been made publicly available at https://github.com/mountainai/cavt.
summary: In order to deal with variant-length long videos, prior works extract multi-modal features and fuse them to predict students' engagement intensity. In this paper, we present a new end-to-end method Class Attention in Video Transformer (CavT), which involves a single vector to process class embedding and to uniformly perform end-to-end learning on variant-length long videos and fixed-length short videos. Furthermore, to address the lack of sufficient samples, we propose a binary-order representatives sampling method (BorS) to add multiple video sequences of each video to augment the training set. BorS+CavT not only achieves the state-of-the-art MSE (0.0495) on the EmotiW-EP dataset, but also obtains the state-of-the-art MSE (0.0377) on the DAiSEE dataset. The code and models have been made publicly available at https://github.com/mountainai/cavt.
abstract_zh: 为了处理不同长度的长视频，先前的工作提取多模态特征并将它们融合以预测学生的参与强度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的端到端方法视频变换器中的类注意（CavT），该方法涉及单个向量来处理类嵌入并对变长长视频和固定长度短视频统一执行端到端学习。此外，为了解决缺乏足够样本的问题，我们提出了一种二元代表采样方法（BorS）来添加每个视频的多个视频序列以扩充训练集。 BorS+CavT不仅在EmotiW-EP数据集上获得了state-of-the-art的MSE（0.0495），还在DAiSEE数据集上获得了state-of-the-art的MSE（0.0377）。代码和模型已在 https://github.com/mountainai/cavt 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CavT的端到端视频变换器模型，结合类注意机制和二进制顺序抽样方法，用于预测学生在视频中的参与度强度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理变长视频时需多模态特征融合，且面临训练样本不足的问题，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计Class Attention Video Transformer (CavT)统一处理变长/短视频，并提出Binary-order Representatives Sampling (BorS)方法通过生成多序列增强训练数据。
AI.result: 在EmotiW-EP和DAiSEE数据集上分别达到MSE 0.0495和0.0377，均取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: CavT+BorS方法有效解决了视频长度差异和数据不足问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yao Zhang,Yun Xiong,Yiheng Sun,Caihua Shan,Tian Lu,Hui Song,Yangyong Zhu
title: RuDi: Explaining Behavior Sequence Models by Automatic Statistics Generation and Rule Distillation
title_zh: RuDi：通过自动统计生成和规则蒸馏解释行为序列模型
abstract: Risk scoring systems have been widely deployed in many applications, which assign risk scores to users according to their behavior sequences. Though many deep learning methods with sophisticated designs have achieved promising results, the black-box nature hinders their applications due to fairness, explainability, and compliance consideration. Rule-based systems are considered reliable in these sensitive scenarios. However, building a rule system is labor-intensive. Experts need to find informative statistics from user behavior sequences, design rules based on statistics and assign weights to each rule. In this paper, we bridge the gap between effective but black-box models and transparent rule models. We propose a two-stage method, RuDi, that distills the knowledge of black-box teacher models into rule-based student models. We design a Monte Carlo tree search-based statistics generation method that can provide a set of informative statistics in the first stage. Then statistics are composed into logical rules with our proposed neural logical networks by mimicking the outputs of teacher models. We evaluate RuDi on three real-world public datasets and an industrial dataset to demonstrate its effectiveness.
summary: Risk scoring systems have been widely deployed in many applications, which assign risk scores to users according to their behavior sequences. Though many deep learning methods with sophisticated designs have achieved promising results, the black-box nature hinders their applications due to fairness, explainability, and compliance consideration. Rule-based systems are considered reliable in these sensitive scenarios. However, building a rule system is labor-intensive. Experts need to find informative statistics from user behavior sequences, design rules based on statistics and assign weights to each rule. In this paper, we bridge the gap between effective but black-box models and transparent rule models. We propose a two-stage method, RuDi, that distills the knowledge of black-box teacher models into rule-based student models. We design a Monte Carlo tree search-based statistics generation method that can provide a set of informative statistics in the first stage. Then statistics are composed into logical rules with our proposed neural logical networks by mimicking the outputs of teacher models. We evaluate RuDi on three real-world public datasets and an industrial dataset to demonstrate its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 风险评分系统已广泛部署在许多应用中，根据用户的行为顺序为用户分配风险评分。尽管许多设计复杂的深度学习方法已经取得了可喜的结果，但由于公平性、可解释性和合规性考虑，黑盒性质阻碍了它们的应用。在这些敏感场景中，基于规则的系统被认为是可靠的。然而，建立规则体系是一项劳动密集型工作。专家需要从用户行为序列中找到信息丰富的统计数据，根据统计数据设计规则并为每个规则分配权重。在本文中，我们弥合了有效但黑盒模型与透明规则模型之间的差距。我们提出了一种两阶段方法 RuDi，它将黑盒教师模型的知识提炼为基于规则的学生模型。我们设计了一种基于蒙特卡罗树搜索的统计生成方法，可以在第一阶段提供一组信息丰富的统计数据。然后，通过模仿教师模型的输出，用我们提出的神经逻辑网络将统计数据组合成逻辑规则。我们在三个现实世界的公共数据集和一个工业数据集上评估 RuDi，以证明其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RuDi的方法，通过自动生成统计信息和规则蒸馏来解释行为序列模型。
AI.motivation: 风险评分系统在许多应用中被广泛使用，但深度学习模型的黑盒特性限制了其在公平性、可解释性和合规性方面的应用，而基于规则的系统虽然可靠但构建过程繁琐。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法RuDi，首先使用蒙特卡洛树搜索生成统计信息，然后通过神经逻辑网络将这些统计信息组合成逻辑规则，以模仿教师模型的输出。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界的公共数据集和一个工业数据集上评估了RuDi，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RuDi方法成功地弥合了黑盒模型与透明规则模型之间的差距，为构建可靠且可解释的风险评分系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Felix Bognar,Markus Oster,Herman Van der Auweraer,Tong Duy Son
title: Virtual Reality Assisted Human Perception in ADAS Development: a Munich 3D Model Study
title_zh: 虚拟现实辅助 ADAS 开发中的人类感知：慕尼黑 3D 模型研究
abstract: As the development of autonomous driving (AD) and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) progresses, the relevance of the comfort of users is gaining increasing interest. It becomes significant to test and validate perceived comfort performance from the early phase of system development before driving on roads. Most of the present ADAS test procedures are not efficient in performing such comfort evaluation. One of the main challenges is to integrate high-quality, realistic and predictable virtual traffic scenarios into an ADAS testing framework that has physics-based sensors capable of sensing the virtual environment. In this paper, we present our development of a virtual reality based ADAS testing framework that enhances human perception evaluation. The main contribution relies on three aspects. First, we introduce our development of a large and high-quality (realism, structure, texture) 3D traffic model of the Munich city in Germany. Second, we optimize the 3D model for virtual reality purpose, and real-time capable for human-in-the-loop ADAS testing. Finally, the model is then integrated into an ADAS framework for testing and validating ADAS functionalities and perceived comfort performance. The developed framework components are presented with illustrative examples.
summary: As the development of autonomous driving (AD) and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) progresses, the relevance of the comfort of users is gaining increasing interest. It becomes significant to test and validate perceived comfort performance from the early phase of system development before driving on roads. Most of the present ADAS test procedures are not efficient in performing such comfort evaluation. One of the main challenges is to integrate high-quality, realistic and predictable virtual traffic scenarios into an ADAS testing framework that has physics-based sensors capable of sensing the virtual environment. In this paper, we present our development of a virtual reality based ADAS testing framework that enhances human perception evaluation. The main contribution relies on three aspects. First, we introduce our development of a large and high-quality (realism, structure, texture) 3D traffic model of the Munich city in Germany. Second, we optimize the 3D model for virtual reality purpose, and real-time capable for human-in-the-loop ADAS testing. Finally, the model is then integrated into an ADAS framework for testing and validating ADAS functionalities and perceived comfort performance. The developed framework components are presented with illustrative examples.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶（AD）和高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）的发展，用户舒适度的相关性越来越受到关注。在上路行驶之前，从系统开发的早期阶段测试和验证感知的舒适度性能变得非常重要。目前大多数 ADAS 测试程序在执行此类舒适度评估方面效率不高。主要挑战之一是将高质量、真实且可预测的虚拟交通场景集成到 ADAS 测试框架中，该框架具有能够感知虚拟环境的基于物理的传感器。在本文中，我们介绍了基于虚拟现实的 ADAS 测试框架的开发，该框架可增强人类感知评估。主要贡献依赖于三个方面。首先，我们介绍我们开发的德国慕尼黑市大型高质量（真实感、结构、纹理）3D 交通模型。其次，我们针对虚拟现实目的优化了 3D 模型，并能够实时进行人机交互 ADAS 测试。最后，该模型被集成到 ADAS 框架中，用于测试和验证 ADAS 功能和感知舒适度性能。所开发的框架组件通过说明性示例进行介绍。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于虚拟现实的ADAS测试框架，通过构建慕尼黑高精度3D交通模型，提升自动驾驶系统开发中的人类感知评估效率。
AI.motivation: 现有ADAS测试方法难以高效评估用户舒适度，缺乏高保真虚拟交通场景与物理传感器的集成方案，亟需改进早期系统验证手段。
AI.method: 构建慕尼黑高精度3D交通模型（含真实纹理与结构），优化模型以适配VR实时渲染，集成至ADAS框架实现人车闭环测试。
AI.result: 成功开发支持VR的人车闭环测试框架，验证了ADAS功能与舒适度评估的有效性，模型满足实时交互需求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为ADAS早期开发阶段提供了高保真舒适度验证方案，推动虚拟现实技术在自动驾驶测试中的应用落地。

search_text: Virtual Reality Assisted Human Perception in ADAS Development: a Munich 3D Model Study 虚拟现实辅助 ADAS 开发中的人类感知：慕尼黑 3D 模型研究 As the development of autonomous driving (AD) and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) progresses, the relevance of the comfort of users is gaining increasing interest. It becomes significant to test and validate perceived comfort performance from the early phase of system development before driving on roads. Most of the present ADAS test procedures are not efficient in performing such comfort evaluation. One of the main challenges is to integrate high-quality, realistic and predictable virtual traffic scenarios into an ADAS testing framework that has physics-based sensors capable of sensing the virtual environment. In this paper, we present our development of a virtual reality based ADAS testing framework that enhances human perception evaluation. The main contribution relies on three aspects. First, we introduce our development of a large and high-quality (realism, structure, texture) 3D traffic model of the Munich city in Germany. Second, we optimize the 3D model for virtual reality purpose, and real-time capable for human-in-the-loop ADAS testing. Finally, the model is then integrated into an ADAS framework for testing and validating ADAS functionalities and perceived comfort performance. The developed framework components are presented with illustrative examples. 随着自动驾驶（AD）和高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）的发展，用户舒适度的相关性越来越受到关注。在上路行驶之前，从系统开发的早期阶段测试和验证感知的舒适度性能变得非常重要。目前大多数 ADAS 测试程序在执行此类舒适度评估方面效率不高。主要挑战之一是将高质量、真实且可预测的虚拟交通场景集成到 ADAS 测试框架中，该框架具有能够感知虚拟环境的基于物理的传感器。在本文中，我们介绍了基于虚拟现实的 ADAS 测试框架的开发，该框架可增强人类感知评估。主要贡献依赖于三个方面。首先，我们介绍我们开发的德国慕尼黑市大型高质量（真实感、结构、纹理）3D 交通模型。其次，我们针对虚拟现实目的优化了 3D 模型，并能够实时进行人机交互 ADAS 测试。最后，该模型被集成到 ADAS 框架中，用于测试和验证 ADAS 功能和感知舒适度性能。所开发的框架组件通过说明性示例进行介绍。 本文开发了一个基于虚拟现实的ADAS测试框架，通过构建慕尼黑高精度3D交通模型，提升自动驾驶系统开发中的人类感知评估效率。 Felix Bognar,Markus Oster,Herman Van der Auweraer,Tong Duy Son cs.HC

authors_text: Yidong Wang,Hao Chen,Yue Fan,Wang Sun,Ran Tao,Wenxin Hou,Renjie Wang,Linyi Yang,Zhi Zhou,Lan-Zhe Guo,Heli Qi,Zhen Wu,Yu-Feng Li,Satoshi Nakamura,Wei Ye,Marios Savvides,Bhiksha Raj,Takahiro Shinozaki,Bernt Schiele,Jindong Wang,Xing Xie,Yue Zhang
title: USB: A Unified Semi-supervised Learning Benchmark for Classification
title_zh: USB：统一的半监督分类学习基准
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS'22 dataset and benchmark track; code at https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS'22 dataset and benchmark track; code at https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) improves model generalization by leveraging massive unlabeled data to augment limited labeled samples. However, currently, popular SSL evaluation protocols are often constrained to computer vision (CV) tasks. In addition, previous work typically trains deep neural networks from scratch, which is time-consuming and environmentally unfriendly. To address the above issues, we construct a Unified SSL Benchmark (USB) for classification by selecting 15 diverse, challenging, and comprehensive tasks from CV, natural language processing (NLP), and audio processing (Audio), on which we systematically evaluate the dominant SSL methods, and also open-source a modular and extensible codebase for fair evaluation of these SSL methods. We further provide the pre-trained versions of the state-of-the-art neural models for CV tasks to make the cost affordable for further tuning. USB enables the evaluation of a single SSL algorithm on more tasks from multiple domains but with less cost. Specifically, on a single NVIDIA V100, only 39 GPU days are required to evaluate FixMatch on 15 tasks in USB while 335 GPU days (279 GPU days on 4 CV datasets except for ImageNet) are needed on 5 CV tasks with TorchSSL.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) improves model generalization by leveraging massive unlabeled data to augment limited labeled samples. However, currently, popular SSL evaluation protocols are often constrained to computer vision (CV) tasks. In addition, previous work typically trains deep neural networks from scratch, which is time-consuming and environmentally unfriendly. To address the above issues, we construct a Unified SSL Benchmark (USB) for classification by selecting 15 diverse, challenging, and comprehensive tasks from CV, natural language processing (NLP), and audio processing (Audio), on which we systematically evaluate the dominant SSL methods, and also open-source a modular and extensible codebase for fair evaluation of these SSL methods. We further provide the pre-trained versions of the state-of-the-art neural models for CV tasks to make the cost affordable for further tuning. USB enables the evaluation of a single SSL algorithm on more tasks from multiple domains but with less cost. Specifically, on a single NVIDIA V100, only 39 GPU days are required to evaluate FixMatch on 15 tasks in USB while 335 GPU days (279 GPU days on 4 CV datasets except for ImageNet) are needed on 5 CV tasks with TorchSSL.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）通过利用大量未标记数据来增强有限的标记样本，从而提高模型泛化能力。然而，目前流行的 SSL 评估协议通常仅限于计算机视觉 (CV) 任务。此外，以前的工作通常是从头开始训练深度神经网络，这既耗时又不环保。为了解决上述问题，我们从CV、自然语言处理（NLP）和音频处理（Audio）中选择了15个多样化、具有挑战性和综合性的任务，构建了统一的SSL分类基准（USB），在该基准上我们系统地评估了主流的SSL方法，并开源了一个模块化和可扩展的代码库，以公平地评估这些SSL方法。我们进一步为 CV 任务提供最先进的神经模型的预训练版本，以使进一步调整的成本可承受。 USB 能够对来自多个域的更多任务评估单个 SSL 算法，但成本更低。具体来说，在单个 NVIDIA V100 上，在 USB 中评估 15 个任务的 FixMatch 仅需 39 个 GPU 天，而使用 TorchSSL 评估 5 个 CV 任务则需要 335 个 GPU 天（除了 ImageNet 之外的 4 个 CV 数据集需要 279 个 GPU 天）。

AI.tldr: 构建一个跨计算机视觉、自然语言处理和音频处理的统一半监督学习基准测试平台USB，用于分类任务的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习评估协议局限于计算机视觉领域，且从头训练深度模型耗时且环境成本高，需建立跨领域基准以提升评估效率。
AI.method: 选取15个来自CV、NLP和音频领域的多样化任务，系统评估主流半监督方法，并开源模块化代码库及预训练模型以降低调优成本。
AI.result: 在单块NVIDIA V100 GPU上，使用USB评估FixMatch算法仅需39个GPU日，而传统TorchSSL框架在5个CV任务上需335个GPU日。
AI.conclusion: USB基准通过跨领域任务整合与预训练模型共享，显著降低了半监督算法评估成本，推动了多领域SSL方法的公平比较与优化。

ai_content.tldr: 构建一个跨计算机视觉、自然语言处理和音频处理的统一半监督学习基准测试平台USB，用于分类任务的评估。

search_text: USB: A Unified Semi-supervised Learning Benchmark for Classification USB：统一的半监督分类学习基准 Semi-supervised learning (SSL) improves model generalization by leveraging massive unlabeled data to augment limited labeled samples. However, currently, popular SSL evaluation protocols are often constrained to computer vision (CV) tasks. In addition, previous work typically trains deep neural networks from scratch, which is time-consuming and environmentally unfriendly. To address the above issues, we construct a Unified SSL Benchmark (USB) for classification by selecting 15 diverse, challenging, and comprehensive tasks from CV, natural language processing (NLP), and audio processing (Audio), on which we systematically evaluate the dominant SSL methods, and also open-source a modular and extensible codebase for fair evaluation of these SSL methods. We further provide the pre-trained versions of the state-of-the-art neural models for CV tasks to make the cost affordable for further tuning. USB enables the evaluation of a single SSL algorithm on more tasks from multiple domains but with less cost. Specifically, on a single NVIDIA V100, only 39 GPU days are required to evaluate FixMatch on 15 tasks in USB while 335 GPU days (279 GPU days on 4 CV datasets except for ImageNet) are needed on 5 CV tasks with TorchSSL. 半监督学习（SSL）通过利用大量未标记数据来增强有限的标记样本，从而提高模型泛化能力。然而，目前流行的 SSL 评估协议通常仅限于计算机视觉 (CV) 任务。此外，以前的工作通常是从头开始训练深度神经网络，这既耗时又不环保。为了解决上述问题，我们从CV、自然语言处理（NLP）和音频处理（Audio）中选择了15个多样化、具有挑战性和综合性的任务，构建了统一的SSL分类基准（USB），在该基准上我们系统地评估了主流的SSL方法，并开源了一个模块化和可扩展的代码库，以公平地评估这些SSL方法。我们进一步为 CV 任务提供最先进的神经模型的预训练版本，以使进一步调整的成本可承受。 USB 能够对来自多个域的更多任务评估单个 SSL 算法，但成本更低。具体来说，在单个 NVIDIA V100 上，在 USB 中评估 15 个任务的 FixMatch 仅需 39 个 GPU 天，而使用 TorchSSL 评估 5 个 CV 任务则需要 335 个 GPU 天（除了 ImageNet 之外的 4 个 CV 数据集需要 279 个 GPU 天）。 构建一个跨计算机视觉、自然语言处理和音频处理的统一半监督学习基准测试平台USB，用于分类任务的评估。 Yidong Wang,Hao Chen,Yue Fan,Wang Sun,Ran Tao,Wenxin Hou,Renjie Wang,Linyi Yang,Zhi Zhou,Lan-Zhe Guo,Heli Qi,Zhen Wu,Yu-Feng Li,Satoshi Nakamura,Wei Ye,Marios Savvides,Bhiksha Raj,Takahiro Shinozaki,Bernt Schiele,Jindong Wang,Xing Xie,Yue Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Extraction of Pulmonary Airway in CT Scans Using Deep Fully Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 使用深度全卷积网络提取 CT 扫描中的肺气道
abstract: Accurate, automatic and complete extraction of pulmonary airway in medical images plays an important role in analyzing thoracic CT volumes such as lung cancer detection, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and bronchoscopic-assisted surgery navigation. However, this task remains challenges, due to the complex tree-like structure of the airways. In this technical report, we use two-stage fully convolutional networks (FCNs) to automatically segment pulmonary airway in thoracic CT scans from multi-sites. Specifically, we firstly adopt a 3D FCN with U-shape network architecture to segment pulmonary airway in a coarse resolution in order to accelerate medical image analysis pipeline. And then another one 3D FCN is trained to segment pulmonary airway in a fine resolution. In the 2022 MICCAI Multi-site Multi-domain Airway Tree Modeling (ATM) Challenge, the reported method was evaluated on the public training set of 300 cases and independent private validation set of 50 cases. The resulting Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) is 0.914 $\pm$ 0.040, False Negative Error (FNE) is 0.079 $\pm$ 0.042, and False Positive Error (FPE) is 0.090 $\pm$ 0.066 on independent private validation set.
summary: Accurate, automatic and complete extraction of pulmonary airway in medical images plays an important role in analyzing thoracic CT volumes such as lung cancer detection, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and bronchoscopic-assisted surgery navigation. However, this task remains challenges, due to the complex tree-like structure of the airways. In this technical report, we use two-stage fully convolutional networks (FCNs) to automatically segment pulmonary airway in thoracic CT scans from multi-sites. Specifically, we firstly adopt a 3D FCN with U-shape network architecture to segment pulmonary airway in a coarse resolution in order to accelerate medical image analysis pipeline. And then another one 3D FCN is trained to segment pulmonary airway in a fine resolution. In the 2022 MICCAI Multi-site Multi-domain Airway Tree Modeling (ATM) Challenge, the reported method was evaluated on the public training set of 300 cases and independent private validation set of 50 cases. The resulting Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) is 0.914 $\pm$ 0.040, False Negative Error (FNE) is 0.079 $\pm$ 0.042, and False Positive Error (FPE) is 0.090 $\pm$ 0.066 on independent private validation set.
abstract_zh: 医学图像中准确、自动、完整的肺气道提取对于肺癌检测、慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）和支气管镜辅助手术导航等胸部CT容积分析具有重要作用。然而，由于气道复杂的树状结构，这项任务仍然充满挑战。在本技术报告中，我们使用两级全卷积网络 (FCN) 在多部位胸部 CT 扫描中自动分割肺气道。具体来说，我们首先采用具有 U 形网络架构的 3D FCN 以粗分辨率分割肺气道，以加速医学图像分析流程。然后，训练另一台 3D FCN 以高分辨率分割肺气道。在 2022 年 MICCAI 多站点多域气道树建模 (ATM) 挑战赛中，所报告的方法在 300 个案例的公共训练集和 50 个案例的独立私人验证集上进行了评估。在独立的私有验证集上，所得骰子相似系数 (DSC) 为 0.914 $\pm$ 0.040，假阴性错误 (FNE) 为 0.079 $\pm$ 0.042，假阳性错误 (FPE) 为 0.090 $\pm$ 0.066。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用两阶段全卷积网络（FCNs）自动分割胸部CT扫描中的肺部气道，以应对复杂树状结构带来的分割挑战。
AI.motivation: 肺部气道的精确分割对肺癌检测、慢阻肺分析及手术导航至关重要，但其复杂树状结构使现有方法难以兼顾效率与精度。
AI.method: 采用双阶段3D FCN：第一阶段用U型网络进行粗粒度快速分割，第二阶段通过细粒度分割优化结果，结合多站点数据训练与验证。
AI.result: 在MICCAI 2022 ATM挑战赛中，独立验证集DSC达0.914±0.040，FNE为0.079±0.042，FPE为0.090±0.066，显示方法具有高精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段FCN框架有效平衡了分割精度与计算效率，为多中心医学影像分析提供了可靠解决方案。

search_text: Extraction of Pulmonary Airway in CT Scans Using Deep Fully Convolutional Networks 使用深度全卷积网络提取 CT 扫描中的肺气道 Accurate, automatic and complete extraction of pulmonary airway in medical images plays an important role in analyzing thoracic CT volumes such as lung cancer detection, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), and bronchoscopic-assisted surgery navigation. However, this task remains challenges, due to the complex tree-like structure of the airways. In this technical report, we use two-stage fully convolutional networks (FCNs) to automatically segment pulmonary airway in thoracic CT scans from multi-sites. Specifically, we firstly adopt a 3D FCN with U-shape network architecture to segment pulmonary airway in a coarse resolution in order to accelerate medical image analysis pipeline. And then another one 3D FCN is trained to segment pulmonary airway in a fine resolution. In the 2022 MICCAI Multi-site Multi-domain Airway Tree Modeling (ATM) Challenge, the reported method was evaluated on the public training set of 300 cases and independent private validation set of 50 cases. The resulting Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) is 0.914 $\pm$ 0.040, False Negative Error (FNE) is 0.079 $\pm$ 0.042, and False Positive Error (FPE) is 0.090 $\pm$ 0.066 on independent private validation set. 医学图像中准确、自动、完整的肺气道提取对于肺癌检测、慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）和支气管镜辅助手术导航等胸部CT容积分析具有重要作用。然而，由于气道复杂的树状结构，这项任务仍然充满挑战。在本技术报告中，我们使用两级全卷积网络 (FCN) 在多部位胸部 CT 扫描中自动分割肺气道。具体来说，我们首先采用具有 U 形网络架构的 3D FCN 以粗分辨率分割肺气道，以加速医学图像分析流程。然后，训练另一台 3D FCN 以高分辨率分割肺气道。在 2022 年 MICCAI 多站点多域气道树建模 (ATM) 挑战赛中，所报告的方法在 300 个案例的公共训练集和 50 个案例的独立私人验证集上进行了评估。在独立的私有验证集上，所得骰子相似系数 (DSC) 为 0.914 $\pm$ 0.040，假阴性错误 (FNE) 为 0.079 $\pm$ 0.042，假阳性错误 (FPE) 为 0.090 $\pm$ 0.066。 本文提出使用两阶段全卷积网络（FCNs）自动分割胸部CT扫描中的肺部气道，以应对复杂树状结构带来的分割挑战。 Shaofeng Yuan eess.IV,cs.CV

title: On the Complexity of Distance-$d$ Independent Set Reconfiguration
title_zh: 论距离-$d$独立集重构的复杂性
abstract: For a fixed positive integer $d \geq 2$, a distance-$d$ independent set (D$d$IS) of a graph is a vertex subset whose distance between any two members is at least $d$. Imagine that there is a token placed on each member of a D$d$IS. Two D$d$ISs are adjacent under Token Sliding ($\mathsf{TS}$) if one can be obtained from the other by moving a token from one vertex to one of its unoccupied adjacent vertices. Under Token Jumping ($\mathsf{TJ}$), the target vertex needs not to be adjacent to the original one. The Distance-$d$ Independent Set Reconfiguration (D$d$ISR) problem under $\mathsf{TS}/\mathsf{TJ}$ asks if there is a corresponding sequence of adjacent D$d$ISs that transforms one given D$d$IS into another. The problem for $d = 2$, also known as the Independent Set Reconfiguration problem, has been well-studied in the literature and its computational complexity on several graph classes has been known. In this paper, we study the computational complexity of D$d$ISR on different graphs under $\mathsf{TS}$ and $\mathsf{TJ}$ for any fixed $d \geq 3$. On chordal graphs, we show that D$d$ISR under $\mathsf{TJ}$ is in $\mathtt{P}$ when $d$ is even and $\mathtt{PSPACE}$-complete when $d$ is odd. On split graphs, there is an interesting complexity dichotomy: D$d$ISR is $\mathtt{PSPACE}$-complete for $d = 2$ but in $\mathtt{P}$ for $d=3$ under $\mathsf{TS}$, while under $\mathsf{TJ}$ it is in $\mathtt{P}$ for $d = 2$ but $\mathtt{PSPACE}$-complete for $d = 3$. Additionally, certain well-known hardness results for $d = 2$ on perfect graphs and planar graphs of maximum degree three and bounded bandwidth can be extended for $d \geq 3$.

The problem for $d = 2$, also known as the Independent Set Reconfiguration problem, has been well-studied in the literature and its computational complexity on several graph classes has been known. In this paper, we study the computational complexity of D$d$ISR on different graphs under $\mathsf{TS}$ and $\mathsf{TJ}$ for any fixed $d \geq 3$. On chordal graphs, we show that D$d$ISR under $\mathsf{TJ}$ is in $\mathtt{P}$ when $d$ is even and $\mathtt{PSPACE}$-complete when $d$ is odd.
