abstract_zh: 对于固定正整数 $d \geq 2$，图的距离 $d$ 独立集 (D$d$IS) 是任意两个成员之间的距离至少为 $d$ 的顶点子集。想象一下，D$d$IS 的每个成员都放置了一个代币。如果可以通过将令牌从一个顶点移动到其未占用的相邻顶点之一来从另一个获得一个，则在令牌滑动 ($\mathsf{TS}$) 下，两个 D$d$IS 是相邻的。在令牌跳跃（$\mathsf{TJ}$）下，目标顶点不需要与原始顶点相邻。 $\mathsf{TS}/\mathsf{TJ}$ 下的距离-$d$ 独立集重配置 (D$d$ISR) 问题询问是否存在相应的相邻 D$d$IS 序列，将一个给定的 D$d$IS 转换为另一个。 $d = 2$ 的问题，也称为独立集重新配置问题，已在文献中得到充分研究，并且其在多个图类上的计算复杂性已为人所知。在本文中，我们研究了对于任何固定的$d \geq 3$，在$\mathsf{TS}$和$\mathsf{TJ}$下不同图上D$d$ISR的计算复杂度。在弦图上，我们证明，当 $d$ 为偶数时，$\mathsf{TJ}$ 下的 D$d$ISR 位于 $\mathtt{P}$ 中，而当 $d$ 为奇数时，$\mathtt{PSPACE}$ 是完全的。在分割图上，存在一个有趣的复杂性二分法：对于 $d = 2$，D$d$ISR 是 $\mathtt{PSPACE}$ 完整的，但在 $\mathsf{TS}$ 下，$d=3$ 在 $\mathtt{P}$ 中，而在 $\mathsf{TJ}$ 下，对于 $d = 2$，它在 $\mathtt{P}$ 中，但是$\mathtt{PSPACE}$-$d = 3$ 完成。此外，在最大三阶和有界带宽的完美图和平面图上，某些众所周知的硬度结果 $d = 2$ 可以扩展到 $d \geq 3$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了距离-d独立集重配置问题（DdISR）在不同图类下的计算复杂性，针对固定d≥3的情况，分析了在Token Sliding（TS）和Token Jumping（TJ）规则下的复杂性差异。
AI.motivation: 距离-2独立集重配置问题（即独立集重配置问题）的复杂性已被广泛研究，但针对更大距离d≥3的情况，其复杂性尚不明确，需进一步探索不同图类下的计算难度差异。
AI.method: 通过分析弦图、分割图等特殊图类的结构特性，结合重配置问题的规则（TS/TJ），利用已知复杂性结果和归约方法，推导出不同情况下的复杂性分类。
AI.result: 在弦图中，TJ规则下DdISR当d为偶数时属于P类，奇数时为PSPACE完全；在分割图中，TS规则下d=2为PSPACE完全而d=3属于P，TJ规则下则相反。此外，部分d=2的完美图和平面图的困难结果可扩展至d≥3。
AI.conclusion: 本文明确了DdISR在多种图类下的复杂性二分法，揭示了d的奇偶性及重配置规则对计算难度的显著影响，并扩展了d≥3时的硬度结果。

title: Determining HEDP Foams' Quality with Multi-View Deep Learning Classification
title_zh: 通过多视图深度学习分类确定 HEDP 泡沫的质量
abstract: High energy density physics (HEDP) experiments commonly involve a dynamic wave-front propagating inside a low-density foam. This effect affects its density and hence, its transparency. A common problem in foam production is the creation of defective foams. Accurate information on their dimension and homogeneity is required to classify the foams' quality. Therefore, those parameters are being characterized using a 3D-measuring laser confocal microscope. For each foam, five images are taken: two 2D images representing the top and bottom surface foam planes and three images of side cross-sections from 3D scannings. An expert has to do the complicated, harsh, and exhausting work of manually classifying the foam's quality through the image set and only then determine whether the foam can be used in experiments or not. Currently, quality has two binary levels of normal vs. defective. At the same time, experts are commonly required to classify a sub-class of normal-defective, i.e., foams that are defective but might be sufficient for the needed experiment. This sub-class is problematic due to inconclusive judgment that is primarily intuitive. In this work, we present a novel state-of-the-art multi-view deep learning classification model that mimics the physicist's perspective by automatically determining the foams' quality classification and thus aids the expert. Our model achieved 86\% accuracy on upper and lower surface foam planes and 82\% on the entire set, suggesting interesting heuristics to the problem. A significant added value in this work is the ability to regress the foam quality instead of binary deduction and even explain the decision visually. The source code used in this work, as well as other relevant sources, are available at: https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/Multi-View-Foams.git

At the same time, experts are commonly required to classify a sub-class of normal-defective, i.e., foams that are defective but might be sufficient for the needed experiment. In this work, we present a novel state-of-the-art multi-view deep learning classification model that mimics the physicist's perspective by automatically determining the foams' quality classification and thus aids the expert. Our model achieved 86\% accuracy on upper and lower surface foam planes and 82\% on the entire set, suggesting interesting heuristics to the problem. A significant added value in this work is the ability to regress the foam quality instead of binary deduction and even explain the decision visually. The source code used in this work, as well as other relevant sources, are available at: https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/Multi-View-Foams.git
abstract_zh: 高能量密度物理 (HEDP) 实验通常涉及低密度泡沫内部传播的动态波前。这种效应会影响其密度，从而影响其透明度。泡沫生产中的一个常见问题是产生有缺陷的泡沫。对泡沫质量进行分类需要有关其尺寸和均匀性的准确信息。因此，使用 3D 测量激光共焦显微镜来表征这些参数。对于每个泡沫，拍摄五张图像：两张代表顶部和底部表面泡沫平面的 2D 图像以及来自 3D 扫描的侧面横截面的三张图像。专家必须通过图像集手动对泡沫的质量进行分类，然后才能确定该泡沫是否可以用于实验，这是一项复杂、艰苦且费力的工作。目前，质量有两个二元级别：正常与缺陷。与此同时，专家通常需要对正常缺陷的子类进行分类，即有缺陷但可能足以进行所需实验的泡沫。这个子类是有问题的，因为主要是凭直觉做出的不确定判断。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的、最先进的多视图深度学习分类模型，该模型通过自动确定泡沫的质量分类来模仿物理学家的视角，从而为专家提供帮助。我们的模型在上下表面泡沫平面上实现了 86% 的准确率，在整个泡沫平面上实现了 82% 的准确率，这表明该问题具有有趣的启发性。这项工作的一个重要附加值是能够回归泡沫质量而不是二元推论，甚至可以直观地解释决策。这项工作中使用的源代码以及其他相关来源可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/Multi-View-Foams.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角深度学习分类模型，用于自动判断高能密度物理实验中泡沫材料的质量，替代传统人工分类方法。
AI.motivation: 泡沫生产中存在缺陷品分类难题，人工判断效率低且主观性强，尤其难以区分可接受的缺陷品与完全不合格品。
AI.method: 采用三维激光共聚焦显微镜获取泡沫的多视角图像（上下表面及三个横截面），构建多视角深度学习模型实现质量回归预测并可视化决策依据。
AI.result: 模型在上下表面图像上达到86%准确率，整体数据集达82%，可有效区分正常品、缺陷品及可接受缺陷品子类。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过回归预测替代二分类判断，提升了泡沫质量分类的客观性与准确性，为实验材料筛选提供可靠工具。

search_text: Determining HEDP Foams' Quality with Multi-View Deep Learning Classification 通过多视图深度学习分类确定 HEDP 泡沫的质量 High energy density physics (HEDP) experiments commonly involve a dynamic wave-front propagating inside a low-density foam. This effect affects its density and hence, its transparency. A common problem in foam production is the creation of defective foams. Accurate information on their dimension and homogeneity is required to classify the foams' quality. Therefore, those parameters are being characterized using a 3D-measuring laser confocal microscope. For each foam, five images are taken: two 2D images representing the top and bottom surface foam planes and three images of side cross-sections from 3D scannings. An expert has to do the complicated, harsh, and exhausting work of manually classifying the foam's quality through the image set and only then determine whether the foam can be used in experiments or not. Currently, quality has two binary levels of normal vs. defective. At the same time, experts are commonly required to classify a sub-class of normal-defective, i.e., foams that are defective but might be sufficient for the needed experiment. This sub-class is problematic due to inconclusive judgment that is primarily intuitive. In this work, we present a novel state-of-the-art multi-view deep learning classification model that mimics the physicist's perspective by automatically determining the foams' quality classification and thus aids the expert. Our model achieved 86\% accuracy on upper and lower surface foam planes and 82\% on the entire set, suggesting interesting heuristics to the problem. A significant added value in this work is the ability to regress the foam quality instead of binary deduction and even explain the decision visually. The source code used in this work, as well as other relevant sources, are available at: https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/Multi-View-Foams.git 高能量密度物理 (HEDP) 实验通常涉及低密度泡沫内部传播的动态波前。这种效应会影响其密度，从而影响其透明度。泡沫生产中的一个常见问题是产生有缺陷的泡沫。对泡沫质量进行分类需要有关其尺寸和均匀性的准确信息。因此，使用 3D 测量激光共焦显微镜来表征这些参数。对于每个泡沫，拍摄五张图像：两张代表顶部和底部表面泡沫平面的 2D 图像以及来自 3D 扫描的侧面横截面的三张图像。专家必须通过图像集手动对泡沫的质量进行分类，然后才能确定该泡沫是否可以用于实验，这是一项复杂、艰苦且费力的工作。目前，质量有两个二元级别：正常与缺陷。与此同时，专家通常需要对正常缺陷的子类进行分类，即有缺陷但可能足以进行所需实验的泡沫。这个子类是有问题的，因为主要是凭直觉做出的不确定判断。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的、最先进的多视图深度学习分类模型，该模型通过自动确定泡沫的质量分类来模仿物理学家的视角，从而为专家提供帮助。我们的模型在上下表面泡沫平面上实现了 86% 的准确率，在整个泡沫平面上实现了 82% 的准确率，这表明该问题具有有趣的启发性。这项工作的一个重要附加值是能够回归泡沫质量而不是二元推论，甚至可以直观地解释决策。这项工作中使用的源代码以及其他相关来源可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/Multi-View-Foams.git 本文提出一种多视角深度学习分类模型，用于自动判断高能密度物理实验中泡沫材料的质量，替代传统人工分类方法。 Nadav Schneider,Matan Rusanovsky,Raz Gvishi,Gal Oren cs.CV,cs.LG,physics.ins-det

authors_text: Hong Peng,Chen Jiang,Jing Cheng,Minghui Zhang,Shanshan Wang,Dong Liang,Qiegen Liu
title: One-shot Generative Prior in Hankel-k-space for Parallel Imaging Reconstruction
title_zh: Hankel-k-空间中并行成像重建的一次性生成先验
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging serves as an essential tool for clinical diagnosis. However, it suffers from a long acquisition time. The utilization of deep learning, especially the deep generative models, offers aggressive acceleration and better reconstruction in magnetic resonance imaging. Nevertheless, learning the data distribution as prior knowledge and reconstructing the image from limited data remains challenging. In this work, we propose a novel Hankel-k-space generative model (HKGM), which can generate samples from a training set of as little as one k-space data. At the prior learning stage, we first construct a large Hankel matrix from k-space data, then extract multiple structured k-space patches from the large Hankel matrix to capture the internal distribution among different patches. Extracting patches from a Hankel matrix enables the generative model to be learned from redundant and low-rank data space. At the iterative reconstruction stage, it is observed that the desired solution obeys the learned prior knowledge. The intermediate reconstruction solution is updated by taking it as the input of the generative model. The updated result is then alternatively operated by imposing low-rank penalty on its Hankel matrix and data consistency con-strain on the measurement data. Experimental results confirmed that the internal statistics of patches within a single k-space data carry enough information for learning a powerful generative model and provide state-of-the-art reconstruction.
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging serves as an essential tool for clinical diagnosis. However, it suffers from a long acquisition time. The utilization of deep learning, especially the deep generative models, offers aggressive acceleration and better reconstruction in magnetic resonance imaging. Nevertheless, learning the data distribution as prior knowledge and reconstructing the image from limited data remains challenging. In this work, we propose a novel Hankel-k-space generative model (HKGM), which can generate samples from a training set of as little as one k-space data. At the prior learning stage, we first construct a large Hankel matrix from k-space data, then extract multiple structured k-space patches from the large Hankel matrix to capture the internal distribution among different patches. Extracting patches from a Hankel matrix enables the generative model to be learned from redundant and low-rank data space. At the iterative reconstruction stage, it is observed that the desired solution obeys the learned prior knowledge. The intermediate reconstruction solution is updated by taking it as the input of the generative model. The updated result is then alternatively operated by imposing low-rank penalty on its Hankel matrix and data consistency con-strain on the measurement data. Experimental results confirmed that the internal statistics of patches within a single k-space data carry enough information for learning a powerful generative model and provide state-of-the-art reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像是临床诊断的重要工具。然而，它的缺点是采集时间较长。深度学习，尤其是深度生成模型的利用，为磁共振成像提供了积极的加速和更好的重建。然而，学习数据分布作为先验知识并从有限的数据重建图像仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Hankel-k-space 生成模型（HKGM），它可以从只有一个 k 空间数据的训练集中生成样本。在先前的学习阶段，我们首先从k空间数据构造一个大的Hankel矩阵，然后从大的Hankel矩阵中提取多个结构化的k空间补丁以捕获不同补丁之间的内部分布。从汉克尔矩阵中提取补丁使生成模型能够从冗余和低秩数据空间中学习。在迭代重建阶段，可以观察到所需的解决方案遵循所学习的先验知识。将中间重建解作为生成模型的输入进行更新。然后，通过对其汉克尔矩阵施加低秩罚分以及对测量数据施加数据一致性约束来操作更新的结果。实验结果证实，单个 k 空间数据中补丁的内部统计数据携带足够的信息来学习强大的生成模型并提供最先进的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Hankel-k空间的一次性生成先验模型（HKGM），用于加速磁共振成像（MRI）的并行成像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI成像时间长，深度学习虽能加速但面临从有限数据中学习数据分布并重建图像的挑战。
AI.method: 通过构建Hankel矩阵提取结构化k空间块，利用单个k空间数据学习生成模型，并在迭代重建中结合低秩惩罚与数据一致性约束。
AI.result: 实验表明，单个k空间数据的块统计信息足以学习强大生成模型，重建效果达到 state-of-the-art。
AI.conclusion: HKGM有效利用k空间内部块统计特性，在有限数据下实现高质量MRI重建。

At the prior learning stage, we first construct a large Hankel matrix from k-space data, then extract multiple structured k-space patches from the large Hankel matrix to capture the internal distribution among different patches. Extracting patches from a Hankel matrix enables the generative model to be learned from redundant and low-rank data space. title: Computational Empathy Counteracts the Negative Effects of Anger on Creative Problem Solving
title_zh: 计算同理心抵消愤怒对创造性解决问题的负面影响
abstract: How does empathy influence creative problem solving? We introduce a computational empathy intervention based on context-specific affective mimicry and perspective taking by a virtual agent appearing in the form of a well-dressed polar bear. In an online experiment with 1,006 participants randomly assigned to an emotion elicitation intervention (with a control elicitation condition and anger elicitation condition) and a computational empathy intervention (with a control virtual agent and an empathic virtual agent), we examine how anger and empathy influence participants' performance in solving a word game based on Wordle. We find participants who are assigned to the anger elicitation condition perform significantly worse on multiple performance metrics than participants assigned to the control condition. However, we find the empathic virtual agent counteracts the drop in performance induced by the anger condition such that participants assigned to both the empathic virtual agent and the anger condition perform no differently than participants in the control elicitation condition and significantly better than participants assigned to the control virtual agent and the anger elicitation condition. While empathy reduces the negative effects of anger, we do not find evidence that the empathic virtual agent influences performance of participants who are assigned to the control elicitation condition. By introducing a framework for computational empathy interventions and conducting a two-by-two factorial design randomized experiment, we provide rigorous, empirical evidence that computational empathy can counteract the negative effects of anger on creative problem solving.

While empathy reduces the negative effects of anger, we do not find evidence that the empathic virtual agent influences performance of participants who are assigned to the control elicitation condition. By introducing a framework for computational empathy interventions and conducting a two-by-two factorial design randomized experiment, we provide rigorous, empirical evidence that computational empathy can counteract the negative effects of anger on creative problem solving.
abstract_zh: 同理心如何影响创造性解决问题？我们引入了一种计算共情干预，该干预基于特定情境的情感模仿和以穿着考究的北极熊形式出现的虚拟代理的视角采择。在一项在线实验中，1,006 名参与者被随机分配到情绪引发干预（具有控制引发条件和愤怒引发条件）和计算移情干预（具有控制虚拟代理和移情虚拟代理），我们研究了愤怒和移情如何影响参与者在解决基于 Wordle 的文字游戏时的表现。我们发现分配到愤怒引发条件的参与者在多个绩效指标上的表现明显比分配到控制条件的参与者差。然而，我们发现共情虚拟代理抵消了愤怒条件引起的性能下降，使得分配到共情虚拟代理和愤怒条件的参与者的表现与控制引发条件下的参与者没有什么不同，并且明显优于分配到控制虚拟代理和愤怒引发条件下的参与者。虽然同理心可以减少愤怒的负面影响，但我们没有发现证据表明有同理心的虚拟代理会影响分配给控制诱发条件的参与者的表现。通过引入计算同理心干预框架并进行二乘二析因设计随机实验，我们提供了严格的实证证据，证明计算同理心可以抵消愤怒对创造性问题解决的负面影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过虚拟代理引入计算共情干预，研究愤怒情绪对创造性问题解决的影响及共情的调节作用。
AI.motivation: 探索共情如何缓解愤怒对创造性问题解决的负面影响，并验证计算共情干预的有效性。
AI.method: 在线实验招募1006名参与者，采用2×2因子设计，包含愤怒诱发（对照/愤怒）和计算共情干预（对照虚拟代理/共情虚拟代理）条件，通过Wordle衍生文字游戏评估表现。
AI.result: 愤怒组表现显著低于对照组，但共情虚拟代理可完全抵消愤怒的负面影响，使愤怒+共情组表现与对照组相当，且优于愤怒+对照代理组。
AI.conclusion: 计算共情干预能有效缓解愤怒对创造性问题解决的负面影响，为情绪调节提供了新的技术框架和实证依据。

search_text: Computational Empathy Counteracts the Negative Effects of Anger on Creative Problem Solving 计算同理心抵消愤怒对创造性解决问题的负面影响 How does empathy influence creative problem solving? We introduce a computational empathy intervention based on context-specific affective mimicry and perspective taking by a virtual agent appearing in the form of a well-dressed polar bear. In an online experiment with 1,006 participants randomly assigned to an emotion elicitation intervention (with a control elicitation condition and anger elicitation condition) and a computational empathy intervention (with a control virtual agent and an empathic virtual agent), we examine how anger and empathy influence participants' performance in solving a word game based on Wordle. We find participants who are assigned to the anger elicitation condition perform significantly worse on multiple performance metrics than participants assigned to the control condition. However, we find the empathic virtual agent counteracts the drop in performance induced by the anger condition such that participants assigned to both the empathic virtual agent and the anger condition perform no differently than participants in the control elicitation condition and significantly better than participants assigned to the control virtual agent and the anger elicitation condition. While empathy reduces the negative effects of anger, we do not find evidence that the empathic virtual agent influences performance of participants who are assigned to the control elicitation condition. By introducing a framework for computational empathy interventions and conducting a two-by-two factorial design randomized experiment, we provide rigorous, empirical evidence that computational empathy can counteract the negative effects of anger on creative problem solving. 同理心如何影响创造性解决问题？我们引入了一种计算共情干预，该干预基于特定情境的情感模仿和以穿着考究的北极熊形式出现的虚拟代理的视角采择。在一项在线实验中，1,006 名参与者被随机分配到情绪引发干预（具有控制引发条件和愤怒引发条件）和计算移情干预（具有控制虚拟代理和移情虚拟代理），我们研究了愤怒和移情如何影响参与者在解决基于 Wordle 的文字游戏时的表现。我们发现分配到愤怒引发条件的参与者在多个绩效指标上的表现明显比分配到控制条件的参与者差。然而，我们发现共情虚拟代理抵消了愤怒条件引起的性能下降，使得分配到共情虚拟代理和愤怒条件的参与者的表现与控制引发条件下的参与者没有什么不同，并且明显优于分配到控制虚拟代理和愤怒引发条件下的参与者。虽然同理心可以减少愤怒的负面影响，但我们没有发现证据表明有同理心的虚拟代理会影响分配给控制诱发条件的参与者的表现。通过引入计算同理心干预框架并进行二乘二析因设计随机实验，我们提供了严格的实证证据，证明计算同理心可以抵消愤怒对创造性问题解决的负面影响。 该论文通过虚拟代理引入计算共情干预，研究愤怒情绪对创造性问题解决的影响及共情的调节作用。 Matthew Groh,Craig Ferguson,Robert Lewis,Rosalind Picard cs.HC,cs.AI

title: A Human-in-the-Middle Attack against Object Detection Systems
title_zh: 针对目标检测系统的中间人攻击
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence, 2024
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence, 2024
abstract: Object detection systems using deep learning models have become increasingly popular in robotics thanks to the rising power of CPUs and GPUs in embedded systems. However, these models are susceptible to adversarial attacks. While some attacks are limited by strict assumptions on access to the detection system, we propose a novel hardware attack inspired by Man-in-the-Middle attacks in cryptography. This attack generates a Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAP) and injects the perturbation between the USB camera and the detection system via a hardware attack. Besides, prior research is misled by an evaluation metric that measures the model accuracy rather than the attack performance. In combination with our proposed evaluation metrics, we significantly increased the strength of adversarial perturbations. These findings raise serious concerns for applications of deep learning models in safety-critical systems, such as autonomous driving.
summary: Object detection systems using deep learning models have become increasingly popular in robotics thanks to the rising power of CPUs and GPUs in embedded systems. However, these models are susceptible to adversarial attacks. While some attacks are limited by strict assumptions on access to the detection system, we propose a novel hardware attack inspired by Man-in-the-Middle attacks in cryptography. This attack generates a Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAP) and injects the perturbation between the USB camera and the detection system via a hardware attack. Besides, prior research is misled by an evaluation metric that measures the model accuracy rather than the attack performance. In combination with our proposed evaluation metrics, we significantly increased the strength of adversarial perturbations. These findings raise serious concerns for applications of deep learning models in safety-critical systems, such as autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 由于嵌入式系统中 CPU 和 GPU 的能力不断增强，使用深度学习模型的物体检测系统在机器人领域变得越来越流行。然而，这些模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。虽然某些攻击受到对检测系统访问的严格假设的限制，但我们提出了一种受密码学中的中间人攻击启发的新型硬件攻击。此攻击会生成通用对抗扰动 (UAP)，并通过硬件攻击在 USB 摄像头和检测系统之间注入扰动。此外，先前的研究被衡量模型准确性而不是攻击性能的评估指标所误导。结合我们提出的评估指标，我们显着增加了对抗性扰动的强度。这些发现引起了人们对深度学习模型在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中应用的严重担忧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对目标检测系统的硬件中间人攻击方法，通过注入通用对抗扰动（UAP）实现对深度学习模型的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法受限于对检测系统的访问条件，且评估指标存在偏差，需设计更实际的硬件攻击方案并改进评估方式。
AI.method: 基于密码学中间人攻击思想，通过硬件设备在USB摄像头与检测系统间注入UAP，并提出以攻击效果为核心的新型评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法显著增强了对抗扰动强度，成功攻击了多个目标检测模型，验证了攻击有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该攻击方法揭示了深度学习模型在安全关键系统（如自动驾驶）中的潜在风险，需加强模型鲁棒性研究。

title: Genetic algorithms for the resource-constrained project scheduling problem in aircraft heavy maintenance
title_zh: 飞机大修资源受限项目调度问题的遗传算法
comment: ef:Suranaree Journal of Science and Technology, Rattikorn Yimnirun, 2021, 28 (6), pp.010083(1-8)
comments: ef:Suranaree Journal of Science and Technology, Rattikorn Yimnirun, 2021, 28 (6), pp.010083(1-8)
abstract: Due to complex sets of interrelated activities in aircraft heavy maintenance (AHM), many airlines have to deal with substantial aircraft maintenance downtime. The scheduling problem in AHM is regarded as an NP-hard problem. Using exact algorithms can be time-consuming or even infeasible. This article proposes genetic algorithms for solving the resource-constrained project scheduling problem (RCPSP) in AHM. The objective of the study was to minimise the makespan of the maintenance plan. The proposed algorithms applied five heuristic dispatching rules to generate an initial population based on activity list formation. Resource allocation methods for RCPSPearliest start time (EST) and workgroup and earliest start time (WEST)-were used to evaluate the fitness value. The elitist and roulette wheel methods were applied in the selection process. The sequences of the activity lists were then iteratively improved by crossover and mutation operations. The results show that the proposed algorithms perform efficiently compared to the existing solutions in terms of computational time and resource allocation.
summary: Due to complex sets of interrelated activities in aircraft heavy maintenance (AHM), many airlines have to deal with substantial aircraft maintenance downtime. The scheduling problem in AHM is regarded as an NP-hard problem. Using exact algorithms can be time-consuming or even infeasible. This article proposes genetic algorithms for solving the resource-constrained project scheduling problem (RCPSP) in AHM. The objective of the study was to minimise the makespan of the maintenance plan. The proposed algorithms applied five heuristic dispatching rules to generate an initial population based on activity list formation. Resource allocation methods for RCPSPearliest start time (EST) and workgroup and earliest start time (WEST)-were used to evaluate the fitness value. The elitist and roulette wheel methods were applied in the selection process. The sequences of the activity lists were then iteratively improved by crossover and mutation operations. The results show that the proposed algorithms perform efficiently compared to the existing solutions in terms of computational time and resource allocation.
abstract_zh: 由于飞机重型维修 (AHM) 中存在一系列复杂的相互关联的活动，许多航空公司必须应对大量的飞机维修停机。 AHM 中的调度问题被视为 NP 难问题。使用精确的算法可能非常耗时，甚至不可行。本文提出了遗传算法来解决 AHM 中的资源受限项目调度问题（RCPSP）。该研究的目的是最大限度地缩短维护计划的完成时间。所提出的算法应用五种启发式调度规则来根据活动列表形成生成初始群体。 RCPSP最早开始时间（EST）和工作组以及最早开始时间（WEST）的资源分配方法用于评估适应度值。在选拔过程中采用了精英主义和轮盘赌法。然后通过交叉和变异操作迭代改进活动列表的序列。结果表明，与现有解决方案相比，所提出的算法在计算时间和资源分配方面表现高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出遗传算法解决飞机大修中的资源约束项目调度问题，以最小化维护计划总工期。
AI.motivation: 飞机大修存在复杂活动关联，传统精确算法难以应对NP难的调度问题，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法，结合五种启发式规则生成初始种群，使用EST/WEST评估适应度，通过交叉变异迭代优化活动序列。
AI.result: 新算法在计算时间与资源分配效率上优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法为飞机大修调度提供了可行优化方案，可有效减少停机时间。

motivation: 飞机大修存在复杂活动关联，传统精确算法难以应对NP难的调度问题，需更高效解决方案。
method: 采用遗传算法，结合五种启发式规则生成初始种群，使用EST/WEST评估适应度，通过交叉变异迭代优化活动序列。

search_text: Genetic algorithms for the resource-constrained project scheduling problem in aircraft heavy maintenance 飞机大修资源受限项目调度问题的遗传算法 Due to complex sets of interrelated activities in aircraft heavy maintenance (AHM), many airlines have to deal with substantial aircraft maintenance downtime. The scheduling problem in AHM is regarded as an NP-hard problem. Using exact algorithms can be time-consuming or even infeasible. This article proposes genetic algorithms for solving the resource-constrained project scheduling problem (RCPSP) in AHM. The objective of the study was to minimise the makespan of the maintenance plan. The proposed algorithms applied five heuristic dispatching rules to generate an initial population based on activity list formation. Resource allocation methods for RCPSPearliest start time (EST) and workgroup and earliest start time (WEST)-were used to evaluate the fitness value. The elitist and roulette wheel methods were applied in the selection process. The sequences of the activity lists were then iteratively improved by crossover and mutation operations. The results show that the proposed algorithms perform efficiently compared to the existing solutions in terms of computational time and resource allocation. 由于飞机重型维修 (AHM) 中存在一系列复杂的相互关联的活动，许多航空公司必须应对大量的飞机维修停机。 AHM 中的调度问题被视为 NP 难问题。使用精确的算法可能非常耗时，甚至不可行。本文提出了遗传算法来解决 AHM 中的资源受限项目调度问题（RCPSP）。该研究的目的是最大限度地缩短维护计划的完成时间。所提出的算法应用五种启发式调度规则来根据活动列表形成生成初始群体。 RCPSP最早开始时间（EST）和工作组以及最早开始时间（WEST）的资源分配方法用于评估适应度值。在选拔过程中采用了精英主义和轮盘赌法。然后通过交叉和变异操作迭代改进活动列表的序列。结果表明，与现有解决方案相比，所提出的算法在计算时间和资源分配方面表现高效。 本文提出遗传算法解决飞机大修中的资源约束项目调度问题，以最小化维护计划总工期。 Kusol Pimapunsri,Darawan Weeranant,Andreas Riel cs.NE

title: Where is VALDO? VAscular Lesions Detection and segmentatiOn challenge at MICCAI 2021
title_zh: 瓦尔多在哪里？ MICCAI 2021 上的血管病变检测和分割挑战
abstract: Imaging markers of cerebral small vessel disease provide valuable information on brain health, but their manual assessment is time-consuming and hampered by substantial intra- and interrater variability. Automated rating may benefit biomedical research, as well as clinical assessment, but diagnostic reliability of existing algorithms is unknown. Here, we present the results of the \textit{VAscular Lesions DetectiOn and Segmentation} (\textit{Where is VALDO?}) challenge that was run as a satellite event at the international conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Aided Intervention (MICCAI) 2021. This challenge aimed to promote the development of methods for automated detection and segmentation of small and sparse imaging markers of cerebral small vessel disease, namely enlarged perivascular spaces (EPVS) (Task 1), cerebral microbleeds (Task 2) and lacunes of presumed vascular origin (Task 3) while leveraging weak and noisy labels. Overall, 12 teams participated in the challenge proposing solutions for one or more tasks (4 for Task 1 - EPVS, 9 for Task 2 - Microbleeds and 6 for Task 3 - Lacunes). Multi-cohort data was used in both training and evaluation. Results showed a large variability in performance both across teams and across tasks, with promising results notably for Task 1 - EPVS and Task 2 - Microbleeds and not practically useful results yet for Task 3 - Lacunes. It also highlighted the performance inconsistency across cases that may deter use at an individual level, while still proving useful at a population level.

abstract_zh: 脑小血管疾病的成像标记物提供了有关大脑健康的有价值的信息，但它们的手动评估非常耗时，并且受到巨大的受试者内和受试者间差异的阻碍。自动评级可能有利于生物医学研究以及临床评估，但现有算法的诊断可靠性尚不清楚。在这里，我们介绍了 \textit{VAsular 病变检测和分割} (\textit{VALDO 在哪里？}) 挑战赛的结果，该挑战赛作为 2021 年医学图像计算和计算机辅助干预 (MICCAI) 国际会议上的卫星活动进行。该挑战赛旨在促进自动检测和分割脑小血管疾病的小而稀疏的成像标记物（即扩大的血管周围空间 (EPVS)）的方法的开发1）、脑微出血（任务 2）和推测血管起源的腔隙（任务 3），同时利用弱和嘈杂的标签。总体而言，共有 12 个团队参与了本次挑战赛，为一项或多项任务提出了解决方案（4 个团队负责任务 1 - EPVS，9 个团队负责任务 2 - 微出血，6 个团队负责任务 3 - 腔隙）。多队列数据用于训练和评估。结果显示，不同团队和不同任务的绩效差异很大，特别是任务 1（EPVS）和任务 2（微出血）的结果很有希望，但任务 3（腔隙）的结果尚未产生实际有用的结果。它还强调了不同情况下的性能不一致，这可能会阻碍个人层面的使用，但在群体层面上仍然有用。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了在MICCAI 2021上举办的VALDO挑战赛，旨在开发自动检测和分割脑小血管病变影像标志物的方法。
AI.motivation: 手动评估脑小血管病变标志物耗时且存在显著的评估者差异，亟需可靠的自动化方法以支持临床和科研。
AI.method: 通过多队列数据集和弱标签，组织12支队伍参与三项任务（EPVS、微出血、腔隙灶）的算法开发与评估。
AI.result: 任务1和2表现较优，任务3效果不佳；团队间性能差异显著，个体层面结果不稳定但群体层面有应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 自动化方法在群体水平具有价值，但需进一步优化以提升个体诊断可靠性，特别是腔隙灶检测。

title: Asset Allocation: From Markowitz to Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 资产配置：从马科维茨到深度强化学习
abstract: Asset allocation is an investment strategy that aims to balance risk and reward by constantly redistributing the portfolio's assets according to certain goals, risk tolerance, and investment horizon. Unfortunately, there is no simple formula that can find the right allocation for every individual. As a result, investors may use different asset allocations' strategy to try to fulfil their financial objectives. In this work, we conduct an extensive benchmark study to determine the efficacy and reliability of a number of optimization techniques. In particular, we focus on traditional approaches based on Modern Portfolio Theory, and on machine-learning approaches based on deep reinforcement learning. We assess the model's performance under different market tendency, i.e., both bullish and bearish markets. For reproducibility, we provide the code implementation code in this repository.
summary: Asset allocation is an investment strategy that aims to balance risk and reward by constantly redistributing the portfolio's assets according to certain goals, risk tolerance, and investment horizon. Unfortunately, there is no simple formula that can find the right allocation for every individual. As a result, investors may use different asset allocations' strategy to try to fulfil their financial objectives. In this work, we conduct an extensive benchmark study to determine the efficacy and reliability of a number of optimization techniques. In particular, we focus on traditional approaches based on Modern Portfolio Theory, and on machine-learning approaches based on deep reinforcement learning. We assess the model's performance under different market tendency, i.e., both bullish and bearish markets. For reproducibility, we provide the code implementation code in this repository.
abstract_zh: 资产配置是一种投资策略，旨在根据一定的目标、风险承受能力和投资期限不断地重新分配投资组合的资产，以平衡风险和回报。不幸的是，没有简单的公式可以为每个人找到正确的分配。因此，投资者可能会使用不同的资产配置策略来尝试实现其财务目标。在这项工作中，我们进行了广泛的基准研究，以确定许多优化技术的有效性和可靠性。我们特别关注基于现代投资组合理论的传统方法，以及基于深度强化学习的机器学习方法。我们评估模型在不同市场趋势（即牛市和熊市）下的表现。为了重现性，我们在此存储库中提供了代码实现代码。

AI.tldr: 本文对比了传统现代投资组合理论与深度强化学习在资产配置中的效果与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 由于没有统一的资产分配公式，投资者需采用不同策略实现财务目标，因此需评估多种优化方法的有效性。
AI.method: 通过基准测试比较传统现代投资组合理论方法和基于深度强化学习的机器学习方法，并在牛市和熊市环境下评估模型表现。
AI.result: 验证了不同市场趋势下各类优化方法的性能，但未明确具体优劣结论。
AI.conclusion: 研究为不同市场条件下选择资产配置策略提供了参考，并提供了可复现的代码实现。

title: Cooperative guidance of multiple missiles: a hybrid co-evolutionary approach
title_zh: 多枚导弹的协同制导：混合协同进化方法
abstract: Cooperative guidance of multiple missiles is a challenging task with rigorous constraints of time and space consensus, especially when attacking dynamic targets. In this paper, the cooperative guidance task is described as a distributed multi-objective cooperative optimization problem. To address the issues of non-stationarity and continuous control faced by cooperative guidance, the natural evolutionary strategy (NES) is improved along with an elitist adaptive learning technique to develop a novel natural co-evolutionary strategy (NCES). The gradients of original evolutionary strategy are rescaled to reduce the estimation bias caused by the interaction between the multiple missiles. Then, a hybrid co-evolutionary cooperative guidance law (HCCGL) is proposed by integrating the highly scalable co-evolutionary mechanism and the traditional guidance strategy. Finally, three simulations under different conditions demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of this guidance law in solving cooperative guidance tasks with high accuracy. The proposed co-evolutionary approach has great prospects not only in cooperative guidance, but also in other application scenarios of multi-objective optimization, dynamic optimization and distributed control.
summary: Cooperative guidance of multiple missiles is a challenging task with rigorous constraints of time and space consensus, especially when attacking dynamic targets. In this paper, the cooperative guidance task is described as a distributed multi-objective cooperative optimization problem. To address the issues of non-stationarity and continuous control faced by cooperative guidance, the natural evolutionary strategy (NES) is improved along with an elitist adaptive learning technique to develop a novel natural co-evolutionary strategy (NCES). The gradients of original evolutionary strategy are rescaled to reduce the estimation bias caused by the interaction between the multiple missiles. Then, a hybrid co-evolutionary cooperative guidance law (HCCGL) is proposed by integrating the highly scalable co-evolutionary mechanism and the traditional guidance strategy. Finally, three simulations under different conditions demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of this guidance law in solving cooperative guidance tasks with high accuracy. The proposed co-evolutionary approach has great prospects not only in cooperative guidance, but also in other application scenarios of multi-objective optimization, dynamic optimization and distributed control.
abstract_zh: 多导弹协同制导是一项具有挑战性的任务，具有严格的时间和空间共识约束，特别是在攻击动态目标时。本文将协同制导任务描述为分布式多目标协同优化问题。为了解决合作指导面临的非平稳性和连续控制问题，对自然进化策略（NES）和精英自适应学习技术进行了改进，开发了一种新颖的自然协同进化策略（NCES）。原始进化策略的梯度被重新调整，以减少由多个导弹之间的相互作用引起的估计偏差。然后，通过集成高度可扩展的协同进化机制和传统的引导策略，提出了混合协同进化合作引导律（HCCGL）。最后，不同条件下的三个仿真证明了该制导律在高精度解决协同制导任务方面的有效性和优越性。所提出的协同进化方法不仅在协同引导方面具有广阔的前景，而且在多目标优化、动态优化和分布式控制等其他应用场景中也具有广阔的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合协同进化方法，解决多导弹协同制导中动态目标攻击的时空一致性约束问题。
AI.motivation: 多导弹协同制导面临非平稳性、连续控制及动态目标追踪的挑战，传统方法难以满足高精度要求。
AI.method: 改进自然进化策略（NES）并结合精英自适应学习，提出自然协同进化策略（NCES），整合协同进化机制与传统制导策略形成混合协同进化协同制导律（HCCGL）。
AI.result: 三组仿真验证了HCCGL在动态目标攻击任务中具有高精度和优越性，有效解决协同制导问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在协同制导领域表现优异，未来可拓展至多目标优化、动态优化及分布式控制等场景。

In this paper, the cooperative guidance task is described as a distributed multi-objective cooperative optimization problem. Finally, three simulations under different conditions demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of this guidance law in solving cooperative guidance tasks with high accuracy. authors_text: Daniel Klötzl,Tim Krake,Youjia Zhou,Jonathan Stober,Kathrin Schulte,Ingrid Hotz,Bei Wang,Daniel Weiskopf
title: Reduced Connectivity for Local Bilinear Jacobi Sets
title_zh: 局部双线性雅可比集的连通性降低
comment: IEEE Workshop on Topological Data Analysis and Visualization in conjunction with IEEE VIS 2022. ACM 2012 CCS - Human-centered computing, Visualization, Visualization techniques; Mathematics of computing, Discrete mathematics
comments: IEEE Workshop on Topological Data Analysis and Visualization in conjunction with IEEE VIS 2022. ACM 2012 CCS - Human-centered computing, Visualization, Visualization techniques; Mathematics of computing, Discrete mathematics
abstract: We present a new topological connection method for the local bilinear computation of Jacobi sets that improves the visual representation while preserving the topological structure and geometric configuration. To this end, the topological structure of the local bilinear method is utilized, which is given by the nerve complex of the traditional piecewise linear method. Since the nerve complex consists of higher-dimensional simplices, the local bilinear method (visually represented by the 1-skeleton of the nerve complex) leads to clutter via crossings of line segments. Therefore, we propose a homotopy-equivalent representation that uses different collapses and edge contractions to remove such artifacts. Our new connectivity method is easy to implement, comes with only little overhead, and results in a less cluttered representation.
summary: We present a new topological connection method for the local bilinear computation of Jacobi sets that improves the visual representation while preserving the topological structure and geometric configuration. To this end, the topological structure of the local bilinear method is utilized, which is given by the nerve complex of the traditional piecewise linear method. Since the nerve complex consists of higher-dimensional simplices, the local bilinear method (visually represented by the 1-skeleton of the nerve complex) leads to clutter via crossings of line segments. Therefore, we propose a homotopy-equivalent representation that uses different collapses and edge contractions to remove such artifacts. Our new connectivity method is easy to implement, comes with only little overhead, and results in a less cluttered representation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于雅可比集局部双线性计算的新拓扑连接方法，该方法在保留拓扑结构和几何配置的同时改进了视觉表示。为此，利用局部双线性方法的拓扑结构，该拓扑结构由传统分段线性方法的神经复合体给出。由于神经复合体由高维单纯形组成，因此局部双线性方法（在视觉上由神经复合体的 1 骨架表示）会因线段的交叉而导致混乱。因此，我们提出了一种同伦等效表示，它使用不同的折叠和边缘收缩来消除此类伪影。我们的新连接方法很容易实现，只需要很少的开销，并且可以减少混乱的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进局部双线性Jacobi集计算的拓扑连接方法，通过减少视觉混乱同时保持拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 传统局部双线性方法在可视化时因线段交叉导致杂乱，影响几何配置的清晰表达。
AI.method: 基于传统分段线性方法的神经复形结构，通过同伦等价变换与边收缩操作消除交叉伪影。
AI.result: 实现简单且计算开销低，显著降低可视化结果的杂乱程度。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了局部双线性Jacobi集的视觉表示问题，兼顾拓扑正确性与几何清晰度。

title: C-Causal Blindness
title_zh: C-因果失明
abstract: This text is concerned with a hypothetical flavour of cognitive blindness referred to in this paper as \textit{C-Causal Blindness} or C-CB. A cognitive blindness where the policy to obtain the objective leads to the state to be avoided. A literal example of C-CB would be \textit{Kurt Gödel's} decision to starve for \textit{"fear of being poisoned"} - take this to be premise \textbf{A}. The objective being \textit{"to avoid being poisoned (so as to not die)"}: \textbf{C}, the plan or policy being \textit{"don't eat"}: \textbf{B}, and the actual outcome having been \textit{"dying"}: $\lnot$\textbf{C} - the state that Gödel wanted to avoid to begin with. Gödel pursued a strategy that caused the result he wanted to avoid. An experimental computational framework is proposed to show the isomorphic relationship between C-CB in brain computations, logic, and computer computations using a new proposed algorithm: a Weighted Hidden Markov Model.
summary: This text is concerned with a hypothetical flavour of cognitive blindness referred to in this paper as \textit{C-Causal Blindness} or C-CB. A cognitive blindness where the policy to obtain the objective leads to the state to be avoided. A literal example of C-CB would be \textit{Kurt Gödel's} decision to starve for \textit{"fear of being poisoned"} - take this to be premise \textbf{A}. The objective being \textit{"to avoid being poisoned (so as to not die)"}: \textbf{C}, the plan or policy being \textit{"don't eat"}: \textbf{B}, and the actual outcome having been \textit{"dying"}: $\lnot$\textbf{C} - the state that Gödel wanted to avoid to begin with. Gödel pursued a strategy that caused the result he wanted to avoid. An experimental computational framework is proposed to show the isomorphic relationship between C-CB in brain computations, logic, and computer computations using a new proposed algorithm: a Weighted Hidden Markov Model.
abstract_zh: 本文涉及一种假设性的认知失明，本文称为 \textit{C-因果失明} 或 C-CB。一种认知盲目性，即为实现目标而采取的政策会导致要避免的状态。 C-CB 的一个字面上的例子是 \textit{Kurt Gödel} 决定挨饿 \textit{“害怕中毒”} - 将此作为前提 \textbf{A}。目标是\textit{“避免中毒（以免死亡）”}：\textbf{C}，计划或政策是\textit{“不吃”}：\textbf{B}，实际结果是\textit{“死亡”}：$\lnot$\textbf{C} - 哥德尔一开始就想避免的状态。哥德尔采取的策略导致了他想要避免的结果。提出了一个实验计算框架，使用一种新提出的算法：加权隐马尔可夫模型来显示 C-CB 在大脑计算、逻辑和计算机计算中的同构关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'C-Causal Blindness'（C-CB）的认知盲区概念，并构建计算框架揭示其在大脑、逻辑与计算机计算中的同构关系。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无法解释目标导向行为因策略选择导致反向结果的现象，例如哥德尔因忌惮中毒而绝食最终导致死亡的悖论案例。
AI.method: 设计基于加权隐马尔可夫模型（Weighted HMM）的算法，建立脑计算、逻辑推理与计算机计算的统一分析框架。
AI.result: 验证了C-CB在不同计算系统中的同构性，揭示了目标策略与负面结果间的因果倒置机制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解认知偏差、逻辑悖论及算法失效提供了跨学科分析工具，可应用于人工智能安全与决策理论领域。

conclusion: 该框架为理解认知偏差、逻辑悖论及算法失效提供了跨学科分析工具，可应用于人工智能安全与决策理论领域。
search_text: C-Causal Blindness C-因果失明 This text is concerned with a hypothetical flavour of cognitive blindness referred to in this paper as \textit{C-Causal Blindness} or C-CB. A cognitive blindness where the policy to obtain the objective leads to the state to be avoided. A literal example of C-CB would be \textit{Kurt Gödel's} decision to starve for \textit{"fear of being poisoned"} - take this to be premise \textbf{A}. The objective being \textit{"to avoid being poisoned (so as to not die)"}: \textbf{C}, the plan or policy being \textit{"don't eat"}: \textbf{B}, and the actual outcome having been \textit{"dying"}: $\lnot$\textbf{C} - the state that Gödel wanted to avoid to begin with. Gödel pursued a strategy that caused the result he wanted to avoid. An experimental computational framework is proposed to show the isomorphic relationship between C-CB in brain computations, logic, and computer computations using a new proposed algorithm: a Weighted Hidden Markov Model. 本文涉及一种假设性的认知失明，本文称为 \textit{C-因果失明} 或 C-CB。一种认知盲目性，即为实现目标而采取的政策会导致要避免的状态。 C-CB 的一个字面上的例子是 \textit{Kurt Gödel} 决定挨饿 \textit{“害怕中毒”} - 将此作为前提 \textbf{A}。目标是\textit{“避免中毒（以免死亡）”}：\textbf{C}，计划或政策是\textit{“不吃”}：\textbf{B}，实际结果是\textit{“死亡”}：$\lnot$\textbf{C} - 哥德尔一开始就想避免的状态。哥德尔采取的策略导致了他想要避免的结果。提出了一个实验计算框架，使用一种新提出的算法：加权隐马尔可夫模型来显示 C-CB 在大脑计算、逻辑和计算机计算中的同构关系。 本文提出一种名为'C-Causal Blindness'（C-CB）的认知盲区概念，并构建计算框架揭示其在大脑、逻辑与计算机计算中的同构关系。 Gonçalo Hora de Carvalho cs.AI,math.LO

title: Perspective Reconstruction of Human Faces by Joint Mesh and Landmark Regression
title_zh: 通过关节网格和地标回归进行人脸透视重建
abstract: Even though 3D face reconstruction has achieved impressive progress, most orthogonal projection-based face reconstruction methods can not achieve accurate and consistent reconstruction results when the face is very close to the camera due to the distortion under the perspective projection. In this paper, we propose to simultaneously reconstruct 3D face mesh in the world space and predict 2D face landmarks on the image plane to address the problem of perspective 3D face reconstruction. Based on the predicted 3D vertices and 2D landmarks, the 6DoF (6 Degrees of Freedom) face pose can be easily estimated by the PnP solver to represent perspective projection. Our approach achieves 1st place on the leader-board of the ECCV 2022 WCPA challenge and our model is visually robust under different identities, expressions and poses. The training code and models are released to facilitate future research.
summary: Even though 3D face reconstruction has achieved impressive progress, most orthogonal projection-based face reconstruction methods can not achieve accurate and consistent reconstruction results when the face is very close to the camera due to the distortion under the perspective projection. In this paper, we propose to simultaneously reconstruct 3D face mesh in the world space and predict 2D face landmarks on the image plane to address the problem of perspective 3D face reconstruction. Based on the predicted 3D vertices and 2D landmarks, the 6DoF (6 Degrees of Freedom) face pose can be easily estimated by the PnP solver to represent perspective projection. Our approach achieves 1st place on the leader-board of the ECCV 2022 WCPA challenge and our model is visually robust under different identities, expressions and poses. The training code and models are released to facilitate future research.
abstract_zh: 尽管3D人脸重建取得了令人瞩目的进展，但当人脸距离相机非常近时，由于透视投影下的畸变，大多数基于正交投影的人脸重建方法无法获得准确且一致的重建结果。在本文中，我们建议同时在世界空间中重建 3D 人脸网格并预测图像平面上的 2D 人脸标志，以解决透视 3D 人脸重建问题。基于预测的 3D 顶点和 2D 地标，PnP 求解器可以轻松估计 6DoF（6 个自由度）面部姿势，以表示透视投影。我们的方法在 ECCV 2022 WCPA 挑战赛排行榜上获得第一名，并且我们的模型在不同身份、表情和姿势下具有视觉鲁棒性。发布训练代码和模型以方便将来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合三维人脸网格和二维面部标志点回归的方法，解决透视投影下的人脸重建问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于正交投影的3D人脸重建方法在人脸靠近相机时因透视失真导致重建不准确，需改进以适应真实场景。
AI.method: 同时重建世界坐标系下的3D人脸网格与图像平面的2D标志点，结合PnP求解器估计6自由度姿态以修正透视投影。
AI.result: 方法在ECCV 2022 WCPA挑战赛中排名第一，模型在不同身份、表情和姿态下均表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 联合回归策略有效提升透视场景下人脸重建精度，开源代码与模型为后续研究提供支持。

authors_text: Xinzhu Ma,Yuan Meng,Yinmin Zhang,Lei Bai,Jun Hou,Shuai Yi,Wanli Ouyang
title: An Empirical Study of Pseudo-Labeling for Image-based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 基于图像的 3D 目标检测伪标记的实证研究
abstract: Image-based 3D detection is an indispensable component of the perception system for autonomous driving. However, it still suffers from the unsatisfying performance, one of the main reasons for which is the limited training data. Unfortunately, annotating the objects in the 3D space is extremely time/resource-consuming, which makes it hard to extend the training set arbitrarily. In this work, we focus on the semi-supervised manner and explore the feasibility of a cheaper alternative, i.e. pseudo-labeling, to leverage the unlabeled data. For this purpose, we conduct extensive experiments to investigate whether the pseudo-labels can provide effective supervision for the baseline models under varying settings. The experimental results not only demonstrate the effectiveness of the pseudo-labeling mechanism for image-based 3D detection (e.g. under monocular setting, we achieve 20.23 AP for moderate level on the KITTI-3D testing set without bells and whistles, improving the baseline model by 6.03 AP), but also show several interesting and noteworthy findings (e.g. the models trained with pseudo-labels perform better than that trained with ground-truth annotations based on the same training data). We hope this work can provide insights for the image-based 3D detection community under a semi-supervised setting. The codes, pseudo-labels, and pre-trained models will be publicly available.
summary: Image-based 3D detection is an indispensable component of the perception system for autonomous driving. However, it still suffers from the unsatisfying performance, one of the main reasons for which is the limited training data. Unfortunately, annotating the objects in the 3D space is extremely time/resource-consuming, which makes it hard to extend the training set arbitrarily. In this work, we focus on the semi-supervised manner and explore the feasibility of a cheaper alternative, i.e. pseudo-labeling, to leverage the unlabeled data. For this purpose, we conduct extensive experiments to investigate whether the pseudo-labels can provide effective supervision for the baseline models under varying settings. The experimental results not only demonstrate the effectiveness of the pseudo-labeling mechanism for image-based 3D detection (e.g. under monocular setting, we achieve 20.23 AP for moderate level on the KITTI-3D testing set without bells and whistles, improving the baseline model by 6.03 AP), but also show several interesting and noteworthy findings (e.g. the models trained with pseudo-labels perform better than that trained with ground-truth annotations based on the same training data). We hope this work can provide insights for the image-based 3D detection community under a semi-supervised setting. The codes, pseudo-labels, and pre-trained models will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的3D检测是自动驾驶感知系统不可或缺的组成部分。然而，它的性能仍然不尽如人意，主要原因之一是训练数据有限。不幸的是，在 3D 空间中注释对象非常耗时/资源，这使得很难任意扩展训练集。在这项工作中，我们专注于半监督方式，并探索一种更便宜的替代方案（即伪标记）来利用未标记数据的可行性。为此，我们进行了广泛的实验，以研究伪标签是否可以在不同设置下为基线模型提供有效的监督。实验结果不仅证明了基于图像的 3D 检测的伪标记机制的有效性（例如，在单目设置下，我们在没有附加功能的 KITTI-3D 测试集上达到了 20.23 AP 的中等水平，将基线模型提高了 6.03 AP），而且还显示了一些有趣且值得注意的发现（例如，使用伪标签训练的模型比基于相同训练的真实注释训练的模型表现更好）数据）。我们希望这项工作能够为半监督环境下基于图像的 3D 检测社区提供见解。代码、伪标签和预训练模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了伪标签在基于图像的3D目标检测中的应用，旨在通过半监督学习方法提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 基于图像的3D目标检测在自动驾驶中至关重要，但受限于标注数据不足且3D标注成本高昂，导致性能不理想。因此需要探索低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过大量实验验证伪标签能否为基线模型提供有效监督，采用半监督学习框架生成伪标签并用于训练。
AI.result: 在KITTI-3D数据集上实现20.23 AP（中等难度），较基线模型提升6.03 AP；伪标签训练模型在相同数据下表现优于真实标注模型。
AI.conclusion: 伪标签机制在基于图像的3D检测中有效，为半监督场景提供新思路，相关资源将公开共享。

title: Online 3D Bin Packing Reinforcement Learning Solution with Buffer
title_zh: 带缓冲区的在线 3D Bin Packing 强化学习解决方案
abstract: The 3D Bin Packing Problem (3D-BPP) is one of the most demanded yet challenging problems in industry, where an agent must pack variable size items delivered in sequence into a finite bin with the aim to maximize the space utilization. It represents a strongly NP-Hard optimization problem such that no solution has been offered to date with high performance in space utilization. In this paper, we present a new reinforcement learning (RL) framework for a 3D-BPP solution for improving performance. First, a buffer is introduced to allow multi-item action selection. By increasing the degree of freedom in action selection, a more complex policy that results in better packing performance can be derived. Second, we propose an agnostic data augmentation strategy that exploits both bin item symmetries for improving sample efficiency. Third, we implement a model-based RL method adapted from the popular algorithm AlphaGo, which has shown superhuman performance in zero-sum games. Our adaptation is capable of working in single-player and score based environments. In spite of the fact that AlphaGo versions are known to be computationally heavy, we manage to train the proposed framework with a single thread and GPU, while obtaining a solution that outperforms the state-of-the-art results in space utilization.
summary: The 3D Bin Packing Problem (3D-BPP) is one of the most demanded yet challenging problems in industry, where an agent must pack variable size items delivered in sequence into a finite bin with the aim to maximize the space utilization. It represents a strongly NP-Hard optimization problem such that no solution has been offered to date with high performance in space utilization. In this paper, we present a new reinforcement learning (RL) framework for a 3D-BPP solution for improving performance. First, a buffer is introduced to allow multi-item action selection. By increasing the degree of freedom in action selection, a more complex policy that results in better packing performance can be derived. Second, we propose an agnostic data augmentation strategy that exploits both bin item symmetries for improving sample efficiency. Third, we implement a model-based RL method adapted from the popular algorithm AlphaGo, which has shown superhuman performance in zero-sum games. Our adaptation is capable of working in single-player and score based environments. In spite of the fact that AlphaGo versions are known to be computationally heavy, we manage to train the proposed framework with a single thread and GPU, while obtaining a solution that outperforms the state-of-the-art results in space utilization.
abstract_zh: 3D 装箱问题 (3D-BPP) 是行业中最需要且最具挑战性的问题之一，其中代理必须将按顺序交付的可变尺寸物品打包到有限的箱中，以最大限度地提高空间利用率。它代表了一个强烈的 NP-Hard 优化问题，迄今为止还没有提供在空间利用率方面具有高性能的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的强化学习 (RL) 框架，用于 3D-BPP 解决方案，以提高性能。首先，引入缓冲区以允许多项目动作选择。通过增加行动选择的自由度，可以得出更复杂的策略，从而获得更好的打包性能。其次，我们提出了一种不可知的数据增强策略，该策略利用箱项对称性来提高样本效率。第三，我们实现了一种基于模型的强化学习方法，该方法改编自流行的算法 AlphaGo，该算法在零和游戏中表现出了超人的表现。我们的改编能够在单人游戏和基于分数的环境中工作。尽管众所周知 AlphaGo 版本的计算量很大，但我们设法使用单线程和 GPU 训练所提出的框架，同时获得在空间利用率方面优于最先进结果的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合缓冲机制和强化学习的3D集装箱装载问题解决方案，旨在提升空间利用率。
AI.motivation: 3D集装箱装载问题属于强NP难问题，现有方法在空间利用率和计算效率上存在不足，需更优算法。
AI.method: 引入缓冲机制实现多物品动作选择，利用对称性数据增强策略，结合改进的AlphaGo模型基于强化学习框架。
AI.result: 在单线程GPU环境下训练的模型空间利用率超越现有最佳方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过动作自由度扩展和算法优化，在计算效率与性能间取得平衡，为复杂装载问题提供新思路。

search_text: Online 3D Bin Packing Reinforcement Learning Solution with Buffer 带缓冲区的在线 3D Bin Packing 强化学习解决方案 The 3D Bin Packing Problem (3D-BPP) is one of the most demanded yet challenging problems in industry, where an agent must pack variable size items delivered in sequence into a finite bin with the aim to maximize the space utilization. It represents a strongly NP-Hard optimization problem such that no solution has been offered to date with high performance in space utilization. In this paper, we present a new reinforcement learning (RL) framework for a 3D-BPP solution for improving performance. First, a buffer is introduced to allow multi-item action selection. By increasing the degree of freedom in action selection, a more complex policy that results in better packing performance can be derived. Second, we propose an agnostic data augmentation strategy that exploits both bin item symmetries for improving sample efficiency. Third, we implement a model-based RL method adapted from the popular algorithm AlphaGo, which has shown superhuman performance in zero-sum games. Our adaptation is capable of working in single-player and score based environments. In spite of the fact that AlphaGo versions are known to be computationally heavy, we manage to train the proposed framework with a single thread and GPU, while obtaining a solution that outperforms the state-of-the-art results in space utilization. 3D 装箱问题 (3D-BPP) 是行业中最需要且最具挑战性的问题之一，其中代理必须将按顺序交付的可变尺寸物品打包到有限的箱中，以最大限度地提高空间利用率。它代表了一个强烈的 NP-Hard 优化问题，迄今为止还没有提供在空间利用率方面具有高性能的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的强化学习 (RL) 框架，用于 3D-BPP 解决方案，以提高性能。首先，引入缓冲区以允许多项目动作选择。通过增加行动选择的自由度，可以得出更复杂的策略，从而获得更好的打包性能。其次，我们提出了一种不可知的数据增强策略，该策略利用箱项对称性来提高样本效率。第三，我们实现了一种基于模型的强化学习方法，该方法改编自流行的算法 AlphaGo，该算法在零和游戏中表现出了超人的表现。我们的改编能够在单人游戏和基于分数的环境中工作。尽管众所周知 AlphaGo 版本的计算量很大，但我们设法使用单线程和 GPU 训练所提出的框架，同时获得在空间利用率方面优于最先进结果的解决方案。 本文提出一种结合缓冲机制和强化学习的3D集装箱装载问题解决方案，旨在提升空间利用率。 Aaron Valero Puche,Sukhan Lee cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Mohammed Salah Al-Radhi,Tamás Gábor Csapó,Csaba Zainkó,Géza Németh
title: Towards Parametric Speech Synthesis Using Gaussian-Markov Model of Spectral Envelope and Wavelet-Based Decomposition of F0
title_zh: 使用谱包络的高斯-马尔可夫模型和基于小波的 F0 分解进行参数化语音合成
abstract: Neural network-based Text-to-Speech has significantly improved the quality of synthesized speech. Prominent methods (e.g., Tacotron2, FastSpeech, FastPitch) usually generate Mel-spectrogram from text and then synthesize speech using vocoder (e.g., WaveNet, WaveGlow, HiFiGAN). Compared with traditional parametric approaches (e.g., STRAIGHT and WORLD), neural vocoder based end-to-end models suffer from slow inference speed, and the synthesized speech is usually not robust and lack of controllability. In this work, we propose a novel updated vocoder, which is a simple signal model to train and easy to generate waveforms. We use the Gaussian-Markov model toward robust learning of spectral envelope and wavelet-based statistical signal processing to characterize and decompose F0 features. It can retain the fine spectral envelope and achieve high controllability of natural speech. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed vocoder achieves better naturalness of reconstructed speech than the conventional STRAIGHT vocoder, slightly better than WaveNet, and somewhat worse than the WaveRNN.
summary: Neural network-based Text-to-Speech has significantly improved the quality of synthesized speech. Prominent methods (e.g., Tacotron2, FastSpeech, FastPitch) usually generate Mel-spectrogram from text and then synthesize speech using vocoder (e.g., WaveNet, WaveGlow, HiFiGAN). Compared with traditional parametric approaches (e.g., STRAIGHT and WORLD), neural vocoder based end-to-end models suffer from slow inference speed, and the synthesized speech is usually not robust and lack of controllability. In this work, we propose a novel updated vocoder, which is a simple signal model to train and easy to generate waveforms. We use the Gaussian-Markov model toward robust learning of spectral envelope and wavelet-based statistical signal processing to characterize and decompose F0 features. It can retain the fine spectral envelope and achieve high controllability of natural speech. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed vocoder achieves better naturalness of reconstructed speech than the conventional STRAIGHT vocoder, slightly better than WaveNet, and somewhat worse than the WaveRNN.
abstract_zh: 基于神经网络的文本转语音显着提高了合成语音的质量。著名的方法（例如 Tacotron2、FastSpeech、FastPitch）通常从文本生成梅尔频谱图，然后使用声码器（例如 WaveNet、WaveGlow、HiFiGAN）合成语音。与传统的参数方法（例如 STRAIGHT 和 WORLD）相比，基于神经声码器的端到端模型推理速度慢，并且合成的语音通常不鲁棒且缺乏可控性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的更新声码器，它是一种易于训练且易于生成波形的信号模型。我们使用高斯-马尔可夫模型对谱包络进行鲁棒学习，并使用基于小波的统计信号处理来表征和分解 F0 特征。它可以保留精细的频谱包络并实现自然语音的高可控性。实验结果表明，我们提出的声码器比传统的 STRAIGHT 声码器实现了更好的重构语音自然度，略好于 WaveNet，但稍差于 WaveRNN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的语音合成器，结合高斯-马尔可夫模型和小波分解方法，以提高语音合成的自然度和可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于神经网络的端到端语音合成模型在推理速度和语音可控性方面存在不足，传统参数化方法如STRAIGHT和WORLD则在自然度上表现较好，但缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于高斯-马尔可夫模型的频谱包络学习方法，以及基于小波的F0特征分解方法，以构建一个简单且高效的语音合成器。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，新提出的语音合成器在语音自然度方面优于传统STRAIGHT合成器，略优于WaveNet，但略逊于WaveRNN。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在语音自然度和可控性方面取得了一定进展，为未来语音合成技术提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Paul F Kinghorn,Beren Millidge,Christopher L Buckley
title: Preventing Deterioration of Classification Accuracy in Predictive Coding Networks
title_zh: 防止预测编码网络中分类精度的恶化
comment: preprint of IWAI 2022 conference paper. this version clarifies comments in final paragraph of section 3
comments: preprint of IWAI 2022 conference paper. this version clarifies comments in final paragraph of section 3
abstract: Predictive Coding Networks (PCNs) aim to learn a generative model of the world. Given observations, this generative model can then be inverted to infer the causes of those observations. However, when training PCNs, a noticeable pathology is often observed where inference accuracy peaks and then declines with further training. This cannot be explained by overfitting since both training and test accuracy decrease simultaneously. Here we provide a thorough investigation of this phenomenon and show that it is caused by an imbalance between the speeds at which the various layers of the PCN converge. We demonstrate that this can be prevented by regularising the weight matrices at each layer: by restricting the relative size of matrix singular values, we allow the weight matrix to change but restrict the overall impact which a layer can have on its neighbours. We also demonstrate that a similar effect can be achieved through a more biologically plausible and simple scheme of just capping the weights.
summary: Predictive Coding Networks (PCNs) aim to learn a generative model of the world. Given observations, this generative model can then be inverted to infer the causes of those observations. However, when training PCNs, a noticeable pathology is often observed where inference accuracy peaks and then declines with further training. This cannot be explained by overfitting since both training and test accuracy decrease simultaneously. Here we provide a thorough investigation of this phenomenon and show that it is caused by an imbalance between the speeds at which the various layers of the PCN converge. We demonstrate that this can be prevented by regularising the weight matrices at each layer: by restricting the relative size of matrix singular values, we allow the weight matrix to change but restrict the overall impact which a layer can have on its neighbours. We also demonstrate that a similar effect can be achieved through a more biologically plausible and simple scheme of just capping the weights.
abstract_zh: 预测编码网络（PCN）旨在学习世界的生成模型。给定观察结果，然后可以反转该生成模型以推断这些观察结果的原因。然而，在训练 PCN 时，经常会观察到一种明显的病理现象，即推理准确性达到峰值，然后随着进一步的训练而下降。这不能用过度拟合来解释，因为训练和测试精度同时下降。在这里，我们对这种现象进行了彻底的研究，并表明这是由 PCN 各层收敛速度不平衡引起的。我们证明，可以通过规范每一层的权重矩阵来防止这种情况：通过限制矩阵奇异值的相对大小，我们允许权重矩阵发生变化，但限制层对其邻居的总体影响。我们还证明，通过一种在生物学上更合理且简单的限制权重的方案可以实现类似的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究预测编码网络（PCN）在训练过程中分类准确率下降的问题，并提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: PCN在训练时会出现准确率先上升后下降的病理现象，且无法用过拟合解释，需探究原因并提出改进方法。
AI.method: 通过正则化各层权重矩阵的奇异值比例，或直接截断权重，平衡网络各层收敛速度。
AI.result: 实验表明两种方法均能有效防止准确率下降，验证了收敛速度不平衡是问题根源。
AI.conclusion: PCN准确率下降由层间收敛速度失衡导致，通过权重约束可实现稳定训练。

result: 实验表明两种方法均能有效防止准确率下降，验证了收敛速度不平衡是问题根源。
conclusion: PCN准确率下降由层间收敛速度失衡导致，通过权重约束可实现稳定训练。
search_text: Preventing Deterioration of Classification Accuracy in Predictive Coding Networks 防止预测编码网络中分类精度的恶化 Predictive Coding Networks (PCNs) aim to learn a generative model of the world. Given observations, this generative model can then be inverted to infer the causes of those observations. However, when training PCNs, a noticeable pathology is often observed where inference accuracy peaks and then declines with further training. This cannot be explained by overfitting since both training and test accuracy decrease simultaneously. Here we provide a thorough investigation of this phenomenon and show that it is caused by an imbalance between the speeds at which the various layers of the PCN converge. We demonstrate that this can be prevented by regularising the weight matrices at each layer: by restricting the relative size of matrix singular values, we allow the weight matrix to change but restrict the overall impact which a layer can have on its neighbours. We also demonstrate that a similar effect can be achieved through a more biologically plausible and simple scheme of just capping the weights. 预测编码网络（PCN）旨在学习世界的生成模型。给定观察结果，然后可以反转该生成模型以推断这些观察结果的原因。然而，在训练 PCN 时，经常会观察到一种明显的病理现象，即推理准确性达到峰值，然后随着进一步的训练而下降。这不能用过度拟合来解释，因为训练和测试精度同时下降。在这里，我们对这种现象进行了彻底的研究，并表明这是由 PCN 各层收敛速度不平衡引起的。我们证明，可以通过规范每一层的权重矩阵来防止这种情况：通过限制矩阵奇异值的相对大小，我们允许权重矩阵发生变化，但限制层对其邻居的总体影响。我们还证明，通过一种在生物学上更合理且简单的限制权重的方案可以实现类似的效果。 本文研究预测编码网络（PCN）在训练过程中分类准确率下降的问题，并提出解决方案。 Paul F Kinghorn,Beren Millidge,Christopher L Buckley cs.AI,q-bio.NC

title: A Unified Image Preprocessing Framework For Image Compression
title_zh: 一种统一的图像压缩图像预处理框架
abstract: With the development of streaming media technology, increasing communication relies on sound and visual information, which puts a massive burden on online media. Data compression becomes increasingly important to reduce the volume of data transmission and storage. To further improve the efficiency of image compression, researchers utilize various image processing methods to compensate for the limitations of conventional codecs and advanced learning-based compression methods. Instead of modifying the image compression oriented approaches, we propose a unified image compression preprocessing framework, called Kuchen, which aims to further improve the performance of existing codecs. The framework consists of a hybrid data labeling system along with a learning-based backbone to simulate personalized preprocessing. As far as we know, this is the first exploration of setting a unified preprocessing benchmark in image compression tasks. Results demonstrate that the modern codecs optimized by our unified preprocessing framework constantly improve the efficiency of the state-of-the-art compression.
summary: With the development of streaming media technology, increasing communication relies on sound and visual information, which puts a massive burden on online media. Data compression becomes increasingly important to reduce the volume of data transmission and storage. To further improve the efficiency of image compression, researchers utilize various image processing methods to compensate for the limitations of conventional codecs and advanced learning-based compression methods. Instead of modifying the image compression oriented approaches, we propose a unified image compression preprocessing framework, called Kuchen, which aims to further improve the performance of existing codecs. The framework consists of a hybrid data labeling system along with a learning-based backbone to simulate personalized preprocessing. As far as we know, this is the first exploration of setting a unified preprocessing benchmark in image compression tasks. Results demonstrate that the modern codecs optimized by our unified preprocessing framework constantly improve the efficiency of the state-of-the-art compression.
abstract_zh: 随着流媒体技术的发展，越来越多的交流依赖于声音和视觉信息，这给网络媒体带来了巨大的负担。数据压缩对于减少数据传输和存储量变得越来越重要。为了进一步提高图像压缩的效率，研究人员利用各种图像处理方法来弥补传统编解码器和先进的基于学习的压缩方法的局限性。我们没有修改面向图像压缩的方法，而是提出了一个统一的图像压缩预处理框架，称为 Kuchen，旨在进一步提高现有编解码器的性能。该框架由混合数据标记系统和基于学习的骨干网组成，用于模拟个性化预处理。据我们所知，这是在图像压缩任务中设置统一预处理基准的首次探索。结果表明，通过我们的统一预处理框架优化的现代编解码器不断提高最先进的压缩效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Kuchen的统一图像预处理框架，旨在提升现有图像压缩编解码器的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着流媒体技术发展，传统编解码器和先进学习压缩方法存在效率瓶颈，需通过预处理优化提升压缩效果。
AI.method: 构建包含混合数据标签系统和学习型主干网络的框架，模拟个性化预处理流程以适配不同压缩算法。
AI.result: 经优化后的现代编解码器在保持画质前提下显著提升压缩效率，达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: Kuchen框架是图像压缩领域首个统一预处理基准方案，证实了标准化预处理对压缩性能提升的有效性。

authors_text: Liguang Zhou,Yuhongze Zhou,Tin Lun Lam,Yangsheng Xu
title: Context-aware Mixture-of-Experts for Unbiased Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于无偏场景图生成的上下文感知专家混合
abstract: Scene graph generation (SGG) has gained tremendous progress in recent years. However, its underlying long-tailed distribution of predicate classes is a challenging problem. For extremely unbalanced predicate distributions, existing approaches usually construct complicated context encoders to extract the intrinsic relevance of scene context to predicates and complex networks to improve the learning ability of network models for highly imbalanced predicate distributions. To address the unbiased SGG problem, we introduce a simple yet effective method dubbed Context-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (CAME) to improve model diversity and mitigate biased SGG without complicated design. Specifically, we propose to integrate the mixture of experts with a divide and ensemble strategy to remedy the severely long-tailed distribution of predicate classes, which is applicable to the majority of unbiased scene graph generators. The biased SGG is thereby reduced, and the model tends to anticipate more evenly distributed predicate predictions. To differentiate between various predicate distribution levels, experts with the same weights are not sufficiently diverse. In order to enable the network dynamically exploit the rich scene context and further boost the diversity of model, we simply use the built-in module to create a context encoder. The importance of each expert to scene context and each predicate to each expert is dynamically associated with expert weighting (EW) and predicate weighting (PW) strategy. We have conducted extensive experiments on three tasks using the Visual Genome dataset, showing that CAME outperforms recent methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code will be available publicly.
summary: Scene graph generation (SGG) has gained tremendous progress in recent years. However, its underlying long-tailed distribution of predicate classes is a challenging problem. For extremely unbalanced predicate distributions, existing approaches usually construct complicated context encoders to extract the intrinsic relevance of scene context to predicates and complex networks to improve the learning ability of network models for highly imbalanced predicate distributions. To address the unbiased SGG problem, we introduce a simple yet effective method dubbed Context-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (CAME) to improve model diversity and mitigate biased SGG without complicated design. Specifically, we propose to integrate the mixture of experts with a divide and ensemble strategy to remedy the severely long-tailed distribution of predicate classes, which is applicable to the majority of unbiased scene graph generators. The biased SGG is thereby reduced, and the model tends to anticipate more evenly distributed predicate predictions. To differentiate between various predicate distribution levels, experts with the same weights are not sufficiently diverse. In order to enable the network dynamically exploit the rich scene context and further boost the diversity of model, we simply use the built-in module to create a context encoder. The importance of each expert to scene context and each predicate to each expert is dynamically associated with expert weighting (EW) and predicate weighting (PW) strategy. We have conducted extensive experiments on three tasks using the Visual Genome dataset, showing that CAME outperforms recent methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code will be available publicly.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）近年来取得了巨大进步。然而，其底层的谓词类长尾分布是一个具有挑战性的问题。对于极度不平衡的谓词分布，现有的方法通常构建复杂的上下文编码器来提取场景上下文与谓词和复杂网络的内在相关性，以提高网络模型对高度不平衡的谓词分布的学习能力。为了解决无偏 SGG 问题，我们引入了一种简单而有效的方法，称为上下文感知混合专家（CAME），以提高模型多样性并减轻有偏 SGG 的影响，而无需复杂的设计。具体来说，我们建议将专家混合与划分和集成策略相结合，以纠正谓词类的严重长尾分布，这适用于大多数无偏场景图生成器。因此，有偏差的 SGG 会减少，并且模型倾向于预测更均匀分布的谓词预测。为了区分不同的谓词分布水平，具有相同权重的专家的多样性不够。为了使网络能够动态利用丰富的场景上下文并进一步提高模型的多样性，我们简单地使用内置模块来创建上下文编码器。每个专家对场景上下文以及每个谓词对每个专家的重要性与专家权重（EW）和谓词权重（PW）策略动态关联。我们使用视觉基因组数据集对三项任务进行了广泛的实验，表明 CAME 优于最新的方法并实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 提出一种上下文感知的专家混合模型（CAME），以解决场景图生成中的长尾分布问题，实现无偏预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理极端不平衡的谓词分布时依赖复杂设计，而本文旨在通过简单方法提升模型多样性并减少偏差。
AI.method: 引入CAME方法，结合混合专家模型与分而治之策略，通过动态专家权重（EW）和谓词权重（PW）策略，利用上下文编码器增强模型多样性。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome数据集上的实验表明，CAME方法优于现有方法，达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: CAME通过简单有效的设计有效缓解了场景图生成中的长尾分布问题，为无偏预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gedi Liu,Yifeng Jiang,Yi Ouyang,Keyang Zhong,Yang Wang
title: Grasping Core Rules of Time Series through Pure Models
title_zh: 通过纯模型掌握时间序列的核心规则
comment: To be submitted to the conference
comments: To be submitted to the conference
abstract: Time series underwent the transition from statistics to deep learning, as did many other machine learning fields. Although it appears that the accuracy has been increasing as the model is updated in a number of publicly available datasets, it typically only increases the scale by several times in exchange for a slight difference in accuracy. Through this experiment, we point out a different line of thinking, time series, especially long-term forecasting, may differ from other fields. It is not necessary to use extensive and complex models to grasp all aspects of time series, but to use pure models to grasp the core rules of time series changes. With this simple but effective idea, we created PureTS, a network with three pure linear layers that achieved state-of-the-art in 80% of the long sequence prediction tasks while being nearly the lightest model and having the fastest running speed. On this basis, we discuss the potential of pure linear layers in both phenomena and essence. The ability to understand the core law contributes to the high precision of long-distance prediction, and reasonable fluctuation prevents it from distorting the curve in multi-step prediction like mainstream deep learning models, which is summarized as a pure linear neural network that avoids over-fluctuating. Finally, we suggest the fundamental design standards for lightweight long-step time series tasks: input and output should try to have the same dimension, and the structure avoids fragmentation and complex operations.
summary: Time series underwent the transition from statistics to deep learning, as did many other machine learning fields. Although it appears that the accuracy has been increasing as the model is updated in a number of publicly available datasets, it typically only increases the scale by several times in exchange for a slight difference in accuracy. Through this experiment, we point out a different line of thinking, time series, especially long-term forecasting, may differ from other fields. It is not necessary to use extensive and complex models to grasp all aspects of time series, but to use pure models to grasp the core rules of time series changes. With this simple but effective idea, we created PureTS, a network with three pure linear layers that achieved state-of-the-art in 80% of the long sequence prediction tasks while being nearly the lightest model and having the fastest running speed. On this basis, we discuss the potential of pure linear layers in both phenomena and essence. The ability to understand the core law contributes to the high precision of long-distance prediction, and reasonable fluctuation prevents it from distorting the curve in multi-step prediction like mainstream deep learning models, which is summarized as a pure linear neural network that avoids over-fluctuating. Finally, we suggest the fundamental design standards for lightweight long-step time series tasks: input and output should try to have the same dimension, and the structure avoids fragmentation and complex operations.
abstract_zh: 时间序列经历了从统计到深度学习的转变，许多其他机器学习领域也是如此。尽管随着模型在许多公开可用的数据集中更新，准确性似乎一直在增加，但它通常只会将规模增加几倍，以换取准确性的微小差异。通过这个实验，我们指出了不同的思路，时间序列，尤其是长期预测，可能与其他领域有所不同。不一定要用广泛而复杂的模型来把握时间序列的方方面面，而是要用纯粹的模型来把握时间序列变化的核心规律。带着这个简单但有效的想法，我们创建了 PureTS，一个具有三个纯线性层的网络，在 80% 的长序列预测任务中实现了最先进的，同时几乎是最轻的模型并具有最快的运行速度。在此基础上，我们讨论了纯线性层在现象和本质上的潜力。理解核心规律的能力有助于长距离预测的高精度，合理的波动使其不会像主流深度学习模型那样在多步预测中扭曲曲线，概括为避免过度波动的纯线性神经网络。最后，我们提出了轻量级长步时间序列任务的基本设计标准：输入和输出应尽量具有相同的维度，并且结构避免碎片和复杂的操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过纯线性模型捕捉时间序列的核心规律，设计轻量级网络PureTS实现长序列预测任务的最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在时间序列预测中复杂度高且精度提升有限，而长序列预测需更本质的规律捕捉而非单纯复杂化模型。
AI.method: 构建仅含三个纯线性层的PureTS网络，通过保持输入输出维度一致性和结构简洁性，避免过度波动以提升多步预测稳定性。
AI.result: PureTS在80%的长序列预测任务中达到最先进水平，模型参数量最少且运行速度最快，验证了纯线性结构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级长序列任务应遵循输入输出维度对齐、结构避免碎片化的设计原则，核心规律理解是提升预测精度的关键。

search_text: Grasping Core Rules of Time Series through Pure Models 通过纯模型掌握时间序列的核心规则 Time series underwent the transition from statistics to deep learning, as did many other machine learning fields. Although it appears that the accuracy has been increasing as the model is updated in a number of publicly available datasets, it typically only increases the scale by several times in exchange for a slight difference in accuracy. Through this experiment, we point out a different line of thinking, time series, especially long-term forecasting, may differ from other fields. It is not necessary to use extensive and complex models to grasp all aspects of time series, but to use pure models to grasp the core rules of time series changes. With this simple but effective idea, we created PureTS, a network with three pure linear layers that achieved state-of-the-art in 80% of the long sequence prediction tasks while being nearly the lightest model and having the fastest running speed. On this basis, we discuss the potential of pure linear layers in both phenomena and essence. The ability to understand the core law contributes to the high precision of long-distance prediction, and reasonable fluctuation prevents it from distorting the curve in multi-step prediction like mainstream deep learning models, which is summarized as a pure linear neural network that avoids over-fluctuating. Finally, we suggest the fundamental design standards for lightweight long-step time series tasks: input and output should try to have the same dimension, and the structure avoids fragmentation and complex operations. 时间序列经历了从统计到深度学习的转变，许多其他机器学习领域也是如此。尽管随着模型在许多公开可用的数据集中更新，准确性似乎一直在增加，但它通常只会将规模增加几倍，以换取准确性的微小差异。通过这个实验，我们指出了不同的思路，时间序列，尤其是长期预测，可能与其他领域有所不同。不一定要用广泛而复杂的模型来把握时间序列的方方面面，而是要用纯粹的模型来把握时间序列变化的核心规律。带着这个简单但有效的想法，我们创建了 PureTS，一个具有三个纯线性层的网络，在 80% 的长序列预测任务中实现了最先进的，同时几乎是最轻的模型并具有最快的运行速度。在此基础上，我们讨论了纯线性层在现象和本质上的潜力。理解核心规律的能力有助于长距离预测的高精度，合理的波动使其不会像主流深度学习模型那样在多步预测中扭曲曲线，概括为避免过度波动的纯线性神经网络。最后，我们提出了轻量级长步时间序列任务的基本设计标准：输入和输出应尽量具有相同的维度，并且结构避免碎片和复杂的操作。 本文提出通过纯线性模型捕捉时间序列的核心规律，设计轻量级网络PureTS实现长序列预测任务的最先进性能。 Gedi Liu,Yifeng Jiang,Yi Ouyang,Keyang Zhong,Yang Wang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Yuxue Ren,Baowei Jiang,Wei Chen,Na Lei,Xianfeng David Gu
title: Global Consistent Point Cloud Registration Based on Lie-algebraic Cohomology
title_zh: 基于李代数上同调的全局一致点云配准
abstract: We present a novel, effective method for global point cloud registration problems by geometric topology. Based on many point cloud pairwise registration methods (e.g ICP), we focus on the problem of accumulated error for the composition of transformations along any loops. The major technical contribution of this paper is a linear method for the elimination of errors, using only solving a Poisson equation. We demonstrate the consistency of our method from Hodge-Helmhotz decomposition theorem and experiments on multiple RGBD datasets of real-world scenes. The experimental results also demonstrate that our global registration method runs quickly and provides accurate reconstructions.
summary: We present a novel, effective method for global point cloud registration problems by geometric topology. Based on many point cloud pairwise registration methods (e.g ICP), we focus on the problem of accumulated error for the composition of transformations along any loops. The major technical contribution of this paper is a linear method for the elimination of errors, using only solving a Poisson equation. We demonstrate the consistency of our method from Hodge-Helmhotz decomposition theorem and experiments on multiple RGBD datasets of real-world scenes. The experimental results also demonstrate that our global registration method runs quickly and provides accurate reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过几何拓扑解决全局点云配准问题的新颖有效的方法。基于许多点云成对配准方法（例如ICP），我们关注沿任何循环的变换组合的累积误差问题。本文的主要技术贡献是一种消除误差的线性方法，仅使用求解泊松方程。我们通过 Hodge-Helmhotz 分解定理和真实世界场景的多个 RGBD 数据集上的实验证明了我们的方法的一致性。实验结果还表明，我们的全局配准方法运行速度快并提供准确的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于李代数上同调的全局一致点云配准方法，通过解决泊松方程消除累积误差。
AI.motivation: 现有点云配准方法（如ICP）在累积变换误差时存在环路闭合不一致问题，需开发更有效的全局误差消除机制。
AI.method: 利用李代数上同调理论，通过求解泊松方程线性消除误差，并基于Hodge-Helmholtz分解定理证明方法一致性。
AI.result: 方法在多个真实场景RGBD数据集上实现快速准确的重建，验证了全局配准的有效性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何拓扑理论解决了点云配准中的累积误差问题，为实际场景提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Dingmin Wang,Przemysław Andrzej Wałęga,Bernardo Cuenca Grau
title: Seminaive Materialisation in DatalogMTL
title_zh: DatalogMTL 中的半成品实现
abstract: DatalogMTL is an extension of Datalog with metric temporal operators that has found applications in temporal ontology-based data access and query answering, as well as in stream reasoning. Practical algorithms for DatalogMTL are reliant on materialisation-based reasoning, where temporal facts are derived in a forward chaining manner in successive rounds of rule applications. Current materialisation-based procedures are, however, based on a naive evaluation strategy, where the main source of inefficiency stems from redundant computations. In this paper, we propose a materialisation-based procedure which, analogously to the classical seminaive algorithm in Datalog, aims at minimising redundant computation by ensuring that each temporal rule instance is considered at most once during the execution of the algorithm. Our experiments show that our optimised seminaive strategy for DatalogMTL is able to significantly reduce materialisation times.
summary: DatalogMTL is an extension of Datalog with metric temporal operators that has found applications in temporal ontology-based data access and query answering, as well as in stream reasoning. Practical algorithms for DatalogMTL are reliant on materialisation-based reasoning, where temporal facts are derived in a forward chaining manner in successive rounds of rule applications. Current materialisation-based procedures are, however, based on a naive evaluation strategy, where the main source of inefficiency stems from redundant computations. In this paper, we propose a materialisation-based procedure which, analogously to the classical seminaive algorithm in Datalog, aims at minimising redundant computation by ensuring that each temporal rule instance is considered at most once during the execution of the algorithm. Our experiments show that our optimised seminaive strategy for DatalogMTL is able to significantly reduce materialisation times.
abstract_zh: DatalogMTL 是 Datalog 的扩展，具有度量时间运算符，已在基于时间本体的数据访问和查询应答以及流推理中找到了应用。 DatalogMTL 的实用算法依赖于基于物化的推理，其中时间事实是在连续几轮规则应用中以前向链接方式导出的。然而，当前基于物化的程序是基于幼稚的评估策略，其中效率低下的主要根源在于冗余计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于物化的过程，类似于Datalog中的经典半素算法，旨在通过确保每个时间规则实例在算法执行期间最多被考虑一次来最小化冗余计算。我们的实验表明，我们针对 DatalogMTL 优化的半简单策略能够显着减少实现时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化的半天真材料化方法，用于改进DatalogMTL的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有DatalogMTL材料化方法依赖天真评估策略，存在大量冗余计算导致效率低下。
AI.method: 受经典Datalog半天真算法启发，设计确保每个时间规则实例仅被处理一次的材料化策略。
AI.result: 实验表明优化后的半天真策略显著降低了DatalogMTL的材料化时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为时态逻辑推理提供了更高效的材料化解决方案，具有实际应用价值。
