title: Efficient Task-Oriented Dialogue Systems with Response Selection as an Auxiliary Task
title_zh: 以响应选择作为辅助任务的高效的面向任务的对话系统
abstract: The adoption of pre-trained language models in task-oriented dialogue systems has resulted in significant enhancements of their text generation abilities. However, these architectures are slow to use because of the large number of trainable parameters and can sometimes fail to generate diverse responses. To address these limitations, we propose two models with auxiliary tasks for response selection - (1) distinguishing distractors from ground truth responses and (2) distinguishing synthetic responses from ground truth labels. They achieve state-of-the-art results on the MultiWOZ 2.1 dataset with combined scores of 107.5 and 108.3 and outperform a baseline with three times more parameters. We publish reproducible code and checkpoints and discuss the effects of applying auxiliary tasks to T5-based architectures.
summary: The adoption of pre-trained language models in task-oriented dialogue systems has resulted in significant enhancements of their text generation abilities. However, these architectures are slow to use because of the large number of trainable parameters and can sometimes fail to generate diverse responses. To address these limitations, we propose two models with auxiliary tasks for response selection - (1) distinguishing distractors from ground truth responses and (2) distinguishing synthetic responses from ground truth labels. They achieve state-of-the-art results on the MultiWOZ 2.1 dataset with combined scores of 107.5 and 108.3 and outperform a baseline with three times more parameters. We publish reproducible code and checkpoints and discuss the effects of applying auxiliary tasks to T5-based architectures.
abstract_zh: 在面向任务的对话系统中采用预先训练的语言模型显着增强了其文本生成能力。然而，由于可训练参数数量众多，这些架构使用起来很慢，并且有时无法生成不同的响应。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了两种具有用于响应选择的辅助任务的模型 - (1) 区分干扰因素和真实响应；(2) 区分合成响应和真实标签。他们在 MultiWOZ 2.1 数据集上取得了最先进的结果，综合得分为 107.5 和 108.3，并且在参数数量增加三倍的情况下优于基线。我们发布可重现的代码和检查点，并讨论将辅助任务应用于基于 T5 的架构的效果。

AI.tldr: 提出两种辅助任务模型以提升任务导向对话系统的效率和响应多样性
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型虽增强生成能力但存在参数量大、响应多样性不足的问题
AI.method: 设计两种响应选择辅助任务：区分干扰项与真实响应、区分合成响应与真实标签，并结合T5架构实现
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ 2.1数据集取得107.5/108.3综合得分，超越参数量为其三倍的基线模型
AI.conclusion: 辅助任务能有效提升模型性能，证明参数精简与任务优化的可行性

authors_text: Ján Švec,Kateřina Žmolíková,Martin Kocour,Marc Delcroix,Tsubasa Ochiai,Ladislav Mošner,Jan Černocký
title: Analysis of impact of emotions on target speech extraction and speech separation
title_zh: 情绪对目标语音提取和语音分离的影响分析
abstract: Recently, the performance of blind speech separation (BSS) and target speech extraction (TSE) has greatly progressed. Most works, however, focus on relatively well-controlled conditions using, e.g., read speech. The performance may degrade in more realistic situations. One of the factors causing such degradation may be intrinsic speaker variability, such as emotions, occurring commonly in realistic speech. In this paper, we investigate the influence of emotions on TSE and BSS. We create a new test dataset of emotional mixtures for the evaluation of TSE and BSS. This dataset combines LibriSpeech and Ryerson Audio-Visual Database of Emotional Speech and Song (RAVDESS). Through controlled experiments, we can analyze the impact of different emotions on the performance of BSS and TSE. We observe that BSS is relatively robust to emotions, while TSE, which requires identifying and extracting the speech of a target speaker, is much more sensitive to emotions. On comparative speaker verification experiments we show that identifying the target speaker may be particularly challenging when dealing with emotional speech. Using our findings, we outline potential future directions that could improve the robustness of BSS and TSE systems toward emotional speech.
summary: Recently, the performance of blind speech separation (BSS) and target speech extraction (TSE) has greatly progressed. Most works, however, focus on relatively well-controlled conditions using, e.g., read speech. The performance may degrade in more realistic situations. One of the factors causing such degradation may be intrinsic speaker variability, such as emotions, occurring commonly in realistic speech. In this paper, we investigate the influence of emotions on TSE and BSS. We create a new test dataset of emotional mixtures for the evaluation of TSE and BSS. This dataset combines LibriSpeech and Ryerson Audio-Visual Database of Emotional Speech and Song (RAVDESS). Through controlled experiments, we can analyze the impact of different emotions on the performance of BSS and TSE. We observe that BSS is relatively robust to emotions, while TSE, which requires identifying and extracting the speech of a target speaker, is much more sensitive to emotions. On comparative speaker verification experiments we show that identifying the target speaker may be particularly challenging when dealing with emotional speech. Using our findings, we outline potential future directions that could improve the robustness of BSS and TSE systems toward emotional speech.
abstract_zh: 最近，盲语音分离（BSS）和目标语音提取（TSE）的性能有了很大的进步。然而，大多数作品都侧重于使用相对良好控制的条件，例如朗读语音。在更现实的情况下，性能可能会下降。导致这种退化的因素之一可能是说话者内在的可变性，例如现实语音中常见的情绪。在本文中，我们研究了情绪对 TSE 和 BSS 的影响。我们创建了一个新的情绪混合测试数据集，用于评估 TSE 和 BSS。该数据集结合了 LibriSpeech 和瑞尔森情感语音和歌曲视听数据库 (RAVDESS)。通过对照实验，我们可以分析不同情绪对BSS和TSE表现的影响。我们观察到 BSS 对情绪相对稳健，而 TSE 需要识别和提取目标说话者的语音，对情绪更加敏感。在比较说话人验证实验中，我们表明在处理情感语音时识别目标说话人可能特别具有挑战性。利用我们的发现，我们概述了未来的潜在方向，可以提高 BSS 和 TSE 系统对情感语音的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究情绪对目标语音提取和语音分离性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管盲源分离和目标语音提取技术在受控条件下取得了显著进展，但在真实场景中，如情绪变化等内在说话人变异性可能导致性能下降，因此需要研究情绪对这些技术的影响。
AI.method: 作者创建了一个包含情绪混合语音的新测试数据集，结合了LibriSpeech和RAVDESS数据集，并通过受控实验分析了不同情绪对语音分离和目标语音提取的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，语音分离对情绪较为鲁棒，而目标语音提取对情绪更为敏感，且在情绪语音中识别目标说话人可能具有挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 未来的研究方向应集中于提高语音分离和目标语音提取系统对情绪语音的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Khiem H. Le,Hieu H. Pham,Thao B. T. Nguyen,Tu A. Nguyen,Cuong D. Do
title: Enhancing Deep Learning-based 3-lead ECG Classification with Heartbeat Counting and Demographic Data Integration
title_zh: 通过心跳计数和人口统计数据集成增强基于深度学习的 3 导联心电图分类
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.12381
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.12381
abstract: Nowadays, an increasing number of people are being diagnosed with cardiovascular diseases (CVDs), the leading cause of death globally. The gold standard for identifying these heart problems is via electrocardiogram (ECG). The standard 12-lead ECG is widely used in clinical practice and the majority of current research. However, using a lower number of leads can make ECG more pervasive as it can be integrated with portable or wearable devices. This article introduces two novel techniques to improve the performance of the current deep learning system for 3-lead ECG classification, making it comparable with models that are trained using standard 12-lead ECG. Specifically, we propose a multi-task learning scheme in the form of the number of heartbeats regression and an effective mechanism to integrate patient demographic data into the system. With these two advancements, we got classification performance in terms of F1 scores of 0.9796 and 0.8140 on two large-scale ECG datasets, i.e., Chapman and CPSC-2018, respectively, which surpassed current state-of-the-art ECG classification methods, even those trained on 12-lead data. To encourage further development, our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lhkhiem28/LightX3ECG.
summary: Nowadays, an increasing number of people are being diagnosed with cardiovascular diseases (CVDs), the leading cause of death globally. The gold standard for identifying these heart problems is via electrocardiogram (ECG). The standard 12-lead ECG is widely used in clinical practice and the majority of current research. However, using a lower number of leads can make ECG more pervasive as it can be integrated with portable or wearable devices. This article introduces two novel techniques to improve the performance of the current deep learning system for 3-lead ECG classification, making it comparable with models that are trained using standard 12-lead ECG. Specifically, we propose a multi-task learning scheme in the form of the number of heartbeats regression and an effective mechanism to integrate patient demographic data into the system. With these two advancements, we got classification performance in terms of F1 scores of 0.9796 and 0.8140 on two large-scale ECG datasets, i.e., Chapman and CPSC-2018, respectively, which surpassed current state-of-the-art ECG classification methods, even those trained on 12-lead data. To encourage further development, our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lhkhiem28/LightX3ECG.
abstract_zh: 如今，越来越多的人被诊断患有心血管疾病（CVD），这是全球死亡的主要原因。识别这些心脏问题的黄金标准是通过心电图 (ECG)。标准 12 导联心电图广泛应用于临床实践和当前的大多数研究。然而，使用较少数量的导联可以使心电图更加普及，因为它可以与便携式或可穿戴设备集成。本文介绍了两种新技术，可提高当前 3 导联心电图分类深度学习系统的性能，使其与使用标准 12 导联心电图训练的模型相媲美。具体来说，我们提出了一种心跳次数回归形式的多任务学习方案以及将患者人口统计数据集成到系统中的有效机制。通过这两项进步，我们在两个大型心电图数据集（即 Chapman 和 CPSC-2018）上分别获得了 0.9796 和 0.8140 的 F1 分数分类性能，超越了当前最先进的心电图分类方法，甚至超过了那些在 12 导联数据上训练的心电图分类方法。为了鼓励进一步开发，我们的源代码在 https://github.com/lhkhiem28/LightX3ECG 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新方法提升基于深度学习的3导联心电图（ECG）分类性能，使其接近12导联ECG模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管12导联ECG是诊断心血管疾病的标准，但3导联ECG因便携性更适合可穿戴设备。现有3导联模型性能不足，需改进以实现临床应用。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，通过心搏数回归任务辅助分类，并提出患者人口统计学数据（如年龄、性别）的有效融合机制。
AI.result: 在Chapman和CPSC-2018数据集上分别达到0.9796和0.8140的F1分数，优于现有包括12导联模型在内的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合心搏计数与人口数据的多任务学习显著提升3导联ECG分类效果，开源代码促进后续研究。

method: 设计多任务学习框架，通过心搏数回归任务辅助分类，并提出患者人口统计学数据（如年龄、性别）的有效融合机制。
result: 在Chapman和CPSC-2018数据集上分别达到0.9796和0.8140的F1分数，优于现有包括12导联模型在内的最先进方法。
conclusion: 结合心搏计数与人口数据的多任务学习显著提升3导联ECG分类效果，开源代码促进后续研究。
search_text: Enhancing Deep Learning-based 3-lead ECG Classification with Heartbeat Counting and Demographic Data Integration 通过心跳计数和人口统计数据集成增强基于深度学习的 3 导联心电图分类 Nowadays, an increasing number of people are being diagnosed with cardiovascular diseases (CVDs), the leading cause of death globally. The gold standard for identifying these heart problems is via electrocardiogram (ECG). The standard 12-lead ECG is widely used in clinical practice and the majority of current research. However, using a lower number of leads can make ECG more pervasive as it can be integrated with portable or wearable devices. This article introduces two novel techniques to improve the performance of the current deep learning system for 3-lead ECG classification, making it comparable with models that are trained using standard 12-lead ECG. Specifically, we propose a multi-task learning scheme in the form of the number of heartbeats regression and an effective mechanism to integrate patient demographic data into the system. With these two advancements, we got classification performance in terms of F1 scores of 0.9796 and 0.8140 on two large-scale ECG datasets, i.e., Chapman and CPSC-2018, respectively, which surpassed current state-of-the-art ECG classification methods, even those trained on 12-lead data. To encourage further development, our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/lhkhiem28/LightX3ECG. 如今，越来越多的人被诊断患有心血管疾病（CVD），这是全球死亡的主要原因。识别这些心脏问题的黄金标准是通过心电图 (ECG)。标准 12 导联心电图广泛应用于临床实践和当前的大多数研究。然而，使用较少数量的导联可以使心电图更加普及，因为它可以与便携式或可穿戴设备集成。本文介绍了两种新技术，可提高当前 3 导联心电图分类深度学习系统的性能，使其与使用标准 12 导联心电图训练的模型相媲美。具体来说，我们提出了一种心跳次数回归形式的多任务学习方案以及将患者人口统计数据集成到系统中的有效机制。通过这两项进步，我们在两个大型心电图数据集（即 Chapman 和 CPSC-2018）上分别获得了 0.9796 和 0.8140 的 F1 分数分类性能，超越了当前最先进的心电图分类方法，甚至超过了那些在 12 导联数据上训练的心电图分类方法。为了鼓励进一步开发，我们的源代码在 https://github.com/lhkhiem28/LightX3ECG 上公开提供。 本文提出两种新方法提升基于深度学习的3导联心电图（ECG）分类性能，使其接近12导联ECG模型的效果。 Khiem H. Le,Hieu H. Pham,Thao B. T. Nguyen,Tu A. Nguyen,Cuong D. Do cs.CV

title: Estimating Personal Model Parameters from Utterances in Model-based Reminiscence
title_zh: 从基于模型的记忆中的话语估计个人模型参数
comment: Accepted paper for the 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII)
comments: Accepted paper for the 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII)
abstract: Reminiscence therapy is mental health care based on the recollection of memories. However, the effectiveness of this method varies amongst individuals. To solve this problem, it is necessary to provide more personalized support; therefore, this study utilized a computational model of personal memory recollection based on a cognitive architecture adaptive control of thought-rational (ACT-R). An ACT-R memory model reflecting the state of users is expected to facilitate personal recollection. In this study, we proposed a method for estimating the internal states of users through repeated interactions with the memory model. The model, which contains the lifelog of the user, presents a memory item (stimulus) to the user, and receives the response of the user to the stimulus, based on which it adjusts the internal parameters of the model. Through the repetition of these processes, the parameters of the model will reflect the internal states of the user. To confirm the feasibility of the proposed method, we analyzed utterances of users when using a system that incorporates this model. The results confirmed the ability of the method to estimate the memory retrieval parameters of the model from the utterances of the user. In addition, the ability of the method to estimate changes in the mood of the user caused by using the system was confirmed. These results support the feasibility of the interactive method for estimating human internal states, which will eventually contribute to the ability to induce memory recall and emotions for our well-being.
summary: Reminiscence therapy is mental health care based on the recollection of memories. However, the effectiveness of this method varies amongst individuals. To solve this problem, it is necessary to provide more personalized support; therefore, this study utilized a computational model of personal memory recollection based on a cognitive architecture adaptive control of thought-rational (ACT-R). An ACT-R memory model reflecting the state of users is expected to facilitate personal recollection. In this study, we proposed a method for estimating the internal states of users through repeated interactions with the memory model. The model, which contains the lifelog of the user, presents a memory item (stimulus) to the user, and receives the response of the user to the stimulus, based on which it adjusts the internal parameters of the model. Through the repetition of these processes, the parameters of the model will reflect the internal states of the user. To confirm the feasibility of the proposed method, we analyzed utterances of users when using a system that incorporates this model. The results confirmed the ability of the method to estimate the memory retrieval parameters of the model from the utterances of the user. In addition, the ability of the method to estimate changes in the mood of the user caused by using the system was confirmed. These results support the feasibility of the interactive method for estimating human internal states, which will eventually contribute to the ability to induce memory recall and emotions for our well-being.
abstract_zh: 回忆疗法是基于记忆回忆的心理保健。然而，这种方法的有效性因人而异。要解决这个问题，需要提供更加个性化的支持；因此，本研究利用了基于思维理性认知架构自适应控制（ACT-R）的个人记忆回忆计算模型。反映用户状态的 ACT-R 记忆模型有望促进个人回忆。在本研究中，我们提出了一种通过与记忆模型重复交互来估计用户内部状态的方法。该模型包含用户的生活日志，向用户呈现记忆项（刺激），并接收用户对刺激的响应，并据此调整模型的内部参数。通过重复这些过程，模型的参数将反映用户的内部状态。为了确认所提出方法的可行性，我们分析了用户在使用包含该模型的系统时的话语。结果证实了该方法能够根据用户的话语估计模型的记忆检索参数。此外，该方法能够估计因使用该系统而引起的用户情绪变化的能力也得到了证实。这些结果支持了估计人类内部状态的交互式方法的可行性，这最终将有助于诱导记忆回忆和情绪以促进我们的福祉。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于ACT-R认知架构的计算模型，通过分析用户对话估计个人记忆参数，以实现个性化回忆治疗。
AI.motivation: 传统回忆疗法效果因人而异，需通过个性化模型调整以提升心理健康干预效果。
AI.method: 构建包含用户生活日志的ACT-R记忆模型，通过交互式刺激-响应循环调整模型参数，并分析用户语音数据验证参数估计有效性。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能准确估计用户记忆检索参数及系统使用引发的情绪变化，证实了交互式状态估计的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 交互式模型参数估计方法为个性化记忆唤起与情绪调节提供了技术基础，有助于提升心理健康干预效果。

title: Crowd Counting on Heavily Compressed Images with Curriculum Pre-Training
title_zh: 通过课程预训练对重度压缩图像进行人群计数
abstract: JPEG image compression algorithm is a widely used technique for image size reduction in edge and cloud computing settings. However, applying such lossy compression on images processed by deep neural networks can lead to significant accuracy degradation. Inspired by the curriculum learning paradigm, we propose a training approach called curriculum pre-training (CPT) for crowd counting on compressed images, which alleviates the drop in accuracy resulting from lossy compression. We verify the effectiveness of our approach by extensive experiments on three crowd counting datasets, two crowd counting DNN models and various levels of compression. The proposed training method is not overly sensitive to hyper-parameters, and reduces the error, particularly for heavily compressed images, by up to 19.70%.
summary: JPEG image compression algorithm is a widely used technique for image size reduction in edge and cloud computing settings. However, applying such lossy compression on images processed by deep neural networks can lead to significant accuracy degradation. Inspired by the curriculum learning paradigm, we propose a training approach called curriculum pre-training (CPT) for crowd counting on compressed images, which alleviates the drop in accuracy resulting from lossy compression. We verify the effectiveness of our approach by extensive experiments on three crowd counting datasets, two crowd counting DNN models and various levels of compression. The proposed training method is not overly sensitive to hyper-parameters, and reduces the error, particularly for heavily compressed images, by up to 19.70%.
abstract_zh: JPEG 图像压缩算法是一种广泛使用的技术，用于在边缘和云计算设置中减小图像尺寸。然而，对深度神经网络处理的图像应用这种有损压缩可能会导致准确性显着下降。受课程学习范式的启发，我们提出了一种称为课程预训练（CPT）的训练方法，用于对压缩图像进行人群计数，从而减轻有损压缩导致的准确性下降。我们通过对三个人群计数数据集、两个人群计数 DNN 模型和不同压缩级别的大量实验来验证我们方法的有效性。所提出的训练方法对超参数不太敏感，并且将误差降低了高达 19.70%，特别是对于重度压缩的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种课程预训练方法（CPT），用于解决高度压缩图像在人群计数任务中因JPEG压缩导致的精度下降问题。
AI.motivation: JPEG压缩在边缘和云计算场景中广泛应用，但其引入的图像失真会导致深度学习模型在人群计数任务中出现显著精度损失。
AI.method: 受课程学习启发，设计课程预训练（CPT）方法，在训练过程中逐步增加图像压缩强度，使模型适应不同压缩级别的特征分布。
AI.result: 在三个主流数据集和两种模型架构上验证，CPT方法在高度压缩场景下将误差降低最高19.70%，且对超参数选择具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 课程预训练有效缓解了图像压缩带来的精度损失，在保持模型泛化能力的同时提升了压缩图像的计数准确性，具有实际应用价值。

title: Sound and Relatively Complete Belief Hoare Logic for Statistical Hypothesis Testing Programs
title_zh: 统计假设检验程序的合理且相对完整的信念霍尔逻辑
comment: Accepted to the journal Artificial Intelligence (AI); an extended version of the KR'21 conference paper https://proceedings.kr.org/2021/39/
comments: Accepted to the journal Artificial Intelligence (AI); an extended version of the KR'21 conference paper https://proceedings.kr.org/2021/39/
abstract: We propose a new approach to formally describing the requirement for statistical inference and checking whether a program uses the statistical method appropriately. Specifically, we define belief Hoare logic (BHL) for formalizing and reasoning about the statistical beliefs acquired via hypothesis testing. This program logic is sound and relatively complete with respect to a Kripke model for hypothesis tests. We demonstrate by examples that BHL is useful for reasoning about practical issues in hypothesis testing. In our framework, we clarify the importance of prior beliefs in acquiring statistical beliefs through hypothesis testing, and discuss the whole picture of the justification of statistical inference inside and outside the program logic.
summary: We propose a new approach to formally describing the requirement for statistical inference and checking whether a program uses the statistical method appropriately. Specifically, we define belief Hoare logic (BHL) for formalizing and reasoning about the statistical beliefs acquired via hypothesis testing. This program logic is sound and relatively complete with respect to a Kripke model for hypothesis tests. We demonstrate by examples that BHL is useful for reasoning about practical issues in hypothesis testing. In our framework, we clarify the importance of prior beliefs in acquiring statistical beliefs through hypothesis testing, and discuss the whole picture of the justification of statistical inference inside and outside the program logic.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法来正式描述统计推断的要求并检查程序是否适当地使用了统计方法。具体来说，我们定义信念霍尔逻辑（BHL），用于对通过假设检验获得的统计信念进行形式化和推理。该程序逻辑相对于假设检验的 Kripke 模型来说是合理且相对完整的。我们通过例子证明 BHL 对于推理假设检验中的实际问题非常有用。在我们的框架中，我们阐明了先验信念在通过假设检验获得统计信念方面的重要性，并讨论了程序逻辑内部和外部统计推断合理性的全貌。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的信念霍尔逻辑（BHL），用于形式化描述和验证统计假设检验程序中统计推断的正确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以形式化验证统计假设检验程序中统计信念的正确性，需构建逻辑框架以确保程序符合统计推断规范。
AI.method: 定义信念霍尔逻辑（BHL），基于克里普克模型证明其可靠性与相对完备性，并通过实例验证其在实际假设检验问题中的适用性。
AI.result: BHL被证明相对于假设检验的克里普克模型是可靠且相对完备的，能够有效推理统计信念的形成过程并澄清先验信念的重要性。
AI.conclusion: BHL为统计假设检验程序提供了形式化验证的新方法，明确了先验信念在统计推断中的关键作用，拓展了程序逻辑在统计领域的应用边界。

search_text: Sound and Relatively Complete Belief Hoare Logic for Statistical Hypothesis Testing Programs 统计假设检验程序的合理且相对完整的信念霍尔逻辑 We propose a new approach to formally describing the requirement for statistical inference and checking whether a program uses the statistical method appropriately. Specifically, we define belief Hoare logic (BHL) for formalizing and reasoning about the statistical beliefs acquired via hypothesis testing. This program logic is sound and relatively complete with respect to a Kripke model for hypothesis tests. We demonstrate by examples that BHL is useful for reasoning about practical issues in hypothesis testing. In our framework, we clarify the importance of prior beliefs in acquiring statistical beliefs through hypothesis testing, and discuss the whole picture of the justification of statistical inference inside and outside the program logic. 我们提出了一种新方法来正式描述统计推断的要求并检查程序是否适当地使用了统计方法。具体来说，我们定义信念霍尔逻辑（BHL），用于对通过假设检验获得的统计信念进行形式化和推理。该程序逻辑相对于假设检验的 Kripke 模型来说是合理且相对完整的。我们通过例子证明 BHL 对于推理假设检验中的实际问题非常有用。在我们的框架中，我们阐明了先验信念在通过假设检验获得统计信念方面的重要性，并讨论了程序逻辑内部和外部统计推断合理性的全貌。 本文提出一种新的信念霍尔逻辑（BHL），用于形式化描述和验证统计假设检验程序中统计推断的正确性。 Yusuke Kawamoto,Tetsuya Sato,Kohei Suenaga cs.AI

authors_text: Abid Hasan Zim,Aeyan Ashraf,Aquib Iqbal,Asad Malik,Minoru Kuribayashi
title: A Vision Transformer-Based Approach to Bearing Fault Classification via Vibration Signals
title_zh: 基于视觉变压器的振动信号轴承故障分类方法
abstract: Rolling bearings are the most crucial components of rotating machinery. Identifying defective bearings in a timely manner may prevent the malfunction of an entire machinery system. The mechanical condition monitoring field has entered the big data phase as a result of the fast advancement of machine parts. When working with large amounts of data, the manual feature extraction approach has the drawback of being inefficient and inaccurate. Data-driven methods like the Deep Learning method have been successfully used in recent years for mechanical intelligent fault detection. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) were mostly used in earlier research to detect and identify bearing faults. The CNN model, however, suffers from the drawback of having trouble managing fault-time information, which results in a lack of classification results. In this study, bearing defects have been classified using a state-of-the-art Vision Transformer (ViT). Bearing defects were classified using Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) bearing failure laboratory experimental data. The research took into account 13 distinct kinds of defects under 0-load situations in addition to normal bearing conditions. Using the short-time Fourier transform (STFT), the vibration signals were converted into 2D time-frequency images. The 2D time-frequency images are used as input parameters for the ViT. The model achieved an overall accuracy of 98.8%.
summary: Rolling bearings are the most crucial components of rotating machinery. Identifying defective bearings in a timely manner may prevent the malfunction of an entire machinery system. The mechanical condition monitoring field has entered the big data phase as a result of the fast advancement of machine parts. When working with large amounts of data, the manual feature extraction approach has the drawback of being inefficient and inaccurate. Data-driven methods like the Deep Learning method have been successfully used in recent years for mechanical intelligent fault detection. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) were mostly used in earlier research to detect and identify bearing faults. The CNN model, however, suffers from the drawback of having trouble managing fault-time information, which results in a lack of classification results. In this study, bearing defects have been classified using a state-of-the-art Vision Transformer (ViT). Bearing defects were classified using Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) bearing failure laboratory experimental data. The research took into account 13 distinct kinds of defects under 0-load situations in addition to normal bearing conditions. Using the short-time Fourier transform (STFT), the vibration signals were converted into 2D time-frequency images. The 2D time-frequency images are used as input parameters for the ViT. The model achieved an overall accuracy of 98.8%.
abstract_zh: 滚动轴承是旋转机械最关键的部件。及时识别有缺陷的轴承可以防止整个机械系统发生故障。随着机械零部件的快速发展，机械状态监测领域已进入大数据阶段。当处理大量数据时，手动特征提取方法存在效率低且不准确的缺点。近年来，深度学习方法等数据驱动方法已成功用于机械智能故障检测。早期研究中主要使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来检测和识别轴承故障。然而，CNN 模型存在无法管理故障时间信息的缺点，从而导致缺乏分类结果。在这项研究中，使用最先进的视觉转换器 (ViT) 对轴承缺陷进行分类。使用凯斯西储大学 (CWRU) 轴承故障实验室实验数据对轴承缺陷进行分类。除正常轴承条件外，该研究还考虑了零载荷情况下的 13 种不同类型的缺陷。使用短时傅立叶变换（STFT），将振动信号转换为二维时频图像。二维时频图像用作 ViT 的输入参数。该模型的总体准确率达到了 98.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的轴承故障分类方法，通过振动信号进行故障检测。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在处理轴承故障时间信息时存在不足，而ViT模型能更有效地处理时频图像特征。
AI.method: 利用短时傅里叶变换（STFT）将振动信号转化为2D时频图像，作为ViT模型的输入进行分类。
AI.result: 在CWRU数据集上实现98.8%的总体分类准确率，涵盖13种不同故障类型及正常状态。
AI.conclusion: ViT模型在轴承故障分类任务中表现出色，为机械故障诊断提供了新的有效方法。

Identifying defective bearings in a timely manner may prevent the malfunction of an entire machinery system. The mechanical condition monitoring field has entered the big data phase as a result of the fast advancement of machine parts. When working with large amounts of data, the manual feature extraction approach has the drawback of being inefficient and inaccurate. Data-driven methods like the Deep Learning method have been successfully used in recent years for mechanical intelligent fault detection. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) were mostly used in earlier research to detect and identify bearing faults. The CNN model, however, suffers from the drawback of having trouble managing fault-time information, which results in a lack of classification results. In this study, bearing defects have been classified using a state-of-the-art Vision Transformer (ViT). Bearing defects were classified using Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) bearing failure laboratory experimental data. The research took into account 13 distinct kinds of defects under 0-load situations in addition to normal bearing conditions. Using the short-time Fourier transform (STFT), the vibration signals were converted into 2D time-frequency images. The 2D time-frequency images are used as input parameters for the ViT. authors_text: Yaosen Chen,Qi Yuan,Zhiqiang Li,Yuegen Liu,Wei Wang,Chaoping Xie,Xuming Wen,Qien Yu
title: UPST-NeRF: Universal Photorealistic Style Transfer of Neural Radiance Fields for 3D Scene
title_zh: UPST-NeRF：3D 场景神经辐射场的通用真实感风格传输
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.12183 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.12183 by other authors
abstract: 3D scenes photorealistic stylization aims to generate photorealistic images from arbitrary novel views according to a given style image while ensuring consistency when rendering from different viewpoints. Some existing stylization methods with neural radiance fields can effectively predict stylized scenes by combining the features of the style image with multi-view images to train 3D scenes. However, these methods generate novel view images that contain objectionable artifacts. Besides, they cannot achieve universal photorealistic stylization for a 3D scene. Therefore, a styling image must retrain a 3D scene representation network based on a neural radiation field. We propose a novel 3D scene photorealistic style transfer framework to address these issues. It can realize photorealistic 3D scene style transfer with a 2D style image. We first pre-trained a 2D photorealistic style transfer network, which can meet the photorealistic style transfer between any given content image and style image. Then, we use voxel features to optimize a 3D scene and get the geometric representation of the scene. Finally, we jointly optimize a hyper network to realize the scene photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images. In the transfer stage, we use a pre-trained 2D photorealistic network to constrain the photorealistic style of different views and different style images in the 3D scene. The experimental results show that our method not only realizes the 3D photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images but also outperforms the existing methods in terms of visual quality and consistency. Project page:https://semchan.github.io/UPST_NeRF.
summary: 3D scenes photorealistic stylization aims to generate photorealistic images from arbitrary novel views according to a given style image while ensuring consistency when rendering from different viewpoints. Some existing stylization methods with neural radiance fields can effectively predict stylized scenes by combining the features of the style image with multi-view images to train 3D scenes. However, these methods generate novel view images that contain objectionable artifacts. Besides, they cannot achieve universal photorealistic stylization for a 3D scene. Therefore, a styling image must retrain a 3D scene representation network based on a neural radiation field. We propose a novel 3D scene photorealistic style transfer framework to address these issues. It can realize photorealistic 3D scene style transfer with a 2D style image. We first pre-trained a 2D photorealistic style transfer network, which can meet the photorealistic style transfer between any given content image and style image. Then, we use voxel features to optimize a 3D scene and get the geometric representation of the scene. Finally, we jointly optimize a hyper network to realize the scene photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images. In the transfer stage, we use a pre-trained 2D photorealistic network to constrain the photorealistic style of different views and different style images in the 3D scene. The experimental results show that our method not only realizes the 3D photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images but also outperforms the existing methods in terms of visual quality and consistency. Project page:https://semchan.github.io/UPST_NeRF.
abstract_zh: 3D 场景真实感风格化旨在根据给定的风格图像从任意新颖的视图生成真实感图像，同时确保从不同视点渲染时的一致性。现有的一些具有神经辐射场的风格化方法可以通过将风格图像的特征与多视图图像相结合来训练3D场景，从而有效地预测风格化场景。然而，这些方法生成的新颖视图图像包含令人讨厌的伪影。此外，它们无法实现 3D 场景的通用真实感风格化。因此，造型图像必须重新训练基于神经辐射场的 3D 场景表示网络。我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 场景真实感风格转换框架来解决这些问题。它可以用2D风格图像实现逼真的3D场景风格转换。我们首先预训练了一个2D真实感风格转移网络，它可以满足任何给定内容图像和风格图像之间的真实感风格转移。然后，我们使用体素特征来优化 3D 场景并获得场景的几何表示。最后，我们联合优化超网络来实现任意风格图像的场景真实感风格迁移。在传输阶段，我们使用预先训练的2D真实感网络来约束3D场景中不同视图和不同风格图像的真实感风格。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅实现了任意风格图像的3D真实感风格迁移，而且在视觉质量和一致性方面优于现有方法。项目页面：https://semchan.github.io/UPST_NeRF。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UPST-NeRF框架，实现基于神经辐射场的3D场景通用光栅化风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF的风格迁移方法存在生成图像伪影多、无法实现通用光栅化风格迁移的问题，且需针对每种风格重新训练模型。
AI.method: 预训练2D光栅化风格迁移网络，结合体素特征优化3D场景几何表示，通过超网络联合优化实现任意风格图像的3D场景风格迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在视觉质量与视角一致性上优于现有方法，可实现任意风格图像的3D光栅化迁移。
AI.conclusion: UPST-NeRF通过解耦2D风格迁移与3D场景优化，有效解决了现有方法的伪影与通用性缺陷。

search_text: UPST-NeRF: Universal Photorealistic Style Transfer of Neural Radiance Fields for 3D Scene UPST-NeRF：3D 场景神经辐射场的通用真实感风格传输 3D scenes photorealistic stylization aims to generate photorealistic images from arbitrary novel views according to a given style image while ensuring consistency when rendering from different viewpoints. Some existing stylization methods with neural radiance fields can effectively predict stylized scenes by combining the features of the style image with multi-view images to train 3D scenes. However, these methods generate novel view images that contain objectionable artifacts. Besides, they cannot achieve universal photorealistic stylization for a 3D scene. Therefore, a styling image must retrain a 3D scene representation network based on a neural radiation field. We propose a novel 3D scene photorealistic style transfer framework to address these issues. It can realize photorealistic 3D scene style transfer with a 2D style image. We first pre-trained a 2D photorealistic style transfer network, which can meet the photorealistic style transfer between any given content image and style image. Then, we use voxel features to optimize a 3D scene and get the geometric representation of the scene. Finally, we jointly optimize a hyper network to realize the scene photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images. In the transfer stage, we use a pre-trained 2D photorealistic network to constrain the photorealistic style of different views and different style images in the 3D scene. The experimental results show that our method not only realizes the 3D photorealistic style transfer of arbitrary style images but also outperforms the existing methods in terms of visual quality and consistency. Project page:https://semchan.github.io/UPST_NeRF. 3D 场景真实感风格化旨在根据给定的风格图像从任意新颖的视图生成真实感图像，同时确保从不同视点渲染时的一致性。现有的一些具有神经辐射场的风格化方法可以通过将风格图像的特征与多视图图像相结合来训练3D场景，从而有效地预测风格化场景。然而，这些方法生成的新颖视图图像包含令人讨厌的伪影。此外，它们无法实现 3D 场景的通用真实感风格化。因此，造型图像必须重新训练基于神经辐射场的 3D 场景表示网络。我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 场景真实感风格转换框架来解决这些问题。它可以用2D风格图像实现逼真的3D场景风格转换。我们首先预训练了一个2D真实感风格转移网络，它可以满足任何给定内容图像和风格图像之间的真实感风格转移。然后，我们使用体素特征来优化 3D 场景并获得场景的几何表示。最后，我们联合优化超网络来实现任意风格图像的场景真实感风格迁移。在传输阶段，我们使用预先训练的2D真实感网络来约束3D场景中不同视图和不同风格图像的真实感风格。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅实现了任意风格图像的3D真实感风格迁移，而且在视觉质量和一致性方面优于现有方法。项目页面：https://semchan.github.io/UPST_NeRF。 本文提出UPST-NeRF框架，实现基于神经辐射场的3D场景通用光栅化风格迁移。 Yaosen Chen,Qi Yuan,Zhiqiang Li,Yuegen Liu,Wei Wang,Chaoping Xie,Xuming Wen,Qien Yu cs.CV

title: Self-Supervised Vision Transformers for Malware Detection
title_zh: 用于恶意软件检测的自监督视觉转换器
abstract: Malware detection plays a crucial role in cyber-security with the increase in malware growth and advancements in cyber-attacks. Previously unseen malware which is not determined by security vendors are often used in these attacks and it is becoming inevitable to find a solution that can self-learn from unlabeled sample data. This paper presents SHERLOCK, a self-supervision based deep learning model to detect malware based on the Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture. SHERLOCK is a novel malware detection method which learns unique features to differentiate malware from benign programs with the use of image-based binary representation. Experimental results using 1.2 million Android applications across a hierarchy of 47 types and 696 families, shows that self-supervised learning can achieve an accuracy of 97% for the binary classification of malware which is higher than existing state-of-the-art techniques. Our proposed model is also able to outperform state-of-the-art techniques for multi-class malware classification of types and family with macro-F1 score of .497 and .491 respectively.
summary: Malware detection plays a crucial role in cyber-security with the increase in malware growth and advancements in cyber-attacks. Previously unseen malware which is not determined by security vendors are often used in these attacks and it is becoming inevitable to find a solution that can self-learn from unlabeled sample data. This paper presents SHERLOCK, a self-supervision based deep learning model to detect malware based on the Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture. SHERLOCK is a novel malware detection method which learns unique features to differentiate malware from benign programs with the use of image-based binary representation. Experimental results using 1.2 million Android applications across a hierarchy of 47 types and 696 families, shows that self-supervised learning can achieve an accuracy of 97% for the binary classification of malware which is higher than existing state-of-the-art techniques. Our proposed model is also able to outperform state-of-the-art techniques for multi-class malware classification of types and family with macro-F1 score of .497 and .491 respectively.
abstract_zh: 随着恶意软件的增长和网络攻击的进步，恶意软件检测在网络安全中发挥着至关重要的作用。这些攻击中经常使用未经安全供应商确定的以前未见过的恶意软件，因此找到一种可以从未标记的样本数据中进行自学习的解决方案已成为必然。本文提出了 SHERLOCK，一种基于自我监督的深度学习模型，用于检测基于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 架构的恶意软件。 SHERLOCK 是一种新颖的恶意软件检测方法，它使用基于图像的二进制表示学习独特的功能来区分恶意软件和良性程序。使用涵盖 47 个类型和 696 个家族的 120 万个 Android 应用程序进行的实验结果表明，自监督学习可以实现恶意软件二元分类的 97% 准确率，高于现有的最先进技术。我们提出的模型还能够超越最先进的多类恶意软件分类技术和家族，宏 F1 分数分别为 0.497 和 0.491。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自监督视觉Transformer（ViT）的恶意软件检测方法SHERLOCK，通过图像化二进制文件实现高精度分类。
AI.motivation: 传统恶意软件检测依赖标注数据且难以应对新型未知恶意软件，需开发可从无标签数据中自学习的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建SHERLOCK模型，将二进制文件转化为图像输入ViT架构，利用自监督学习提取区分恶意软件与良性程序的特征。
AI.result: 在120万Android应用数据集上实现97%二分类准确率，多分类任务中类型和家族的宏F1分数分别为0.497和0.491。
AI.conclusion: 自监督视觉Transformer在恶意软件检测中优于现有技术，证明了该方法在处理未标注数据时的有效性与潜力。

title: Hierarchical Attention Network for Few-Shot Object Detection via Meta-Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过元对比学习进行少样本目标检测的分层注意力网络
abstract: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) aims to classify and detect few images of novel categories. Existing meta-learning methods insufficiently exploit features between support and query images owing to structural limitations. We propose a hierarchical attention network with sequentially large receptive fields to fully exploit the query and support images. In addition, meta-learning does not distinguish the categories well because it determines whether the support and query images match. In other words, metric-based learning for classification is ineffective because it does not work directly. Thus, we propose a contrastive learning method called meta-contrastive learning, which directly helps achieve the purpose of the meta-learning strategy. Finally, we establish a new state-of-the-art network, by realizing significant margins. Our method brings 2.3, 1.0, 1.3, 3.4 and 2.4% AP improvements for 1-30 shots object detection on COCO dataset. Our code is available at: https://github.com/infinity7428/hANMCL
summary: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) aims to classify and detect few images of novel categories. Existing meta-learning methods insufficiently exploit features between support and query images owing to structural limitations. We propose a hierarchical attention network with sequentially large receptive fields to fully exploit the query and support images. In addition, meta-learning does not distinguish the categories well because it determines whether the support and query images match. In other words, metric-based learning for classification is ineffective because it does not work directly. Thus, we propose a contrastive learning method called meta-contrastive learning, which directly helps achieve the purpose of the meta-learning strategy. Finally, we establish a new state-of-the-art network, by realizing significant margins. Our method brings 2.3, 1.0, 1.3, 3.4 and 2.4% AP improvements for 1-30 shots object detection on COCO dataset. Our code is available at: https://github.com/infinity7428/hANMCL
abstract_zh: 小样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在对新类别的少量图像进行分类和检测。由于结构限制，现有的元学习方法不足以利用支持图像和查询图像之间的特征。我们提出了一个具有连续大接受域的分层注意网络，以充分利用查询和支持图像。此外，元学习不能很好地区分类别，因为它决定了支持图像和查询图像是否匹配。换句话说，基于度量的分类学习是无效的，因为它不能直接起作用。因此，我们提出了一种称为元对比学习的对比学习方法，它直接有助于实现元学习策略的目的。最后，我们通过实现显着的利润建立了一个新的最先进的网络。我们的方法为 COCO 数据集上的 1-30 个镜头的目标检测带来了 2.3、1.0、1.3、3.4 和 2.4% 的 AP 改进。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/infinity7428/hANMCL

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元对比学习的分层注意力网络，用于解决少样本目标检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的元学习方法在利用支持图像和查询图像之间的特征方面存在结构限制，难以有效区分类别，导致分类效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出了一种具有顺序大感受野的分层注意力网络，以充分利用查询和支持图像的特征，并引入元对比学习方法，直接实现元学习策略的目标。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，该方法在1-30次拍摄的目标检测任务中分别提升了2.3%、1.0%、1.3%、3.4%和2.4%的平均精度（AP）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在少样本目标检测任务中取得了新的最先进成果，显著提升了检测性能。

title: Model Predictive Impedance Control with Gaussian Processes for Human and Environment Interaction
title_zh: 人类与环境相互作用的高斯过程预测阻抗控制模型
abstract: Robotic tasks which involve uncertainty--due to variation in goal, environment configuration, or confidence in task model--may require human input to instruct or adapt the robot. In tasks with physical contact, several existing methods for adapting robot trajectory or impedance according to individual uncertainties have been proposed, e.g., realizing intention detection or uncertainty-aware learning from demonstration. However, isolated methods cannot address the wide range of uncertainties jointly present in many tasks. To improve generality, this paper proposes a model predictive control (MPC) framework which plans both trajectory and impedance online, can consider discrete and continuous uncertainties, includes safety constraints, and can be efficiently applied to a new task. This framework can consider uncertainty from: contact constraint variation, uncertainty in human goals, or task disturbances. An uncertainty-aware task model is learned from a few ($\leq3$) demonstrations using Gaussian Processes. This task model is used in a nonlinear MPC problem to optimize robot trajectory and impedance according to belief in discrete human goals, human kinematics, safety constraints, contact stability, and frequency-domain disturbance rejection. This MPC formulation is introduced, analyzed with respect to convexity, and validated in co-manipulation with multiple goals, a collaborative polishing task, and a collaborative assembly task.
summary: Robotic tasks which involve uncertainty--due to variation in goal, environment configuration, or confidence in task model--may require human input to instruct or adapt the robot. In tasks with physical contact, several existing methods for adapting robot trajectory or impedance according to individual uncertainties have been proposed, e.g., realizing intention detection or uncertainty-aware learning from demonstration. However, isolated methods cannot address the wide range of uncertainties jointly present in many tasks. To improve generality, this paper proposes a model predictive control (MPC) framework which plans both trajectory and impedance online, can consider discrete and continuous uncertainties, includes safety constraints, and can be efficiently applied to a new task. This framework can consider uncertainty from: contact constraint variation, uncertainty in human goals, or task disturbances. An uncertainty-aware task model is learned from a few ($\leq3$) demonstrations using Gaussian Processes. This task model is used in a nonlinear MPC problem to optimize robot trajectory and impedance according to belief in discrete human goals, human kinematics, safety constraints, contact stability, and frequency-domain disturbance rejection. This MPC formulation is introduced, analyzed with respect to convexity, and validated in co-manipulation with multiple goals, a collaborative polishing task, and a collaborative assembly task.
abstract_zh: 由于目标、环境配置或任务模型信心的变化而涉及不确定性的机器人任务可能需要人工输入来指导或适应机器人。在具有物理接触的任务中，已经提出了几种根据个体不确定性调整机器人轨迹或阻抗的现有方法，例如，通过演示实现意图检测或不确定性感知学习。然而，孤立的方法无法解决许多任务中共同存在的广泛不确定性。为了提高通用性，本文提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC）框架，该框架可以在线规划轨迹和阻抗，可以考虑离散和连续不确定性，包括安全约束，并且可以有效地应用于新任务。该框架可以考虑以下方面的不确定性：接触约束变化、人类目标的不确定性或任务干扰。不确定性感知任务模型是通过使用高斯过程的一些 ($\leq3$) 演示来学习的。该任务模型用于非线性 MPC 问题，根据离散人类目标、人体运动学、安全约束、接触稳定性和频域干扰抑制的信念来优化机器人轨迹和阻抗。介绍了该 MPC 公式，并对其凸性进行了分析，并在多个目标、协作抛光任务和协作组装任务的协同操作中进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高斯过程的模型预测阻抗控制框架，用于处理人机交互中的多种不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理接触约束变化、人类目标不确定性和任务干扰等多源不确定性，缺乏通用性与安全性保障。
AI.method: 基于少量演示数据（≤3次）使用高斯过程学习不确定性任务模型，并将其嵌入非线性MPC框架，联合优化轨迹与阻抗参数，集成安全约束与接触稳定性分析。
AI.result: 在多目标协同操作、打磨及装配任务中验证了框架有效性，展示了对离散目标信念、运动学不确定性及频域干扰的鲁棒适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性感知的MPC框架实现了对复杂人机交互任务的通用控制，具备安全性、可迁移性与高效性优势。

To improve generality, this paper proposes a model predictive control (MPC) framework which plans both trajectory and impedance online, can consider discrete and continuous uncertainties, includes safety constraints, and can be efficiently applied to a new task. This task model is used in a nonlinear MPC problem to optimize robot trajectory and impedance according to belief in discrete human goals, human kinematics, safety constraints, contact stability, and frequency-domain disturbance rejection. title: Non-Blocking Batch A* (Technical Report)
title_zh: 非阻塞批次 A*（技术报告）
abstract: Heuristic search has traditionally relied on hand-crafted or programmatically derived heuristics. Neural networks (NNs) are newer powerful tools which can be used to learn complex mappings from states to cost-to-go heuristics. However, their slow single inference time is a large overhead that can substantially slow down planning time in optimized heuristic search implementations. Several recent works have described ways to take advantage of NN's batch computations to decrease overhead in planning, while retaining bounds on (sub)optimality. However, all these methods have used the NN heuristic in a "blocking" manner while building up their batches, and have ignored possible fast-to-compute admissible heuristics (e.g. existing classically derived heuristics) that are usually available to use. We introduce Non-Blocking Batch A* (NBBA*), a bounded suboptimal method which lazily computes the NN heuristic in batches while allowing expansions informed by a non-NN heuristic. We show how this subtle but important change can lead to substantial reductions in expansions compared to the current blocking alternative, and see that the performance is related to the information difference between the batch computed NN and fast non-NN heuristic.
summary: Heuristic search has traditionally relied on hand-crafted or programmatically derived heuristics. Neural networks (NNs) are newer powerful tools which can be used to learn complex mappings from states to cost-to-go heuristics. However, their slow single inference time is a large overhead that can substantially slow down planning time in optimized heuristic search implementations. Several recent works have described ways to take advantage of NN's batch computations to decrease overhead in planning, while retaining bounds on (sub)optimality. However, all these methods have used the NN heuristic in a "blocking" manner while building up their batches, and have ignored possible fast-to-compute admissible heuristics (e.g. existing classically derived heuristics) that are usually available to use. We introduce Non-Blocking Batch A* (NBBA*), a bounded suboptimal method which lazily computes the NN heuristic in batches while allowing expansions informed by a non-NN heuristic. We show how this subtle but important change can lead to substantial reductions in expansions compared to the current blocking alternative, and see that the performance is related to the information difference between the batch computed NN and fast non-NN heuristic.
abstract_zh: 启发式搜索传统上依赖于手工制作或以编程方式导出的启发式方法。神经网络 (NN) 是更新的强大工具，可用于学习从状态到成本启发式的复杂映射。然而，它们缓慢的单次推理时间是一个很大的开销，可以大大减慢优化启发式搜索实现中的规划时间。最近的几项工作描述了利用神经网络的批量计算来减少规划开销，同时保留（次）最优性界限的方法。然而，所有这些方法在构建批次时都以“阻塞”方式使用神经网络启发式，并且忽略了通常可用的可能的快速计算可接受的启发式（例如现有的经典派生启发式）。我们引入了非阻塞批次 A* (NBBA*)，这是一种有界次优方法，它批量延迟计算 NN 启发式方法，同时允许由非 NN 启发式方法进行扩展。我们展示了与当前的阻塞替代方案相比，这种微妙但重要的变化如何导致扩展的大幅减少，并发现性能与批量计算的神经网络和快速非神经网络启发式之间的信息差异有关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非阻塞批量A*算法（NBBA*），通过结合神经网络启发式和传统快速启发式，减少规划过程中的计算开销。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式搜索依赖手工启发式，而神经网络虽能学习复杂映射但单次推理速度慢。现有批量方法阻塞式使用神经网络，未充分利用传统启发式，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计NBBA*算法，在批量计算神经网络启发式的同时，允许传统启发式引导节点扩展，实现非阻塞式规划。
AI.result: 实验表明NBBA*相比阻塞方法显著减少扩展次数，性能与神经网络启发式和传统启发式的信息差异密切相关。
AI.conclusion: NBBA*通过融合两种启发式优势，有效提升规划效率，为神经网络启发式与经典方法的协同应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bowen Li,Philip H. S. Torr,Thomas Lukasiewicz
title: Memory-Driven Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: 内存驱动的文本到图像生成
abstract: We introduce a memory-driven semi-parametric approach to text-to-image generation, which is based on both parametric and non-parametric techniques. The non-parametric component is a memory bank of image features constructed from a training set of images. The parametric component is a generative adversarial network. Given a new text description at inference time, the memory bank is used to selectively retrieve image features that are provided as basic information of target images, which enables the generator to produce realistic synthetic results. We also incorporate the content information into the discriminator, together with semantic features, allowing the discriminator to make a more reliable prediction. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed memory-driven semi-parametric approach produces more realistic images than purely parametric approaches, in terms of both visual fidelity and text-image semantic consistency.
summary: We introduce a memory-driven semi-parametric approach to text-to-image generation, which is based on both parametric and non-parametric techniques. The non-parametric component is a memory bank of image features constructed from a training set of images. The parametric component is a generative adversarial network. Given a new text description at inference time, the memory bank is used to selectively retrieve image features that are provided as basic information of target images, which enables the generator to produce realistic synthetic results. We also incorporate the content information into the discriminator, together with semantic features, allowing the discriminator to make a more reliable prediction. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed memory-driven semi-parametric approach produces more realistic images than purely parametric approaches, in terms of both visual fidelity and text-image semantic consistency.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种内存驱动的半参数方法来生成文本到图像，该方法基于参数和非参数技术。非参数组件是由图像训练集构建的图像特征存储库。参数组件是生成对抗网络。在推理时给定新的文本描述，存储库用于选择性地检索作为目标图像的基本信息提供的图像特征，这使得生成器能够产生真实的合成结果。我们还将内容信息与语义特征一起合并到判别器中，使判别器能够做出更可靠的预测。实验结果表明，在视觉保真度和文本图像语义一致性方面，所提出的内存驱动半参数方法比纯参数方法产生更真实的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于记忆驱动的半参数文本到图像生成方法，结合参数化生成对抗网络与非参数化图像特征内存库，提升生成图像的真实感和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 纯参数化方法在文本到图像生成中常面临视觉保真度不足与语义对齐困难的问题，需借助外部知识库增强生成质量。
AI.method: 构建训练图像特征的非参数内存库作为生成基础，结合生成对抗网络（GAN）的参数化生成器与融合内容信息的判别器，通过特征检索与对抗训练联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在视觉真实度和文本-图像语义一致性指标上均优于纯参数化方法，生成图像更贴近描述文本。
AI.conclusion: 半参数化框架通过内存库与GAN的协同作用，有效提升了文本到图像生成的质量，为复杂场景生成提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于记忆驱动的半参数文本到图像生成方法，结合参数化生成对抗网络与非参数化图像特征内存库，提升生成图像的真实感和语义一致性。

search_text: Memory-Driven Text-to-Image Generation 内存驱动的文本到图像生成 We introduce a memory-driven semi-parametric approach to text-to-image generation, which is based on both parametric and non-parametric techniques. The non-parametric component is a memory bank of image features constructed from a training set of images. The parametric component is a generative adversarial network. Given a new text description at inference time, the memory bank is used to selectively retrieve image features that are provided as basic information of target images, which enables the generator to produce realistic synthetic results. We also incorporate the content information into the discriminator, together with semantic features, allowing the discriminator to make a more reliable prediction. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed memory-driven semi-parametric approach produces more realistic images than purely parametric approaches, in terms of both visual fidelity and text-image semantic consistency. 我们引入了一种内存驱动的半参数方法来生成文本到图像，该方法基于参数和非参数技术。非参数组件是由图像训练集构建的图像特征存储库。参数组件是生成对抗网络。在推理时给定新的文本描述，存储库用于选择性地检索作为目标图像的基本信息提供的图像特征，这使得生成器能够产生真实的合成结果。我们还将内容信息与语义特征一起合并到判别器中，使判别器能够做出更可靠的预测。实验结果表明，在视觉保真度和文本图像语义一致性方面，所提出的内存驱动半参数方法比纯参数方法产生更真实的图像。 本文提出一种基于记忆驱动的半参数文本到图像生成方法，结合参数化生成对抗网络与非参数化图像特征内存库，提升生成图像的真实感和语义一致性。 Bowen Li,Philip H. S. Torr,Thomas Lukasiewicz cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Pyramidal Predictive Network: A Model for Visual-frame Prediction Based on Predictive Coding Theory
title_zh: 金字塔预测网络：基于预测编码理论的视觉帧预测模型
abstract: Visual-frame prediction is a pixel-dense prediction task that infers future frames from past frames. Lacking of appearance details, low prediction accuracy and high computational overhead are still major problems with current models or methods. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network model inspired by the well-known predictive coding theory to deal with the problems. Predictive coding provides an interesting and reliable computational framework, which will be combined with other theories such as the cerebral cortex at different level oscillates at different frequencies, to design an efficient and reliable predictive network model for visual-frame prediction. Specifically, the model is composed of a series of recurrent and convolutional units forming the top-down and bottom-up streams, respectively. The update frequency of neural units on each of the layer decreases with the increasing of network levels, which results in neurons of higher-level can capture information in longer time dimensions. According to the experimental results, this model shows better compactness and comparable predictive performance with existing works, implying lower computational cost and higher prediction accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Ling-CF/PPNet.
summary: Visual-frame prediction is a pixel-dense prediction task that infers future frames from past frames. Lacking of appearance details, low prediction accuracy and high computational overhead are still major problems with current models or methods. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network model inspired by the well-known predictive coding theory to deal with the problems. Predictive coding provides an interesting and reliable computational framework, which will be combined with other theories such as the cerebral cortex at different level oscillates at different frequencies, to design an efficient and reliable predictive network model for visual-frame prediction. Specifically, the model is composed of a series of recurrent and convolutional units forming the top-down and bottom-up streams, respectively. The update frequency of neural units on each of the layer decreases with the increasing of network levels, which results in neurons of higher-level can capture information in longer time dimensions. According to the experimental results, this model shows better compactness and comparable predictive performance with existing works, implying lower computational cost and higher prediction accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Ling-CF/PPNet.
abstract_zh: 视觉帧预测是一种像素密集的预测任务，可以从过去的帧推断未来的帧。缺乏外观细节、预测精度低和计算开销高仍然是当前模型或方法的主要问题。在本文中，我们受著名的预测编码理论的启发，提出了一种新颖的神经网络模型来处理这些问题。预测编码提供了一个有趣且可靠的计算框架，它将与不同级别的大脑皮层以不同频率振荡等其他理论相结合，为视觉帧预测设计高效且可靠的预测网络模型。具体来说，该模型由一系列循环单元和卷积单元组成，分别形成自上而下和自下而上的流。每层神经单元的更新频率随着网络层数的增加而降低，这导致更高层的神经元可以捕获更长时间维度的信息。根据实验结果，该模型显示出更好的紧凑性和与现有作品相当的预测性能，意味着更低的计算成本和更高的预测精度。代码可在 https://github.com/Ling-CF/PPNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于预测编码理论的金字塔预测网络（PPNet），用于解决视觉帧预测任务中的细节缺失、精度不足和计算量大的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉帧预测模型存在外观细节不足、预测精度低及计算开销大的缺陷，需设计更高效可靠的预测框架。
AI.method: 结合预测编码理论与脑皮质多频振荡机制，构建包含递归与卷积单元的上下行流网络，高层神经元更新频率递减以捕捉长时序信息。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在保持预测性能的同时显著降低计算成本，具有更高的紧凑性和预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: PPNet通过理论融合与层级设计有效提升了视觉帧预测的效率与精度，为相关应用提供了新思路。

title: Automatic Controlling Fish Feeding Machine using Feature Extraction of Nutriment and Ripple Behavior
title_zh: 利用营养物和波纹行为特征提取自动控制鱼喂食机
abstract: Controlling fish feeding machine is challenging problem because experienced fishermen can adequately control based on assumption. To build robust method for reasonable application, we propose automatic controlling fish feeding machine based on computer vision using combination of counting nutriments and estimating ripple behavior using regression and textural feature, respectively. To count number of nutriments, we apply object detection and tracking methods to acknowledge the nutriments moving to sea surface. Recently, object tracking is active research and challenging problem in computer vision. Unfortunately, the robust tracking method for multiple small objects with dense and complex relationships is unsolved problem in aquaculture field with more appearance creatures. Based on the number of nutriments and ripple behavior, we can control fish feeding machine which consistently performs well in real environment. Proposed method presents the agreement for automatic controlling fish feeding by the activation graphs and textural feature of ripple behavior. Our tracking method can precisely track the nutriments in next frame comparing with other methods. Based on computational time, proposed method reaches 3.86 fps while other methods spend lower than 1.93 fps. Quantitative evaluation can promise that proposed method is valuable for aquaculture fish farm with widely applied to real environment.
summary: Controlling fish feeding machine is challenging problem because experienced fishermen can adequately control based on assumption. To build robust method for reasonable application, we propose automatic controlling fish feeding machine based on computer vision using combination of counting nutriments and estimating ripple behavior using regression and textural feature, respectively. To count number of nutriments, we apply object detection and tracking methods to acknowledge the nutriments moving to sea surface. Recently, object tracking is active research and challenging problem in computer vision. Unfortunately, the robust tracking method for multiple small objects with dense and complex relationships is unsolved problem in aquaculture field with more appearance creatures. Based on the number of nutriments and ripple behavior, we can control fish feeding machine which consistently performs well in real environment. Proposed method presents the agreement for automatic controlling fish feeding by the activation graphs and textural feature of ripple behavior. Our tracking method can precisely track the nutriments in next frame comparing with other methods. Based on computational time, proposed method reaches 3.86 fps while other methods spend lower than 1.93 fps. Quantitative evaluation can promise that proposed method is valuable for aquaculture fish farm with widely applied to real environment.
abstract_zh: 控制喂鱼机是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为经验丰富的渔民可以根据假设进行充分控制。为了建立合理应用的鲁棒方法，我们提出了基于计算机视觉的自动控制养鱼机，结合计数营养物和分别使用回归和纹理特征估计波纹行为。为了计算营养物质的数量，我们应用对象检测和跟踪方法来识别移动到海面的营养物质。近年来，目标跟踪是计算机视觉领域的活跃研究和具有挑战性的问题。不幸的是，对于具有密集且复杂关系的多个小目标的鲁棒跟踪方法在具有更多外观生物的水产养殖领域中是未解决的问题。根据营养物质的数量和波动行为，我们可以控制喂鱼机，使其在真实环境中始终表现良好。所提出的方法提出了通过激活图和波纹行为的纹理特征自动控制鱼进食的协议。与其他方法相比，我们的跟踪方法可以精确地跟踪下一帧的营养物质。基于计算时间，所提出的方法达到 3.86 fps，而其他方法的花费低于 1.93 fps。定量评价表明所提出的方法对于水产养殖养鱼场具有重要价值，可以广泛应用于实际环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的自动控制鱼饲料机的方法，结合营养物计数和涟漪行为估计。
AI.motivation: 传统鱼饲料控制依赖经验判断，缺乏鲁棒性，需开发适用于实际环境的自动化方法。
AI.method: 采用目标检测与跟踪技术统计营养物数量，结合回归分析与纹理特征估计涟漪行为，通过激活图实现自动控制。
AI.result: 所提方法跟踪精度优于现有方法，帧率可达3.86 fps，定量评估验证其在水产养殖中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过精确的营养物跟踪与涟漪行为分析，实现了在真实环境中稳定控制鱼饲料机的目标。

Based on computational time, proposed method reaches 3.86 fps while other methods spend lower than 1.93 fps. Quantitative evaluation can promise that proposed method is valuable for aquaculture fish farm with widely applied to real environment. 控制喂鱼机是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为经验丰富的渔民可以根据假设进行充分控制。为了建立合理应用的鲁棒方法，我们提出了基于计算机视觉的自动控制养鱼机，结合计数营养物和分别使用回归和纹理特征估计波纹行为。为了计算营养物质的数量，我们应用对象检测和跟踪方法来识别移动到海面的营养物质。近年来，目标跟踪是计算机视觉领域的活跃研究和具有挑战性的问题。不幸的是，对于具有密集且复杂关系的多个小目标的鲁棒跟踪方法在具有更多外观生物的水产养殖领域中是未解决的问题。根据营养物质的数量和波动行为，我们可以控制喂鱼机，使其在真实环境中始终表现良好。所提出的方法提出了通过激活图和波纹行为的纹理特征自动控制鱼进食的协议。与其他方法相比，我们的跟踪方法可以精确地跟踪下一帧的营养物质。基于计算时间，所提出的方法达到 3.86 fps，而其他方法的花费低于 1.93 fps。定量评价表明所提出的方法对于水产养殖养鱼场具有重要价值，可以广泛应用于实际环境。 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的自动控制鱼饲料机的方法，结合营养物计数和涟漪行为估计。 Hilmil Pradana,Keiichi Horio cs.CV

authors_text: Yuchen Guo,Qiguang Chen,Gary P. T. Choi,Lok Ming Lui
title: Automatic Landmark Detection and Registration of Brain Cortical Surfaces via Quasi-Conformal Geometry and Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过准共形几何和卷积神经网络对大脑皮层表面进行自动地标检测和注册
abstract: In medical imaging, surface registration is extensively used for performing systematic comparisons between anatomical structures, with a prime example being the highly convoluted brain cortical surfaces. To obtain a meaningful registration, a common approach is to identify prominent features on the surfaces and establish a low-distortion mapping between them with the feature correspondence encoded as landmark constraints. Prior registration works have primarily focused on using manually labeled landmarks and solving highly nonlinear optimization problems, which are time-consuming and hence hinder practical applications. In this work, we propose a novel framework for the automatic landmark detection and registration of brain cortical surfaces using quasi-conformal geometry and convolutional neural networks. We first develop a landmark detection network (LD-Net) that allows for the automatic extraction of landmark curves given two prescribed starting and ending points based on the surface geometry. We then utilize the detected landmarks and quasi-conformal theory for achieving the surface registration. Specifically, we develop a coefficient prediction network (CP-Net) for predicting the Beltrami coefficients associated with the desired landmark-based registration and a mapping network called the disk Beltrami solver network (DBS-Net) for generating quasi-conformal mappings from the predicted Beltrami coefficients, with the bijectivity guaranteed by quasi-conformal theory. Experimental results are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework. Altogether, our work paves a new way for surface-based morphometry and medical shape analysis.

We first develop a landmark detection network (LD-Net) that allows for the automatic extraction of landmark curves given two prescribed starting and ending points based on the surface geometry. We then utilize the detected landmarks and quasi-conformal theory for achieving the surface registration. Specifically, we develop a coefficient prediction network (CP-Net) for predicting the Beltrami coefficients associated with the desired landmark-based registration and a mapping network called the disk Beltrami solver network (DBS-Net) for generating quasi-conformal mappings from the predicted Beltrami coefficients, with the bijectivity guaranteed by quasi-conformal theory. Experimental results are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework. Altogether, our work paves a new way for surface-based morphometry and medical shape analysis.
abstract_zh: 在医学成像中，表面配准广泛用于在解剖结构之间进行系统比较，一个典型的例子是高度复杂的大脑皮层表面。为了获得有意义的配准，一种常见的方法是识别表面上的突出特征，并在它们之间建立低失真映射，并将特征对应编码为地标约束。之前的配准工作主要集中在使用手动标记的地标和解决高度非线性的优化问题，这些问题非常耗时，因此阻碍了实际应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用准共形几何和卷积神经网络自动地标检测和大脑皮层表面注册的新框架。我们首先开发了一个地标检测网络（LD-Net），它允许根据表面几何形状给定两个规定的起点和终点来自动提取地标曲线。然后，我们利用检测到的地标和准共形理论来实现表面配准。具体来说，我们开发了一个系数预测网络（CP-Net），用于预测与所需的基于地标的配准相关的贝尔特拉米系数，以及一个称为盘贝尔特拉米求解器网络（DBS-Net）的映射网络，用于从预测的贝尔特拉米系数生成准共形映射，并由准共形理论保证双射性。实验结果证明了我们提出的框架的有效性。总而言之，我们的工作为基于表面的形态测量和医学形状分析铺平了新的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合拟共形几何与卷积神经网络的自动脑皮层表面标志点检测与配准框架。
AI.motivation: 传统脑表面配准依赖人工标注的标志点且计算耗时，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 开发了LD-Net自动检测标志曲线，结合CP-Net预测Beltrami系数与DBS-Net生成拟共形映射实现配准。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提框架在脑皮层表面配准任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为基于表面的形态学分析和医学形状分析提供了新方法。

title: Adaptive Joint Optimization for 3D Reconstruction with Differentiable Rendering
title_zh: 利用可微分渲染进行 3D 重建的自适应联合优化
comment: 12 pages, published on TVCG; Project page: https://adjointopti.github.io/adjoin.github.io/
comments: 12 pages, published on TVCG; Project page: https://adjointopti.github.io/adjoin.github.io/
abstract: Due to inevitable noises introduced during scanning and quantization, 3D reconstruction via RGB-D sensors suffers from errors both in geometry and texture, leading to artifacts such as camera drifting, mesh distortion, texture ghosting, and blurriness. Given an imperfect reconstructed 3D model, most previous methods have focused on the refinement of either geometry, texture, or camera pose. Or different optimization schemes and objectives for optimizing each component have been used in previous joint optimization methods, forming a complicated system. In this paper, we propose a novel optimization approach based on differentiable rendering, which integrates the optimization of camera pose, geometry, and texture into a unified framework by enforcing consistency between the rendered results and the corresponding RGB-D inputs. Based on the unified framework, we introduce a joint optimization approach to fully exploit the inter-relationships between geometry, texture, and camera pose, and describe an adaptive interleaving strategy to improve optimization stability and efficiency. Using differentiable rendering, an image-level adversarial loss is applied to further improve the 3D model, making it more photorealistic. Experiments on synthetic and real data using quantitative and qualitative evaluation demonstrated the superiority of our approach in recovering both fine-scale geometry and high-fidelity texture.Code is available at https://adjointopti.github.io/adjoin.github.io/.
summary: Due to inevitable noises introduced during scanning and quantization, 3D reconstruction via RGB-D sensors suffers from errors both in geometry and texture, leading to artifacts such as camera drifting, mesh distortion, texture ghosting, and blurriness. Given an imperfect reconstructed 3D model, most previous methods have focused on the refinement of either geometry, texture, or camera pose. Or different optimization schemes and objectives for optimizing each component have been used in previous joint optimization methods, forming a complicated system. In this paper, we propose a novel optimization approach based on differentiable rendering, which integrates the optimization of camera pose, geometry, and texture into a unified framework by enforcing consistency between the rendered results and the corresponding RGB-D inputs. Based on the unified framework, we introduce a joint optimization approach to fully exploit the inter-relationships between geometry, texture, and camera pose, and describe an adaptive interleaving strategy to improve optimization stability and efficiency. Using differentiable rendering, an image-level adversarial loss is applied to further improve the 3D model, making it more photorealistic. Experiments on synthetic and real data using quantitative and qualitative evaluation demonstrated the superiority of our approach in recovering both fine-scale geometry and high-fidelity texture.Code is available at https://adjointopti.github.io/adjoin.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 由于扫描和量化过程中不可避免地引入噪声，通过 RGB-D 传感器进行的 3D 重建会出现几何和纹理错误，从而导致相机漂移、网格失真、纹理重影和模糊等伪影。鉴于重建的 3D 模型不完美，之前的大多数方法都集中在几何形状、纹理或相机姿势的细化上。或者之前的联合优化方法使用了不同的优化方案和优化每个组件的目标，形成了一个复杂的系统。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于可微渲染的新颖优化方法，通过强制渲染结果与相应的 RGB-D 输入之间的一致性，将相机姿态、几何和纹理的优化集成到统一的框架中。基于统一框架，我们引入了联合优化方法来充分利用几何、纹理和相机位姿之间的相互关系，并描述了自适应交错策略以提高优化稳定性和效率。使用可微渲染，应用图像级对抗性损失来进一步改进 3D 模型，使其更加逼真。使用定量和定性评估对合成数据和真实数据进行的实验证明了我们的方法在恢复精细几何形状和高保真纹理方面的优越性。代码可在 https://adjointopti.github.io/adjoin.github.io/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微渲染的自适应联合优化方法，用于改进RGB-D传感器的3D重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法因扫描和量化噪声导致几何和纹理误差，且传统方法多单独优化各组件或采用复杂系统，难以稳定高效地处理多组件关联性。
AI.method: 通过可微渲染构建统一框架，联合优化相机位姿、几何和纹理，引入自适应交错策略提升稳定性，并采用图像级对抗损失增强真实感。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上定量定性实验表明，该方法在细节几何恢复和高保真纹理生成方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过统一框架和自适应策略有效解决了3D重建中的多组件耦合优化问题，提升了重建精度与稳定性。

authors_text: Wenchao Ma,Bin Tan,Nan Xue,Tianfu Wu,Xianwei Zheng,Gui-Song Xia
title: HoW-3D: Holistic 3D Wireframe Perception from a Single Image
title_zh: HoW-3D：从单个图像进行整体 3D 线框感知
comment: To appear in IEEE 3DV 2022. Code and Dataset are available at https://github.com/Wenchao-M/HoW-3D
comments: To appear in IEEE 3DV 2022. Code and Dataset are available at https://github.com/Wenchao-M/HoW-3D
abstract: This paper studies the problem of holistic 3D wireframe perception (HoW-3D), a new task of perceiving both the visible 3D wireframes and the invisible ones from single-view 2D images. As the non-front surfaces of an object cannot be directly observed in a single view, estimating the non-line-of-sight (NLOS) geometries in HoW-3D is a fundamentally challenging problem and remains open in computer vision. We study the problem of HoW-3D by proposing an ABC-HoW benchmark, which is created on top of CAD models sourced from the ABC-dataset with 12k single-view images and the corresponding holistic 3D wireframe models. With our large-scale ABC-HoW benchmark available, we present a novel Deep Spatial Gestalt (DSG) model to learn the visible junctions and line segments as the basis and then infer the NLOS 3D structures from the visible cues by following the Gestalt principles of human vision systems. In our experiments, we demonstrate that our DSG model performs very well in inferring the holistic 3D wireframes from single-view images. Compared with the strong baseline methods, our DSG model outperforms the previous wireframe detectors in detecting the invisible line geometry in single-view images and is even very competitive with prior arts that take high-fidelity PointCloud as inputs on reconstructing 3D wireframes.

As the non-front surfaces of an object cannot be directly observed in a single view, estimating the non-line-of-sight (NLOS) geometries in HoW-3D is a fundamentally challenging problem and remains open in computer vision. We study the problem of HoW-3D by proposing an ABC-HoW benchmark, which is created on top of CAD models sourced from the ABC-dataset with 12k single-view images and the corresponding holistic 3D wireframe models. With our large-scale ABC-HoW benchmark available, we present a novel Deep Spatial Gestalt (DSG) model to learn the visible junctions and line segments as the basis and then infer the NLOS 3D structures from the visible cues by following the Gestalt principles of human vision systems. In our experiments, we demonstrate that our DSG model performs very well in inferring the holistic 3D wireframes from single-view images. Compared with the strong baseline methods, our DSG model outperforms the previous wireframe detectors in detecting the invisible line geometry in single-view images and is even very competitive with prior arts that take high-fidelity PointCloud as inputs on reconstructing 3D wireframes.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了整体 3D 线框感知 (HoW-3D) 问题，这是一项从单视图 2D 图像中感知可见 3D 线框和不可见 3D 线框的新任务。由于无法在单个视图中直接观察物体的非前表面，因此估计 HoW-3D 中的非视距 (NLOS) 几何形状是一个根本上具有挑战性的问题，并且在计算机视觉中仍然是开放的。我们通过提出 ABC-HoW 基准来研究 HoW-3D 问题，该基准是在源自 ABC 数据集的 CAD 模型之上创建的，其中包含 12k 单视图图像和相应的整体 3D 线框模型。借助我们的大规模 ABC-HoW 基准，我们提出了一种新颖的深度空间格式塔 (DSG) 模型，以学习可见的连接点和线段为基础，然后遵循人类视觉系统的格式塔原理，从可见线索推断 NLOS 3D 结构。在我们的实验中，我们证明了我们的 DSG 模型在从单视图图像推断整体 3D 线框方面表现良好。与强基线方法相比，我们的 DSG 模型在检测单视图图像中不可见的线几何形状方面优于以前的线框检测器，甚至与采用高保真点云作为重建 3D 线框输入的现有技术非常有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张图像中感知完整3D线框结构的新任务HoW-3D，包括可见和不可见的线框。
AI.motivation: 由于单视角图像无法直接观察到物体的非正面表面，因此估计不可见的非视线几何结构在计算机视觉中是一个具有挑战性的问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个名为ABC-HoW的基准数据集，并设计了一种深度空间格式塔（DSG）模型，通过学习可见的连接点和线段，遵循人类视觉系统的格式塔原则来推断不可见的3D结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，DSG模型在从单视角图像推断完整3D线框方面表现优异，优于现有方法，并且在重建3D线框方面与使用高保真点云输入的先前方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为单视角图像的3D线框感知提供了新的任务和方法，具有重要的应用前景。

title: On a Mechanism Framework of Autoencoders
title_zh: 关于自动编码器的机制框架
comment: v2:lemma 9 modified; v3:proof of lemma 8 changed; v4:definition 13 modified
comments: v2:lemma 9 modified; v3:proof of lemma 8 changed; v4:definition 13 modified
abstract: This paper proposes a theoretical framework on the mechanism of autoencoders. To the encoder part, under the main use of dimensionality reduction, we investigate its two fundamental properties: bijective maps and data disentangling. The general construction methods of an encoder that satisfies either or both of the above two properties are given. The generalization mechanism of autoencoders is modeled. Based on the theoretical framework above, we explain some experimental results of variational autoencoders, denoising autoencoders, and linear-unit autoencoders, with emphasis on the interpretation of the lower-dimensional representation of data via encoders; and the mechanism of image restoration through autoencoders is natural to be understood by those explanations. Compared to PCA and decision trees, the advantages of (generalized) autoencoders on dimensionality reduction and classification are demonstrated, respectively. Convolutional neural networks and randomly weighted neural networks are also interpreted by this framework.
summary: This paper proposes a theoretical framework on the mechanism of autoencoders. To the encoder part, under the main use of dimensionality reduction, we investigate its two fundamental properties: bijective maps and data disentangling. The general construction methods of an encoder that satisfies either or both of the above two properties are given. The generalization mechanism of autoencoders is modeled. Based on the theoretical framework above, we explain some experimental results of variational autoencoders, denoising autoencoders, and linear-unit autoencoders, with emphasis on the interpretation of the lower-dimensional representation of data via encoders; and the mechanism of image restoration through autoencoders is natural to be understood by those explanations. Compared to PCA and decision trees, the advantages of (generalized) autoencoders on dimensionality reduction and classification are demonstrated, respectively. Convolutional neural networks and randomly weighted neural networks are also interpreted by this framework.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了自动编码器机制的理论框架。对于编码器部分，在降维的主要用途下，我们研究了它的两个基本属性：双射映射和数据解缠结。给出了满足上述两个性质中的一个或两个的编码器的一般构造方法。对自动编码器的泛化机制进行了建模。基于上述理论框架，我们解释了变分自编码器、去噪自编码器和线性单元自编码器的一些实验结果，重点是通过编码器解释数据的低维表示；通过这些解释自然可以理解通过自动编码器进行图像恢复的机制。与PCA和决策树相比，（广义）自动编码器分别在降维和分类方面具有优势。卷积神经网络和随机加权神经网络也由该框架解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个自编码器机制的理论框架，分析编码器的双射映射与数据解缠属性，并解释多种自编码器的实验结果。
AI.motivation: 现有自编码器应用广泛但缺乏系统理论指导，需建立统一框架解释其机制及不同变体的工作原理。
AI.method: 通过分析编码器的双射性与解缠特性，构建泛化机制模型，并结合实验对比PCA、决策树等方法验证优势。
AI.result: 成功解释变分/去噪自编码器的实验现象，证明自编码器在降维与分类任务中优于传统方法，并兼容CNN等结构。
AI.conclusion: 该框架深化了对自编码器机制的理解，为模型设计与应用优化提供了理论依据。

title: Deepfake Detection using ImageNet models and Temporal Images of 468 Facial Landmarks
title_zh: 使用 ImageNet 模型和 468 个面部标志的时间图像进行 Deepfake 检测
abstract: This paper presents our results and findings on the use of temporal images for deepfake detection. We modelled temporal relations that exist in the movement of 468 facial landmarks across frames of a given video as spatial relations by constructing an image (referred to as temporal image) using the pixel values at these facial landmarks. CNNs are capable of recognizing spatial relationships that exist between the pixels of a given image. 10 different ImageNet models were considered for the study.
summary: This paper presents our results and findings on the use of temporal images for deepfake detection. We modelled temporal relations that exist in the movement of 468 facial landmarks across frames of a given video as spatial relations by constructing an image (referred to as temporal image) using the pixel values at these facial landmarks. CNNs are capable of recognizing spatial relationships that exist between the pixels of a given image. 10 different ImageNet models were considered for the study.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们使用时间图像进行深度伪造检测的结果和发现。我们通过使用这些面部标志处的像素值构建图像（称为时间图像），将给定视频帧之间 468 个面部标志的运动中存在的时间关系建模为空间关系。 CNN 能够识别给定图像的像素之间存在的空间关系。该研究考虑了 10 种不同的 ImageNet 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用468个面部标志点的时序图像结合ImageNet模型进行深度伪造检测的方法。
AI.motivation: 通过将面部标志点的时序运动转化为空间关系，利用CNN对空间特征的敏感性提升检测效果。
AI.method: 提取视频中每帧468个面部标志点的像素值，构建时序图像并输入10种ImageNet预训练CNN模型进行分类检测。
AI.result: 实验验证了时序图像方法在深度伪造检测中的有效性，不同ImageNet模型表现存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 时序图像方法能有效捕捉面部动态特征，结合ImageNet模型可为深度伪造检测提供新思路。

search_text: Deepfake Detection using ImageNet models and Temporal Images of 468 Facial Landmarks 使用 ImageNet 模型和 468 个面部标志的时间图像进行 Deepfake 检测 This paper presents our results and findings on the use of temporal images for deepfake detection. We modelled temporal relations that exist in the movement of 468 facial landmarks across frames of a given video as spatial relations by constructing an image (referred to as temporal image) using the pixel values at these facial landmarks. CNNs are capable of recognizing spatial relationships that exist between the pixels of a given image. 10 different ImageNet models were considered for the study. 本文介绍了我们使用时间图像进行深度伪造检测的结果和发现。我们通过使用这些面部标志处的像素值构建图像（称为时间图像），将给定视频帧之间 468 个面部标志的运动中存在的时间关系建模为空间关系。 CNN 能够识别给定图像的像素之间存在的空间关系。该研究考虑了 10 种不同的 ImageNet 模型。 本文提出利用468个面部标志点的时序图像结合ImageNet模型进行深度伪造检测的方法。 Christeen T Jose cs.CV

title: A Multi-objective Memetic Algorithm for Auto Adversarial Attack Optimization Design
title_zh: 一种用于自动对抗攻击优化设计的多目标模因算法
abstract: The phenomenon of adversarial examples has been revealed in variant scenarios. Recent studies show that well-designed adversarial defense strategies can improve the robustness of deep learning models against adversarial examples. However, with the rapid development of defense technologies, it also tends to be more difficult to evaluate the robustness of the defensed model due to the weak performance of existing manually designed adversarial attacks. To address the challenge, given the defensed model, the efficient adversarial attack with less computational burden and lower robust accuracy is needed to be further exploited. Therefore, we propose a multi-objective memetic algorithm for auto adversarial attack optimization design, which realizes the automatical search for the near-optimal adversarial attack towards defensed models. Firstly, the more general mathematical model of auto adversarial attack optimization design is constructed, where the search space includes not only the attacker operations, magnitude, iteration number, and loss functions but also the connection ways of multiple adversarial attacks. In addition, we develop a multi-objective memetic algorithm combining NSGA-II and local search to solve the optimization problem. Finally, to decrease the evaluation cost during the search, we propose a representative data selection strategy based on the sorting of cross entropy loss values of each images output by models. Experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and ImageNet datasets show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
