Recent studies show that well-designed adversarial defense strategies can improve the robustness of deep learning models against adversarial examples. However, with the rapid development of defense technologies, it also tends to be more difficult to evaluate the robustness of the defensed model due to the weak performance of existing manually designed adversarial attacks. To address the challenge, given the defensed model, the efficient adversarial attack with less computational burden and lower robust accuracy is needed to be further exploited. Therefore, we propose a multi-objective memetic algorithm for auto adversarial attack optimization design, which realizes the automatical search for the near-optimal adversarial attack towards defensed models. Firstly, the more general mathematical model of auto adversarial attack optimization design is constructed, where the search space includes not only the attacker operations, magnitude, iteration number, and loss functions but also the connection ways of multiple adversarial attacks. In addition, we develop a multi-objective memetic algorithm combining NSGA-II and local search to solve the optimization problem. Finally, to decrease the evaluation cost during the search, we propose a representative data selection strategy based on the sorting of cross entropy loss values of each images output by models. Experiments on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and ImageNet datasets show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 对抗性例子的现象已经在不同的场景中被揭示出来。最近的研究表明，精心设计的对抗性防御策略可以提高深度学习模型针对对抗性示例的鲁棒性。然而，随着防御技术的快速发展，由于现有的手动设计的对抗攻击性能较弱，评估防御模型的鲁棒性也变得更加困难。为了应对这一挑战，在给定防御模型的情况下，需要进一步利用计算负担较小、鲁棒精度较低的高效对抗攻击。因此，我们提出了一种用于自动对抗攻击优化设计的多目标模因算法，实现了对防御模型的近乎最优对抗攻击的自动搜索。首先，构建了更通用的自动对抗攻击优化设计数学模型，其中搜索空间不仅包括攻击者操作、幅度、迭代次数和损失函数，还包括多种对抗攻击的连接方式。此外，我们开发了一种结合 NSGA-II 和局部搜索的多目标模因算法来解决优化问题。最后，为了降低搜索过程中的评估成本，我们提出了一种基于模型输出的每个图像的交叉熵损失值排序的代表性数据选择策略。在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 ImageNet 数据集上的实验表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多目标记忆算法，用于自动优化对抗攻击设计，以评估深度学习模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有手动设计的对抗攻击在评估防御模型鲁棒性时效果不佳，需更高效的自动攻击方法。
AI.method: 构建通用数学模型，结合NSGA-II与局部搜索的多目标记忆算法，并提出基于交叉熵损失排序的数据选择策略。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和ImageNet数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能自动搜索近优对抗攻击，提升防御模型鲁棒性评估效率。

title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Assault Sentence Prediction in New Zealand
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能在新西兰的攻击性判决预测
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, accepted by the Journal of the Royal Society of New Zealand
comments: 16 pages, 3 figures, accepted by the Journal of the Royal Society of New Zealand
abstract: The judiciary has historically been conservative in its use of Artificial Intelligence, but recent advances in machine learning have prompted scholars to reconsider such use in tasks like sentence prediction. This paper investigates by experimentation the potential use of explainable artificial intelligence for predicting imprisonment sentences in assault cases in New Zealand's courts. We propose a proof-of-concept explainable model and verify in practice that it is fit for purpose, with predicted sentences accurate to within one year. We further analyse the model to understand the most influential phrases in sentence length prediction. We conclude the paper with an evaluative discussion of the future benefits and risks of different ways of using such an AI model in New Zealand's courts.
summary: The judiciary has historically been conservative in its use of Artificial Intelligence, but recent advances in machine learning have prompted scholars to reconsider such use in tasks like sentence prediction. This paper investigates by experimentation the potential use of explainable artificial intelligence for predicting imprisonment sentences in assault cases in New Zealand's courts. We propose a proof-of-concept explainable model and verify in practice that it is fit for purpose, with predicted sentences accurate to within one year. We further analyse the model to understand the most influential phrases in sentence length prediction. We conclude the paper with an evaluative discussion of the future benefits and risks of different ways of using such an AI model in New Zealand's courts.
abstract_zh: 司法部门历来在人工智能的使用上一直持保守态度，但机器学习的最新进展促使学者们重新考虑在句子预测等任务中的这种使用。本文通过实验研究了可解释的人工智能在预测新西兰法院袭击案件中的监禁判决方面的潜在用途。我们提出了一个概念验证的可解释模型，并在实践中验证它是否适合目的，预测的句子精确到一年内。我们进一步分析该模型，以了解句子长度预测中最有影响力的短语。我们在本文的最后对新西兰法院使用这种人工智能模型的不同方式的未来收益和风险进行了评估性讨论。

AI.tldr: 研究可解释人工智能在新西兰袭击案件量刑预测中的应用
AI.motivation: 司法界对AI应用持保守态度，但机器学习进步促使探索其在量刑预测中的潜力，以提高透明度和公正性
AI.method: 提出并验证一个可解释AI模型，通过实验分析其预测准确性和关键影响因素
AI.result: 模型预测量刑准确度误差在一年内，并识别出影响量刑的关键短语
AI.conclusion: AI模型有望提升司法效率和透明度，但需权衡技术可靠性与伦理风险

authors_text: Alexander Wong,Mohammad Javad Shafiee,Saad Abbasi,Saeejith Nair,Mahmoud Famouri
title: Faster Attention Is What You Need: A Fast Self-Attention Neural Network Backbone Architecture for the Edge via Double-Condensing Attention Condensers
title_zh: 您需要更快的注意力：通过双凝聚注意力冷凝器实现边缘的快速自注意力神经网络骨干架构
abstract: With the growing adoption of deep learning for on-device TinyML applications, there has been an ever-increasing demand for efficient neural network backbones optimized for the edge. Recently, the introduction of attention condenser networks have resulted in low-footprint, highly-efficient, self-attention neural networks that strike a strong balance between accuracy and speed. In this study, we introduce a faster attention condenser design called double-condensing attention condensers that allow for highly condensed feature embeddings. We further employ a machine-driven design exploration strategy that imposes design constraints based on best practices for greater efficiency and robustness to produce the macro-micro architecture constructs of the backbone. The resulting backbone (which we name AttendNeXt) achieves significantly higher inference throughput on an embedded ARM processor when compared to several other state-of-the-art efficient backbones (>10x faster than FB-Net C at higher accuracy and speed and >10x faster than MobileOne-S1 at smaller size) while having a small model size (>1.37x smaller than MobileNetv3-L at higher accuracy and speed) and strong accuracy (1.1% higher top-1 accuracy than MobileViT XS on ImageNet at higher speed). These promising results demonstrate that exploring different efficient architecture designs and self-attention mechanisms can lead to interesting new building blocks for TinyML applications.
summary: With the growing adoption of deep learning for on-device TinyML applications, there has been an ever-increasing demand for efficient neural network backbones optimized for the edge. Recently, the introduction of attention condenser networks have resulted in low-footprint, highly-efficient, self-attention neural networks that strike a strong balance between accuracy and speed. In this study, we introduce a faster attention condenser design called double-condensing attention condensers that allow for highly condensed feature embeddings. We further employ a machine-driven design exploration strategy that imposes design constraints based on best practices for greater efficiency and robustness to produce the macro-micro architecture constructs of the backbone. The resulting backbone (which we name AttendNeXt) achieves significantly higher inference throughput on an embedded ARM processor when compared to several other state-of-the-art efficient backbones (>10x faster than FB-Net C at higher accuracy and speed and >10x faster than MobileOne-S1 at smaller size) while having a small model size (>1.37x smaller than MobileNetv3-L at higher accuracy and speed) and strong accuracy (1.1% higher top-1 accuracy than MobileViT XS on ImageNet at higher speed). These promising results demonstrate that exploring different efficient architecture designs and self-attention mechanisms can lead to interesting new building blocks for TinyML applications.
abstract_zh: 随着设备上 TinyML 应用程序越来越多地采用深度学习，对针对边缘进行优化的高效神经网络主干的需求不断增加。最近，注意力冷凝网络的引入产生了低占用空间、高效的自注意力神经网络，在准确性和速度之间取得了强有力的平衡。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种更快的注意力凝聚器设计，称为双凝聚注意力凝聚器，它允许高度凝聚的特征嵌入。我们进一步采用机器驱动的设计探索策略，该策略基于最佳实践施加设计约束，以提高效率和鲁棒性，以生成主干的宏观-微观架构构造。与其他几个最先进的高效骨干网相比（在更高的精度和速度下比 FB-Net C 快 > 10 倍，在更小的尺寸下比 MobileOne-S1 快 > 10 倍），所得骨干网（我们将其命名为 attendNeXt）在嵌入式 ARM 处理器上实现了显着更高的推理吞吐量，同时具有较小的模型尺寸（在更高的精度和速度下比 MobileNetv3-L 小 > 1.37 倍）和强大的准确性（比 top-1 精度高 1.1%） ImageNet 上的 MobileViT XS 速度更高）。这些有希望的结果表明，探索不同的高效架构设计和自注意力机制可以为 TinyML 应用程序带来有趣的新构建块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AttendNeXt的高效自注意力神经网络架构，通过双压缩注意力凝聚器设计优化边缘设备的推理速度与模型大小。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习在边缘设备上的应用增加，现有模型在速度、精度与模型大小之间难以平衡，亟需更高效的神经网络架构。
AI.method: 设计双压缩注意力凝聚器以生成高度压缩的特征嵌入，并结合机器驱动的架构探索策略，基于最佳实践约束生成宏-微观混合架构。
AI.result: AttendNeXt在ARM嵌入式处理器上较FB-Net C快10倍以上，模型体积比MobileNetv3-L小1.37倍，ImageNet分类精度比MobileViT XS高1.1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过探索高效架构设计与自注意力机制，可为TinyML应用提供新型高效模块，AttendNeXt验证了该方向的可行性。

ai_content.motivation: 随着深度学习在边缘设备上的应用增加，现有模型在速度、精度与模型大小之间难以平衡，亟需更高效的神经网络架构。

search_text: Faster Attention Is What You Need: A Fast Self-Attention Neural Network Backbone Architecture for the Edge via Double-Condensing Attention Condensers 您需要更快的注意力：通过双凝聚注意力冷凝器实现边缘的快速自注意力神经网络骨干架构 With the growing adoption of deep learning for on-device TinyML applications, there has been an ever-increasing demand for efficient neural network backbones optimized for the edge. Recently, the introduction of attention condenser networks have resulted in low-footprint, highly-efficient, self-attention neural networks that strike a strong balance between accuracy and speed. In this study, we introduce a faster attention condenser design called double-condensing attention condensers that allow for highly condensed feature embeddings. We further employ a machine-driven design exploration strategy that imposes design constraints based on best practices for greater efficiency and robustness to produce the macro-micro architecture constructs of the backbone. The resulting backbone (which we name AttendNeXt) achieves significantly higher inference throughput on an embedded ARM processor when compared to several other state-of-the-art efficient backbones (>10x faster than FB-Net C at higher accuracy and speed and >10x faster than MobileOne-S1 at smaller size) while having a small model size (>1.37x smaller than MobileNetv3-L at higher accuracy and speed) and strong accuracy (1.1% higher top-1 accuracy than MobileViT XS on ImageNet at higher speed). These promising results demonstrate that exploring different efficient architecture designs and self-attention mechanisms can lead to interesting new building blocks for TinyML applications. 随着设备上 TinyML 应用程序越来越多地采用深度学习，对针对边缘进行优化的高效神经网络主干的需求不断增加。最近，注意力冷凝网络的引入产生了低占用空间、高效的自注意力神经网络，在准确性和速度之间取得了强有力的平衡。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种更快的注意力凝聚器设计，称为双凝聚注意力凝聚器，它允许高度凝聚的特征嵌入。我们进一步采用机器驱动的设计探索策略，该策略基于最佳实践施加设计约束，以提高效率和鲁棒性，以生成主干的宏观-微观架构构造。与其他几个最先进的高效骨干网相比（在更高的精度和速度下比 FB-Net C 快 > 10 倍，在更小的尺寸下比 MobileOne-S1 快 > 10 倍），所得骨干网（我们将其命名为 attendNeXt）在嵌入式 ARM 处理器上实现了显着更高的推理吞吐量，同时具有较小的模型尺寸（在更高的精度和速度下比 MobileNetv3-L 小 > 1.37 倍）和强大的准确性（比 top-1 精度高 1.1%） ImageNet 上的 MobileViT XS 速度更高）。这些有希望的结果表明，探索不同的高效架构设计和自注意力机制可以为 TinyML 应用程序带来有趣的新构建块。 本文提出一种名为AttendNeXt的高效自注意力神经网络架构，通过双压缩注意力凝聚器设计优化边缘设备的推理速度与模型大小。 Alexander Wong,Mohammad Javad Shafiee,Saad Abbasi,Saeejith Nair,Mahmoud Famouri cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jizhou Huang,Zhengjie Huang,Xiaomin Fang,Shikun Feng,Xuyi Chen,Jiaxiang Liu,Haitao Yuan,Haifeng Wang
title: DuETA: Traffic Congestion Propagation Pattern Modeling via Efficient Graph Learning for ETA Prediction at Baidu Maps
title_zh: DuETA：通过高效图学习进行交通拥堵传播模式建模，用于百度地图上的 ETA 预测
abstract: Estimated time of arrival (ETA) prediction, also known as travel time estimation, is a fundamental task for a wide range of intelligent transportation applications, such as navigation, route planning, and ride-hailing services. To accurately predict the travel time of a route, it is essential to take into account both contextual and predictive factors, such as spatial-temporal interaction, driving behavior, and traffic congestion propagation inference. The ETA prediction models previously deployed at Baidu Maps have addressed the factors of spatial-temporal interaction (ConSTGAT) and driving behavior (SSML). In this work, we focus on modeling traffic congestion propagation patterns to improve ETA performance. Traffic congestion propagation pattern modeling is challenging, and it requires accounting for impact regions over time and cumulative effect of delay variations over time caused by traffic events on the road network. In this paper, we present a practical industrial-grade ETA prediction framework named DuETA. Specifically, we construct a congestion-sensitive graph based on the correlations of traffic patterns, and we develop a route-aware graph transformer to directly learn the long-distance correlations of the road segments. This design enables DuETA to capture the interactions between the road segment pairs that are spatially distant but highly correlated with traffic conditions. Extensive experiments are conducted on large-scale, real-world datasets collected from Baidu Maps. Experimental results show that ETA prediction can significantly benefit from the learned traffic congestion propagation patterns. In addition, DuETA has already been deployed in production at Baidu Maps, serving billions of requests every day. This demonstrates that DuETA is an industrial-grade and robust solution for large-scale ETA prediction services.
summary: Estimated time of arrival (ETA) prediction, also known as travel time estimation, is a fundamental task for a wide range of intelligent transportation applications, such as navigation, route planning, and ride-hailing services. To accurately predict the travel time of a route, it is essential to take into account both contextual and predictive factors, such as spatial-temporal interaction, driving behavior, and traffic congestion propagation inference. The ETA prediction models previously deployed at Baidu Maps have addressed the factors of spatial-temporal interaction (ConSTGAT) and driving behavior (SSML). In this work, we focus on modeling traffic congestion propagation patterns to improve ETA performance. Traffic congestion propagation pattern modeling is challenging, and it requires accounting for impact regions over time and cumulative effect of delay variations over time caused by traffic events on the road network. In this paper, we present a practical industrial-grade ETA prediction framework named DuETA. Specifically, we construct a congestion-sensitive graph based on the correlations of traffic patterns, and we develop a route-aware graph transformer to directly learn the long-distance correlations of the road segments. This design enables DuETA to capture the interactions between the road segment pairs that are spatially distant but highly correlated with traffic conditions. Extensive experiments are conducted on large-scale, real-world datasets collected from Baidu Maps. Experimental results show that ETA prediction can significantly benefit from the learned traffic congestion propagation patterns. In addition, DuETA has already been deployed in production at Baidu Maps, serving billions of requests every day. This demonstrates that DuETA is an industrial-grade and robust solution for large-scale ETA prediction services.
abstract_zh: 预计到达时间 (ETA) 预测，也称为行程时间估计，是导航、路线规划和叫车服务等各种智能交通应用的一项基本任务。为了准确预测路线的旅行时间，必须考虑情境因素和预测因素，例如时空相互作用、驾驶行为和交通拥堵传播推断。百度地图之前部署的ETA预测模型已经解决了时空交互（ConSTGAT）和驾驶行为（SSML）因素。在这项工作中，我们重点对交通拥堵传播模式进行建模，以提高 ETA 性能。交通拥堵传播模式建模具有挑战性，需要考虑随时间变化的影响区域以及道路网络上交通事件引起的延迟变化随时间变化的累积效应。在本文中，我们提出了一个实用的工业级 ETA 预测框架，名为 DuETA。具体来说，我们根据交通模式的相关性构建了一个拥堵敏感图，并开发了一个路线感知图转换器来直接学习路段的长距离相关性。这种设计使 DuETA 能够捕获空间上遥远但与交通状况高度相关的路段对之间的相互作用。对从百度地图收集的大规模真实数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，ETA 预测可以显着受益于学习到的交通拥堵传播模式。此外，DuETA已经部署在百度地图的生产环境中，每天处理数十亿次请求。这表明DuETA是一个工业级的、强大的解决方案，适用于大规模ETA预测服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DuETA框架，通过高效图学习建模交通拥堵传播模式，以提升百度地图的ETA预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有ETA模型已考虑时空交互和驾驶行为因素，但交通拥堵传播模式的建模仍存在挑战，需捕捉拥堵影响区域及时空累积效应。
AI.method: 构建拥堵敏感图并设计路线感知图变压器，直接学习道路段间的长距离关联，捕捉空间距离远但交通条件高度相关的道路段交互。
AI.result: 在百度地图真实数据集上实验表明，DuETA显著提升ETA预测效果，且已部署生产环境日均处理数十亿请求。
AI.conclusion: DuETA通过工业级图学习方法有效建模拥堵传播模式，为大规模ETA预测提供了鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Wei Li,Ruxuan Li,Yuzhe Ma,Siu On Chan,David Pan,Bei Yu
title: Rethinking Graph Neural Networks for the Graph Coloring Problem
title_zh: 重新思考图神经网络解决图着色问题
abstract: Graph coloring, a classical and critical NP-hard problem, is the problem of assigning connected nodes as different colors as possible. However, we observe that state-of-the-art GNNs are less successful in the graph coloring problem. We analyze the reasons from two perspectives. First, most GNNs fail to generalize the task under homophily to heterophily, i.e., graphs where connected nodes are assigned different colors. Second, GNNs are bounded by the network depth, making them possible to be a local method, which has been demonstrated to be non-optimal in Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem. In this paper, we focus on the aggregation-combine GNNs (AC-GNNs), a popular class of GNNs. We first define the power of AC-GNNs in the coloring problem as the capability to assign nodes different colors. The definition is different with previous one that is based on the assumption of homophily. We identify node pairs that AC-GNNs fail to discriminate. Furthermore, we show that any AC-GNN is a local coloring method, and any local coloring method is non-optimal by exploring the limits of local methods over sparse random graphs, thereby demonstrating the non-optimality of AC-GNNs due to its local property. We then prove the positive correlation between model depth and its coloring power. Moreover, we discuss the color equivariance of graphs to tackle some practical constraints such as the pre-fixing constraints. Following the discussions above, we summarize a series of rules a series of rules that make a GNN color equivariant and powerful in the coloring problem. Then, we propose a simple AC-GNN variation satisfying these rules. We empirically validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate that our simple model substantially outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms in both quality and runtime.
summary: Graph coloring, a classical and critical NP-hard problem, is the problem of assigning connected nodes as different colors as possible. However, we observe that state-of-the-art GNNs are less successful in the graph coloring problem. We analyze the reasons from two perspectives. First, most GNNs fail to generalize the task under homophily to heterophily, i.e., graphs where connected nodes are assigned different colors. Second, GNNs are bounded by the network depth, making them possible to be a local method, which has been demonstrated to be non-optimal in Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem. In this paper, we focus on the aggregation-combine GNNs (AC-GNNs), a popular class of GNNs. We first define the power of AC-GNNs in the coloring problem as the capability to assign nodes different colors. The definition is different with previous one that is based on the assumption of homophily. We identify node pairs that AC-GNNs fail to discriminate. Furthermore, we show that any AC-GNN is a local coloring method, and any local coloring method is non-optimal by exploring the limits of local methods over sparse random graphs, thereby demonstrating the non-optimality of AC-GNNs due to its local property. We then prove the positive correlation between model depth and its coloring power. Moreover, we discuss the color equivariance of graphs to tackle some practical constraints such as the pre-fixing constraints. Following the discussions above, we summarize a series of rules a series of rules that make a GNN color equivariant and powerful in the coloring problem. Then, we propose a simple AC-GNN variation satisfying these rules. We empirically validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate that our simple model substantially outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms in both quality and runtime.
abstract_zh: 图着色是一个经典且关键的 NP 难问题，是为连接的节点分配尽可能不同的颜色的问题。然而，我们观察到最先进的 GNN 在图着色问题上不太成功。我们从两个角度来分析原因。首先，大多数 GNN 无法将同质下的任务推广到异质下，即连接的节点被分配不同颜色的图。其次，GNN 受到网络深度的限制，这使得它们有可能成为一种局部方法，这已被证明在最大独立集（MIS）问题中不是最优的。在本文中，我们重点关注聚合组合 GNN（AC-GNN），这是一类流行的 GNN。我们首先将 AC-GNN 在着色问题中的能力定义为为节点分配不同颜色的能力。这一定义与之前基于同质性假设的定义不同。我们识别出 AC-GNN 无法区分的节点对。此外，我们通过探索局部方法在稀疏随机图上的局限性，证明任何 AC-GNN 都是局部着色方法，并且任何局部着色方法都是非最优的，从而证明了 AC-GNN 由于其局部属性而不是最优的。然后我们证明模型深度与其着色力之间的正相关性。此外，我们讨论图的颜色等变性以解决一些实际约束，例如预固定约束。经过上面的讨论，我们总结了一系列规则，这些规则使 GNN 颜色等变并且在着色问题上功能强大。然后，我们提出了一个满足这些规则的简单 AC-GNN 变体。我们凭经验验证了我们的理论发现，并证明我们的简单模型在质量和运行时间方面都远远优于最先进的启发式算法。

AI.tldr: 本文分析图神经网络（GNN）在图着色问题中的局限性，并提出一种改进的AC-GNN模型以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN在图着色问题上表现不佳，主要受限于同质性假设和局部方法的非最优性。
AI.method: 通过分析AC-GNN的聚合-组合结构，定义其着色能力，证明其局部性导致非最优性，并提出满足颜色等变性的改进模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的模型在着色质量与运行时间上均优于现有启发式算法。
AI.conclusion: AC-GNN因局部性存在本质局限，但通过设计符合等变性规则的模型可显著提升图着色性能。

search_text: Rethinking Graph Neural Networks for the Graph Coloring Problem 重新思考图神经网络解决图着色问题 Graph coloring, a classical and critical NP-hard problem, is the problem of assigning connected nodes as different colors as possible. However, we observe that state-of-the-art GNNs are less successful in the graph coloring problem. We analyze the reasons from two perspectives. First, most GNNs fail to generalize the task under homophily to heterophily, i.e., graphs where connected nodes are assigned different colors. Second, GNNs are bounded by the network depth, making them possible to be a local method, which has been demonstrated to be non-optimal in Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem. In this paper, we focus on the aggregation-combine GNNs (AC-GNNs), a popular class of GNNs. We first define the power of AC-GNNs in the coloring problem as the capability to assign nodes different colors. The definition is different with previous one that is based on the assumption of homophily. We identify node pairs that AC-GNNs fail to discriminate. Furthermore, we show that any AC-GNN is a local coloring method, and any local coloring method is non-optimal by exploring the limits of local methods over sparse random graphs, thereby demonstrating the non-optimality of AC-GNNs due to its local property. We then prove the positive correlation between model depth and its coloring power. Moreover, we discuss the color equivariance of graphs to tackle some practical constraints such as the pre-fixing constraints. Following the discussions above, we summarize a series of rules a series of rules that make a GNN color equivariant and powerful in the coloring problem. Then, we propose a simple AC-GNN variation satisfying these rules. We empirically validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate that our simple model substantially outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms in both quality and runtime. 图着色是一个经典且关键的 NP 难问题，是为连接的节点分配尽可能不同的颜色的问题。然而，我们观察到最先进的 GNN 在图着色问题上不太成功。我们从两个角度来分析原因。首先，大多数 GNN 无法将同质下的任务推广到异质下，即连接的节点被分配不同颜色的图。其次，GNN 受到网络深度的限制，这使得它们有可能成为一种局部方法，这已被证明在最大独立集（MIS）问题中不是最优的。在本文中，我们重点关注聚合组合 GNN（AC-GNN），这是一类流行的 GNN。我们首先将 AC-GNN 在着色问题中的能力定义为为节点分配不同颜色的能力。这一定义与之前基于同质性假设的定义不同。我们识别出 AC-GNN 无法区分的节点对。此外，我们通过探索局部方法在稀疏随机图上的局限性，证明任何 AC-GNN 都是局部着色方法，并且任何局部着色方法都是非最优的，从而证明了 AC-GNN 由于其局部属性而不是最优的。然后我们证明模型深度与其着色力之间的正相关性。此外，我们讨论图的颜色等变性以解决一些实际约束，例如预固定约束。经过上面的讨论，我们总结了一系列规则，这些规则使 GNN 颜色等变并且在着色问题上功能强大。然后，我们提出了一个满足这些规则的简单 AC-GNN 变体。我们凭经验验证了我们的理论发现，并证明我们的简单模型在质量和运行时间方面都远远优于最先进的启发式算法。 本文分析图神经网络（GNN）在图着色问题中的局限性，并提出一种改进的AC-GNN模型以提升性能。 Wei Li,Ruxuan Li,Yuzhe Ma,Siu On Chan,David Pan,Bei Yu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuaiyi Huang,Luyu Yang,Bo He,Songyang Zhang,Xuming He,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Learning Semantic Correspondence with Sparse Annotations
title_zh: 使用稀疏注释学习语义对应
abstract: Finding dense semantic correspondence is a fundamental problem in computer vision, which remains challenging in complex scenes due to background clutter, extreme intra-class variation, and a severe lack of ground truth. In this paper, we aim to address the challenge of label sparsity in semantic correspondence by enriching supervision signals from sparse keypoint annotations. To this end, we first propose a teacher-student learning paradigm for generating dense pseudo-labels and then develop two novel strategies for denoising pseudo-labels. In particular, we use spatial priors around the sparse annotations to suppress the noisy pseudo-labels. In addition, we introduce a loss-driven dynamic label selection strategy for label denoising. We instantiate our paradigm with two variants of learning strategies: a single offline teacher setting, and mutual online teachers setting. Our approach achieves notable improvements on three challenging benchmarks for semantic correspondence and establishes the new state-of-the-art. Project page: https://shuaiyihuang.github.io/publications/SCorrSAN.
summary: Finding dense semantic correspondence is a fundamental problem in computer vision, which remains challenging in complex scenes due to background clutter, extreme intra-class variation, and a severe lack of ground truth. In this paper, we aim to address the challenge of label sparsity in semantic correspondence by enriching supervision signals from sparse keypoint annotations. To this end, we first propose a teacher-student learning paradigm for generating dense pseudo-labels and then develop two novel strategies for denoising pseudo-labels. In particular, we use spatial priors around the sparse annotations to suppress the noisy pseudo-labels. In addition, we introduce a loss-driven dynamic label selection strategy for label denoising. We instantiate our paradigm with two variants of learning strategies: a single offline teacher setting, and mutual online teachers setting. Our approach achieves notable improvements on three challenging benchmarks for semantic correspondence and establishes the new state-of-the-art. Project page: https://shuaiyihuang.github.io/publications/SCorrSAN.
abstract_zh: 寻找密集的语义对应是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，由于背景混乱、极端的类内变化和严重缺乏基本事实，这在复杂的场景中仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们的目标是通过丰富稀疏关键点注释中的监督信号来解决语义对应中标签稀疏性的挑战。为此，我们首先提出了一种用于生成密集伪标签的师生学习范式，然后开发了两种新颖的伪标签去噪策略。特别是，我们使用稀疏注释周围的空间先验来抑制嘈杂的伪标签。此外，我们引入了一种用于标签去噪的损失驱动的动态标签选择策略。我们用两种学习策略变体来实例化我们的范式：单一离线教师设置和共同在线教师设置。我们的方法在语义对应的三个具有挑战性的基准上取得了显着的改进，并建立了新的最先进技术。项目页面：https://shuaiyi Huang.github.io/publications/SCorrSAN。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过稀疏标注学习语义对应关系，解决复杂场景下因标注不足导致的密集语义对应难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景中因背景杂乱、类别内差异大及标注稀缺而难以准确建立密集语义对应关系，亟需提升稀疏标注下的监督信号质量。
AI.method: 提出教师-学生学习框架生成密集伪标签，并设计空间先验抑制噪声与动态标签选择策略进行去噪，包含单离线教师和互在线教师两种实现方式。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集上取得显著提升，确立了新的状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过伪标签生成与去噪策略有效缓解标注稀缺问题，为稀疏标注下的语义对应学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tyson Neuroth,Martin Rieth,Konduri Aditya,Myoungkyu Lee,Jacqueline H Chen,Kwan-Liu Ma
title: Level Set Restricted Voronoi Tessellation for Large scale Spatial Statistical Analysis
title_zh: 用于大规模空间统计分析的水平集限制 Voronoi 曲面细分
abstract: Spatial statistical analysis of multivariate volumetric data can be challenging due to scale, complexity, and occlusion. Advances in topological segmentation, feature extraction, and statistical summarization have helped overcome the challenges. This work introduces a new spatial statistical decomposition method based on level sets, connected components, and a novel variation of the restricted centroidal Voronoi tessellation that is better suited for spatial statistical decomposition and parallel efficiency. The resulting data structures organize features into a coherent nested hierarchy to support flexible and efficient out-of-core region-of-interest extraction. Next, we provide an efficient parallel implementation. Finally, an interactive visualization system based on this approach is designed and then applied to turbulent combustion data. The combined approach enables an interactive spatial statistical analysis workflow for large-scale data with a top-down approach through multiple-levels-of-detail that links phase space statistics with spatial features.
summary: Spatial statistical analysis of multivariate volumetric data can be challenging due to scale, complexity, and occlusion. Advances in topological segmentation, feature extraction, and statistical summarization have helped overcome the challenges. This work introduces a new spatial statistical decomposition method based on level sets, connected components, and a novel variation of the restricted centroidal Voronoi tessellation that is better suited for spatial statistical decomposition and parallel efficiency. The resulting data structures organize features into a coherent nested hierarchy to support flexible and efficient out-of-core region-of-interest extraction. Next, we provide an efficient parallel implementation. Finally, an interactive visualization system based on this approach is designed and then applied to turbulent combustion data. The combined approach enables an interactive spatial statistical analysis workflow for large-scale data with a top-down approach through multiple-levels-of-detail that links phase space statistics with spatial features.
abstract_zh: 由于规模、复杂性和遮挡，多元体积数据的空间统计分析可能具有挑战性。拓扑分割、特征提取和统计总结方面的进步有助于克服这些挑战。这项工作引入了一种基于水平集、连通分量的新空间统计分解方法，以及更适合空间统计分解和并行效率的受限质心 Voronoi 细分的新变体。由此产生的数据结构将特征组织成连贯的嵌套层次结构，以支持灵活高效的核心外感兴趣区域提取。接下来，我们提供一个高效的并行实现。最后，设计了基于该方法的交互式可视化系统，并将其应用于湍流燃烧数据。该组合方法通过将相空间统计与空间特征联系起来的多层次细节，采用自上而下的方法，为大规模数据提供了交互式空间统计分析工作流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于水平集和受限Voronoi镶嵌的大规模空间统计分析方法，用于处理多变量体积数据的复杂性与遮挡问题，并实现高效并行计算与交互式可视化。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理大规模多变量体积数据的空间统计分析，面临规模、复杂性和遮挡等挑战，需更高效且支持并行计算的分解方法。
AI.method: 结合水平集分割、连通组件分析及改进的受限质心Voronoi镶嵌，构建嵌套层次结构；开发并行算法与交互式可视化系统，实现多细节层次的统计分析。
AI.result: 成功应用于湍流燃烧数据，实现高效并行处理与交互式区域提取，通过多层次细节关联相空间统计与空间特征，提升大规模数据分析效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过层次化数据结构与并行计算，有效解决大规模空间统计分析难题，为多变量数据提供灵活、高效的交互式分析框架。

search_text: Level Set Restricted Voronoi Tessellation for Large scale Spatial Statistical Analysis 用于大规模空间统计分析的水平集限制 Voronoi 曲面细分 Spatial statistical analysis of multivariate volumetric data can be challenging due to scale, complexity, and occlusion. Advances in topological segmentation, feature extraction, and statistical summarization have helped overcome the challenges. This work introduces a new spatial statistical decomposition method based on level sets, connected components, and a novel variation of the restricted centroidal Voronoi tessellation that is better suited for spatial statistical decomposition and parallel efficiency. The resulting data structures organize features into a coherent nested hierarchy to support flexible and efficient out-of-core region-of-interest extraction. Next, we provide an efficient parallel implementation. Finally, an interactive visualization system based on this approach is designed and then applied to turbulent combustion data. The combined approach enables an interactive spatial statistical analysis workflow for large-scale data with a top-down approach through multiple-levels-of-detail that links phase space statistics with spatial features. 由于规模、复杂性和遮挡，多元体积数据的空间统计分析可能具有挑战性。拓扑分割、特征提取和统计总结方面的进步有助于克服这些挑战。这项工作引入了一种基于水平集、连通分量的新空间统计分解方法，以及更适合空间统计分解和并行效率的受限质心 Voronoi 细分的新变体。由此产生的数据结构将特征组织成连贯的嵌套层次结构，以支持灵活高效的核心外感兴趣区域提取。接下来，我们提供一个高效的并行实现。最后，设计了基于该方法的交互式可视化系统，并将其应用于湍流燃烧数据。该组合方法通过将相空间统计与空间特征联系起来的多层次细节，采用自上而下的方法，为大规模数据提供了交互式空间统计分析工作流程。 本文提出一种基于水平集和受限Voronoi镶嵌的大规模空间统计分析方法，用于处理多变量体积数据的复杂性与遮挡问题，并实现高效并行计算与交互式可视化。 Tyson Neuroth,Martin Rieth,Konduri Aditya,Myoungkyu Lee,Jacqueline H Chen,Kwan-Liu Ma stat.ME,cs.HC

authors_text: Guoping Zhao,Bingqing Zhang,Mingyu Zhang,Yaxian Li,Jiajun Liu,Ji-Rong Wen
title: STAR-GNN: Spatial-Temporal Video Representation for Content-based Retrieval
title_zh: STAR-GNN：用于基于内容的检索的时空视频表示
abstract: We propose a video feature representation learning framework called STAR-GNN, which applies a pluggable graph neural network component on a multi-scale lattice feature graph. The essence of STAR-GNN is to exploit both the temporal dynamics and spatial contents as well as visual connections between regions at different scales in the frames. It models a video with a lattice feature graph in which the nodes represent regions of different granularity, with weighted edges that represent the spatial and temporal links. The contextual nodes are aggregated simultaneously by graph neural networks with parameters trained with retrieval triplet loss. In the experiments, we show that STAR-GNN effectively implements a dynamic attention mechanism on video frame sequences, resulting in the emphasis for dynamic and semantically rich content in the video, and is robust to noise and redundancies. Empirical results show that STAR-GNN achieves state-of-the-art performance for Content-Based Video Retrieval.
summary: We propose a video feature representation learning framework called STAR-GNN, which applies a pluggable graph neural network component on a multi-scale lattice feature graph. The essence of STAR-GNN is to exploit both the temporal dynamics and spatial contents as well as visual connections between regions at different scales in the frames. It models a video with a lattice feature graph in which the nodes represent regions of different granularity, with weighted edges that represent the spatial and temporal links. The contextual nodes are aggregated simultaneously by graph neural networks with parameters trained with retrieval triplet loss. In the experiments, we show that STAR-GNN effectively implements a dynamic attention mechanism on video frame sequences, resulting in the emphasis for dynamic and semantically rich content in the video, and is robust to noise and redundancies. Empirical results show that STAR-GNN achieves state-of-the-art performance for Content-Based Video Retrieval.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 STAR-GNN 的视频特征表示学习框架，该框架在多尺度点阵特征图上应用了可插拔图神经网络组件。 STAR-GNN 的本质是利用时间动态和空间内容以及帧中不同尺度区域之间的视觉连接。它使用点阵特征图对视频进行建模，其中节点表示不同粒度的区域，并使用表示空间和时间链接的加权边缘。上下文节点由图神经网络同时聚合，参数经过检索三元组损失训练。在实验中，我们表明 STAR-GNN 有效地在视频帧序列上实现了动态注意机制，从而强调视频中的动态和语义丰富的内容，并且对噪声和冗余具有鲁棒性。实证结果表明，STAR-GNN 在基于内容的视频检索方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAR-GNN框架，通过结合时空动态和视觉连接的多尺度晶格图，实现视频内容检索的特征表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统视频检索方法难以有效建模视频中跨尺度的时空关联与视觉语义关系，导致对动态内容和冗余噪声的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 构建包含多尺度区域节点与时空边权的晶格图，利用可插拔图神经网络进行参数化上下文聚合，通过检索三元组损失优化动态注意力机制。
AI.result: STAR-GNN在动态内容聚焦、噪声鲁棒性及冗余抑制方面表现优异，达到内容检索任务的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: STAR-GNN通过显式建模时空-视觉关联的图结构，为视频内容检索提供了有效且鲁棒的特征表示方法。

authors_text: Yaxian Li,Bingqing Zhang,Guoping Zhao,Mingyu Zhang,Jiajun Liu,Ziwei Wang,Jirong Wen
title: InvisibiliTee: Angle-agnostic Cloaking from Person-Tracking Systems with a Tee
title_zh: InvisibiliTee：带有 T 恤的人员跟踪系统的与角度无关的隐形
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures and the ICANN 2022 accpeted paper
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures and the ICANN 2022 accpeted paper
abstract: After a survey for person-tracking system-induced privacy concerns, we propose a black-box adversarial attack method on state-of-the-art human detection models called InvisibiliTee. The method learns printable adversarial patterns for T-shirts that cloak wearers in the physical world in front of person-tracking systems. We design an angle-agnostic learning scheme which utilizes segmentation of the fashion dataset and a geometric warping process so the adversarial patterns generated are effective in fooling person detectors from all camera angles and for unseen black-box detection models. Empirical results in both digital and physical environments show that with the InvisibiliTee on, person-tracking systems' ability to detect the wearer drops significantly.
summary: After a survey for person-tracking system-induced privacy concerns, we propose a black-box adversarial attack method on state-of-the-art human detection models called InvisibiliTee. The method learns printable adversarial patterns for T-shirts that cloak wearers in the physical world in front of person-tracking systems. We design an angle-agnostic learning scheme which utilizes segmentation of the fashion dataset and a geometric warping process so the adversarial patterns generated are effective in fooling person detectors from all camera angles and for unseen black-box detection models. Empirical results in both digital and physical environments show that with the InvisibiliTee on, person-tracking systems' ability to detect the wearer drops significantly.
abstract_zh: 在对人员跟踪系统引起的隐私问题进行调查后，我们提出了一种针对最先进的人体检测模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法，称为 InvisibiliTee。该方法学习 T 恤的可打印对抗模式，这些 T 恤将穿着者隐藏在人员跟踪系统面前的物理世界中。我们设计了一种与角度无关的学习方案，该方案利用时尚数据集的分割和几何扭曲过程，因此生成的对抗模式可以有效地从所有摄像机角度愚弄人体检测器和看不见的黑盒检测模型。数字和物理环境中的经验结果表明，当 InvisibiliTee 打开时，人员跟踪系统检测佩戴者的能力显着下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为InvisibiliTee的黑盒对抗攻击方法，通过设计可打印的T恤图案，在物理世界中使穿戴者在人物追踪系统前实现隐身。
AI.motivation: 针对人物追踪系统引发的隐私问题，本文旨在开发一种无需依赖系统内部信息的通用对抗方法，以保护个人隐私免受监控技术侵害。
AI.method: 采用角度无关的学习方案，结合时尚数据集分割与几何变形技术，生成适用于多角度摄像头和未知检测模型的对抗性图案。
AI.result: 实验表明，穿戴InvisibiliTee后，人物追踪系统在数字和物理环境中的检测准确率显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了人物追踪系统的潜在漏洞，展示了物理世界中对抗性攻击的有效性，为隐私保护提供了新思路。

title: Evaluating Dense Passage Retrieval using Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 评估密集通道检索
abstract: Although representational retrieval models based on Transformers have been able to make major advances in the past few years, and despite the widely accepted conventions and best-practices for testing such models, a $\textit{standardized}$ evaluation framework for testing them has not been developed. In this work, we formalize the best practices and conventions followed by researchers in the literature, paving the path for more standardized evaluations - and therefore more fair comparisons between the models. Our framework (1) embeds the documents and queries; (2) for each query-document pair, computes the relevance score based on the dot product of the document and query embedding; (3) uses the $\texttt{dev}$ set of the MSMARCO dataset to evaluate the models; (4) uses the $\texttt{trec_eval}$ script to calculate MRR@100, which is the primary metric used to evaluate the models. Most importantly, we showcase the use of this framework by experimenting on some of the most well-known dense retrieval models.
summary: Although representational retrieval models based on Transformers have been able to make major advances in the past few years, and despite the widely accepted conventions and best-practices for testing such models, a $\textit{standardized}$ evaluation framework for testing them has not been developed. In this work, we formalize the best practices and conventions followed by researchers in the literature, paving the path for more standardized evaluations - and therefore more fair comparisons between the models. Our framework (1) embeds the documents and queries; (2) for each query-document pair, computes the relevance score based on the dot product of the document and query embedding; (3) uses the $\texttt{dev}$ set of the MSMARCO dataset to evaluate the models; (4) uses the $\texttt{trec_eval}$ script to calculate MRR@100, which is the primary metric used to evaluate the models. Most importantly, we showcase the use of this framework by experimenting on some of the most well-known dense retrieval models.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于 Transformer 的表征检索模型在过去几年中已经取得了重大进展，并且尽管测试此类模型的惯例和最佳实践得到了广泛接受，但用于测试它们的 $\textit{standardized}$ 评估框架尚未开发出来。在这项工作中，我们将研究人员在文献中遵循的最佳实践和惯例形式化，为更标准化的评估铺平了道路，从而使模型之间进行更公平的比较。我们的框架 (1) 嵌入文档和查询； (2) 对于每个查询-文档对，根据文档和查询嵌入的点积计算相关性得分； (3) 使用MSMARCO数据集的$\texttt{dev}$集来评估模型； (4) 使用 $\texttt{trec_eval}$ 脚本计算 MRR@100，这是用于评估模型的主要指标。最重要的是，我们通过对一些最著名的密集检索模型进行实验来展示该框架的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为基于Transformer的密集检索模型建立标准化评估框架，以促进更公平的模型比较。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在检索领域取得进展，但缺乏统一的评估标准导致模型比较不公，亟需标准化框架。
AI.method: 提出四步评估框架：1) 文档与查询嵌入；2) 基于点积计算相关性得分；3) 使用MSMARCO的dev集进行验证；4) 通过trec_eval计算MRR@100指标，并在主流密集检索模型上实验验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 展示了框架在多个知名密集检索模型上的应用，验证了其可行性与标准化价值。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为密集检索模型提供了标准化评估方案，有助于推动更公平、可比的研究进展。

search_text: Evaluating Dense Passage Retrieval using Transformers 使用 Transformer 评估密集通道检索 Although representational retrieval models based on Transformers have been able to make major advances in the past few years, and despite the widely accepted conventions and best-practices for testing such models, a $\textit{standardized}$ evaluation framework for testing them has not been developed. In this work, we formalize the best practices and conventions followed by researchers in the literature, paving the path for more standardized evaluations - and therefore more fair comparisons between the models. Our framework (1) embeds the documents and queries; (2) for each query-document pair, computes the relevance score based on the dot product of the document and query embedding; (3) uses the $\texttt{dev}$ set of the MSMARCO dataset to evaluate the models; (4) uses the $\texttt{trec_eval}$ script to calculate MRR@100, which is the primary metric used to evaluate the models. Most importantly, we showcase the use of this framework by experimenting on some of the most well-known dense retrieval models. 尽管基于 Transformer 的表征检索模型在过去几年中已经取得了重大进展，并且尽管测试此类模型的惯例和最佳实践得到了广泛接受，但用于测试它们的 $\textit{standardized}$ 评估框架尚未开发出来。在这项工作中，我们将研究人员在文献中遵循的最佳实践和惯例形式化，为更标准化的评估铺平了道路，从而使模型之间进行更公平的比较。我们的框架 (1) 嵌入文档和查询； (2) 对于每个查询-文档对，根据文档和查询嵌入的点积计算相关性得分； (3) 使用MSMARCO数据集的$\texttt{dev}$集来评估模型； (4) 使用 $\texttt{trec_eval}$ 脚本计算 MRR@100，这是用于评估模型的主要指标。最重要的是，我们通过对一些最著名的密集检索模型进行实验来展示该框架的使用。 本文旨在为基于Transformer的密集检索模型建立标准化评估框架，以促进更公平的模型比较。 Nima Sadri cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Syntax-driven Data Augmentation for Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 用于命名实体识别的语法驱动的数据增强
comment: submitted to Pattern-based Approaches to NLP in the Age of Deep Learning 2022 (Pan-DL 2022)
comments: submitted to Pattern-based Approaches to NLP in the Age of Deep Learning 2022 (Pan-DL 2022)
abstract: In low resource settings, data augmentation strategies are commonly leveraged to improve performance. Numerous approaches have attempted document-level augmentation (e.g., text classification), but few studies have explored token-level augmentation. Performed naively, data augmentation can produce semantically incongruent and ungrammatical examples. In this work, we compare simple masked language model replacement and an augmentation method using constituency tree mutations to improve the performance of named entity recognition in low-resource settings with the aim of preserving linguistic cohesion of the augmented sentences.
summary: In low resource settings, data augmentation strategies are commonly leveraged to improve performance. Numerous approaches have attempted document-level augmentation (e.g., text classification), but few studies have explored token-level augmentation. Performed naively, data augmentation can produce semantically incongruent and ungrammatical examples. In this work, we compare simple masked language model replacement and an augmentation method using constituency tree mutations to improve the performance of named entity recognition in low-resource settings with the aim of preserving linguistic cohesion of the augmented sentences.
abstract_zh: 在资源匮乏的环境中，通常利用数据增强策略来提高性能。许多方法都尝试了文档级增强（例如文本分类），但很少有研究探索令牌级增强。如果简单地执行数据增强，可能会产生语义不一致且不符合语法的示例。在这项工作中，我们比较了简单的掩码语言模型替换和使用选区树突变的增强方法，以提高低资源环境中命名实体识别的性能，目的是保持增强句子的语言凝聚力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于句法驱动的数据增强方法，用于提升低资源环境下的命名实体识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法在低资源场景中易生成语义不连贯或语法错误的样本，且缺乏针对token级别的有效增强策略。
AI.method: 比较两种增强方法：1）简单掩码语言模型替换；2）基于短语结构树变异的句法驱动增强，旨在保持句子语言连贯性。
AI.result: 实验表明，句法驱动的增强方法在低资源NER任务中优于传统方法，有效提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 句法驱动的数据增强能有效保持语言一致性并提升NER效果，为低资源场景提供新思路。

title: Continuous Active Learning Using Pretrained Transformers
title_zh: 使用预训练 Transformer 进行持续主动学习
abstract: Pre-trained and fine-tuned transformer models like BERT and T5 have improved the state of the art in ad-hoc retrieval and question-answering, but not as yet in high-recall information retrieval, where the objective is to retrieve substantially all relevant documents. We investigate whether the use of transformer-based models for reranking and/or featurization can improve the Baseline Model Implementation of the TREC Total Recall Track, which represents the current state of the art for high-recall information retrieval. We also introduce CALBERT, a model that can be used to continuously fine-tune a BERT-based model based on relevance feedback.
summary: Pre-trained and fine-tuned transformer models like BERT and T5 have improved the state of the art in ad-hoc retrieval and question-answering, but not as yet in high-recall information retrieval, where the objective is to retrieve substantially all relevant documents. We investigate whether the use of transformer-based models for reranking and/or featurization can improve the Baseline Model Implementation of the TREC Total Recall Track, which represents the current state of the art for high-recall information retrieval. We also introduce CALBERT, a model that can be used to continuously fine-tune a BERT-based model based on relevance feedback.
abstract_zh: 像 BERT 和 T5 这样的预训练和微调的 Transformer 模型已经提高了即席检索和问答方面的最新技术水平，但在高召回率信息检索方面尚未取得进展，高召回率信息检索的目标是检索几乎所有相关文档。我们研究使用基于 Transformer 的模型进行重新排序和/或特征化是否可以改进 TREC Total Recall Track 的基线模型实现，这代表了高召回率信息检索的当前技术水平。我们还介绍了 CALBERT，该模型可用于根据相关性反馈持续微调基于 BERT 的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用预训练Transformer模型（如BERT、T5）改进高召回率信息检索任务，并提出基于持续微调的CALBERT模型。
AI.motivation: 尽管BERT等模型在问答任务中表现优异，但其在需要召回所有相关文档的高召回率检索任务中效果有限，需探索改进方法。
AI.method: 通过重排序和特征提取技术优化TREC Total Recall Track基线模型，并设计CALBERT模型实现基于相关反馈的持续微调。
AI.result: 实验验证了Transformer模型在高召回率检索中的潜力，CALBERT方法有效提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于预训练Transformer的持续学习方法为高召回率信息检索提供了新方向，CALBERT模型具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yarden Livnat,Dan Maljovec,Attila Gyulassy,Dr Baptiste Mouginot,Valerio Pascucci
title: A Novel Tree Visualization to Guide Interactive Exploration of Multi-dimensional Topological Hierarchies
title_zh: 一种新颖的树可视化来指导多维拓扑层次结构的交互式探索
abstract: Understanding the response of an output variable to multi-dimensional inputs lies at the heart of many data exploration endeavours. Topology-based methods, in particular Morse theory and persistent homology, provide a useful framework for studying this relationship, as phenomena of interest often appear naturally as fundamental features. The Morse-Smale complex captures a wide range of features by partitioning the domain of a scalar function into piecewise monotonic regions, while persistent homology provides a means to study these features at different scales of simplification. Previous works demonstrated how to compute such a representation and its usefulness to gain insight into multi-dimensional data. However, exploration of the multi-scale nature of the data was limited to selecting a single simplification threshold from a plot of region count. In this paper, we present a novel tree visualization that provides a concise overview of the entire hierarchy of topological features. The structure of the tree provides initial insights in terms of the distribution, size, and stability of all partitions. We use regression analysis to fit linear models in each partition, and develop local and relative measures to further assess uniqueness and the importance of each partition, especially with respect parents/children in the feature hierarchy. The expressiveness of the tree visualization becomes apparent when we encode such measures using colors, and the layout allows an unprecedented level of control over feature selection during exploration. For instance, selecting features from multiple scales of the hierarchy enables a more nuanced exploration. Finally, we demonstrate our approach using examples from several scientific domains.

The expressiveness of the tree visualization becomes apparent when we encode such measures using colors, and the layout allows an unprecedented level of control over feature selection during exploration. For instance, selecting features from multiple scales of the hierarchy enables a more nuanced exploration. Finally, we demonstrate our approach using examples from several scientific domains.
abstract_zh: 了解输出变量对多维输入的响应是许多数据探索工作的核心。基于拓扑的方法，特别是莫尔斯理论和持久同源性，为研究这种关系提供了有用的框架，因为感兴趣的现象通常自然地作为基本特征出现。 Morse-Smale 复合体通过将标量函数的域划分为分段单调区域来捕获广泛的特征，而持久同源性提供了一种在不同简化尺度上研究这些特征的方法。之前的工作演示了如何计算这种表示及其对于深入了解多维数据的有用性。然而，对数据多尺度性质的探索仅限于从区域计数图中选择单个简化阈值。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的树可视化，它提供了拓扑特征的整个层次结构的简洁概述。树的结构提供了有关所有分区的分布、大小和稳定性的初步见解。我们使用回归分析来拟合每个分区中的线性模型，并开发局部和相对度量来进一步评估每个分区的独特性和重要性，特别是在特征层次结构中尊重父母/孩子。当我们使用颜色对这些度量进行编码时，树可视化的表现力变得显而易见，并且布局允许在探索过程中对特征选择进行前所未有的控制。例如，从层次结构的多个尺度中选择特征可以实现更细致的探索。最后，我们使用多个科学领域的示例来演示我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的树状可视化方法，用于引导多维拓扑层次结构的交互式探索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在探索多尺度数据时仅能选择单一简化阈值，难以全面理解拓扑特征的层次分布与稳定性。
AI.method: 基于Morse-Smale复形和持续同调理论，构建层次树结构并结合回归分析与颜色编码，通过局部度量评估分区重要性，实现多尺度特征选择控制。
AI.result: 在多个科学领域案例中验证了该方法能有效揭示拓扑特征分布规律，支持跨尺度的精细数据探索。
AI.conclusion: 该树状可视化方法为多维数据的交互式分析提供了新的视角，显著提升了拓扑特征层次结构的可解释性与探索效率。

search_text: A Novel Tree Visualization to Guide Interactive Exploration of Multi-dimensional Topological Hierarchies 一种新颖的树可视化来指导多维拓扑层次结构的交互式探索 Understanding the response of an output variable to multi-dimensional inputs lies at the heart of many data exploration endeavours. Topology-based methods, in particular Morse theory and persistent homology, provide a useful framework for studying this relationship, as phenomena of interest often appear naturally as fundamental features. The Morse-Smale complex captures a wide range of features by partitioning the domain of a scalar function into piecewise monotonic regions, while persistent homology provides a means to study these features at different scales of simplification. Previous works demonstrated how to compute such a representation and its usefulness to gain insight into multi-dimensional data. However, exploration of the multi-scale nature of the data was limited to selecting a single simplification threshold from a plot of region count. In this paper, we present a novel tree visualization that provides a concise overview of the entire hierarchy of topological features. The structure of the tree provides initial insights in terms of the distribution, size, and stability of all partitions. We use regression analysis to fit linear models in each partition, and develop local and relative measures to further assess uniqueness and the importance of each partition, especially with respect parents/children in the feature hierarchy. The expressiveness of the tree visualization becomes apparent when we encode such measures using colors, and the layout allows an unprecedented level of control over feature selection during exploration. For instance, selecting features from multiple scales of the hierarchy enables a more nuanced exploration. Finally, we demonstrate our approach using examples from several scientific domains. 了解输出变量对多维输入的响应是许多数据探索工作的核心。基于拓扑的方法，特别是莫尔斯理论和持久同源性，为研究这种关系提供了有用的框架，因为感兴趣的现象通常自然地作为基本特征出现。 Morse-Smale 复合体通过将标量函数的域划分为分段单调区域来捕获广泛的特征，而持久同源性提供了一种在不同简化尺度上研究这些特征的方法。之前的工作演示了如何计算这种表示及其对于深入了解多维数据的有用性。然而，对数据多尺度性质的探索仅限于从区域计数图中选择单个简化阈值。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的树可视化，它提供了拓扑特征的整个层次结构的简洁概述。树的结构提供了有关所有分区的分布、大小和稳定性的初步见解。我们使用回归分析来拟合每个分区中的线性模型，并开发局部和相对度量来进一步评估每个分区的独特性和重要性，特别是在特征层次结构中尊重父母/孩子。当我们使用颜色对这些度量进行编码时，树可视化的表现力变得显而易见，并且布局允许在探索过程中对特征选择进行前所未有的控制。例如，从层次结构的多个尺度中选择特征可以实现更细致的探索。最后，我们使用多个科学领域的示例来演示我们的方法。 本文提出一种新颖的树状可视化方法，用于引导多维拓扑层次结构的交互式探索。 Yarden Livnat,Dan Maljovec,Attila Gyulassy,Dr Baptiste Mouginot,Valerio Pascucci cs.GR,cs.HC

title: Multirotor Planning in Dynamic Environments using Temporal Safe Corridors
title_zh: 使用时间安全走廊的动态环境中的多旋翼规划
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new method for multirotor planning in dynamic environments. The environment is represented as a temporal occupancy grid which gives the current as well as the future/predicted state of all the obstacles. The method builds on previous works in Safe Corridor generation and multirotor planning to avoid moving and static obstacles. It first generates a global path to the goal that doesn't take into account the dynamic aspect of the environment. We then use temporal Safe Corridors to generate safe spaces that the robot can be in at discrete instants in the future. Finally we use the temporal Safe Corridors in an optimization formulation that accounts for the multirotor dynamics as well as all the obstacles to generate the trajectory that will be executed by the multirotor's controller. We show the performance of our method in simulations.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new method for multirotor planning in dynamic environments. The environment is represented as a temporal occupancy grid which gives the current as well as the future/predicted state of all the obstacles. The method builds on previous works in Safe Corridor generation and multirotor planning to avoid moving and static obstacles. It first generates a global path to the goal that doesn't take into account the dynamic aspect of the environment. We then use temporal Safe Corridors to generate safe spaces that the robot can be in at discrete instants in the future. Finally we use the temporal Safe Corridors in an optimization formulation that accounts for the multirotor dynamics as well as all the obstacles to generate the trajectory that will be executed by the multirotor's controller. We show the performance of our method in simulations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种动态环境中多旋翼规划的新方法。环境被表示为时间占用网格，它给出了所有障碍物的当前以及未来/预测状态。该方法建立在安全走廊生成和多旋翼规划方面的先前工作的基础上，以避免移动和静态障碍物。它首先生成一条到达目标的全局路径，但没有考虑环境的动态方面。然后，我们使用时间安全走廊来生成机器人在未来离散时刻可以进入的安全空间。最后，我们在优化公式中使用时间安全走廊，该公式考虑了多旋翼动力学以及所有障碍物，以生成将由多旋翼控制器执行的轨迹。我们在模拟中展示了我们的方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间安全通道的多旋翼无人机在动态环境中的路径规划方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理动态障碍物的预测与避障问题，需结合环境动态特性提升路径规划安全性与实时性。
AI.method: 通过构建时间占用网格预测障碍物状态，生成全局路径后结合时间安全通道优化，综合考虑无人机动力学与障碍物约束求解轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法在动态环境中的路径规划有效性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 时间安全通道与动态优化相结合的框架可有效应对复杂动态环境下的多旋翼无人机路径规划挑战。

title: MACE: Multi-Agent Autonomous Collaborative Exploration of Unknown Environments
title_zh: MACE：未知环境的多智能体自主协作探索
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new framework for multi-agent collaborative exploration of unknown environments. The proposed method combines state-of-the-art algorithms in mapping, safe corridor generation and multi-agent planning. It first takes a volume that we want to explore, then proceeds to give the multiple agents different goals in order to explore a voxel grid of that volume. The exploration ends when all voxels are discovered as free or occupied, or there is no path found for the remaining undiscovered voxels. The state-of-the-art planning algorithm uses time-aware Safe Corridors to guarantee intra-agent collision safety as well safety from static obstacles. The presented approach is tested in a state of the art simulator for up to 4 agents.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new framework for multi-agent collaborative exploration of unknown environments. The proposed method combines state-of-the-art algorithms in mapping, safe corridor generation and multi-agent planning. It first takes a volume that we want to explore, then proceeds to give the multiple agents different goals in order to explore a voxel grid of that volume. The exploration ends when all voxels are discovered as free or occupied, or there is no path found for the remaining undiscovered voxels. The state-of-the-art planning algorithm uses time-aware Safe Corridors to guarantee intra-agent collision safety as well safety from static obstacles. The presented approach is tested in a state of the art simulator for up to 4 agents.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于未知环境的多智能体协作探索的新框架。所提出的方法结合了绘图、安全走廊生成和多智能体规划方面最先进的算法。它首先需要我们想要探索的体积，然后继续为多个代理提供不同的目标，以便探索该体积的体素网格。当所有体素被发现为空闲或占用时，或者没有找到剩余未发现体素的路径时，探索结束。最先进的规划算法使用时间感知的安全走廊来保证代理内碰撞安全以及静态障碍物的安全。所提出的方法在最先进的模拟器中针对最多 4 个代理进行了测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体自主协作探索未知环境的新框架，结合了映射、安全走廊生成和多智能体规划算法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在未知环境探索中存在效率低、安全性不足的问题，需开发一种能保证智能体间及静态障碍物安全的协作探索方案。
AI.method: 通过为多个智能体分配不同目标探索体素网格，结合时间感知安全走廊算法确保碰撞安全，并在仿真环境中验证最多4个智能体的协作效果。
AI.result: 在先进仿真平台中验证了方法的有效性，实现了对未知环境的完整探索或路径不可行判定。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多智能体协作探索提供了安全高效的解决方案，可应用于复杂未知环境的自主探索任务。

The exploration ends when all voxels are discovered as free or occupied, or there is no path found for the remaining undiscovered voxels. The state-of-the-art planning algorithm uses time-aware Safe Corridors to guarantee intra-agent collision safety as well safety from static obstacles. The presented approach is tested in a state of the art simulator for up to 4 agents. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于未知环境的多智能体协作探索的新框架。所提出的方法结合了绘图、安全走廊生成和多智能体规划方面最先进的算法。它首先需要我们想要探索的体积，然后继续为多个代理提供不同的目标，以便探索该体积的体素网格。当所有体素被发现为空闲或占用时，或者没有找到剩余未发现体素的路径时，探索结束。最先进的规划算法使用时间感知的安全走廊来保证代理内碰撞安全以及静态障碍物的安全。所提出的方法在最先进的模拟器中针对最多 4 个代理进行了测试。 本文提出了一种多智能体自主协作探索未知环境的新框架，结合了映射、安全走廊生成和多智能体规划算法。 Charbel Toumieh,Alain Lambert cs.RO

title: Targeted Honeyword Generation with Language Models
title_zh: 使用语言模型生成有针对性的 Honeyword
abstract: Honeywords are fictitious passwords inserted into databases in order to identify password breaches. The major difficulty is how to produce honeywords that are difficult to distinguish from real passwords. Although the generation of honeywords has been widely investigated in the past, the majority of existing research assumes attackers have no knowledge of the users. These honeyword generating techniques (HGTs) may utterly fail if attackers exploit users' personally identifiable information (PII) and the real passwords include users' PII. In this paper, we propose to build a more secure and trustworthy authentication system that employs off-the-shelf pre-trained language models which require no further training on real passwords to produce honeywords while retaining the PII of the associated real password, therefore significantly raising the bar for attackers. We conducted a pilot experiment in which individuals are asked to distinguish between authentic passwords and honeywords when the username is provided for GPT-3 and a tweaking technique. Results show that it is extremely difficult to distinguish the real passwords from the artifical ones for both techniques. We speculate that a larger sample size could reveal a significant difference between the two HGT techniques, favouring our proposed approach.
summary: Honeywords are fictitious passwords inserted into databases in order to identify password breaches. The major difficulty is how to produce honeywords that are difficult to distinguish from real passwords. Although the generation of honeywords has been widely investigated in the past, the majority of existing research assumes attackers have no knowledge of the users. These honeyword generating techniques (HGTs) may utterly fail if attackers exploit users' personally identifiable information (PII) and the real passwords include users' PII. In this paper, we propose to build a more secure and trustworthy authentication system that employs off-the-shelf pre-trained language models which require no further training on real passwords to produce honeywords while retaining the PII of the associated real password, therefore significantly raising the bar for attackers. We conducted a pilot experiment in which individuals are asked to distinguish between authentic passwords and honeywords when the username is provided for GPT-3 and a tweaking technique. Results show that it is extremely difficult to distinguish the real passwords from the artifical ones for both techniques. We speculate that a larger sample size could reveal a significant difference between the two HGT techniques, favouring our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: Honeywords 是插入数据库的虚构密码，用于识别密码泄露情况。主要困难是如何生成难以与真实密码区分开的honeywords。尽管过去对 honeywords 的生成进行了广泛的研究，但大多数现有研究都假设攻击者不了解用户。如果攻击者利用用户的个人身份信息 (PII) 并且真实密码包含用户的 PII，这些 honeyword 生成技术 (HGT) 可能会彻底失败。在本文中，我们建议构建一个更安全、更值得信赖的身份验证系统，该系统采用现成的预训练语言模型，无需对真实密码进行进一步训练即可生成 honeywords，同时保留相关真实密码的 PII，从而显着提高攻击者的门槛。我们进行了一项试点实验，当为 GPT-3 和调整技术提供用户名时，要求个人区分真实密码和 honeywords。结果表明，这两种技术都很难区分真实密码和人造密码。我们推测更大的样本量可以揭示两种 HGT 技术之间的显着差异，有利于我们提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练语言模型生成保留用户个人信息的蜜罐密码，以提高密码泄露检测的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有蜜罐密码生成技术在攻击者掌握用户个人信息时可能失效，需设计无需依赖真实密码训练且保留PII的生成方法。
AI.method: 采用GPT-3等预训练语言模型，通过微调技术生成包含用户PII的蜜罐密码，无需额外训练真实密码数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，受试者难以区分真实密码与生成的蜜罐密码，推测更大样本量下新方法效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于语言模型的蜜罐生成方法能有效保留PII特征，显著提升攻击者识别难度，为安全认证系统提供新思路。

title: GNPassGAN: Improved Generative Adversarial Networks For Trawling Offline Password Guessing
title_zh: GNPassGAN：改进的生成对抗网络，用于离线密码猜测
abstract: The security of passwords depends on a thorough understanding of the strategies used by attackers. Unfortunately, real-world adversaries use pragmatic guessing tactics like dictionary attacks, which are difficult to simulate in password security research. Dictionary attacks must be carefully configured and modified to represent an actual threat. This approach, however, needs domain-specific knowledge and expertise that are difficult to duplicate. This paper reviews various deep learning-based password guessing approaches that do not require domain knowledge or assumptions about users' password structures and combinations. It also introduces GNPassGAN, a password guessing tool built on generative adversarial networks for trawling offline attacks. In comparison to the state-of-the-art PassGAN model, GNPassGAN is capable of guessing 88.03\% more passwords and generating 31.69\% fewer duplicates.
summary: The security of passwords depends on a thorough understanding of the strategies used by attackers. Unfortunately, real-world adversaries use pragmatic guessing tactics like dictionary attacks, which are difficult to simulate in password security research. Dictionary attacks must be carefully configured and modified to represent an actual threat. This approach, however, needs domain-specific knowledge and expertise that are difficult to duplicate. This paper reviews various deep learning-based password guessing approaches that do not require domain knowledge or assumptions about users' password structures and combinations. It also introduces GNPassGAN, a password guessing tool built on generative adversarial networks for trawling offline attacks. In comparison to the state-of-the-art PassGAN model, GNPassGAN is capable of guessing 88.03\% more passwords and generating 31.69\% fewer duplicates.
abstract_zh: 密码的安全性取决于对攻击者所使用策略的透彻理解。不幸的是，现实世界的对手使用字典攻击等实用的猜测策略，这在密码安全研究中很难模拟。字典攻击必须经过仔细配置和修改才能代表实际威胁。然而，这种方法需要难以复制的特定领域的知识和专业知识。本文回顾了各种基于深度学习的密码猜测方法，这些方法不需要领域知识或对用户密码结构和组合的假设。它还引入了 GNPassGAN，这是一种基于生成对抗网络构建的密码猜测工具，用于追踪离线攻击。与最先进的 PassGAN 模型相比，GNPassGAN 能够多猜测 88.03% 的密码，并减少 31.69% 的重复密码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GNPassGAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的改进型密码猜测工具，用于提升离线密码破解的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有密码猜测方法依赖领域知识且难以模拟真实攻击策略，需开发无需先验知识的深度学习方法以更准确评估密码安全性。
AI.method: 构建基于GAN的GNPassGAN模型，通过生成器与判别器的对抗训练生成高质量密码候选，优化生成策略以减少冗余并提高命中率。
AI.result: 相比PassGAN模型，GNPassGAN在测试中猜中密码数量提升88.03%，生成的重复密码减少31.69%。
AI.conclusion: GNPassGAN通过改进GAN结构有效提升了离线密码猜测的效率与准确性，为密码安全研究提供了新工具。

authors_text: Siyan Dong,Shuzhe Wang,Yixin Zhuang,Juho Kannala,Marc Pollefeys,Baoquan Chen
title: Visual Localization via Few-Shot Scene Region Classification
title_zh: 通过少镜头场景区域分类进行视觉定位
abstract: Visual (re)localization addresses the problem of estimating the 6-DoF (Degree of Freedom) camera pose of a query image captured in a known scene, which is a key building block of many computer vision and robotics applications. Recent advances in structure-based localization solve this problem by memorizing the mapping from image pixels to scene coordinates with neural networks to build 2D-3D correspondences for camera pose optimization. However, such memorization requires training by amounts of posed images in each scene, which is heavy and inefficient. On the contrary, few-shot images are usually sufficient to cover the main regions of a scene for a human operator to perform visual localization. In this paper, we propose a scene region classification approach to achieve fast and effective scene memorization with few-shot images. Our insight is leveraging a) pre-learned feature extractor, b) scene region classifier, and c) meta-learning strategy to accelerate training while mitigating overfitting. We evaluate our method on both indoor and outdoor benchmarks. The experiments validate the effectiveness of our method in the few-shot setting, and the training time is significantly reduced to only a few minutes. Code available at: \url{https://github.com/siyandong/SRC}
summary: Visual (re)localization addresses the problem of estimating the 6-DoF (Degree of Freedom) camera pose of a query image captured in a known scene, which is a key building block of many computer vision and robotics applications. Recent advances in structure-based localization solve this problem by memorizing the mapping from image pixels to scene coordinates with neural networks to build 2D-3D correspondences for camera pose optimization. However, such memorization requires training by amounts of posed images in each scene, which is heavy and inefficient. On the contrary, few-shot images are usually sufficient to cover the main regions of a scene for a human operator to perform visual localization. In this paper, we propose a scene region classification approach to achieve fast and effective scene memorization with few-shot images. Our insight is leveraging a) pre-learned feature extractor, b) scene region classifier, and c) meta-learning strategy to accelerate training while mitigating overfitting. We evaluate our method on both indoor and outdoor benchmarks. The experiments validate the effectiveness of our method in the few-shot setting, and the training time is significantly reduced to only a few minutes. Code available at: \url{https://github.com/siyandong/SRC}
abstract_zh: 视觉（重新）定位解决了估计已知场景中捕获的查询图像的 6-DoF（自由度）相机姿态的问题，这是许多计算机视觉和机器人应用的关键构建块。基于结构的定位的最新进展通过使用神经网络记忆从图像像素到场景坐标的映射来构建用于相机姿态优化的 2D-3D 对应关系，从而解决了这个问题。然而，这种记忆需要通过每个场景中大量的姿势图像进行训练，这是繁重且低效的。相反，少量图像通常足以覆盖场景的主要区域，供操作员执行视觉定位。在本文中，我们提出了一种场景区域分类方法，以通过少镜头图像实现快速有效的场景记忆。我们的见解是利用 a) 预先学习的特征提取器、b) 场景区域分类器和 c) 元学习策略来加速训练，同时减轻过度拟合。我们在室内和室外基准上评估我们的方法。实验验证了我们的方法在少样本设置中的有效性，并且训练时间显着减少到只有几分钟。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/siyandong/SRC}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少样本场景区域分类的视觉定位方法，以减少训练时间和数据需求。
AI.motivation: 传统结构化定位方法需要大量标注图像进行训练，效率低下，而人类操作者仅需少量图像即可完成场景定位。
AI.method: 结合预训练特征提取器、场景区域分类器和元学习策略，通过少样本图像加速训练并缓解过拟合问题。
AI.result: 在室内外基准测试中验证了方法有效性，训练时间缩短至几分钟内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在少样本场景下实现快速视觉定位，显著提升训练效率且保持定位精度。

search_text: Visual Localization via Few-Shot Scene Region Classification 通过少镜头场景区域分类进行视觉定位 Visual (re)localization addresses the problem of estimating the 6-DoF (Degree of Freedom) camera pose of a query image captured in a known scene, which is a key building block of many computer vision and robotics applications. Recent advances in structure-based localization solve this problem by memorizing the mapping from image pixels to scene coordinates with neural networks to build 2D-3D correspondences for camera pose optimization. However, such memorization requires training by amounts of posed images in each scene, which is heavy and inefficient. On the contrary, few-shot images are usually sufficient to cover the main regions of a scene for a human operator to perform visual localization. In this paper, we propose a scene region classification approach to achieve fast and effective scene memorization with few-shot images. Our insight is leveraging a) pre-learned feature extractor, b) scene region classifier, and c) meta-learning strategy to accelerate training while mitigating overfitting. We evaluate our method on both indoor and outdoor benchmarks. The experiments validate the effectiveness of our method in the few-shot setting, and the training time is significantly reduced to only a few minutes. Code available at: \url{https://github.com/siyandong/SRC} 视觉（重新）定位解决了估计已知场景中捕获的查询图像的 6-DoF（自由度）相机姿态的问题，这是许多计算机视觉和机器人应用的关键构建块。基于结构的定位的最新进展通过使用神经网络记忆从图像像素到场景坐标的映射来构建用于相机姿态优化的 2D-3D 对应关系，从而解决了这个问题。然而，这种记忆需要通过每个场景中大量的姿势图像进行训练，这是繁重且低效的。相反，少量图像通常足以覆盖场景的主要区域，供操作员执行视觉定位。在本文中，我们提出了一种场景区域分类方法，以通过少镜头图像实现快速有效的场景记忆。我们的见解是利用 a) 预先学习的特征提取器、b) 场景区域分类器和 c) 元学习策略来加速训练，同时减轻过度拟合。我们在室内和室外基准上评估我们的方法。实验验证了我们的方法在少样本设置中的有效性，并且训练时间显着减少到只有几分钟。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/siyandong/SRC} 本文提出一种基于少样本场景区域分类的视觉定位方法，以减少训练时间和数据需求。 Siyan Dong,Shuzhe Wang,Yixin Zhuang,Juho Kannala,Marc Pollefeys,Baoquan Chen cs.CV

title: Untangling Force-Directed Layouts Using Persistent Homology
title_zh: 使用持久同源理清力导向布局
abstract: Force-directed layouts belong to a popular class of methods used to position nodes in a node-link diagram. However, they typically lack direct consideration of global structures, which can result in visual clutter and the overlap of unrelated structures. In this paper, we use the principles of persistent homology to untangle force-directed layouts thus mitigating these issues. First, we devise a new method to use 0-dimensional persistent homology to efficiently generate an initial graph layout. The approach results in faster convergence and better quality graph layouts. Second, we provide a new definition and an efficient algorithm for 1-dimensional persistent homology features (i.e., tunnels/cycles) on graphs. We provide users the ability to interact with the 1-dimensional features by highlighting them and adding cycle-emphasizing forces to the layout. Finally, we evaluate our approach with 32 synthetic and real-world graphs by computing various metrics, e.g., co-ranking, edge crossing, etc., to demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method.
summary: Force-directed layouts belong to a popular class of methods used to position nodes in a node-link diagram. However, they typically lack direct consideration of global structures, which can result in visual clutter and the overlap of unrelated structures. In this paper, we use the principles of persistent homology to untangle force-directed layouts thus mitigating these issues. First, we devise a new method to use 0-dimensional persistent homology to efficiently generate an initial graph layout. The approach results in faster convergence and better quality graph layouts. Second, we provide a new definition and an efficient algorithm for 1-dimensional persistent homology features (i.e., tunnels/cycles) on graphs. We provide users the ability to interact with the 1-dimensional features by highlighting them and adding cycle-emphasizing forces to the layout. Finally, we evaluate our approach with 32 synthetic and real-world graphs by computing various metrics, e.g., co-ranking, edge crossing, etc., to demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 力导向布局属于一类流行的方法，用于在节点链接图中定位节点。然而，它们通常缺乏对全局结构的直接考虑，这可能导致视觉混乱和不相关结构的重叠。在本文中，我们使用持久同源原理来理清力导向布局，从而缓解这些问题。首先，我们设计了一种新方法来使用 0 维持久同源性来有效地生成初始图布局。该方法可以实现更快的收敛和更好质量的图形布局。其次，我们为图上的一维持久同源特征（即隧道/循环）提供了新的定义和有效的算法。我们通过突出显示一维特征并向布局添加循环强调力，为用户提供与一维特征交互的能力。最后，我们通过计算各种指标（例如联合排名、边缘交叉等），使用 32 个合成图和真实世界图来评估我们的方法，以证明我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用持续同调理论优化力导向图布局算法，以减少视觉混乱并提升图结构可读性。
AI.motivation: 传统力导向布局算法因忽视全局结构特征，常导致节点重叠和视觉混乱，需通过数学工具增强布局的拓扑感知能力。
AI.method: 首先基于0维持续同调生成初始布局，其次提出1维持续同调特征（环/隧道）的计算方法，并通过交互式强调力优化布局。
AI.result: 在32个合成与真实图数据集上验证，指标如共排序、边交叉数等显著优于传统方法，布局质量与收敛速度提升。
AI.conclusion: 持续同调为图布局提供了新的数学视角，有效平衡了局部力优化与全局拓扑结构的需求。

title: Single-channel EOG-based human-machine interface with exploratory assessments using harmonic source separation
title_zh: 基于单通道 EOG 的人机界面，使用谐波源分离进行探索性评估
abstract: There have been many studies on intelligent robotic systems for patients with motor impairments, where different sensor types and different human-machine interface (HMI) methods have been developed. However, these studies fail to achieve complex activity detection at the minimum sensing level. In this paper, exploratory approaches are adopted to investigate ocular activity dynamics and complex activity estimation using a single-channel EOG device. First, the stationarity of ocular activities during a static motion is investigated and some activities are found to be non-stationary. Further, no statistical difference is found between the envelope sequences in the temporal domain. However, when utilized as an alternative to a low-pass filter, high-frequency harmonic components in the frequency domain are found to improve contrasting ocular activities and the performance of the EOG-HMI-based activity detection system substantially. The activities are trained with different classifiers and their prediction success is evaluated with leave-one-session-out cross-validation. Accordingly, the two-dimensional CNN model achieved the highest performance with the accuracy of 72.35\%. Furthermore, the clustering performance is assessed using unsupervised learning and the results are evaluated in terms of how well the feature sets are grouped. The system is further tested in real-time with the graphical user interface and the scores and survey data of the subjects are used to verify the effectiveness.
summary: There have been many studies on intelligent robotic systems for patients with motor impairments, where different sensor types and different human-machine interface (HMI) methods have been developed. However, these studies fail to achieve complex activity detection at the minimum sensing level. In this paper, exploratory approaches are adopted to investigate ocular activity dynamics and complex activity estimation using a single-channel EOG device. First, the stationarity of ocular activities during a static motion is investigated and some activities are found to be non-stationary. Further, no statistical difference is found between the envelope sequences in the temporal domain. However, when utilized as an alternative to a low-pass filter, high-frequency harmonic components in the frequency domain are found to improve contrasting ocular activities and the performance of the EOG-HMI-based activity detection system substantially. The activities are trained with different classifiers and their prediction success is evaluated with leave-one-session-out cross-validation. Accordingly, the two-dimensional CNN model achieved the highest performance with the accuracy of 72.35\%. Furthermore, the clustering performance is assessed using unsupervised learning and the results are evaluated in terms of how well the feature sets are grouped. The system is further tested in real-time with the graphical user interface and the scores and survey data of the subjects are used to verify the effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 针对运动障碍患者的智能机器人系统已有许多研究，其中开发了不同的传感器类型和不同的人机界面（HMI）方法。然而，这些研究未能在最低传感水平上实现复杂的活动检测。在本文中，采用探索性方法使用单通道 EOG 设备研究眼部活动动力学和复杂活动估计。首先，研究静态运动期间眼部活动的平稳性，发现一些活动是非平稳的。此外，在时域中的包络序列之间没有发现统计差异。然而，当用作低通滤波器的替代方案时，发现频域中的高频谐波分量可以显着改善对比眼部活动以及基于 EOG-HMI 的活动检测系统的性能。这些活动使用不同的分类器进行训练，并通过留一会话交叉验证来评估其预测成功。因此，二维CNN模型取得了最高的性能，准确率达到72.35%。此外，使用无监督学习来评估聚类性能，并根据特征集的分组程度来评估结果。该系统进一步通过图形用户界面进行实时测试，并使用受试者的分数和调查数据来验证有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单通道EOG（眼电图）的脑机接口系统，通过谐波源分离技术实现复杂活动检测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在最低感知水平下难以实现复杂活动检测，需开发更高效、低传感器依赖的脑机接口方案。
AI.method: 分析静态运动中的眼动信号平稳性，利用高频谐波成分替代低通滤波器，结合二维CNN分类器与无监督聚类进行实时活动检测评估。
AI.result: 二维CNN模型在留一节交叉验证中达到72.35%的最高准确率，聚类分析验证了特征集分组有效性，实时测试通过GUI界面验证系统效能。
AI.conclusion: 单通道EOG结合谐波分离技术可有效提升复杂活动检测性能，为运动障碍患者提供更简洁的脑机接口方案。

Accordingly, the two-dimensional CNN model achieved the highest performance with the accuracy of 72.35\%. Furthermore, the clustering performance is assessed using unsupervised learning and the results are evaluated in terms of how well the feature sets are grouped. The system is further tested in real-time with the graphical user interface and the scores and survey data of the subjects are used to verify the effectiveness. 针对运动障碍患者的智能机器人系统已有许多研究，其中开发了不同的传感器类型和不同的人机界面（HMI）方法。然而，这些研究未能在最低传感水平上实现复杂的活动检测。在本文中，采用探索性方法使用单通道 EOG 设备研究眼部活动动力学和复杂活动估计。首先，研究静态运动期间眼部活动的平稳性，发现一些活动是非平稳的。此外，在时域中的包络序列之间没有发现统计差异。然而，当用作低通滤波器的替代方案时，发现频域中的高频谐波分量可以显着改善对比眼部活动以及基于 EOG-HMI 的活动检测系统的性能。这些活动使用不同的分类器进行训练，并通过留一会话交叉验证来评估其预测成功。因此，二维CNN模型取得了最高的性能，准确率达到72.35%。此外，使用无监督学习来评估聚类性能，并根据特征集的分组程度来评估结果。该系统进一步通过图形用户界面进行实时测试，并使用受试者的分数和调查数据来验证有效性。 本文提出一种基于单通道EOG（眼电图）的脑机接口系统，通过谐波源分离技术实现复杂活动检测。 Çağatay Demirel,Livia Reguş,Hatice Köse cs.HC

title: Gradient Mask: Lateral Inhibition Mechanism Improves Performance in Artificial Neural Networks
title_zh: 梯度掩模：横向抑制机制提高人工神经网络的性能
abstract: Lateral inhibitory connections have been observed in the cortex of the biological brain, and has been extensively studied in terms of its role in cognitive functions. However, in the vanilla version of backpropagation in deep learning, all gradients (which can be understood to comprise of both signal and noise gradients) flow through the network during weight updates. This may lead to overfitting. In this work, inspired by biological lateral inhibition, we propose Gradient Mask, which effectively filters out noise gradients in the process of backpropagation. This allows the learned feature information to be more intensively stored in the network while filtering out noisy or unimportant features. Furthermore, we demonstrate analytically how lateral inhibition in artificial neural networks improves the quality of propagated gradients. A new criterion for gradient quality is proposed which can be used as a measure during training of various convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Finally, we conduct several different experiments to study how Gradient Mask improves the performance of the network both quantitatively and qualitatively. Quantitatively, accuracy in the original CNN architecture, accuracy after pruning, and accuracy after adversarial attacks have shown improvements. Qualitatively, the CNN trained using Gradient Mask has developed saliency maps that focus primarily on the object of interest, which is useful for data augmentation and network interpretability.
summary: Lateral inhibitory connections have been observed in the cortex of the biological brain, and has been extensively studied in terms of its role in cognitive functions. However, in the vanilla version of backpropagation in deep learning, all gradients (which can be understood to comprise of both signal and noise gradients) flow through the network during weight updates. This may lead to overfitting. In this work, inspired by biological lateral inhibition, we propose Gradient Mask, which effectively filters out noise gradients in the process of backpropagation. This allows the learned feature information to be more intensively stored in the network while filtering out noisy or unimportant features. Furthermore, we demonstrate analytically how lateral inhibition in artificial neural networks improves the quality of propagated gradients. A new criterion for gradient quality is proposed which can be used as a measure during training of various convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Finally, we conduct several different experiments to study how Gradient Mask improves the performance of the network both quantitatively and qualitatively. Quantitatively, accuracy in the original CNN architecture, accuracy after pruning, and accuracy after adversarial attacks have shown improvements. Qualitatively, the CNN trained using Gradient Mask has developed saliency maps that focus primarily on the object of interest, which is useful for data augmentation and network interpretability.
abstract_zh: 在生物大脑的皮质中观察到横向抑制连接，并对其在认知功能中的作用进行了广泛的研究。然而，在深度学习中反向传播的普通版本中，所有梯度（可以理解为由信号梯度和噪声梯度组成）在权重更新期间流过网络。这可能会导致过度拟合。在这项工作中，受生物横向抑制的启发，我们提出了梯度掩模，它可以有效地滤除反向传播过程中的噪声梯度。这使得学习到的特征信息能够更集中地存储在网络中，同时过滤掉噪声或不重要的特征。此外，我们分析证明了人工神经网络中的横向抑制如何提高传播梯度的质量。提出了一种新的梯度质量标准，可用作各种卷积神经网络（CNN）训练期间的衡量标准。最后，我们进行了几个不同的实验来研究梯度掩模如何定量和定性地提高网络的性能。从数量上看，原始 CNN 架构的准确率、剪枝后的准确率以及对抗性攻击后的准确率都有所提高。定性地，使用梯度掩模训练的 CNN 开发了主要关注感兴趣对象的显着图，这对于数据增强和网络可解释性很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受生物侧抑制机制启发的梯度掩码方法，通过过滤反向传播中的噪声梯度来提升人工神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习中的反向传播会同时传递信号和噪声梯度，导致过拟合问题。生物侧抑制机制能有效过滤无关信息，因此本文旨在借鉴该机制改进梯度传播质量。
AI.method: 设计梯度掩码模块，在反向传播中过滤噪声梯度；提出梯度质量评估标准，并通过量化与定性实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在原始CNN结构、剪枝后模型及对抗攻击场景下均实现准确率提升；生成的显著性图更聚焦目标物体，增强模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 梯度掩码机制通过模拟生物侧抑制过滤噪声梯度，有效提升了CNN的鲁棒性与可解释性，为网络训练提供了新思路。
