authors_text: Chao Feng,Jui Po Hung,Aishan Li,Jieping Yang,Xinyu Zhang
title: MTCSNN: Multi-task Clinical Siamese Neural Network for Diabetic Retinopathy Severity Prediction
title_zh: MTCSNN：用于糖尿病视网膜病变严重程度预测的多任务临床连体神经网络
comment: This paper is not sufficiently exhaustive and lacks some analysis. Besides, certain methods of this paper are from the first author's other co-first authoring research paper. There exist disputes among authors, thus we decide to withdraw this paper currently
comments: This paper is not sufficiently exhaustive and lacks some analysis. Besides, certain methods of this paper are from the first author's other co-first authoring research paper. There exist disputes among authors, thus we decide to withdraw this paper currently
abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) has become one of the leading causes of vision impairment in working-aged people and is a severe problem worldwide. However, most of the works ignored the ordinal information of labels. In this project, we propose a novel design MTCSNN, a Multi-task Clinical Siamese Neural Network for Diabetic Retinopathy severity prediction task. The novelty of this project is to utilize the ordinal information among labels and add a new regression task, which can help the model learn more discriminative feature embedding for fine-grained classification tasks. We perform comprehensive experiments over the RetinaMNIST, comparing MTCSNN with other models like ResNet-18, 34, 50. Our results indicate that MTCSNN outperforms the benchmark models in terms of AUC and accuracy on the test dataset.
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) has become one of the leading causes of vision impairment in working-aged people and is a severe problem worldwide. However, most of the works ignored the ordinal information of labels. In this project, we propose a novel design MTCSNN, a Multi-task Clinical Siamese Neural Network for Diabetic Retinopathy severity prediction task. The novelty of this project is to utilize the ordinal information among labels and add a new regression task, which can help the model learn more discriminative feature embedding for fine-grained classification tasks. We perform comprehensive experiments over the RetinaMNIST, comparing MTCSNN with other models like ResNet-18, 34, 50. Our results indicate that MTCSNN outperforms the benchmark models in terms of AUC and accuracy on the test dataset.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）已成为工作年龄人群视力障碍的主要原因之一，并且是世界范围内的一个严重问题。然而，大多数作品忽略了标签的序数信息。在这个项目中，我们提出了一种新颖的设计 MTCSNN，这是一种用于糖尿病视网膜病变严重程度预测任务的多任务临床连体神经网络。该项目的新颖之处在于利用标签之间的序数信息并添加新的回归任务，这可以帮助模型为细粒度分类任务学习更具区分性的特征嵌入。我们在 RetinaMNIST 上进行了全面的实验，将 MTCSNN 与 ResNet-18、34、50 等其他模型进行比较。我们的结果表明，MTCSNN 在测试数据集上的 AUC 和准确性方面优于基准模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务临床Siamese神经网络（MTCSNN），用于糖尿病视网膜病变严重程度预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了糖尿病视网膜病变标签的序数信息，导致细粒度分类效果受限。
AI.method: 设计MTCSNN模型，通过引入序数信息和回归任务，结合Siamese网络结构进行多任务学习。
AI.result: 在RetinaMNIST数据集上，MTCSNN在AUC和准确率指标上优于ResNet-18/34/50等基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 利用序数信息和回归任务的多任务学习框架能有效提升糖尿病视网膜病变严重程度预测性能。

title: Model Generalization: A Sharpness Aware Optimization Perspective
title_zh: 模型泛化：锐度感知优化视角
abstract: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) and adaptive sharpness-aware minimization (ASAM) aim to improve the model generalization. And in this project, we proposed three experiments to valid their generalization from the sharpness aware perspective. And our experiments show that sharpness aware-based optimization techniques could help to provide models with strong generalization ability. Our experiments also show that ASAM could improve the generalization performance on un-normalized data, but further research is needed to confirm this.
summary: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) and adaptive sharpness-aware minimization (ASAM) aim to improve the model generalization. And in this project, we proposed three experiments to valid their generalization from the sharpness aware perspective. And our experiments show that sharpness aware-based optimization techniques could help to provide models with strong generalization ability. Our experiments also show that ASAM could improve the generalization performance on un-normalized data, but further research is needed to confirm this.
abstract_zh: 锐度感知最小化（SAM）和自适应锐度感知最小化（ASAM）旨在提高模型泛化能力。在这个项目中，我们提出了三个实验，从清晰度感知的角度来验证它们的概括。我们的实验表明，基于锐度感知的优化技术可以帮助提供具有强大泛化能力的模型。我们的实验还表明，ASAM 可以提高非标准化数据的泛化性能，但需要进一步的研究来证实这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过三个实验验证基于锐度感知的优化技术（SAM和ASAM）在提升模型泛化能力方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 为了验证锐度感知优化技术（如SAM和ASAM）是否能有效提升模型的泛化能力，并探索其在不同数据条件下的表现。
AI.method: 通过设计三个实验，从锐度感知的角度评估SAM和ASAM在不同数据集上的泛化性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于锐度感知的优化方法能增强模型泛化能力，ASAM在未归一化数据上表现更优，但需更多研究确认。
AI.conclusion: 锐度感知优化技术有效提升模型泛化，ASAM在特定数据条件下有潜力，但需进一步研究验证其普遍性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过三个实验验证基于锐度感知的优化技术（SAM和ASAM）在提升模型泛化能力方面的有效性。
ai_content.motivation: 为了验证锐度感知优化技术（如SAM和ASAM）是否能有效提升模型的泛化能力，并探索其在不同数据条件下的表现。
ai_content.method: 通过设计三个实验，从锐度感知的角度评估SAM和ASAM在不同数据集上的泛化性能。
ai_content.result: 实验结果表明，基于锐度感知的优化方法能增强模型泛化能力，ASAM在未归一化数据上表现更优，但需更多研究确认。
ai_content.conclusion: 锐度感知优化技术有效提升模型泛化，ASAM在特定数据条件下有潜力，但需进一步研究验证其普遍性。

search_text: Model Generalization: A Sharpness Aware Optimization Perspective 模型泛化：锐度感知优化视角 Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) and adaptive sharpness-aware minimization (ASAM) aim to improve the model generalization. And in this project, we proposed three experiments to valid their generalization from the sharpness aware perspective. And our experiments show that sharpness aware-based optimization techniques could help to provide models with strong generalization ability. Our experiments also show that ASAM could improve the generalization performance on un-normalized data, but further research is needed to confirm this. 锐度感知最小化（SAM）和自适应锐度感知最小化（ASAM）旨在提高模型泛化能力。在这个项目中，我们提出了三个实验，从清晰度感知的角度来验证它们的概括。我们的实验表明，基于锐度感知的优化技术可以帮助提供具有强大泛化能力的模型。我们的实验还表明，ASAM 可以提高非标准化数据的泛化性能，但需要进一步的研究来证实这一点。 本文通过三个实验验证基于锐度感知的优化技术（SAM和ASAM）在提升模型泛化能力方面的有效性。 Jozef Marus Coldenhoff,Chengkun Li,Yurui Zhu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Limits of an AI program for solving college math problems
title_zh: 人工智能程序解决大学数学问题的局限性
abstract: Drori et al. (2022) report that "A neural network solves, explains, and generates university math problems by program synthesis and few-shot learning at human level ... [It] automatically answers 81\% of university-level mathematics problems." The system they describe is indeed impressive; however, the above description is very much overstated. The work of solving the problems is done, not by a neural network, but by the symbolic algebra package Sympy. Problems of various formats are excluded from consideration. The so-called "explanations" are just rewordings of lines of code. Answers are marked as correct that are not in the form specified in the problem. Most seriously, it seems that in many cases the system uses the correct answer given in the test corpus to guide its path to solving the problem.
summary: Drori et al. (2022) report that "A neural network solves, explains, and generates university math problems by program synthesis and few-shot learning at human level ... [It] automatically answers 81\% of university-level mathematics problems." The system they describe is indeed impressive; however, the above description is very much overstated. The work of solving the problems is done, not by a neural network, but by the symbolic algebra package Sympy. Problems of various formats are excluded from consideration. The so-called "explanations" are just rewordings of lines of code. Answers are marked as correct that are not in the form specified in the problem. Most seriously, it seems that in many cases the system uses the correct answer given in the test corpus to guide its path to solving the problem.
abstract_zh: 德罗里等人。 (2022) 报告称，“神经网络通过程序合成和人类水平的小样本学习来解决、解释和生成大学数学问题……[它]自动回答 81% 的大学数学问题。”他们所描述的系统确实令人印象深刻。然而，上述描述过于夸大了。解决问题的工作不是由神经网络完成，而是由符号代数包 Sympy 完成。各种格式的问题不予考虑。所谓的“解释”不过是代码行的改写。未采用问题中指定形式的答案将被标记为正确。最严重的是，在许多情况下，系统似乎使用测试语料库中给出的正确答案来指导其解决问题的路径。

AI.tldr: 本文分析并批评了Drori等人(2022)关于AI解决大学数学问题的研究，指出其成果存在严重夸大问题。
AI.motivation: 针对Drori等人声称神经网络能以人类水平解决81%大学数学题的结论，本文旨在揭示其研究方法和结果的局限性。
AI.method: 通过分析原论文方法，指出其实际依赖符号计算库SymPy而非神经网络，并验证了问题格式排除、解释生成机制、答案判定标准及数据泄露等缺陷。
AI.result: 发现该系统存在四大问题：1) 实际由SymPy解决数学问题；2) 排除特定问题格式；3) '解释'仅为代码重述；4) 答案判定标准宽松且可能利用测试集答案。
AI.conclusion: 该AI系统未能达到宣称的'人类水平'，其结果因方法缺陷和数据泄露而失真，需重新评估相关研究的可靠性。

title: Towards Parallel Learned Sorting
title_zh: 走向并行学习排序
abstract: We introduce a new sorting algorithm that is the combination of ML-enhanced sorting with the In-place Super Scalar Sample Sort (IPS4o). The main contribution of our work is to achieve parallel ML-enhanced sorting, as previous algorithms were limited to sequential implementations. We introduce the In-Place Parallel Learned Sort (IPLS) algorithm and compare it extensively against other sorting approaches. IPLS combines the IPS4o framework with linear models trained using the Fastest Minimum Conflict Degree algorithm to partition data. The experimental results do not crown IPLS as the fastest algorithm. However, they do show that IPLS is competitive among its peers and that using the IPS4o framework is a promising approach towards parallel learned sorting.
summary: We introduce a new sorting algorithm that is the combination of ML-enhanced sorting with the In-place Super Scalar Sample Sort (IPS4o). The main contribution of our work is to achieve parallel ML-enhanced sorting, as previous algorithms were limited to sequential implementations. We introduce the In-Place Parallel Learned Sort (IPLS) algorithm and compare it extensively against other sorting approaches. IPLS combines the IPS4o framework with linear models trained using the Fastest Minimum Conflict Degree algorithm to partition data. The experimental results do not crown IPLS as the fastest algorithm. However, they do show that IPLS is competitive among its peers and that using the IPS4o framework is a promising approach towards parallel learned sorting.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的排序算法，它将 ML 增强排序与就地超标量样本排序 (IPS4o) 相结合。我们工作的主要贡献是实现并行 ML 增强排序，因为以前的算法仅限于顺序实现。我们介绍就地并行学习排序 (IPLS) 算法，并将其与其他排序方法进行广泛比较。 IPLS 将 IPS4o 框架与使用最快最小冲突度算法训练的线性模型相结合来划分数据。实验结果并未将 IPLS 评为最快算法。然而，它们确实表明 IPLS 在同行中具有竞争力，并且使用 IPS4o 框架是实现并行学习排序的一种有前景的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器学习与IPS4o框架的并行学习排序算法IPLS，旨在提升排序效率。
AI.motivation: 现有排序算法多为顺序实现，难以充分利用并行计算资源，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计IPLS算法，融合IPS4o框架与基于Fastest Minimum Conflict Degree算法训练的线性模型，实现数据划分与并行排序。
AI.result: 实验显示IPLS在速度上非最优，但与其他算法竞争力强，验证了IPS4o框架在并行学习排序中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: IPLS为并行学习排序提供了有效方案，IPS4o框架是该领域有前景的研究方向。

authors_text: Nathan Lutes,Venkata Sriram Siddhardh Nadendla,K. Krishnamurthy
title: Convolutional Spiking Neural Networks for Detecting Anticipatory Brain Potentials Using Electroencephalogram
title_zh: 使用脑电图检测预期大脑电位的卷积尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are receiving increased attention because they mimic synaptic connections in biological systems and produce spike trains, which can be approximated by binary values for computational efficiency. Recently, the addition of convolutional layers to combine the feature extraction power of convolutional networks with the computational efficiency of SNNs has been introduced. This paper studies the feasibility of using a convolutional spiking neural network (CSNN) to detect anticipatory slow cortical potentials (SCPs) related to braking intention in human participants using an electroencephalogram (EEG). Data was collected during an experiment wherein participants operated a remote-controlled vehicle on a testbed designed to simulate an urban environment. Participants were alerted to an incoming braking event via an audio countdown to elicit anticipatory potentials that were measured using an EEG. The CSNN's performance was compared to a standard CNN, EEGNet and three graph neural networks via 10-fold cross-validation. The CSNN outperformed all the other neural networks, and had a predictive accuracy of 99.06 percent with a true positive rate of 98.50 percent, a true negative rate of 99.20 percent and an F1-score of 0.98. Performance of the CSNN was comparable to the CNN in an ablation study using a subset of EEG channels that localized SCPs. Classification performance of the CSNN degraded only slightly when the floating-point EEG data were converted into spike trains via delta modulation to mimic synaptic connections.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are receiving increased attention because they mimic synaptic connections in biological systems and produce spike trains, which can be approximated by binary values for computational efficiency. Recently, the addition of convolutional layers to combine the feature extraction power of convolutional networks with the computational efficiency of SNNs has been introduced. This paper studies the feasibility of using a convolutional spiking neural network (CSNN) to detect anticipatory slow cortical potentials (SCPs) related to braking intention in human participants using an electroencephalogram (EEG). Data was collected during an experiment wherein participants operated a remote-controlled vehicle on a testbed designed to simulate an urban environment. Participants were alerted to an incoming braking event via an audio countdown to elicit anticipatory potentials that were measured using an EEG. The CSNN's performance was compared to a standard CNN, EEGNet and three graph neural networks via 10-fold cross-validation. The CSNN outperformed all the other neural networks, and had a predictive accuracy of 99.06 percent with a true positive rate of 98.50 percent, a true negative rate of 99.20 percent and an F1-score of 0.98. Performance of the CSNN was comparable to the CNN in an ablation study using a subset of EEG channels that localized SCPs. Classification performance of the CSNN degraded only slightly when the floating-point EEG data were converted into spike trains via delta modulation to mimic synaptic connections.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 受到越来越多的关注，因为它们模仿生物系统中的突触连接并产生尖峰序列，可以通过二进制值来近似以提高计算效率。最近，引入了卷积层的添加，将卷积网络的特征提取能力与 SNN 的计算效率结合起来。本文研究了使用卷积尖峰神经网络 (CSNN) 通过脑电图 (EEG) 检测与人类参与者制动意图相关的预期慢皮层电位 (SCP) 的可行性。数据是在一项实验期间收集的，其中参与者在旨在模拟城市环境的试验台上操作遥控车辆。通过音频倒计时向参与者发出即将到来的制动事件的警报，以引发使用脑电图测量的预期电位。通过 10 倍交叉验证，将 CSNN 的性能与标准 CNN、EEGNet 和三个图神经网络进行比较。 CSNN 的性能优于所有其他神经网络，预测准确率为 99.06%，真阳性率为 98.50%，真阴性率为 99.20%，F1 得分为 0.98。在使用定位 SCP 的 EEG 通道子集的消融研究中，CSNN 的性能与 CNN 相当。当浮点脑电图数据通过增量调制转换为尖峰序列以模拟突触连接时，CSNN 的分类性能仅略有下降。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用卷积脉冲神经网络（CSNN）检测与刹车意图相关的预判性慢皮层电位（SCPs）的可行性，基于脑电图（EEG）数据。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）因模拟生物突触连接并具有计算效率而受到关注，但其与卷积网络结合的潜力尚未充分探索。预判性SCPs检测在脑机接口等领域有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 设计实验让参与者在模拟城市环境中操作遥控车，通过音频倒计时引发预判性SCPs。采集EEG数据后，使用CSNN与标准CNN、EEGNet及图神经网络进行10折交叉验证对比，并通过Δ调制将EEG数据转换为脉冲序列测试模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: CSNN在预测准确率（99.06%）、真阳性率（98.50%）、真阴性率（99.20%）和F1分数（0.98）上均优于其他模型，且在数据转换为脉冲序列后性能仅轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: CSNN在检测预判性SCPs任务中表现出卓越性能，验证了其结合卷积特征提取与脉冲计算效率的有效性，为实时脑机接口应用提供了新方法。

search_text: Convolutional Spiking Neural Networks for Detecting Anticipatory Brain Potentials Using Electroencephalogram 使用脑电图检测预期大脑电位的卷积尖峰神经网络 Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are receiving increased attention because they mimic synaptic connections in biological systems and produce spike trains, which can be approximated by binary values for computational efficiency. Recently, the addition of convolutional layers to combine the feature extraction power of convolutional networks with the computational efficiency of SNNs has been introduced. This paper studies the feasibility of using a convolutional spiking neural network (CSNN) to detect anticipatory slow cortical potentials (SCPs) related to braking intention in human participants using an electroencephalogram (EEG). Data was collected during an experiment wherein participants operated a remote-controlled vehicle on a testbed designed to simulate an urban environment. Participants were alerted to an incoming braking event via an audio countdown to elicit anticipatory potentials that were measured using an EEG. The CSNN's performance was compared to a standard CNN, EEGNet and three graph neural networks via 10-fold cross-validation. The CSNN outperformed all the other neural networks, and had a predictive accuracy of 99.06 percent with a true positive rate of 98.50 percent, a true negative rate of 99.20 percent and an F1-score of 0.98. Performance of the CSNN was comparable to the CNN in an ablation study using a subset of EEG channels that localized SCPs. Classification performance of the CSNN degraded only slightly when the floating-point EEG data were converted into spike trains via delta modulation to mimic synaptic connections. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 受到越来越多的关注，因为它们模仿生物系统中的突触连接并产生尖峰序列，可以通过二进制值来近似以提高计算效率。最近，引入了卷积层的添加，将卷积网络的特征提取能力与 SNN 的计算效率结合起来。本文研究了使用卷积尖峰神经网络 (CSNN) 通过脑电图 (EEG) 检测与人类参与者制动意图相关的预期慢皮层电位 (SCP) 的可行性。数据是在一项实验期间收集的，其中参与者在旨在模拟城市环境的试验台上操作遥控车辆。通过音频倒计时向参与者发出即将到来的制动事件的警报，以引发使用脑电图测量的预期电位。通过 10 倍交叉验证，将 CSNN 的性能与标准 CNN、EEGNet 和三个图神经网络进行比较。 CSNN 的性能优于所有其他神经网络，预测准确率为 99.06%，真阳性率为 98.50%，真阴性率为 99.20%，F1 得分为 0.98。在使用定位 SCP 的 EEG 通道子集的消融研究中，CSNN 的性能与 CNN 相当。当浮点脑电图数据通过增量调制转换为尖峰序列以模拟突触连接时，CSNN 的分类性能仅略有下降。 本文研究使用卷积脉冲神经网络（CSNN）检测与刹车意图相关的预判性慢皮层电位（SCPs）的可行性，基于脑电图（EEG）数据。 Nathan Lutes,Venkata Sriram Siddhardh Nadendla,K. Krishnamurthy cs.NE

authors_text: Brenda Praggastis,Davis Brown,Carlos Ortiz Marrero,Emilie Purvine,Madelyn Shapiro,Bei Wang
title: The SVD of Convolutional Weights: A CNN Interpretability Framework
title_zh: 卷积权重的 SVD：CNN 可解释性框架
abstract: Deep neural networks used for image classification often use convolutional filters to extract distinguishing features before passing them to a linear classifier. Most interpretability literature focuses on providing semantic meaning to convolutional filters to explain a model's reasoning process and confirm its use of relevant information from the input domain. Fully connected layers can be studied by decomposing their weight matrices using a singular value decomposition, in effect studying the correlations between the rows in each matrix to discover the dynamics of the map. In this work we define a singular value decomposition for the weight tensor of a convolutional layer, which provides an analogous understanding of the correlations between filters, exposing the dynamics of the convolutional map. We validate our definition using recent results in random matrix theory. By applying the decomposition across the linear layers of an image classification network we suggest a framework against which interpretability methods might be applied using hypergraphs to model class separation. Rather than looking to the activations to explain the network, we use the singular vectors with the greatest corresponding singular values for each linear layer to identify those features most important to the network. We illustrate our approach with examples and introduce the DeepDataProfiler library, the analysis tool used for this study.
summary: Deep neural networks used for image classification often use convolutional filters to extract distinguishing features before passing them to a linear classifier. Most interpretability literature focuses on providing semantic meaning to convolutional filters to explain a model's reasoning process and confirm its use of relevant information from the input domain. Fully connected layers can be studied by decomposing their weight matrices using a singular value decomposition, in effect studying the correlations between the rows in each matrix to discover the dynamics of the map. In this work we define a singular value decomposition for the weight tensor of a convolutional layer, which provides an analogous understanding of the correlations between filters, exposing the dynamics of the convolutional map. We validate our definition using recent results in random matrix theory. By applying the decomposition across the linear layers of an image classification network we suggest a framework against which interpretability methods might be applied using hypergraphs to model class separation. Rather than looking to the activations to explain the network, we use the singular vectors with the greatest corresponding singular values for each linear layer to identify those features most important to the network. We illustrate our approach with examples and introduce the DeepDataProfiler library, the analysis tool used for this study.
abstract_zh: 用于图像分类的深度神经网络通常使用卷积滤波器来提取区分特征，然后再将其传递给线性分类器。大多数可解释性文献侧重于为卷积滤波器提供语义，以解释模型的推理过程并确认其对输入域相关信息的使用。可以通过使用奇异值分解来分解其权重矩阵来研究完全连接的层，实际上是研究每个矩阵中的行之间的相关性以发现映射的动态性。在这项工作中，我们为卷积层的权重张量定义了奇异值分解，它提供了对滤波器之间相关性的类似理解，揭示了卷积图的动态。我们使用随机矩阵理论的最新结果验证了我们的定义。通过在图像分类网络的线性层上应用分解，我们提出了一个框架，可以使用超图来应用可解释性方法来建模类分离。我们不是通过激活来解释网络，而是使用每个线性层具有最大对应奇异值的奇异向量来识别对网络最重要的特征。我们通过示例说明我们的方法，并介绍 DeepDataProfiler 库（本研究中使用的分析工具）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过卷积层权重张量的奇异值分解（SVD）来解释卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架，旨在揭示卷积滤波器之间的相关性及网络动态。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注卷积滤波器的语义解释，但缺乏对卷积层权重矩阵相关性的系统分析。本文希望通过类似全连接层权重分解的方法，为卷积层提供可解释性框架。
AI.method: 定义卷积权重张量的SVD方法，结合随机矩阵理论验证其有效性，并通过超图建模类间分离，利用最大奇异值对应的奇异向量识别网络关键特征。
AI.result: 构建了基于SVD的CNN可解释性框架，通过实例验证了方法的有效性，并开发了DeepDataProfiler工具库支持分析。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过分解卷积权重张量而非激活值，为理解CNN的特征相关性和动态提供了新视角，有望成为解释性方法的基准。

authors_text: Mubashir Noman,Wafa Al Ghallabi,Daniya Najiha,Christoph Mayer,Akshay Dudhane,Martin Danelljan,Hisham Cholakkal,Salman Khan,Luc Van Gool,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: AVisT: A Benchmark for Visual Object Tracking in Adverse Visibility
title_zh: AVist：不利可见性下视觉对象跟踪的基准
abstract: One of the key factors behind the recent success in visual tracking is the availability of dedicated benchmarks. While being greatly benefiting to the tracking research, existing benchmarks do not pose the same difficulty as before with recent trackers achieving higher performance mainly due to (i) the introduction of more sophisticated transformers-based methods and (ii) the lack of diverse scenarios with adverse visibility such as, severe weather conditions, camouflage and imaging effects. We introduce AVisT, a dedicated benchmark for visual tracking in diverse scenarios with adverse visibility. AVisT comprises 120 challenging sequences with 80k annotated frames, spanning 18 diverse scenarios broadly grouped into five attributes with 42 object categories. The key contribution of AVisT is diverse and challenging scenarios covering severe weather conditions such as, dense fog, heavy rain and sandstorm; obstruction effects including, fire, sun glare and splashing water; adverse imaging effects such as, low-light; target effects including, small targets and distractor objects along with camouflage. We further benchmark 17 popular and recent trackers on AVisT with detailed analysis of their tracking performance across attributes, demonstrating a big room for improvement in performance. We believe that AVisT can greatly benefit the tracking community by complementing the existing benchmarks, in developing new creative tracking solutions in order to continue pushing the boundaries of the state-of-the-art. Our dataset along with the complete tracking performance evaluation is available at: https://github.com/visionml/pytracking

We believe that AVisT can greatly benefit the tracking community by complementing the existing benchmarks, in developing new creative tracking solutions in order to continue pushing the boundaries of the state-of-the-art. Our dataset along with the complete tracking performance evaluation is available at: https://github.com/visionml/pytracking
abstract_zh: 视觉跟踪最近取得成功的关键因素之一是专用基准的可用性。虽然对跟踪研究有很大好处，但现有的基准测试并没有像以前那样造成同样的困难，最近的跟踪器实现了更高的性能，这主要是由于（i）引入了更复杂的基于变压器的方法，以及（ii）缺乏能见度较差的各种场景，例如恶劣的天气条件、伪装和成像效果。我们推出了 AVisT，这是一种专用基准，用于在能见度较差的各种场景中进行视觉跟踪。 AVisT 包含 120 个具有挑战性的序列和 80k 个注释帧，涵盖 18 个不同的场景，大致分为 5 个属性和 42 个对象类别。 AVisT的主要贡献是涵盖浓雾、暴雨和沙尘暴等恶劣天气条件的多样化且具有挑战性的场景；障碍效应，包括火灾、阳光眩光和溅水；不良成像效果，例如低光；目标效果包括小目标和干扰物体以及伪装。我们在 AVisT 上进一步对 17 个流行的和最近的跟踪器进行了基准测试，详细分析了它们跨属性的跟踪性能，表明性能还有很大的改进空间。我们相信，AVisT 可以通过补充现有基准，开发新的创意跟踪解决方案，从而继续突破最先进的界限，从而使跟踪社区受益匪浅。我们的数据集以及完整的跟踪性能评估可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/visionml/pytracking

AI.tldr: 本文提出AVisT基准数据集，用于评估视觉目标跟踪在恶劣可见度条件下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪基准因缺乏多样化的恶劣天气和遮挡场景，难以反映实际挑战，且近期跟踪器性能提升主要依赖于Transformer方法，需更复杂场景验证。
AI.method: 构建包含120个序列、80k标注帧的AVisT数据集，涵盖雾、雨、沙尘等天气及光照遮挡等18种场景，并对17种跟踪器进行性能评估。
AI.result: 实验显示现有跟踪器在恶劣条件下表现仍有显著提升空间，验证了AVisT的挑战性及对跟踪算法发展的推动作用。
AI.conclusion: AVisT为跟踪领域提供新基准，促进针对复杂场景的创新算法研发，推动跟踪技术边界突破。

search_text: AVisT: A Benchmark for Visual Object Tracking in Adverse Visibility AVist：不利可见性下视觉对象跟踪的基准 One of the key factors behind the recent success in visual tracking is the availability of dedicated benchmarks. While being greatly benefiting to the tracking research, existing benchmarks do not pose the same difficulty as before with recent trackers achieving higher performance mainly due to (i) the introduction of more sophisticated transformers-based methods and (ii) the lack of diverse scenarios with adverse visibility such as, severe weather conditions, camouflage and imaging effects. We introduce AVisT, a dedicated benchmark for visual tracking in diverse scenarios with adverse visibility. AVisT comprises 120 challenging sequences with 80k annotated frames, spanning 18 diverse scenarios broadly grouped into five attributes with 42 object categories. The key contribution of AVisT is diverse and challenging scenarios covering severe weather conditions such as, dense fog, heavy rain and sandstorm; obstruction effects including, fire, sun glare and splashing water; adverse imaging effects such as, low-light; target effects including, small targets and distractor objects along with camouflage. We further benchmark 17 popular and recent trackers on AVisT with detailed analysis of their tracking performance across attributes, demonstrating a big room for improvement in performance. We believe that AVisT can greatly benefit the tracking community by complementing the existing benchmarks, in developing new creative tracking solutions in order to continue pushing the boundaries of the state-of-the-art. Our dataset along with the complete tracking performance evaluation is available at: https://github.com/visionml/pytracking 视觉跟踪最近取得成功的关键因素之一是专用基准的可用性。虽然对跟踪研究有很大好处，但现有的基准测试并没有像以前那样造成同样的困难，最近的跟踪器实现了更高的性能，这主要是由于（i）引入了更复杂的基于变压器的方法，以及（ii）缺乏能见度较差的各种场景，例如恶劣的天气条件、伪装和成像效果。我们推出了 AVisT，这是一种专用基准，用于在能见度较差的各种场景中进行视觉跟踪。 AVisT 包含 120 个具有挑战性的序列和 80k 个注释帧，涵盖 18 个不同的场景，大致分为 5 个属性和 42 个对象类别。 AVisT的主要贡献是涵盖浓雾、暴雨和沙尘暴等恶劣天气条件的多样化且具有挑战性的场景；障碍效应，包括火灾、阳光眩光和溅水；不良成像效果，例如低光；目标效果包括小目标和干扰物体以及伪装。我们在 AVisT 上进一步对 17 个流行的和最近的跟踪器进行了基准测试，详细分析了它们跨属性的跟踪性能，表明性能还有很大的改进空间。我们相信，AVisT 可以通过补充现有基准，开发新的创意跟踪解决方案，从而继续突破最先进的界限，从而使跟踪社区受益匪浅。我们的数据集以及完整的跟踪性能评估可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/visionml/pytracking 本文提出AVisT基准数据集，用于评估视觉目标跟踪在恶劣可见度条件下的性能。 Mubashir Noman,Wafa Al Ghallabi,Daniya Najiha,Christoph Mayer,Akshay Dudhane,Martin Danelljan,Hisham Cholakkal,Salman Khan,Luc Van Gool,Fahad Shahbaz Khan cs.CV

authors_text: Gang He,Shaoyi Long,Li Xu,Chang Wu,Jinjia Zhou,Ming Sun,Xing Wen,Yurong Dai
title: Global Priors Guided Modulation Network for Joint Super-Resolution and Inverse Tone-Mapping
title_zh: 用于联合超分辨率和逆色调映射的全局先验引导调制网络
abstract: Joint super-resolution and inverse tone-mapping (SR-ITM) aims to enhance the visual quality of videos that have quality deficiencies in resolution and dynamic range. This problem arises when using 4K high dynamic range (HDR) TVs to watch a low-resolution standard dynamic range (LR SDR) video. Previous methods that rely on learning local information typically cannot do well in preserving color conformity and long-range structural similarity, resulting in unnatural color transition and texture artifacts. In order to tackle these challenges, we propose a global priors guided modulation network (GPGMNet) for joint SR-ITM. In particular, we design a global priors extraction module (GPEM) to extract color conformity prior and structural similarity prior that are beneficial for ITM and SR tasks, respectively. To further exploit the global priors and preserve spatial information, we devise multiple global priors guided spatial-wise modulation blocks (GSMBs) with a few parameters for intermediate feature modulation, in which the modulation parameters are generated by the shared global priors and the spatial features map from the spatial pyramid convolution block (SPCB). With these elaborate designs, the GPGMNet can achieve higher visual quality with lower computational complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed GPGMNet is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, our proposed model exceeds the state-of-the-art by 0.64 dB in PSNR, with 69$\%$ fewer parameters and 3.1$\times$ speedup. The code will be released soon.
summary: Joint super-resolution and inverse tone-mapping (SR-ITM) aims to enhance the visual quality of videos that have quality deficiencies in resolution and dynamic range. This problem arises when using 4K high dynamic range (HDR) TVs to watch a low-resolution standard dynamic range (LR SDR) video. Previous methods that rely on learning local information typically cannot do well in preserving color conformity and long-range structural similarity, resulting in unnatural color transition and texture artifacts. In order to tackle these challenges, we propose a global priors guided modulation network (GPGMNet) for joint SR-ITM. In particular, we design a global priors extraction module (GPEM) to extract color conformity prior and structural similarity prior that are beneficial for ITM and SR tasks, respectively. To further exploit the global priors and preserve spatial information, we devise multiple global priors guided spatial-wise modulation blocks (GSMBs) with a few parameters for intermediate feature modulation, in which the modulation parameters are generated by the shared global priors and the spatial features map from the spatial pyramid convolution block (SPCB). With these elaborate designs, the GPGMNet can achieve higher visual quality with lower computational complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed GPGMNet is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, our proposed model exceeds the state-of-the-art by 0.64 dB in PSNR, with 69$\%$ fewer parameters and 3.1$\times$ speedup. The code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 联合超分辨率和逆色调映射（SR-ITM）旨在增强在分辨率和动态范围方面存在质量缺陷的视频的视觉质量。当使用 4K 高动态范围 (HDR) 电视观看低分辨率标准动态范围 (LR SDR) 视频时，就会出现此问题。以前依赖学习局部信息的方法通常不能很好地保持颜色一致性和远程结构相似性，从而导致不自然的颜色过渡和纹理伪影。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个用于联合 SR-ITM 的全局先验引导调制网络（GPGMNet）。特别是，我们设计了一个全局先验提取模块（GPEM）来提取分别有利于 ITM 和 SR 任务的颜色一致性先验和结构相似性先验。为了进一步利用全局先验并保留空间信息，我们设计了多个全局先验引导的空间明智调制块（GSMB），其中带有一些用于中间特征调制的参数，其中调制参数由共享全局先验和来自空间金字塔卷积块（SPCB）的空间特征映射生成。通过这些精心设计，GPGMNet 可以以更低的计算复杂度实现更高的视觉质量。大量实验表明，我们提出的 GPGMNet 优于最先进的方法。具体来说，我们提出的模型在 PSNR 方面超出了现有技术水平 0.64 dB，参数减少了 69$\%$，加速提高了 3.1$\times$。该代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全局先验引导的调制网络（GPGMNet），用于联合超分辨率和逆色调映射（SR-ITM），以提升低分辨率标准动态范围视频在高动态范围电视上的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖局部信息学习，难以保持颜色一致性与长距离结构相似性，导致颜色过渡不自然和纹理伪影。需通过全局先验信息提升SR-ITM效果。
AI.method: 设计全局先验提取模块（GPEM）分别提取颜色一致性先验和结构相似性先验，并构建多组全局先验引导的空间调制块（GSMB），通过共享先验与空间金字塔卷积特征生成调制参数，实现高效特征调制。
AI.result: 在PSNR指标上优于现有方法0.64dB，参数量减少69%，速度提升3.1倍，验证了GPGMNet在视觉质量与计算效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: GPGMNet通过全局先验引导的调制机制，有效解决了SR-ITM中的颜色与结构保持问题，为高质量视频重建提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Manny Ko,Ujjawal K. Panchal,Héctor Andrade-Loarca,Andres Mendez-Vazquez
title: CoShNet: A Hybrid Complex Valued Neural Network using Shearlets
title_zh: CoShNet：使用 Shearlets 的混合复值神经网络
abstract: In a hybrid neural network, the expensive convolutional layers are replaced by a non-trainable fixed transform with a great reduction in parameters. In previous works, good results were obtained by replacing the convolutions with wavelets. However, wavelet based hybrid network inherited wavelet's lack of vanishing moments along curves and its axis-bias. We propose to use Shearlets with its robust support for important image features like edges, ridges and blobs. The resulting network is called Complex Shearlets Network (CoShNet). It was tested on Fashion-MNIST against ResNet-50 and Resnet-18, obtaining 92.2% versus 90.7% and 91.8% respectively. The proposed network has 49.9k parameters versus ResNet-18 with 11.18m and use 52 times fewer FLOPs. Finally, we trained in under 20 epochs versus 200 epochs required by ResNet and do not need any hyperparameter tuning nor regularization. Code: https://github.com/Ujjawal-K-Panchal/coshnet
summary: In a hybrid neural network, the expensive convolutional layers are replaced by a non-trainable fixed transform with a great reduction in parameters. In previous works, good results were obtained by replacing the convolutions with wavelets. However, wavelet based hybrid network inherited wavelet's lack of vanishing moments along curves and its axis-bias. We propose to use Shearlets with its robust support for important image features like edges, ridges and blobs. The resulting network is called Complex Shearlets Network (CoShNet). It was tested on Fashion-MNIST against ResNet-50 and Resnet-18, obtaining 92.2% versus 90.7% and 91.8% respectively. The proposed network has 49.9k parameters versus ResNet-18 with 11.18m and use 52 times fewer FLOPs. Finally, we trained in under 20 epochs versus 200 epochs required by ResNet and do not need any hyperparameter tuning nor regularization. Code: https://github.com/Ujjawal-K-Panchal/coshnet
abstract_zh: 在混合神经网络中，昂贵的卷积层被不可训练的固定变换所取代，参数大大减少。在之前的工作中，通过用小波代替卷积得到了很好的结果。然而，基于小波的混合网络继承了小波沿曲线缺乏消失矩及其轴偏差的缺点。我们建议使用 Shearlets，因为它对边缘、脊和斑点等重要图像特征具有强大的支持。由此产生的网络称为复杂剪切波网络 (CoShNet)。它在 Fashion-MNIST 上针对 ResNet-50 和 Resnet-18 进行了测试，分别获得了 92.2%、90.7% 和 91.8%。所提出的网络有 49.9k 个参数，而 ResNet-18 有 11.18m 个参数，并且使用的 FLOP 数减少了 52 倍。最后，我们训练的时间少于 20 个 epoch，而 ResNet 需要 200 个 epoch，并且不需要任何超参数调整或正则化。代码：https://github.com/Ujjawal-K-Panchal/coshnet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于剪切波的混合复值神经网络（CoShNet），用于图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的卷积神经网络参数量大、计算复杂度高，而使用小波变换的混合网络存在缺乏沿曲线消失矩和轴偏的问题，因此需要一种更优的替代方案。
AI.method: 作者使用剪切波替代卷积层，利用其对图像边缘、脊线和斑点等特征的鲁棒支持，构建了名为CoShNet的混合复值神经网络。
AI.result: CoShNet在Fashion-MNIST数据集上的准确率为92.2%，优于ResNet-50和ResNet-18的90.7%和91.8%。CoShNet参数量为49.9k，仅为ResNet-18的11.18m的1/224，计算量（FLOPs）减少52倍，训练时间也显著缩短。
AI.conclusion: CoShNet在参数量、计算效率和训练时间上均优于传统深度网络，同时无需超参数调整或正则化，适用于图像分类任务。

authors_text: Chenjian Gao,Qian Yu,Lu Sheng,Yi-Zhe Song,Dong Xu
title: SketchSampler: Sketch-based 3D Reconstruction via View-dependent Depth Sampling
title_zh: SketchSampler：通过视图相关深度采样进行基于草图的 3D 重建
abstract: Reconstructing a 3D shape based on a single sketch image is challenging due to the large domain gap between a sparse, irregular sketch and a regular, dense 3D shape. Existing works try to employ the global feature extracted from sketch to directly predict the 3D coordinates, but they usually suffer from losing fine details that are not faithful to the input sketch. Through analyzing the 3D-to-2D projection process, we notice that the density map that characterizes the distribution of 2D point clouds (i.e., the probability of points projected at each location of the projection plane) can be used as a proxy to facilitate the reconstruction process. To this end, we first translate a sketch via an image translation network to a more informative 2D representation that can be used to generate a density map. Next, a 3D point cloud is reconstructed via a two-stage probabilistic sampling process: first recovering the 2D points (i.e., the x and y coordinates) by sampling the density map; and then predicting the depth (i.e., the z coordinate) by sampling the depth values at the ray determined by each 2D point. Extensive experiments are conducted, and both quantitative and qualitative results show that our proposed approach significantly outperforms other baseline methods.
summary: Reconstructing a 3D shape based on a single sketch image is challenging due to the large domain gap between a sparse, irregular sketch and a regular, dense 3D shape. Existing works try to employ the global feature extracted from sketch to directly predict the 3D coordinates, but they usually suffer from losing fine details that are not faithful to the input sketch. Through analyzing the 3D-to-2D projection process, we notice that the density map that characterizes the distribution of 2D point clouds (i.e., the probability of points projected at each location of the projection plane) can be used as a proxy to facilitate the reconstruction process. To this end, we first translate a sketch via an image translation network to a more informative 2D representation that can be used to generate a density map. Next, a 3D point cloud is reconstructed via a two-stage probabilistic sampling process: first recovering the 2D points (i.e., the x and y coordinates) by sampling the density map; and then predicting the depth (i.e., the z coordinate) by sampling the depth values at the ray determined by each 2D point. Extensive experiments are conducted, and both quantitative and qualitative results show that our proposed approach significantly outperforms other baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 由于稀疏、不规则的草图和规则、密集的 3D 形状之间存在较大的域间隙，因此基于单个草图图像重建 3D 形状具有挑战性。现有的工作尝试利用从草图提取的全局特征来直接预测 3D 坐标，但它们通常会丢失不忠实于输入草图的精细细节。通过分析3D到2D的投影过程，我们注意到表征2D点云分布的密度图（即投影在投影平面每个位置的点的概率）可以作为代理来促进重建过程。为此，我们首先通过图像转换网络将草图转换为信息更丰富的 2D 表示，可用于生成密度图。接下来，通过两阶段概率采样过程重建 3D 点云：首先通过对密度图进行采样来恢复 2D 点（即 x 和 y 坐标）；然后通过对每个 2D 点确定的射线处的深度值进行采样来预测深度​​（即 z 坐标）。进行了大量的实验，定量和定性结果都表明我们提出的方法明显优于其他基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于草图的3D重建方法SketchSampler，通过视图相关的深度采样解决单张草图到3D形状的重建难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接通过草图全局特征预测3D坐标时容易丢失细节，而通过分析3D到2D投影过程，发现密度图能有效表征2D点云分布，从而更准确地指导重建。
AI.method: 首先通过图像翻译网络将草图转化为信息更丰富的2D表示以生成密度图；随后采用两阶段概率采样：先根据密度图采样2D点坐标，再沿射线方向采样深度值生成3D点云。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在定量和定性指标上均显著优于其他基线方法，能更精确地保留输入草图的细节特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过密度图与视图相关深度采样的结合，本文提出的方法有效解决了草图到3D重建中的细节丢失问题，为单视图草图重建提供了新思路。

title: Who Finds the Short Proof? An Exploration of Variants of Boolos' Curious Inference using Higher-order Automated Theorem Provers
title_zh: 谁找到了简短的证明？使用高阶自动定理证明器探索 Boolos 好奇推理的变体
comment: 11 pages, 7 appendices (data, proofs and links to proofs); to appear in the Logic Journal of the IGPL
comments: 11 pages, 7 appendices (data, proofs and links to proofs); to appear in the Logic Journal of the IGPL
abstract: This paper reports on an exploration of Boolos' Curious Inference, using higher-order automated theorem provers (ATPs). Surprisingly, only suitable shorthand notations had to be provided by hand for ATPs to find a short proof. The higher-order lemmas required for constructing a short proof are automatically discovered by the ATPs. Given the observations and suggestions in this paper, full proof automation of Boolos' and related examples now seems to be within reach of higher-order ATPs.
summary: This paper reports on an exploration of Boolos' Curious Inference, using higher-order automated theorem provers (ATPs). Surprisingly, only suitable shorthand notations had to be provided by hand for ATPs to find a short proof. The higher-order lemmas required for constructing a short proof are automatically discovered by the ATPs. Given the observations and suggestions in this paper, full proof automation of Boolos' and related examples now seems to be within reach of higher-order ATPs.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了使用高阶自动定理证明器 (ATP) 对 Boolos 好奇推理的探索。令人惊讶的是，只需手工提供合适的速记符号，ATP 就能找到简短的证明。构建简短证明所需的高阶引理由 ATP 自动发现。鉴于本文中的观察和建议，Boolos 和相关示例的完全自动化证明现在似乎可以在高阶 ATP 的范围内实现。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何利用高阶自动定理证明器找到Boolos好奇推理的简短证明
AI.motivation: 验证高阶ATPs是否能通过自动发现引理来简化复杂逻辑证明的过程，从而推动完全自动化证明的可能性
AI.method: 采用高阶自动定理证明器，并手动输入必要的缩写符号，以测试其发现高阶引理的能力
AI.result: ATPs成功自动发现高阶引理，仅需手动提供缩写符号即可找到简短证明
AI.conclusion: 高阶ATPs在适当辅助下可实现复杂逻辑问题的完全自动化证明，为相关领域提供新方向

search_text: Who Finds the Short Proof? An Exploration of Variants of Boolos' Curious Inference using Higher-order Automated Theorem Provers 谁找到了简短的证明？使用高阶自动定理证明器探索 Boolos 好奇推理的变体 This paper reports on an exploration of Boolos' Curious Inference, using higher-order automated theorem provers (ATPs). Surprisingly, only suitable shorthand notations had to be provided by hand for ATPs to find a short proof. The higher-order lemmas required for constructing a short proof are automatically discovered by the ATPs. Given the observations and suggestions in this paper, full proof automation of Boolos' and related examples now seems to be within reach of higher-order ATPs. 本文报告了使用高阶自动定理证明器 (ATP) 对 Boolos 好奇推理的探索。令人惊讶的是，只需手工提供合适的速记符号，ATP 就能找到简短的证明。构建简短证明所需的高阶引理由 ATP 自动发现。鉴于本文中的观察和建议，Boolos 和相关示例的完全自动化证明现在似乎可以在高阶 ATP 的范围内实现。 探讨如何利用高阶自动定理证明器找到Boolos好奇推理的简短证明 Christoph Benzmüller,David Fuenmayor,Alexander Steen,Geoff Sutcliffe math.LO,cs.AI,cs.LO,math.HO

title: Models of Music Cognition and Composition
title_zh: 音乐认知和作曲模型
comment: TLDR: literature review of models of music cognition and composition
comments: TLDR: literature review of models of music cognition and composition
abstract: Much like most of cognition research, music cognition is an interdisciplinary field, which attempts to apply methods of cognitive science (neurological, computational and experimental) to understand the perception and process of composition of music. In this paper, we first motivate why music is relevant to cognitive scientists and give an overview of the approaches to computational modelling of music cognition. We then review literature on the various models of music perception, including non-computational models, computational non-cognitive models and computational cognitive models. Lastly, we review literature on modelling the creative behaviour and on computer systems capable of composing music. Since a lot of technical terms from music theory have been used, we have appended a list of relevant terms and their definitions at the end.

We then review literature on the various models of music perception, including non-computational models, computational non-cognitive models and computational cognitive models. Lastly, we review literature on modelling the creative behaviour and on computer systems capable of composing music. Since a lot of technical terms from music theory have been used, we have appended a list of relevant terms and their definitions at the end.
abstract_zh: 与大多数认知研究一样，音乐认知是一个跨学科领域，它试图应用认知科学的方法（神经学、计算和实验）来理解音乐创作的感知和过程。在本文中，我们首先阐明为什么音乐与认知科学家相关，并概述了音乐认知的计算建模方法。然后，我们回顾了各种音乐感知模型的文献，包括非计算模型、计算非认知模型和计算认知模型。最后，我们回顾了有关创造性行为建模和能够创作音乐的计算机系统的文献。由于使用了很多音乐理论中的技术术语，我们在最后附加了相关术语及其定义的列表。

AI.tldr: 综述音乐认知与作曲的计算模型及研究现状
AI.motivation: 阐明音乐研究对认知科学的重要性，并概述计算模型的方法论框架
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分类梳理非计算模型、非认知计算模型、认知计算模型及音乐创作系统
AI.result: 系统总结音乐感知模型分类、创作行为建模成果及术语定义表
AI.conclusion: 强调跨学科研究价值，指出需整合多模态认知模型与提升作曲系统创造力

title: Conformal Navigation Transformations with Application to Robot Navigation in Complex Workspaces
title_zh: 共形导航变换及其在复杂工作空间中机器人导航的应用
abstract: Navigation functions provide both path and motion planning, which can be used to ensure obstacle avoidance and convergence in the sphere world. When dealing with complex and realistic scenarios, constructing a transformation to the sphere world is essential and, at the same time, challenging. This work proposes a novel transformation termed the conformal navigation transformation to achieve collision-free navigation of a robot in a workspace populated with obstacles of arbitrary shapes. The properties of the conformal navigation transformation, including uniqueness, invariance of navigation properties, and no angular deformation, are investigated, which contribute to the solution of the robot navigation problem in complex environments. Based on navigation functions and the proposed transformation, feedback controllers are derived for the automatic guidance and motion control of kinematic and dynamic mobile robots. Moreover, an iterative method is proposed to construct the conformal navigation transformation in a multiply-connected workspace, which transforms the multiply-connected problem into multiple simply-connected problems to achieve fast convergence. In addition to the analytic guarantees, simulation studies verify the effectiveness of the proposed methodology in workspaces with non-trivial obstacles.
summary: Navigation functions provide both path and motion planning, which can be used to ensure obstacle avoidance and convergence in the sphere world. When dealing with complex and realistic scenarios, constructing a transformation to the sphere world is essential and, at the same time, challenging. The properties of the conformal navigation transformation, including uniqueness, invariance of navigation properties, and no angular deformation, are investigated, which contribute to the solution of the robot navigation problem in complex environments. Based on navigation functions and the proposed transformation, feedback controllers are derived for the automatic guidance and motion control of kinematic and dynamic mobile robots. Moreover, an iterative method is proposed to construct the conformal navigation transformation in a multiply-connected workspace, which transforms the multiply-connected problem into multiple simply-connected problems to achieve fast convergence. In addition to the analytic guarantees, simulation studies verify the effectiveness of the proposed methodology in workspaces with non-trivial obstacles.
abstract_zh: 导航功能提供路径和运动规划，可用于确保球体世界中的避障和收敛。在处理复杂而现实的场景时，构建球体世界的转换至关重要，同时也具有挑战性。这项工作提出了一种称为共形导航变换的新颖变换，以实现机器人在充满任意形状障碍物的工作空间中的无碰撞导航。研究了共形导航变换的特性，包括导航特性的唯一性、不变性和无角度变形，这有助于复杂环境下机器人导航问题的解决。基于导航功能和所提出的变换，导出了用于运动学和动态移动机器人的自动引导和运动控制的反馈控制器。此外，提出了一种迭代方法在多重连通工作空间中构造共形导航变换，将多重连通问题转化为多个单连通问题以实现快速收敛。除了分析保证之外，模拟研究还验证了所提出的方法在具有重要障碍的工作空间中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种共形导航变换方法，用于解决复杂工作空间中机器人的避障导航问题。
AI.motivation: 传统导航函数在处理复杂障碍物场景时，难以有效转换至球形世界，需新方法确保避障与收敛。
AI.method: 提出共形导航变换，研究其唯一性、导航属性不变性等特性，结合导航函数设计反馈控制器，并采用迭代法分解多连通空间为多个简单问题。
AI.result: 仿真验证了该方法在非平凡障碍物工作空间中的有效性，实现快速收敛与避障。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为复杂环境下机器人导航提供了理论保障与有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chengyin Xu,Zenghao Chai,Zhengzhuo Xu,Chun Yuan,Yanbo Fan,Jue Wang
title: HyP$^2$ Loss: Beyond Hypersphere Metric Space for Multi-label Image Retrieval
title_zh: HyP$^2$ 损失：超越超球面度量空间的多标签图像检索
comment: Accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM) 2022
comments: Accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM) 2022
abstract: Image retrieval has become an increasingly appealing technique with broad multimedia application prospects, where deep hashing serves as the dominant branch towards low storage and efficient retrieval. In this paper, we carried out in-depth investigations on metric learning in deep hashing for establishing a powerful metric space in multi-label scenarios, where the pair loss suffers high computational overhead and converge difficulty, while the proxy loss is theoretically incapable of expressing the profound label dependencies and exhibits conflicts in the constructed hypersphere space. To address the problems, we propose a novel metric learning framework with Hybrid Proxy-Pair Loss (HyP$^2$ Loss) that constructs an expressive metric space with efficient training complexity w.r.t. the whole dataset. The proposed HyP$^2$ Loss focuses on optimizing the hypersphere space by learnable proxies and excavating data-to-data correlations of irrelevant pairs, which integrates sufficient data correspondence of pair-based methods and high-efficiency of proxy-based methods. Extensive experiments on four standard multi-label benchmarks justify the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art, is robust among different hash bits and achieves significant performance gains with a faster, more stable convergence speed. Our code is available at https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HyP2-Loss.
summary: Image retrieval has become an increasingly appealing technique with broad multimedia application prospects, where deep hashing serves as the dominant branch towards low storage and efficient retrieval. In this paper, we carried out in-depth investigations on metric learning in deep hashing for establishing a powerful metric space in multi-label scenarios, where the pair loss suffers high computational overhead and converge difficulty, while the proxy loss is theoretically incapable of expressing the profound label dependencies and exhibits conflicts in the constructed hypersphere space. To address the problems, we propose a novel metric learning framework with Hybrid Proxy-Pair Loss (HyP$^2$ Loss) that constructs an expressive metric space with efficient training complexity w.r.t. the whole dataset. The proposed HyP$^2$ Loss focuses on optimizing the hypersphere space by learnable proxies and excavating data-to-data correlations of irrelevant pairs, which integrates sufficient data correspondence of pair-based methods and high-efficiency of proxy-based methods. Extensive experiments on four standard multi-label benchmarks justify the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art, is robust among different hash bits and achieves significant performance gains with a faster, more stable convergence speed. Our code is available at https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HyP2-Loss.
abstract_zh: 图像检索已成为一种越来越有吸引力的技术，具有广阔的多媒体应用前景，其中深度哈希是低存储和高效检索的主导分支。在本文中，我们对深度哈希中的度量学习进行了深入研究，以在多标签场景中建立强大的度量空间，其中对损失具有较高的计算开销和收敛困难，而代理损失在理论上无法表达深刻的标签依赖关系，并且在构造的超球面空间中表现出冲突。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有混合代理对损失（HyP$^2$ Loss）的新颖度量学习框架，该框架构建了一个具有高效训练复杂性的表达度量空间。整个数据集。提出的 HyP$^2$ Loss 侧重于通过可学习代理和挖掘不相关对的数据到数据相关性来优化超球面空间，它集成了基于对的方法的充分数据对应性和基于代理的方法的高效率。对四个标准多标签基准的大量实验证明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法，在不同的哈希位之间具有鲁棒性，并以更快、更稳定的收敛速度实现显着的性能增益。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HyP2-Loss 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型混合代理-配对损失函数（HyP² Loss），用于改进多标签图像检索中的深度哈希度量学习。
AI.motivation: 现有配对损失计算复杂度高且收敛困难，代理损失无法有效表达标签依赖关系并在超球空间中存在冲突，需设计更高效的度量学习框架。
AI.method: 通过可学习的代理优化超球空间，并挖掘无关样本对的数据关联，结合配对方法的数据对应性和代理方法的高效性，构建HyP² Loss框架。
AI.result: 在四个标准多标签基准数据集上优于现有方法，具有不同哈希位数下的鲁棒性，收敛速度更快且更稳定。
AI.conclusion: HyP² Loss有效平衡了计算效率与性能，解决了传统方法在多标签场景下的局限性，为深度哈希检索提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 在四个标准多标签基准数据集上优于现有方法，具有不同哈希位数下的鲁棒性，收敛速度更快且更稳定。
ai_content.conclusion: HyP² Loss有效平衡了计算效率与性能，解决了传统方法在多标签场景下的局限性，为深度哈希检索提供了新思路。

search_text: HyP$^2$ Loss: Beyond Hypersphere Metric Space for Multi-label Image Retrieval HyP$^2$ 损失：超越超球面度量空间的多标签图像检索 Image retrieval has become an increasingly appealing technique with broad multimedia application prospects, where deep hashing serves as the dominant branch towards low storage and efficient retrieval. In this paper, we carried out in-depth investigations on metric learning in deep hashing for establishing a powerful metric space in multi-label scenarios, where the pair loss suffers high computational overhead and converge difficulty, while the proxy loss is theoretically incapable of expressing the profound label dependencies and exhibits conflicts in the constructed hypersphere space. To address the problems, we propose a novel metric learning framework with Hybrid Proxy-Pair Loss (HyP$^2$ Loss) that constructs an expressive metric space with efficient training complexity w.r.t. the whole dataset. The proposed HyP$^2$ Loss focuses on optimizing the hypersphere space by learnable proxies and excavating data-to-data correlations of irrelevant pairs, which integrates sufficient data correspondence of pair-based methods and high-efficiency of proxy-based methods. Extensive experiments on four standard multi-label benchmarks justify the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art, is robust among different hash bits and achieves significant performance gains with a faster, more stable convergence speed. Our code is available at https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HyP2-Loss. 图像检索已成为一种越来越有吸引力的技术，具有广阔的多媒体应用前景，其中深度哈希是低存储和高效检索的主导分支。在本文中，我们对深度哈希中的度量学习进行了深入研究，以在多标签场景中建立强大的度量空间，其中对损失具有较高的计算开销和收敛困难，而代理损失在理论上无法表达深刻的标签依赖关系，并且在构造的超球面空间中表现出冲突。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有混合代理对损失（HyP$^2$ Loss）的新颖度量学习框架，该框架构建了一个具有高效训练复杂性的表达度量空间。整个数据集。提出的 HyP$^2$ Loss 侧重于通过可学习代理和挖掘不相关对的数据到数据相关性来优化超球面空间，它集成了基于对的方法的充分数据对应性和基于代理的方法的高效率。对四个标准多标签基准的大量实验证明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法，在不同的哈希位之间具有鲁棒性，并以更快、更稳定的收敛速度实现显着的性能增益。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/JerryXu0129/HyP2-Loss 获取。 本文提出一种新型混合代理-配对损失函数（HyP² Loss），用于改进多标签图像检索中的深度哈希度量学习。 Chengyin Xu,Zenghao Chai,Zhengzhuo Xu,Chun Yuan,Yanbo Fan,Jue Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chunle Guo,Ruiqi Wu,Xin Jin,Linghao Han,Zhi Chai,Weidong Zhang,Chongyi Li
title: Underwater Ranker: Learn Which Is Better and How to Be Better
title_zh: 水下排名器：了解哪个更好以及如何变得更好
abstract: In this paper, we present a ranking-based underwater image quality assessment (UIQA) method, abbreviated as URanker. The URanker is built on the efficient conv-attentional image Transformer. In terms of underwater images, we specially devise (1) the histogram prior that embeds the color distribution of an underwater image as histogram token to attend global degradation and (2) the dynamic cross-scale correspondence to model local degradation. The final prediction depends on the class tokens from different scales, which comprehensively considers multi-scale dependencies. With the margin ranking loss, our URanker can accurately rank the order of underwater images of the same scene enhanced by different underwater image enhancement (UIE) algorithms according to their visual quality. To achieve that, we also contribute a dataset, URankerSet, containing sufficient results enhanced by different UIE algorithms and the corresponding perceptual rankings, to train our URanker. Apart from the good performance of URanker, we found that a simple U-shape UIE network can obtain promising performance when it is coupled with our pre-trained URanker as additional supervision. In addition, we also propose a normalization tail that can significantly improve the performance of UIE networks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method. The key designs of our method are discussed. We will release our dataset and code.
summary: In this paper, we present a ranking-based underwater image quality assessment (UIQA) method, abbreviated as URanker. The URanker is built on the efficient conv-attentional image Transformer. In terms of underwater images, we specially devise (1) the histogram prior that embeds the color distribution of an underwater image as histogram token to attend global degradation and (2) the dynamic cross-scale correspondence to model local degradation. The final prediction depends on the class tokens from different scales, which comprehensively considers multi-scale dependencies. With the margin ranking loss, our URanker can accurately rank the order of underwater images of the same scene enhanced by different underwater image enhancement (UIE) algorithms according to their visual quality. To achieve that, we also contribute a dataset, URankerSet, containing sufficient results enhanced by different UIE algorithms and the corresponding perceptual rankings, to train our URanker. Apart from the good performance of URanker, we found that a simple U-shape UIE network can obtain promising performance when it is coupled with our pre-trained URanker as additional supervision. In addition, we also propose a normalization tail that can significantly improve the performance of UIE networks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method. The key designs of our method are discussed. We will release our dataset and code.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于排名的水下图像质量评估（UIQA）方法，简称URanker。 URanker 建立在高效的卷积注意力图像 Transformer 之上。在水下图像方面，我们特别设计了（1）直方图先验，将水下图像的颜色分布作为直方图标记嵌入，以参与全局退化；（2）动态跨尺度对应来模拟局部退化。最终的预测取决于不同尺度的类标记，综合考虑了多尺度的依赖关系。通过边缘排名损失，我们的 URanker 可以根据视觉质量对经过不同水下图像增强（UIE）算法增强的同一场景的水下图像进行准确的排名。为了实现这一目标，我们还贡献了一个数据集 URankerSet，其中包含通过不同 UIE 算法增强的足够结果以及相应的感知排名，以训练我们的 URanker。除了 URanker 的良好性能之外，我们发现简单的 U 形 UIE 网络与我们预先训练的 URanker 作为附加监督相结合，可以获得有希望的性能。此外，我们还提出了一种标准化尾部，可以显着提高UIE网络的性能。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的最先进的性能。讨论了我们方法的关键设计。我们将发布我们的数据集和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于排名的水下图像质量评估方法URanker，通过多尺度特征建模和动态跨尺度对应关系，结合自研数据集实现水下图像增强算法的视觉质量排序。
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像质量评估方法难以准确捕捉多尺度退化特征，且缺乏针对不同增强算法的统一质量排序框架，亟需建立兼顾全局与局部特征的评估体系。
AI.method: 构建基于卷积-注意力机制的图像Transformer，设计直方图先验模块建模全局退化特征，采用动态跨尺度对应关系建模局部退化，通过多尺度class token融合预测，结合边距排序损失函数进行训练，并构建包含多算法增强结果的URankerSet数据集。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上取得SOTA性能，验证了URanker的优越性；提出的U型网络结构结合预训练URanker可显著提升水下图像增强效果，归一化尾部设计进一步优化模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文创新性地将排名学习框架应用于水下图像质量评估，通过多尺度特征建模和专用数据集构建，为水下图像增强算法评估提供了新范式，同时验证了预训练评估模型对增强网络的正向引导作用。

title: An improved lower bound on the length of the longest cycle in random graphs
title_zh: 随机图中最长循环长度的改进下界
abstract: We provide a new lower bound on the length of the longest cycle of the binomial random graph $G(n,(1+ε)/n)$ that holds w.h.p. for all $ε=ε(n)$ such that $ε^3n\to \infty$. In the case $ε\leq ε_0$ for some sufficiently small constant $ε_0$, this bound is equal to $1.581ε^2n$ which improves upon the current best lower bound of $4ε^2n/3$ due to Luczak.
summary: We provide a new lower bound on the length of the longest cycle of the binomial random graph $G(n,(1+ε)/n)$ that holds w.h.p. for all $ε=ε(n)$ such that $ε^3n\to \infty$. In the case $ε\leq ε_0$ for some sufficiently small constant $ε_0$, this bound is equal to $1.581ε^2n$ which improves upon the current best lower bound of $4ε^2n/3$ due to Luczak.
abstract_zh: 我们为二项式随机图 $G(n,(1+ε)/n)$ 的最长循环长度提供了一个新的下界，该图保持 w.h.p。对于所有 $ε=ε(n)$ 使得 $ε^3n\to \infty$。在 $ε\leq ε_0$ 对于某个足够小的常数 $ε_0$ 的情况下，此界限等于 $1.581ε^2n$，由于 Luczak，它改进了当前最佳下界 $4ε^2n/3$。

AI.tldr: 改进二项式随机图中最长环长度的下界
AI.motivation: 旨在为二项式随机图的最长环长度提供更精确的下界，以改进现有结果
AI.method: 采用概率分析和组合优化方法，结合随机图理论中的技巧
AI.result: 当ε足够小时，最长环长度的下界为1.581ε²n，优于之前的4ε²n/3
AI.conclusion: 该研究在特定条件下显著提升了最长环长度的下界，为随机图理论提供了新的见解

search_text: An improved lower bound on the length of the longest cycle in random graphs 随机图中最长循环长度的改进下界 We provide a new lower bound on the length of the longest cycle of the binomial random graph $G(n,(1+ε)/n)$ that holds w.h.p. for all $ε=ε(n)$ such that $ε^3n\to \infty$. In the case $ε\leq ε_0$ for some sufficiently small constant $ε_0$, this bound is equal to $1.581ε^2n$ which improves upon the current best lower bound of $4ε^2n/3$ due to Luczak. 我们为二项式随机图 $G(n,(1+ε)/n)$ 的最长循环长度提供了一个新的下界，该图保持 w.h.p。对于所有 $ε=ε(n)$ 使得 $ε^3n\to \infty$。在 $ε\leq ε_0$ 对于某个足够小的常数 $ε_0$ 的情况下，此界限等于 $1.581ε^2n$，由于 Luczak，它改进了当前最佳下界 $4ε^2n/3$。 改进二项式随机图中最长环长度的下界 Michael Anastos math.CO,cs.DS

authors_text: Fedor V. Fomin,Petr A. Golovach,Tanmay Inamdar,Nidhi Purohit,Saket Saurabh
title: Exact Exponential Algorithms for Clustering Problems
title_zh: 聚类问题的精确指数算法
abstract: In this paper we initiate a systematic study of exact algorithms for well-known clustering problems, namely $k$-Median and $k$-Means. In $k$-Median, the input consists of a set $X$ of $n$ points belonging to a metric space, and the task is to select a subset $C \subseteq X$ of $k$ points as centers, such that the sum of the distances of every point to its nearest center is minimized. In $k$-Means, the objective is to minimize the sum of squares of the distances instead. It is easy to design an algorithm running in time $\max_{k\leq n} {n \choose k} n^{O(1)} = O^*(2^n)$ ($O^*(\cdot)$ notation hides polynomial factors in $n$). We design first non-trivial exact algorithms for these problems. In particular, we obtain an $O^*((1.89)^n)$ time exact algorithm for $k$-Median that works for any value of $k$. Our algorithm is quite general in that it does not use any properties of the underlying (metric) space -- it does not even require the distances to satisfy the triangle inequality. In particular, the same algorithm also works for $k$-Means. We complement this result by showing that the running time of our algorithm is asymptotically optimal, up to the base of the exponent. That is, unless ETH fails, there is no algorithm for these problems running in time $2^{o(n)} \cdot n^{O(1)}$. Finally, we consider the "supplier" versions of these clustering problems, where, in addition to the set $X$ we are additionally given a set of $m$ candidate centers $F$, and objective is to find a subset of $k$ centers from $F$. The goal is still to minimize the $k$-Median/$k$-Means/$k$-Center objective. For these versions we give a $O(2^n (mn)^{O(1)})$ time algorithms using subset convolution. We complement this result by showing that, under the Set Cover Conjecture, the supplier versions of these problems do not admit an exact algorithm running in time $2^{(1-ε) n} (mn)^{O(1)}$.
summary: In this paper we initiate a systematic study of exact algorithms for well-known clustering problems, namely $k$-Median and $k$-Means. In $k$-Median, the input consists of a set $X$ of $n$ points belonging to a metric space, and the task is to select a subset $C \subseteq X$ of $k$ points as centers, such that the sum of the distances of every point to its nearest center is minimized. In $k$-Means, the objective is to minimize the sum of squares of the distances instead. It is easy to design an algorithm running in time $\max_{k\leq n} {n \choose k} n^{O(1)} = O^*(2^n)$ ($O^*(\cdot)$ notation hides polynomial factors in $n$). We design first non-trivial exact algorithms for these problems. In particular, we obtain an $O^*((1.89)^n)$ time exact algorithm for $k$-Median that works for any value of $k$. Our algorithm is quite general in that it does not use any properties of the underlying (metric) space -- it does not even require the distances to satisfy the triangle inequality. In particular, the same algorithm also works for $k$-Means. We complement this result by showing that the running time of our algorithm is asymptotically optimal, up to the base of the exponent. That is, unless ETH fails, there is no algorithm for these problems running in time $2^{o(n)} \cdot n^{O(1)}$. Finally, we consider the "supplier" versions of these clustering problems, where, in addition to the set $X$ we are additionally given a set of $m$ candidate centers $F$, and objective is to find a subset of $k$ centers from $F$. The goal is still to minimize the $k$-Median/$k$-Means/$k$-Center objective. For these versions we give a $O(2^n (mn)^{O(1)})$ time algorithms using subset convolution. We complement this result by showing that, under the Set Cover Conjecture, the supplier versions of these problems do not admit an exact algorithm running in time $2^{(1-ε) n} (mn)^{O(1)}$.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们启动了对众所周知的聚类问题的精确算法的系统研究，即 $k$-Median 和 $k$-Means。在 $k$-Median 中，输入由属于度量空间的 $n$ 个点的集合 $X$ 组成，任务是选择 $k$ 个点的子集 $C \subseteq X$ 作为中心，使得每个点到其最近中心的距离之和最小。在 $k$-Means 中，目标是最小化距离的平方和。设计一个在 $\max_{k\leq n} {n \choose k} n^{O(1)} = O^*(2^n)$ 时间内运行的算法很容易（$O^*(\cdot)$ 符号隐藏了 $n$ 中的多项式因子）。我们为这些问题设计了第一个不平凡的精确算法。特别是，我们获得了适用于任何 $k$ 值的 $k$-Median 的 $O^*((1.89)^n)$ 时间精确算法。我们的算法非常通用，因为它不使用基础（度量）空间的任何属性 - 它甚至不需要距离来满足三角形不等式。特别是，相同的算法也适用于 $k$-Means。我们通过证明我们的算法的运行时间是渐近最优的来补充这个结果，直到指数的底数。也就是说，除非 ETH 失败，否则没有算法可以在 $2^{o(n)} \cdot n^{O(1)}$ 时间内运行这些问题。最后，我们考虑这些聚类问题的“供应商”版本，其中，除了集合 $X$ 之外，我们还额外给出了一组 $m$ 候选中心 $F$，目标是从 $F$ 中找到 $k$ 中心的子集。目标仍然是最小化 $k$-Median/$k$-Means/$k$-Center 目标。对于这些版本，我们给出使用子集卷积的 $O(2^n (mn)^{O(1)})$ 时间算法。我们通过证明在集合覆盖猜想下，这些问题的供应商版本不承认在时间 $2^{(1-ε) n} (mn)^{O(1)}$ 中运行的精确算法来补充这一结果。

AI.tldr: 本文针对k-Median和k-Means聚类问题，设计了精确的指数时间算法，并分析了其计算复杂性下界。
AI.motivation: 聚类问题是数据挖掘和机器学习的核心任务，但现有精确算法效率低下。需探索更优算法并明确问题的理论极限。
AI.method: 提出通用算法框架无需依赖度量空间性质，结合子集卷积处理供应商版本问题，并基于ETH和集合覆盖猜想证明复杂性下界。
AI.result: 获得O*(1.89^n)时间算法（适用于任意k），证明其指数底数最优性；供应商版本算法复杂度为O(2^n (mn)^{O(1)})，并证得SCC下界。
AI.conclusion: 当前算法在指数底数上达到理论最优，供应商版本问题的复杂性下界在SCC假设下不可突破。

title: Reduced Implication-bias Logic Loss for Neuro-Symbolic Learning
title_zh: 减少神经符号学习的蕴涵偏差逻辑损失
comment: ACML'2023 Journal Track(Accepted by Machine Learning Journal)
comments: ACML'2023 Journal Track(Accepted by Machine Learning Journal)
abstract: Integrating logical reasoning and machine learning by approximating logical inference with differentiable operators is a widely used technique in Neuro-Symbolic systems. However, some differentiable operators could bring a significant bias during backpropagation and degrade the performance of Neuro-Symbolic learning. In this paper, we reveal that this bias, named \textit{Implication Bias} is common in loss functions derived from fuzzy logic operators. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective method to transform the biased loss functions into \textit{Reduced Implication-bias Logic Loss (RILL)} to address the above problem. Empirical study shows that RILL can achieve significant improvements compared with the biased logic loss functions, especially when the knowledge base is incomplete, and keeps more robust than the compared methods when labelled data is insufficient.
summary: Integrating logical reasoning and machine learning by approximating logical inference with differentiable operators is a widely used technique in Neuro-Symbolic systems. However, some differentiable operators could bring a significant bias during backpropagation and degrade the performance of Neuro-Symbolic learning. In this paper, we reveal that this bias, named \textit{Implication Bias} is common in loss functions derived from fuzzy logic operators. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective method to transform the biased loss functions into \textit{Reduced Implication-bias Logic Loss (RILL)} to address the above problem. Empirical study shows that RILL can achieve significant improvements compared with the biased logic loss functions, especially when the knowledge base is incomplete, and keeps more robust than the compared methods when labelled data is insufficient.
abstract_zh: 通过使用可微运算符近似逻辑推理来集成逻辑推理和机器学习是神经符号系统中广泛使用的技术。然而，一些可微算子可能会在反向传播过程中带来显着的偏差，并降低神经符号学习的性能。在本文中，我们揭示了这种名为 \textit{Implication Bias} 的偏差在模糊逻辑算子派生的损失函数中很常见。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，将偏置损失函数转换为 \textit{Reduced Implication-bias Logic Loss (RILL)} 来解决上述问题。实证研究表明，与有偏逻辑损失函数相比，RILL能够取得显着的改进，尤其是在知识库不完整的情况下，并且在标记数据不足时比对比方法保持更鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种减少蕴含偏差的逻辑损失函数（RILL），以解决神经符号学习中因模糊逻辑运算符导致的反向传播偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号系统中，基于模糊逻辑的损失函数在反向传播时会产生显著的蕴含偏差，导致学习性能下降，尤其在知识库不完整或标注数据不足时更为明显。
AI.method: 通过分析模糊逻辑运算符的偏差来源，提出将原始偏差损失函数转换为RILL的方法，降低蕴含偏差对神经符号学习的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，RILL在知识库不完整和标注数据稀缺场景下显著优于传统逻辑损失函数，且保持更高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RILL有效缓解了神经符号学习中的蕴含偏差问题，为不完整知识下的逻辑推理与机器学习结合提供了更优解决方案。

In this paper, we reveal that this bias, named \textit{Implication Bias} is common in loss functions derived from fuzzy logic operators. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective method to transform the biased loss functions into \textit{Reduced Implication-bias Logic Loss (RILL)} to address the above problem. Empirical study shows that RILL can achieve significant improvements compared with the biased logic loss functions, especially when the knowledge base is incomplete, and keeps more robust than the compared methods when labelled data is insufficient. 通过使用可微运算符近似逻辑推理来集成逻辑推理和机器学习是神经符号系统中广泛使用的技术。然而，一些可微算子可能会在反向传播过程中带来显着的偏差，并降低神经符号学习的性能。在本文中，我们揭示了这种名为 \textit{Implication Bias} 的偏差在模糊逻辑算子派生的损失函数中很常见。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，将偏置损失函数转换为 \textit{Reduced Implication-bias Logic Loss (RILL)} 来解决上述问题。实证研究表明，与有偏逻辑损失函数相比，RILL能够取得显着的改进，尤其是在知识库不完整的情况下，并且在标记数据不足时比对比方法保持更鲁棒性。 本文提出一种减少蕴含偏差的逻辑损失函数（RILL），以解决神经符号学习中因模糊逻辑运算符导致的反向传播偏差问题。 Haoyuan He,Wangzhou Dai,Ming Li cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Tianyi Zhang,Youdan Feng,Yunlu Feng,Yu Zhao,Yanli Lei,Nan Ying,Zhiling Yan,Yufang He,Guanglei Zhang
title: Shuffle Instances-based Vision Transformer for Pancreatic Cancer ROSE Image Classification
title_zh: 用于胰腺癌 ROSE 图像分类的基于 Shuffle 实例的视觉转换器
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.03080
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.03080
abstract: The rapid on-site evaluation (ROSE) technique can signifi-cantly accelerate the diagnosis of pancreatic cancer by im-mediately analyzing the fast-stained cytopathological images. Computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) can potentially address the shortage of pathologists in ROSE. However, the cancerous patterns vary significantly between different samples, making the CAD task extremely challenging. Besides, the ROSE images have complicated perturbations regarding color distribution, brightness, and contrast due to different staining qualities and various acquisition device types. To address these challenges, we proposed a shuffle instances-based Vision Transformer (SI-ViT) approach, which can reduce the perturbations and enhance the modeling among the instances. With the regrouped bags of shuffle instances and their bag-level soft labels, the approach utilizes a regression head to make the model focus on the cells rather than various perturbations. Simultaneously, combined with a classification head, the model can effectively identify the general distributive patterns among different instances. The results demonstrate significant improvements in the classification accuracy with more accurate attention regions, indicating that the diverse patterns of ROSE images are effectively extracted, and the complicated perturbations are significantly reduced. It also suggests that the SI-ViT has excellent potential in analyzing cytopathological images. The code and experimental results are available at https://github.com/sagizty/MIL-SI.

abstract_zh: 快速现场评估（ROSE）技术可以通过立即分析快速染色的细胞病理学图像来显着加速胰腺癌的诊断。计算机辅助诊断（CAD）有可能解决 ROSE 病理学家短缺的问题。然而，不同样本之间的癌变模式差异很大，使得 CAD 任务极具挑战性。此外，由于不同的染色质量和不同的采集设备类型，ROSE图像在颜色分布、亮度和对比度方面具有复杂的扰动。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于随机实例的视觉变换器（SI-ViT）方法，该方法可以减少扰动并增强实例之间的建模。通过重新分组的 shuffle 实例包及其包级软标签，该方法利用回归头使模型专注于单元而不是各种扰动。同时，结合分类头，该模型可以有效地识别不同实例之间的一般分布模式。结果表明，注意力区域更准确，分类精度显着提高，表明 ROSE 图像的多样化模式被有效提取，并且复杂的扰动显着减少。它还表明 SI-ViT 在分析细胞病理学图像方面具有出色的潜力。代码和实验结果可在 https://github.com/sagizty/MIL-SI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于洗牌实例的视觉Transformer（SI-ViT）方法，用于解决胰腺癌ROSE图像分类中的样本模式差异和图像扰动问题。
AI.motivation: ROSE图像因染色质量差异和设备类型不同存在复杂扰动，且癌变模式在样本间差异显著，导致计算机辅助诊断（CAD）任务极具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过洗牌实例重组样本袋并结合袋级软标签，利用回归头聚焦细胞特征，同时通过分类头识别实例间的分布模式，以减少扰动影响。
AI.result: 实验表明SI-ViT显著提升了分类准确率，注意力区域更精确，有效提取了ROSE图像的多样化模式并降低了扰动影响。
AI.conclusion: SI-ViT在细胞病理图像分析中展现出巨大潜力，为ROSE技术的CAD系统提供了有效解决方案。

title: Analogical proportions in monounary algebras
title_zh: 一元代数中的类比比例
abstract: This paper studies analogical proportions in monounary algebras consisting only of a universe and a single unary function. We show that the analogical proportion relation is characterized in the infinite monounary algebra formed by the natural numbers together with the successor function via difference proportions.
summary: This paper studies analogical proportions in monounary algebras consisting only of a universe and a single unary function. We show that the analogical proportion relation is characterized in the infinite monounary algebra formed by the natural numbers together with the successor function via difference proportions.
abstract_zh: 本文研究仅由宇宙和单个一元函数组成的一元代数中的类比比例。我们证明了类比比例关系的特征是由自然数与后继函数通过差比例形成的无限一元代数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单元算子代数中的类比比例关系，通过自然数与后继函数构成的无限单元算子代数，利用差分比例对类比比例关系进行表征。
AI.motivation: 类比推理在人工智能和数学中具有重要意义，而单元算子代数作为基础代数结构，其类比比例关系的表征有助于理解更复杂系统的类比机制。
AI.method: 通过分析自然数集合与后继函数构成的无限单元算子代数，结合差分比例理论，对类比比例关系进行形式化刻画。
AI.result: 证明了在自然数与后继函数构成的无限单元算子代数中，类比比例关系可通过差分比例进行完全表征。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为类比推理在代数结构中的形式化分析提供了理论框架，为后续扩展至其他代数系统或应用领域奠定了基础。

authors_text: Ayman Hasib,Saqib Sizan Khan,Jannatul Ferdous Eva,Mst. Nipa Khatun,Ashraful Haque,Nishat Shahrin,Rashik Rahman,Hasan Murad,Md. Rajibul Islam,Molla Rashied Hussein
title: BDSL 49: A Comprehensive Dataset of Bangla Sign Language
title_zh: BDSL 49：孟加拉手语综合数据集
comment: 16 pages; 6 figures; Submitted to Data in Brief, a multidisciplinary, open-access and peer-reviewed journal for reviewing
comments: 16 pages; 6 figures; Submitted to Data in Brief, a multidisciplinary, open-access and peer-reviewed journal for reviewing
abstract: Language is a method by which individuals express their thoughts. Each language has its own set of alphabetic and numeric characters. People can communicate with one another through either oral or written communication. However, each language has a sign language counterpart. Individuals who are deaf and/or mute communicate through sign language. The Bangla language also has a sign language, which is called BDSL. The dataset is about Bangla hand sign images. The collection contains 49 individual Bangla alphabet images in sign language. BDSL49 is a dataset that consists of 29,490 images with 49 labels. Images of 14 different adult individuals, each with a distinct background and appearance, have been recorded during data collection. Several strategies have been used to eliminate noise from datasets during preparation. This dataset is available to researchers for free. They can develop automated systems using machine learning, computer vision, and deep learning techniques. In addition, two models were used in this dataset. The first is for detection, while the second is for recognition.
summary: Language is a method by which individuals express their thoughts. Each language has its own set of alphabetic and numeric characters. The collection contains 49 individual Bangla alphabet images in sign language. BDSL49 is a dataset that consists of 29,490 images with 49 labels. Images of 14 different adult individuals, each with a distinct background and appearance, have been recorded during data collection. The first is for detection, while the second is for recognition.
abstract_zh: 语言是个人表达思想的方式。每种语言都有自己的字母和数字字符集。人们可以通过口头或书面交流来相互交流。然而，每种语言都有对应的手语。聋哑人通过手语进行交流。孟加拉语还有一种手语，称为 BDSL。该数据集是关于孟加拉手势图像的。该集合包含 49 个单独的手语孟加拉字母图像。 BDSL49 是一个由 29,490 张图像和 49 个标签组成的数据集。在数据收集过程中记录了 14 个不同成年人的图像，每个人都有不同的背景和外表。在准备过程中，已使用多种策略来消除数据集中的噪音。该数据集免费提供给研究人员。他们可以使用机器学习、计算机视觉和深度学习技术开发自动化系统。此外，该数据集中使用了两个模型。第一个用于检测，第二个用于识别。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为BDSL49的孟加拉手语数据集，包含49个孟加拉字母的手语图像，共29,490张图片，用于支持机器学习和计算机视觉研究。
AI.motivation: 为了解决孟加拉语聋哑人群体沟通需求，提供标准化的手语数据集以促进相关技术研究和自动化系统开发。
AI.method: 通过采集14位不同背景成年人的手语图像，采用多策略去噪技术构建数据集，并开发了检测与识别两种模型用于示范应用。
AI.result: 成功构建包含49个类别、29,490张图像的数据集，提供免费访问权限，为后续研究提供基础资源。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为孟加拉手语识别技术发展提供了重要资源，可推动手语自动化系统的创新与应用。

ai_content.result: 成功构建包含49个类别、29,490张图像的数据集，提供免费访问权限，为后续研究提供基础资源。

search_text: BDSL 49: A Comprehensive Dataset of Bangla Sign Language BDSL 49：孟加拉手语综合数据集 Language is a method by which individuals express their thoughts. Each language has its own set of alphabetic and numeric characters. People can communicate with one another through either oral or written communication. However, each language has a sign language counterpart. Individuals who are deaf and/or mute communicate through sign language. The Bangla language also has a sign language, which is called BDSL. The dataset is about Bangla hand sign images. The collection contains 49 individual Bangla alphabet images in sign language. BDSL49 is a dataset that consists of 29,490 images with 49 labels. Images of 14 different adult individuals, each with a distinct background and appearance, have been recorded during data collection. Several strategies have been used to eliminate noise from datasets during preparation. This dataset is available to researchers for free. They can develop automated systems using machine learning, computer vision, and deep learning techniques. In addition, two models were used in this dataset. The first is for detection, while the second is for recognition. 语言是个人表达思想的方式。每种语言都有自己的字母和数字字符集。人们可以通过口头或书面交流来相互交流。然而，每种语言都有对应的手语。聋哑人通过手语进行交流。孟加拉语还有一种手语，称为 BDSL。该数据集是关于孟加拉手势图像的。该集合包含 49 个单独的手语孟加拉字母图像。 BDSL49 是一个由 29,490 张图像和 49 个标签组成的数据集。在数据收集过程中记录了 14 个不同成年人的图像，每个人都有不同的背景和外表。在准备过程中，已使用多种策略来消除数据集中的噪音。该数据集免费提供给研究人员。他们可以使用机器学习、计算机视觉和深度学习技术开发自动化系统。此外，该数据集中使用了两个模型。第一个用于检测，第二个用于识别。 本文介绍了一个名为BDSL49的孟加拉手语数据集，包含49个孟加拉字母的手语图像，共29,490张图片，用于支持机器学习和计算机视觉研究。 Ayman Hasib,Saqib Sizan Khan,Jannatul Ferdous Eva,Mst. Nipa Khatun,Ashraful Haque,Nishat Shahrin,Rashik Rahman,Hasan Murad,Md. Rajibul Islam,Molla Rashied Hussein cs.CV

title: Simply Logical -- Intelligent Reasoning by Example (Fully Interactive Online Edition)
title_zh: 简单逻辑——智能推理实例（全互动在线版）
comment: The online edition is available at https://book.simply-logical.space/
comments: The online edition is available at https://book.simply-logical.space/
abstract: "Simply Logical -- Intelligent Reasoning by Example" by Peter Flach was first published by John Wiley in 1994. It could be purchased as book-only or with a 3.5 inch diskette containing the SWI-Prolog programmes printed in the book (for various operating systems). In 2007 the copyright reverted back to the author at which point the book and programmes were made freely available online; the print version is no longer distributed through John Wiley publishers. In 2015, as a pilot, we ported most of the original book into an online, interactive website using SWI-Prolog's SWISH platform. Since then, we launched the Simply Logical open source organisation committed to maintaining a suite of freely available interactive online educational resources about Artificial Intelligence and Logic Programming with Prolog. With the advent of new educational technologies we were inspired to rebuild the book from the ground up using the Jupyter Book platform enhanced with a collection of bespoke plugins that implement, among other things, interactive SWI-Prolog code blocks that can be executed directly in a web browser. This new version is more modular, easier to maintain, and can be split into custom teaching modules, in addition to being modern-looking, visually appealing, and compatible with a range of (mobile) devices of varying screen sizes.
summary: "Simply Logical -- Intelligent Reasoning by Example" by Peter Flach was first published by John Wiley in 1994. It could be purchased as book-only or with a 3.5 inch diskette containing the SWI-Prolog programmes printed in the book (for various operating systems). In 2007 the copyright reverted back to the author at which point the book and programmes were made freely available online; the print version is no longer distributed through John Wiley publishers. In 2015, as a pilot, we ported most of the original book into an online, interactive website using SWI-Prolog's SWISH platform. Since then, we launched the Simply Logical open source organisation committed to maintaining a suite of freely available interactive online educational resources about Artificial Intelligence and Logic Programming with Prolog. With the advent of new educational technologies we were inspired to rebuild the book from the ground up using the Jupyter Book platform enhanced with a collection of bespoke plugins that implement, among other things, interactive SWI-Prolog code blocks that can be executed directly in a web browser. This new version is more modular, easier to maintain, and can be split into custom teaching modules, in addition to being modern-looking, visually appealing, and compatible with a range of (mobile) devices of varying screen sizes.
abstract_zh: Peter Flach 所著的《简单逻辑——智能推理示例》最初由 John Wiley 于 1994 年出版。它可以单独购买，也可以与包含书中印刷的 SWI-Prolog 程序的 3.5 英寸软盘一起购买（适用于各种操作系统）。 2007 年，版权归还给作者，此时该书和程序可以在网上免费获取；印刷版不再通过约翰·威利出版商发行。 2015 年，作为试点，我们使用 SWI-Prolog 的 SWISH 平台将大部分原书移植到在线交互式网站中。从那时起，我们成立了 Simply Logical 开源组织，致力于维护一套关于人工智能和 Prolog 逻辑编程的免费交互式在线教育资源。随着新教育技术的出现，我们受到启发，使用 Jupyter Book 平台从头开始重建这本书，该平台通过一系列定制插件进行了增强，这些插件实现了可直接在 Web 浏览器中执行的交互式 SWI-Prolog 代码块。这个新版本更加模块化，更易于维护，并且可以分为自定义教学模块，此外还具有现代外观、视觉吸引力并与一系列不同屏幕尺寸的（移动）设备兼容。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了将《Simply Logical》一书转化为基于Jupyter Book平台的交互式在线教育资源的方法与实践。
AI.motivation: 为提升人工智能与逻辑编程教育的互动性与可访问性，作者基于原书内容进行现代化重构，以适应新型教育技术需求。
AI.method: 采用Jupyter Book平台结合定制插件，实现SWI-Prolog代码块的浏览器内直接执行，并重构为模块化、响应式设计的在线教材。
AI.result: 成功构建了模块化、跨设备兼容的交互式在线教育系统，作为开源组织持续维护的AI与Prolog教学资源库。
AI.conclusion: 通过现代技术重构经典教材，显著提升了逻辑编程教育的互动性与可扩展性，为AI教育提供可复用的开源范式。
