authors_text: Wenyuan Zhang,Ruofan Xing,Yunfan Zeng,Yu-Shen Liu,Kanle Shi,Zhizhong Han
title: Fast Learning Radiance Fields by Shooting Much Fewer Rays
title_zh: 通过发射更少的光线来快速学习辐射场
comment: Accepted by lEEE Transactions on lmage Processing 2023. Project Page: https://zparquet.github.io/Fast-Learning . Code: https://github.com/zParquet/Fast-Learning
comments: Accepted by lEEE Transactions on lmage Processing 2023. Project Page: https://zparquet.github.io/Fast-Learning . Code: https://github.com/zParquet/Fast-Learning
abstract: Learning radiance fields has shown remarkable results for novel view synthesis. The learning procedure usually costs lots of time, which motivates the latest methods to speed up the learning procedure by learning without neural networks or using more efficient data structures. However, these specially designed approaches do not work for most of radiance fields based methods. To resolve this issue, we introduce a general strategy to speed up the learning procedure for almost all radiance fields based methods. Our key idea is to reduce the redundancy by shooting much fewer rays in the multi-view volume rendering procedure which is the base for almost all radiance fields based methods. We find that shooting rays at pixels with dramatic color change not only significantly reduces the training burden but also barely affects the accuracy of the learned radiance fields. In addition, we also adaptively subdivide each view into a quadtree according to the average rendering error in each node in the tree, which makes us dynamically shoot more rays in more complex regions with larger rendering error. We evaluate our method with different radiance fields based methods under the widely used benchmarks. Experimental results show that our method achieves comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art with much faster training.
summary: Learning radiance fields has shown remarkable results for novel view synthesis. The learning procedure usually costs lots of time, which motivates the latest methods to speed up the learning procedure by learning without neural networks or using more efficient data structures. However, these specially designed approaches do not work for most of radiance fields based methods. To resolve this issue, we introduce a general strategy to speed up the learning procedure for almost all radiance fields based methods. Our key idea is to reduce the redundancy by shooting much fewer rays in the multi-view volume rendering procedure which is the base for almost all radiance fields based methods. We find that shooting rays at pixels with dramatic color change not only significantly reduces the training burden but also barely affects the accuracy of the learned radiance fields. In addition, we also adaptively subdivide each view into a quadtree according to the average rendering error in each node in the tree, which makes us dynamically shoot more rays in more complex regions with larger rendering error. We evaluate our method with different radiance fields based methods under the widely used benchmarks. Experimental results show that our method achieves comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art with much faster training.
abstract_zh: 学习辐射场在新颖的视图合成方面取得了显着的成果。学习过程通常需要花费大量时间，这激发了最新的方法通过不使用神经网络进行学习或使用更有效的数据结构来加速学习过程。然而，这些专门设计的方法不适用于大多数基于辐射场的方法。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种通用策略来加速几乎所有基于辐射场的方法的学习过程。我们的关键思想是通过在多视图体渲染过程中发射更少的光线来减少冗余，这是几乎所有基于辐射场的方法的基础。我们发现，向颜色变化剧烈的像素发射光线不仅可以显着减轻训练负担，而且几乎不会影响学习的辐射场的准确性。此外，我们还根据树中每个节点的平均渲染误差自适应地将每个视图细分为四叉树，这使得我们可以在渲染误差较大的更复杂区域动态地拍摄更多光线。我们在广泛使用的基准下使用基于不同辐射场的方法来评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法通过更快的训练实现了与最先进的方法相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用策略，通过减少光线数量加速基于辐射场的方法训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有加速方法对多数辐射场技术无效，且传统训练过程耗时过长。
AI.method: 在多视角体渲染中减少冗余光线，优先在颜色突变像素采样，并通过四叉树动态细分复杂区域。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中实现与最先进方法相当的精度，训练速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为各类辐射场方法提供了高效通用的训练加速方案。

In addition, we also adaptively subdivide each view into a quadtree according to the average rendering error in each node in the tree, which makes us dynamically shoot more rays in more complex regions with larger rendering error. We evaluate our method with different radiance fields based methods under the widely used benchmarks. Experimental results show that our method achieves comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art with much faster training. 学习辐射场在新颖的视图合成方面取得了显着的成果。学习过程通常需要花费大量时间，这激发了最新的方法通过不使用神经网络进行学习或使用更有效的数据结构来加速学习过程。然而，这些专门设计的方法不适用于大多数基于辐射场的方法。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种通用策略来加速几乎所有基于辐射场的方法的学习过程。我们的关键思想是通过在多视图体渲染过程中发射更少的光线来减少冗余，这是几乎所有基于辐射场的方法的基础。我们发现，向颜色变化剧烈的像素发射光线不仅可以显着减轻训练负担，而且几乎不会影响学习的辐射场的准确性。此外，我们还根据树中每个节点的平均渲染误差自适应地将每个视图细分为四叉树，这使得我们可以在渲染误差较大的更复杂区域动态地拍摄更多光线。我们在广泛使用的基准下使用基于不同辐射场的方法来评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法通过更快的训练实现了与最先进的方法相当的精度。 本文提出一种通用策略，通过减少光线数量加速基于辐射场的方法训练过程。 Wenyuan Zhang,Ruofan Xing,Yunfan Zeng,Yu-Shen Liu,Kanle Shi,Zhizhong Han cs.CV

authors_text: Zhichao Lu,Ran Cheng,Shihua Huang,Haoming Zhang,Changxiao Qiu,Fan Yang
title: Surrogate-assisted Multi-objective Neural Architecture Search for Real-time Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于实时语义分割的代理辅助多目标神经架构搜索
abstract: The architectural advancements in deep neural networks have led to remarkable leap-forwards across a broad array of computer vision tasks. Instead of relying on human expertise, neural architecture search (NAS) has emerged as a promising avenue toward automating the design of architectures. While recent achievements in image classification have suggested opportunities, the promises of NAS have yet to be thoroughly assessed on more challenging tasks of semantic segmentation. The main challenges of applying NAS to semantic segmentation arise from two aspects: (i) high-resolution images to be processed; (ii) additional requirement of real-time inference speed (i.e., real-time semantic segmentation) for applications such as autonomous driving. To meet such challenges, we propose a surrogate-assisted multi-objective method in this paper. Through a series of customized prediction models, our method effectively transforms the original NAS task into an ordinary multi-objective optimization problem. Followed by a hierarchical pre-screening criterion for in-fill selection, our method progressively achieves a set of efficient architectures trading-off between segmentation accuracy and inference speed. Empirical evaluations on three benchmark datasets together with an application using Huawei Atlas 200 DK suggest that our method can identify architectures significantly outperforming existing state-of-the-art architectures designed both manually by human experts and automatically by other NAS methods.
summary: The architectural advancements in deep neural networks have led to remarkable leap-forwards across a broad array of computer vision tasks. Instead of relying on human expertise, neural architecture search (NAS) has emerged as a promising avenue toward automating the design of architectures. While recent achievements in image classification have suggested opportunities, the promises of NAS have yet to be thoroughly assessed on more challenging tasks of semantic segmentation. The main challenges of applying NAS to semantic segmentation arise from two aspects: (i) high-resolution images to be processed; (ii) additional requirement of real-time inference speed (i.e., real-time semantic segmentation) for applications such as autonomous driving. To meet such challenges, we propose a surrogate-assisted multi-objective method in this paper. Through a series of customized prediction models, our method effectively transforms the original NAS task into an ordinary multi-objective optimization problem. Followed by a hierarchical pre-screening criterion for in-fill selection, our method progressively achieves a set of efficient architectures trading-off between segmentation accuracy and inference speed. Empirical evaluations on three benchmark datasets together with an application using Huawei Atlas 200 DK suggest that our method can identify architectures significantly outperforming existing state-of-the-art architectures designed both manually by human experts and automatically by other NAS methods.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的架构进步导致了广泛的计算机视觉任务的显着飞跃。神经架构搜索（NAS）不再依赖人类的专业知识，而是成为自动化架构设计的一条有前途的途径。虽然最近在图像分类方面取得的成就带来了机遇，但 NAS 在更具挑战性的语义分割任务上的前景尚未得到彻底评估。将NAS应用于语义分割的主要挑战来自两个方面：（i）需要处理的高分辨率图像； (ii) 自动驾驶等应用对实时推理速度（即实时语义分割）的额外要求。为了应对这些挑战，我们在本文中提出了一种代理辅助多目标方法。通过一系列定制的预测模型，我们的方法有效地将原始NAS任务转化为普通的多目标优化问题。接下来是用于填充选择的分层预筛选标准，我们的方法逐步实现了一组在分割精度和推理速度之间进行权衡的有效架构。对三个基准数据集以及使用华为 Atlas 200 DK 的应用程序的实证评估表明，我们的方法可以识别明显优于由人类专家手动设计和其他 NAS 方法自动设计的现有最先进架构的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理模型的多目标神经网络架构搜索方法，用于实时语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经架构搜索（NAS）在图像分类中取得进展，但其在需要高分辨率处理和实时推理速度的语义分割任务中尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 通过定制化预测模型将NAS转化为多目标优化问题，并结合分层预筛选准则进行填充选择，逐步生成兼顾分割精度与推理速度的高效架构。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集和华为Atlas 200 DK应用中的实验表明，该方法找到的架构显著优于人工设计和现有NAS方法的最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了语义分割的精度与实时性需求，为复杂场景下的架构搜索提供了新思路。

Instead of relying on human expertise, neural architecture search (NAS) has emerged as a promising avenue toward automating the design of architectures. While recent achievements in image classification have suggested opportunities, the promises of NAS have yet to be thoroughly assessed on more challenging tasks of semantic segmentation. The main challenges of applying NAS to semantic segmentation arise from two aspects: (i) high-resolution images to be processed; (ii) additional requirement of real-time inference speed (i.e., real-time semantic segmentation) for applications such as autonomous driving. To meet such challenges, we propose a surrogate-assisted multi-objective method in this paper. Through a series of customized prediction models, our method effectively transforms the original NAS task into an ordinary multi-objective optimization problem. Followed by a hierarchical pre-screening criterion for in-fill selection, our method progressively achieves a set of efficient architectures trading-off between segmentation accuracy and inference speed. Empirical evaluations on three benchmark datasets together with an application using Huawei Atlas 200 DK suggest that our method can identify architectures significantly outperforming existing state-of-the-art architectures designed both manually by human experts and automatically by other NAS methods. 深度神经网络的架构进步导致了广泛的计算机视觉任务的显着飞跃。神经架构搜索（NAS）不再依赖人类的专业知识，而是成为自动化架构设计的一条有前途的途径。虽然最近在图像分类方面取得的成就带来了机遇，但 NAS 在更具挑战性的语义分割任务上的前景尚未得到彻底评估。将NAS应用于语义分割的主要挑战来自两个方面：（i）需要处理的高分辨率图像； (ii) 自动驾驶等应用对实时推理速度（即实时语义分割）的额外要求。为了应对这些挑战，我们在本文中提出了一种代理辅助多目标方法。通过一系列定制的预测模型，我们的方法有效地将原始NAS任务转化为普通的多目标优化问题。接下来是用于填充选择的分层预筛选标准，我们的方法逐步实现了一组在分割精度和推理速度之间进行权衡的有效架构。对三个基准数据集以及使用华为 Atlas 200 DK 的应用程序的实证评估表明，我们的方法可以识别明显优于由人类专家手动设计和其他 NAS 方法自动设计的现有最先进架构的架构。 本文提出一种基于代理模型的多目标神经网络架构搜索方法，用于实时语义分割任务。 Zhichao Lu,Ran Cheng,Shihua Huang,Haoming Zhang,Changxiao Qiu,Fan Yang cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Changhong Fu,Haolin Dong,Junjie Ye,Guangze Zheng,Sihang Li,Jilin Zhao
title: HighlightNet: Highlighting Low-Light Potential Features for Real-Time UAV Tracking
title_zh: HighlightNet：突出实时无人机跟踪的弱光潜在功能
abstract: Low-light environments have posed a formidable challenge for robust unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) tracking even with state-of-the-art (SOTA) trackers since the potential image features are hard to extract under adverse light conditions. Besides, due to the low visibility, accurate online selection of the object also becomes extremely difficult for human monitors to initialize UAV tracking in ground control stations. To solve these problems, this work proposes a novel enhancer, i.e., HighlightNet, to light up potential objects for both human operators and UAV trackers. By employing Transformer, HighlightNet can adjust enhancement parameters according to global features and is thus adaptive for the illumination variation. Pixel-level range mask is introduced to make HighlightNet more focused on the enhancement of the tracking object and regions without light sources. Furthermore, a soft truncation mechanism is built to prevent background noise from being mistaken for crucial features. Evaluations on image enhancement benchmarks demonstrate HighlightNet has advantages in facilitating human perception. Experiments on the public UAVDark135 benchmark show that HightlightNet is more suitable for UAV tracking tasks than other SOTA low-light enhancers. In addition, real-world tests on a typical UAV platform verify HightlightNet's practicability and efficiency in nighttime aerial tracking-related applications. The code and demo videos are available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/HighlightNet.
summary: Low-light environments have posed a formidable challenge for robust unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) tracking even with state-of-the-art (SOTA) trackers since the potential image features are hard to extract under adverse light conditions. Besides, due to the low visibility, accurate online selection of the object also becomes extremely difficult for human monitors to initialize UAV tracking in ground control stations. To solve these problems, this work proposes a novel enhancer, i.e., HighlightNet, to light up potential objects for both human operators and UAV trackers. By employing Transformer, HighlightNet can adjust enhancement parameters according to global features and is thus adaptive for the illumination variation. Pixel-level range mask is introduced to make HighlightNet more focused on the enhancement of the tracking object and regions without light sources. Furthermore, a soft truncation mechanism is built to prevent background noise from being mistaken for crucial features. Evaluations on image enhancement benchmarks demonstrate HighlightNet has advantages in facilitating human perception. Experiments on the public UAVDark135 benchmark show that HightlightNet is more suitable for UAV tracking tasks than other SOTA low-light enhancers. In addition, real-world tests on a typical UAV platform verify HightlightNet's practicability and efficiency in nighttime aerial tracking-related applications. The code and demo videos are available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/HighlightNet.
abstract_zh: 即使使用最先进的 (SOTA) 跟踪器，低光环境也对强大的无人机 (UAV) 跟踪提出了巨大的挑战，因为在不利的光照条件下很难提取潜在的图像特征。此外，由于能见度较低，监测人员在地面控制站初始化无人机跟踪时，准确在线选择目标也变得极其困难。为了解决这些问题，这项工作提出了一种新颖的增强器，即HighlightNet，为人类操作员和无人机跟踪器照亮潜在的物体。通过使用 Transformer，HighlightNet 可以根据全局特征调整增强参数，从而自适应光照变化。引入像素级范围掩模是为了使HighlightNet更加专注于跟踪对象和无光源区域的增强。此外，还建立了软截断机制，以防止背景噪声被误认为关键特征。对图像增强基准的评估表明，HighlightNet 在促进人类感知方面具有优势。在公共 UAVDark135 基准测试上的实验表明，HightlightNet 比其他 SOTA 低光增强器更适合无人机跟踪任务。此外，在典型无人机平台上的实际测试验证了HightlightNet在夜间空中跟踪相关应用中的实用性和效率。代码和演示视频可在 https://github.com/vision4robotics/HighlightNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HighlightNet，一种用于增强无人机在低光环境下的实时跟踪性能的图像增强网络。
AI.motivation: 低光环境下无人机跟踪面临图像特征提取困难和人工初始化困难的问题，现有增强方法难以适应光照变化且易引入噪声。
AI.method: 基于Transformer设计自适应增强网络，结合像素级范围掩码聚焦目标区域，并引入软截断机制抑制背景噪声。
AI.result: 在UAVDark135基准测试中优于其他SOTA低光增强器，实际无人机平台测试验证了其夜间跟踪的实用性与效率。
AI.conclusion: HighlightNet通过全局特征自适应增强和区域聚焦机制，有效提升了低光环境下无人机跟踪的鲁棒性与实用性。

title: Remote Photoplethysmography from Low Resolution videos: An end-to-end solution using Efficient ConvNets
title_zh: 低分辨率视频的远程光电体积描记法：使用高效卷积网络的端到端解决方案

abstract: Measurement of the cardiac pulse from facial video has become an interesting pursuit of research over the last few years. This is mainly due to the increasing importance of obtaining the heart rate of an individual in a non-invasive manner, which can be highly useful for applications in gaming and the medical industry. Another instrumental area of research over the past few years has been the advent of Deep Learning and using Deep Neural networks to enhance task performance. In this work, we propose to use efficient convolutional networks to accurately measure the heart rate of user from low resolution facial videos. Furthermore, to ensure that we are able to obtain the heart rate in real time, we compress the deep learning model by pruning it, thereby reducing its memory footprint. We benchmark the performance of our approach on the MAHNOB dataset and compare its performance across multiple approaches.

Another instrumental area of research over the past few years has been the advent of Deep Learning and using Deep Neural networks to enhance task performance. In this work, we propose to use efficient convolutional networks to accurately measure the heart rate of user from low resolution facial videos. Furthermore, to ensure that we are able to obtain the heart rate in real time, we compress the deep learning model by pruning it, thereby reducing its memory footprint. We benchmark the performance of our approach on the MAHNOB dataset and compare its performance across multiple approaches.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，通过面部视频测量心脏脉冲已成为一项有趣的研究。这主要是因为以非侵入方式获取个人心率变得越来越重要，这对于游戏和医疗行业的应用非常有用。过去几年的另一个重要研究领域是深度学习的出现和使用深度神经网络来提高任务性能。在这项工作中，我们建议使用高效的卷积网络从低分辨率面部视频中准确测量用户的心率。此外，为了确保我们能够实时获取心率，我们通过剪枝来压缩深度学习模型，从而减少其内存占用。我们在 MAHNOB 数据集上对我们的方法的性能进行基准测试，并比较多种方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高效卷积网络的端到端方法，用于从低分辨率视频中远程测量心率。
AI.motivation: 随着非侵入式心率监测在医疗和游戏领域的重要性增加，以及深度学习技术的进步，研究如何高效准确地从低分辨率视频中提取心率信息变得尤为重要。
AI.method: 采用高效卷积神经网络（ConvNets）进行端到端建模，并通过模型剪枝技术压缩模型，降低内存占用，确保实时性。
AI.result: 在MAHNOB数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在多种对比方法中表现优异，能够准确提取心率信号。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了高效卷积网络在低分辨率视频心率监测中的有效性，为实时远程健康监测提供了可行的解决方案。

title: An Improved Greedy Algorithm for Stochastic Online Scheduling on Unrelated Machines
title_zh: 不相关机器随机在线调度的改进贪心算法
abstract: Most practical scheduling applications involve some uncertainty about the arriving times and lengths of the jobs. Stochastic online scheduling is a well-established model capturing this. Here the arrivals occur online, while the processing times are random. For this model, Gupta, Moseley, Uetz, and Xie recently devised an efficient policy for non-preemptive scheduling on unrelated machines with the objective to minimize the expected total weighted completion time. We improve upon this policy by adroitly combining greedy job assignment with $α_j$-point scheduling on each machine. In this way we obtain a $(3+\sqrt 5)(2+Δ)$-competitive deterministic and an $(8+4Δ)$-competitive randomized stochastic online scheduling policy, where $Δ$ is an upper bound on the squared coefficients of variation of the processing times. We also give constant performance guarantees for these policies within the class of all fixed-assignment policies. The $α_j$-point scheduling on a single machine can be enhanced when the upper bound $Δ$ is known a priori or the processing times are known to be $δ$-NBUE for some $δ\ge 1$. This implies improved competitive ratios for unrelated machines but may also be of independent interest.
summary: Most practical scheduling applications involve some uncertainty about the arriving times and lengths of the jobs. Stochastic online scheduling is a well-established model capturing this. Here the arrivals occur online, while the processing times are random. For this model, Gupta, Moseley, Uetz, and Xie recently devised an efficient policy for non-preemptive scheduling on unrelated machines with the objective to minimize the expected total weighted completion time. We improve upon this policy by adroitly combining greedy job assignment with $α_j$-point scheduling on each machine. In this way we obtain a $(3+\sqrt 5)(2+Δ)$-competitive deterministic and an $(8+4Δ)$-competitive randomized stochastic online scheduling policy, where $Δ$ is an upper bound on the squared coefficients of variation of the processing times. We also give constant performance guarantees for these policies within the class of all fixed-assignment policies. The $α_j$-point scheduling on a single machine can be enhanced when the upper bound $Δ$ is known a priori or the processing times are known to be $δ$-NBUE for some $δ\ge 1$. This implies improved competitive ratios for unrelated machines but may also be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 大多数实际的调度应用都涉及作业到达时间和长度的一些不确定性。随机在线调度是一个成熟的模型，它抓住了这一点。这里的到达是在线进行的，而处理时间是随机的。对于这个模型，Gupta、Moseley、Uetz 和 Xie 最近设计了一种在不相关机器上进行非抢占式调度的有效策略，其目标是最小化预期总加权完成时间。我们通过巧妙地将贪婪作业分配与每台机器上的 $α_j$ 点调度相结合来改进该策略。通过这种方式，我们获得了$(3+\sqrt 5)(2+Δ)$-竞争性确定性和$(8+4Δ)$-竞争性随机随机在线调度策略，其中$Δ$是处理时间变异系数平方的上限。我们还为所有固定分配保单类别中的这些保单提供持续的绩效保证。当先验已知上限 $Δ$ 或已知某些 $δ\ge 1$ 的处理时间为 $δ$-NBUE 时，可以增强单台机器上的 $α_j$ 点调度。这意味着不相关机器的竞争比得到提高，但也可能具有独立的利益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的贪心算法，用于处理无关机器上的随机在线调度问题，通过结合贪心任务分配与α_j-点调度策略，提升调度效率。
AI.motivation: 实际调度场景中任务到达时间和处理时间存在不确定性，现有算法在处理此类随机性时性能有限，需改进以应对更复杂的实际需求。
AI.method: 将贪心任务分配与单机α_j-点调度结合，在已知Δ上界或处理时间满足δ-NBUE分布时优化α_j-点调度策略，从而提升算法性能。
AI.result: 提出了一种(3+√5)(2+Δ)-竞争比的确定性策略和(8+4Δ)-竞争比的随机化策略，并在固定分配策略类中提供了常数性能保证。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的算法在理论竞争比和实际适用性上均优于现有方法，且α_j-点调度的优化具有独立研究价值。

search_text: An Improved Greedy Algorithm for Stochastic Online Scheduling on Unrelated Machines 不相关机器随机在线调度的改进贪心算法 Most practical scheduling applications involve some uncertainty about the arriving times and lengths of the jobs. Stochastic online scheduling is a well-established model capturing this. Here the arrivals occur online, while the processing times are random. For this model, Gupta, Moseley, Uetz, and Xie recently devised an efficient policy for non-preemptive scheduling on unrelated machines with the objective to minimize the expected total weighted completion time. We improve upon this policy by adroitly combining greedy job assignment with $α_j$-point scheduling on each machine. In this way we obtain a $(3+\sqrt 5)(2+Δ)$-competitive deterministic and an $(8+4Δ)$-competitive randomized stochastic online scheduling policy, where $Δ$ is an upper bound on the squared coefficients of variation of the processing times. We also give constant performance guarantees for these policies within the class of all fixed-assignment policies. The $α_j$-point scheduling on a single machine can be enhanced when the upper bound $Δ$ is known a priori or the processing times are known to be $δ$-NBUE for some $δ\ge 1$. This implies improved competitive ratios for unrelated machines but may also be of independent interest. 大多数实际的调度应用都涉及作业到达时间和长度的一些不确定性。随机在线调度是一个成熟的模型，它抓住了这一点。这里的到达是在线进行的，而处理时间是随机的。对于这个模型，Gupta、Moseley、Uetz 和 Xie 最近设计了一种在不相关机器上进行非抢占式调度的有效策略，其目标是最小化预期总加权完成时间。我们通过巧妙地将贪婪作业分配与每台机器上的 $α_j$ 点调度相结合来改进该策略。通过这种方式，我们获得了$(3+\sqrt 5)(2+Δ)$-竞争性确定性和$(8+4Δ)$-竞争性随机随机在线调度策略，其中$Δ$是处理时间变异系数平方的上限。我们还为所有固定分配保单类别中的这些保单提供持续的绩效保证。当先验已知上限 $Δ$ 或已知某些 $δ\ge 1$ 的处理时间为 $δ$-NBUE 时，可以增强单台机器上的 $α_j$ 点调度。这意味着不相关机器的竞争比得到提高，但也可能具有独立的利益。 本文提出了一种改进的贪心算法，用于处理无关机器上的随机在线调度问题，通过结合贪心任务分配与α_j-点调度策略，提升调度效率。 Sven Jäger cs.DS

authors_text: Dasith de Silva Edirimuni,Xuequan Lu,Gang Li,Antonio Robles-Kelly
title: Contrastive Learning for Joint Normal Estimation and Point Cloud Filtering
title_zh: 联合法线估计和点云过滤的对比学习
comment: This paper has been accepted to the IEEE TVCG journal. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF
comments: This paper has been accepted to the IEEE TVCG journal. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF
abstract: Point cloud filtering and normal estimation are two fundamental research problems in the 3D field. Existing methods usually perform normal estimation and filtering separately and often show sensitivity to noise and/or inability to preserve sharp geometric features such as corners and edges. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning method to jointly estimate normals and filter point clouds. We first introduce a 3D patch based contrastive learning framework, with noise corruption as an augmentation, to train a feature encoder capable of generating faithful representations of point cloud patches while remaining robust to noise. These representations are consumed by a simple regression network and supervised by a novel joint loss, simultaneously estimating point normals and displacements that are used to filter the patch centers. Experimental results show that our method well supports the two tasks simultaneously and preserves sharp features and fine details. It generally outperforms state-of-the-art techniques on both tasks. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF.
summary: Point cloud filtering and normal estimation are two fundamental research problems in the 3D field. Existing methods usually perform normal estimation and filtering separately and often show sensitivity to noise and/or inability to preserve sharp geometric features such as corners and edges. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning method to jointly estimate normals and filter point clouds. We first introduce a 3D patch based contrastive learning framework, with noise corruption as an augmentation, to train a feature encoder capable of generating faithful representations of point cloud patches while remaining robust to noise. These representations are consumed by a simple regression network and supervised by a novel joint loss, simultaneously estimating point normals and displacements that are used to filter the patch centers. Experimental results show that our method well supports the two tasks simultaneously and preserves sharp features and fine details. It generally outperforms state-of-the-art techniques on both tasks. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF.
abstract_zh: 点云过滤和法线估计是3D领域的两个基本研究问题。现有方法通常单独执行法线估计和滤波，并且通常表现出对噪声的敏感性和/或无法保留尖锐的几何特征，例如角和边缘。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法来联合估计法线和过滤点云。我们首先引入基于 3D 补丁的对比学习框架，以噪声损坏作为增强，来训练能够生成点云补丁的忠实表示的特征编码器，同时保持对噪声的鲁棒性。这些表示由简单的回归网络消耗，并由新颖的联合损失监督，同时估计用于过滤补丁中心的点法线和位移。实验结果表明，我们的方法很好地同时支持这两个任务，并保留了清晰的特征和精细的细节。它在这两项任务上通常都优于最先进的技术。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的联合方法，同时进行点云法线估计与滤波。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将法线估计与滤波分开处理，存在对噪声敏感及无法保留尖锐几何特征（如边缘、角落）的问题。
AI.method: 设计3D块对比学习框架，通过噪声增强训练特征编码器；利用回归网络与新型联合损失函数，同步估计法线及用于滤波的位移量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持尖锐特征与细节的同时，两项任务均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的联合学习框架有效解决了点云处理中的噪声鲁棒性与几何特征保留难题，代码已开源。

search_text: Contrastive Learning for Joint Normal Estimation and Point Cloud Filtering 联合法线估计和点云过滤的对比学习 Point cloud filtering and normal estimation are two fundamental research problems in the 3D field. Existing methods usually perform normal estimation and filtering separately and often show sensitivity to noise and/or inability to preserve sharp geometric features such as corners and edges. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning method to jointly estimate normals and filter point clouds. We first introduce a 3D patch based contrastive learning framework, with noise corruption as an augmentation, to train a feature encoder capable of generating faithful representations of point cloud patches while remaining robust to noise. These representations are consumed by a simple regression network and supervised by a novel joint loss, simultaneously estimating point normals and displacements that are used to filter the patch centers. Experimental results show that our method well supports the two tasks simultaneously and preserves sharp features and fine details. It generally outperforms state-of-the-art techniques on both tasks. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF. 点云过滤和法线估计是3D领域的两个基本研究问题。现有方法通常单独执行法线估计和滤波，并且通常表现出对噪声的敏感性和/或无法保留尖锐的几何特征，例如角和边缘。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法来联合估计法线和过滤点云。我们首先引入基于 3D 补丁的对比学习框架，以噪声损坏作为增强，来训练能够生成点云补丁的忠实表示的特征编码器，同时保持对噪声的鲁棒性。这些表示由简单的回归网络消耗，并由新颖的联合损失监督，同时估计用于过滤补丁中心的点法线和位移。实验结果表明，我们的方法很好地同时支持这两个任务，并保留了清晰的特征和精细的细节。它在这两项任务上通常都优于最先进的技术。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/ddsediri/CLJNEPCF 获取。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的联合方法，同时进行点云法线估计与滤波。 Dasith de Silva Edirimuni,Xuequan Lu,Gang Li,Antonio Robles-Kelly cs.CV

authors_text: Piyapat Saranrittichai,Chaithanya Kumar Mummadi,Claudia Blaiotta,Mauricio Munoz,Volker Fischer
title: Multi-Attribute Open Set Recognition
title_zh: 多属性开集识别
comment: Accepted for publication at German Conference for Pattern Recognition (GCPR) 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at German Conference for Pattern Recognition (GCPR) 2022
abstract: Open Set Recognition (OSR) extends image classification to an open-world setting, by simultaneously classifying known classes and identifying unknown ones. While conventional OSR approaches can detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples, they cannot provide explanations indicating which underlying visual attribute(s) (e.g., shape, color or background) cause a specific sample to be unknown. In this work, we introduce a novel problem setup that generalizes conventional OSR to a multi-attribute setting, where multiple visual attributes are simultaneously recognized. Here, OOD samples can be not only identified but also categorized by their unknown attribute(s). We propose simple extensions of common OSR baselines to handle this novel scenario. We show that these baselines are vulnerable to shortcuts when spurious correlations exist in the training dataset. This leads to poor OOD performance which, according to our experiments, is mainly due to unintended cross-attribute correlations of the predicted confidence scores. We provide an empirical evidence showing that this behavior is consistent across different baselines on both synthetic and real world datasets.
summary: Open Set Recognition (OSR) extends image classification to an open-world setting, by simultaneously classifying known classes and identifying unknown ones. While conventional OSR approaches can detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples, they cannot provide explanations indicating which underlying visual attribute(s) (e.g., shape, color or background) cause a specific sample to be unknown. In this work, we introduce a novel problem setup that generalizes conventional OSR to a multi-attribute setting, where multiple visual attributes are simultaneously recognized. Here, OOD samples can be not only identified but also categorized by their unknown attribute(s). We propose simple extensions of common OSR baselines to handle this novel scenario. We show that these baselines are vulnerable to shortcuts when spurious correlations exist in the training dataset. This leads to poor OOD performance which, according to our experiments, is mainly due to unintended cross-attribute correlations of the predicted confidence scores. We provide an empirical evidence showing that this behavior is consistent across different baselines on both synthetic and real world datasets.
abstract_zh: 开放集识别 (OSR) 通过同时对已知类进行分类并识别未知类，将图像分类扩展到开放世界环境。虽然传统的 OSR 方法可以检测分布外 (OOD) 样本，但它们无法提供说明哪些底层视觉属性（例如形状、颜色或背景）导致特定样本未知。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的问题设置，将传统的 OSR 推广到多属性设置，其中同时识别多个视觉属性。在这里，OOD 样本不仅可以被识别，还可以根据其未知属性进行分类。我们提出了常见 OSR 基线的简单扩展来处理这种新场景。我们表明，当训练数据集中存在虚假相关性时，这些基线很容易受到捷径的影响。这会导致 OOD 性能不佳，根据我们的实验，这主要是由于预测置信度分数的意外跨属性相关性造成的。我们提供的经验证据表明，这种行为在合成数据集和现实世界数据集的不同基线上是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多属性开放集识别问题，同时识别已知类别和未知样本的属性，并分析现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统开放集识别无法解释样本未知的具体属性，需扩展至多属性场景以提供更细粒度的未知原因分析。
AI.method: 对常见OSR基线进行简单扩展，但发现其在存在虚假相关性时易产生跨属性置信度关联导致性能下降。
AI.result: 实验表明，基线方法在合成与真实数据集上均因预测置信度的跨属性相关性出现较差的未知样本识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 需设计新方法消除跨属性置信度关联，以提升多属性开放集识别的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zhiliang Wu,Hanyu Xuan,Changchang Sun,Kang Zhang,Yan Yan
title: Semi-Supervised Video Inpainting with Cycle Consistency Constraints
title_zh: 具有循环一致性约束的半监督视频修复
abstract: Deep learning-based video inpainting has yielded promising results and gained increasing attention from researchers. Generally, these methods usually assume that the corrupted region masks of each frame are known and easily obtained. However, the annotation of these masks are labor-intensive and expensive, which limits the practical application of current methods. Therefore, we expect to relax this assumption by defining a new semi-supervised inpainting setting, making the networks have the ability of completing the corrupted regions of the whole video using the annotated mask of only one frame. Specifically, in this work, we propose an end-to-end trainable framework consisting of completion network and mask prediction network, which are designed to generate corrupted contents of the current frame using the known mask and decide the regions to be filled of the next frame, respectively. Besides, we introduce a cycle consistency loss to regularize the training parameters of these two networks. In this way, the completion network and the mask prediction network can constrain each other, and hence the overall performance of the trained model can be maximized. Furthermore, due to the natural existence of prior knowledge (e.g., corrupted contents and clear borders), current video inpainting datasets are not suitable in the context of semi-supervised video inpainting. Thus, we create a new dataset by simulating the corrupted video of real-world scenarios. Extensive experimental results are reported to demonstrate the superiority of our model in the video inpainting task. Remarkably, although our model is trained in a semi-supervised manner, it can achieve comparable performance as fully-supervised methods.
summary: Deep learning-based video inpainting has yielded promising results and gained increasing attention from researchers. Generally, these methods usually assume that the corrupted region masks of each frame are known and easily obtained. However, the annotation of these masks are labor-intensive and expensive, which limits the practical application of current methods. Therefore, we expect to relax this assumption by defining a new semi-supervised inpainting setting, making the networks have the ability of completing the corrupted regions of the whole video using the annotated mask of only one frame. Specifically, in this work, we propose an end-to-end trainable framework consisting of completion network and mask prediction network, which are designed to generate corrupted contents of the current frame using the known mask and decide the regions to be filled of the next frame, respectively. Besides, we introduce a cycle consistency loss to regularize the training parameters of these two networks. In this way, the completion network and the mask prediction network can constrain each other, and hence the overall performance of the trained model can be maximized. Furthermore, due to the natural existence of prior knowledge (e.g., corrupted contents and clear borders), current video inpainting datasets are not suitable in the context of semi-supervised video inpainting. Thus, we create a new dataset by simulating the corrupted video of real-world scenarios. Extensive experimental results are reported to demonstrate the superiority of our model in the video inpainting task. Remarkably, although our model is trained in a semi-supervised manner, it can achieve comparable performance as fully-supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的视频修复已经取得了可喜的成果，并越来越受到研究人员的关注。一般来说，这些方法通常假设每帧的损坏区域掩模是已知的并且容易获得。然而，这些掩模的注释是劳动密集型且昂贵的，这限制了当前方法的实际应用。因此，我们期望通过定义一个新的半监督修复设置来放宽这一假设，使网络有能力仅使用一帧的带注释的掩模来完成整个视频的损坏区域。具体来说，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个由补全网络和掩模预测网络组成的端到端可训练框架，它们被设计为使用已知掩模生成当前帧的损坏内容，并分别决定下一帧要填充的区域。此外，我们引入了循环一致性损失来规范这两个网络的训练参数。这样，补全网络和掩模预测网络可以相互约束，从而最大化训练模型的整体性能。此外，由于先验知识的自然存在（例如，损坏的内容和清晰的边界），当前的视频修复数据集不适合半监督视频修复的背景。因此，我们通过模拟真实场景的损坏视频来创建一个新的数据集。大量的实验结果证明了我们的模型在视频修复任务中的优越性。值得注意的是，尽管我们的模型是以半监督方式训练的，但它可以实现与完全监督方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督视频修复方法，通过单帧标注掩码实现全视频损坏区域修复。
AI.motivation: 现有视频修复方法依赖大量人工标注的损坏掩码，导致应用成本高且效率低，需减少对完整掩码的依赖。
AI.method: 设计端到端框架包含修复网络和掩码预测网络，结合循环一致性损失实现网络间相互约束，并构建真实场景模拟数据集。
AI.result: 模型在半监督设置下达到与全监督方法相当的修复效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过循环一致性约束和半监督机制，可在减少标注成本的同时保持视频修复性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

Thus, we create a new dataset by simulating the corrupted video of real-world scenarios. Extensive experimental results are reported to demonstrate the superiority of our model in the video inpainting task. Remarkably, although our model is trained in a semi-supervised manner, it can achieve comparable performance as fully-supervised methods. 基于深度学习的视频修复已经取得了可喜的成果，并越来越受到研究人员的关注。一般来说，这些方法通常假设每帧的损坏区域掩模是已知的并且容易获得。然而，这些掩模的注释是劳动密集型且昂贵的，这限制了当前方法的实际应用。因此，我们期望通过定义一个新的半监督修复设置来放宽这一假设，使网络有能力仅使用一帧的带注释的掩模来完成整个视频的损坏区域。具体来说，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个由补全网络和掩模预测网络组成的端到端可训练框架，它们被设计为使用已知掩模生成当前帧的损坏内容，并分别决定下一帧要填充的区域。此外，我们引入了循环一致性损失来规范这两个网络的训练参数。这样，补全网络和掩模预测网络可以相互约束，从而最大化训练模型的整体性能。此外，由于先验知识的自然存在（例如，损坏的内容和清晰的边界），当前的视频修复数据集不适合半监督视频修复的背景。因此，我们通过模拟真实场景的损坏视频来创建一个新的数据集。大量的实验结果证明了我们的模型在视频修复任务中的优越性。值得注意的是，尽管我们的模型是以半监督方式训练的，但它可以实现与完全监督方法相当的性能。 本文提出一种半监督视频修复方法，通过单帧标注掩码实现全视频损坏区域修复。 Zhiliang Wu,Hanyu Xuan,Changchang Sun,Kang Zhang,Yan Yan cs.CV

title: Light Weight Character and Shape Recognition for Autonomous Drones
title_zh: 自主无人机的轻量级字符和形状识别
abstract: There has been an extensive use of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles in search and rescue missions to distribute first aid kits and food packets. It is important that these UAVs are able to identify and distinguish the markers from one another for effective distribution. One of the common ways to mark the locations is via the use of characters superimposed on shapes of various colors which gives rise to wide variety of markers based on combination of different shapes, characters, and their respective colors. In this paper, we propose an object detection and classification pipeline which prevents false positives and minimizes misclassification of alphanumeric characters and shapes in aerial images. Our method makes use of traditional computer vision techniques and unsupervised machine learning methods for identifying region proposals, segmenting the image targets and removing false positives. We make use of a computationally light model for classification, making it easy to be deployed on any aerial vehicle.
summary: There has been an extensive use of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles in search and rescue missions to distribute first aid kits and food packets. It is important that these UAVs are able to identify and distinguish the markers from one another for effective distribution. One of the common ways to mark the locations is via the use of characters superimposed on shapes of various colors which gives rise to wide variety of markers based on combination of different shapes, characters, and their respective colors. In this paper, we propose an object detection and classification pipeline which prevents false positives and minimizes misclassification of alphanumeric characters and shapes in aerial images. Our method makes use of traditional computer vision techniques and unsupervised machine learning methods for identifying region proposals, segmenting the image targets and removing false positives. We make use of a computationally light model for classification, making it easy to be deployed on any aerial vehicle.
abstract_zh: 在搜救任务中广泛使用无人机来分发急救箱和食品包。重要的是，这些无人机能够相互识别和区分标记，以实现有效分发。标记位置的常见方法之一是使用叠加在各种颜色的形状上的字符，这基于不同形状、字符及其各自颜色的组合产生了各种各样的标记。在本文中，我们提出了一种对象检测和分类流程，可以防止误报并最大限度地减少航空图像中字母数字字符和形状的错误分类。我们的方法利用传统的计算机视觉技术和无监督机器学习方法来识别区域建议、分割图像目标并消除误报。我们利用轻量计算模型进行分类，使其易于部署在任何飞行器上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的字符和形状识别系统，用于自主无人机在复杂环境中准确识别标记，确保救援物资的有效分发。
AI.motivation: 无人机在救援任务中需识别多种颜色形状叠加字符的标记，但现有方法存在误报和误分类问题，亟需高效且适合部署在资源受限无人机上的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合传统计算机视觉技术与无监督机器学习方法，实现区域提议、图像分割和误报过滤，并采用轻量级分类模型降低计算负载。
AI.result: 该方法有效减少了误报和字符形状误分类，且模型体积小，可顺利部署于无人机等嵌入式设备。
AI.conclusion: 本文设计的轻量级识别系统为无人机在复杂场景下的标记识别提供了可靠方案，提升了救援任务的自动化水平与准确性。

title: Real-time Caller Intent Detection In Human-Human Customer Support Spoken Conversations
title_zh: 人与人客户支持语音对话中的实时呼叫者意图检测
comment: mber:Accepted in Communication in Human-AI Interaction, IJCAI'22
comments: mber:Accepted in Communication in Human-AI Interaction, IJCAI'22
abstract: Agent assistance during human-human customer support spoken interactions requires triggering workflows based on the caller's intent (reason for call). Timeliness of prediction is essential for a good user experience. The goal is for a system to detect the caller's intent at the time the agent would have been able to detect it (Intent Boundary). Some approaches focus on predicting the output offline, i.e. once the full spoken input (e.g. the whole conversational turn) has been processed by the ASR system. This introduces an undesirable latency in the prediction each time the intent could have been detected earlier in the turn. Recent work on voice assistants has used incremental real-time predictions at a word-by-word level to detect intent before the end of a command. Human-directed and machine-directed speech however have very different characteristics. In this work, we propose to apply a method developed in the context of voice-assistant to the problem of online real time caller's intent detection in human-human spoken interactions. We use a dual architecture in which two LSTMs are jointly trained: one predicting the Intent Boundary (IB) and then other predicting the intent class at the IB. We conduct our experiments on our private dataset comprising transcripts of human-human telephone conversations from the telecom customer support domain. We report results analyzing both the accuracy of our system as well as the impact of different architectures on the trade off between overall accuracy and prediction latency.
summary: Agent assistance during human-human customer support spoken interactions requires triggering workflows based on the caller's intent (reason for call). Timeliness of prediction is essential for a good user experience. The goal is for a system to detect the caller's intent at the time the agent would have been able to detect it (Intent Boundary). Some approaches focus on predicting the output offline, i.e. once the full spoken input (e.g. the whole conversational turn) has been processed by the ASR system. This introduces an undesirable latency in the prediction each time the intent could have been detected earlier in the turn. Recent work on voice assistants has used incremental real-time predictions at a word-by-word level to detect intent before the end of a command. Human-directed and machine-directed speech however have very different characteristics. In this work, we propose to apply a method developed in the context of voice-assistant to the problem of online real time caller's intent detection in human-human spoken interactions. We conduct our experiments on our private dataset comprising transcripts of human-human telephone conversations from the telecom customer support domain. We report results analyzing both the accuracy of our system as well as the impact of different architectures on the trade off between overall accuracy and prediction latency.
abstract_zh: 人与人的客户支持语音交互期间的座席协助需要根据呼叫者的意图（呼叫原因）触发工作流程。预测的及时性对于良好的用户体验至关重要。系统的目标是在代理能够检测到调用者的意图时检测到它（意图边界）。一些方法侧重于离线预测输出，即一旦 ASR 系统处理完完整的语音输入（例如整个对话轮次）。每次本可以在回合中较早检测到意图时，这都会在预测中引入不希望的延迟。最近的语音助手工作使用逐字级别的增量实时预测来检测命令结束之前的意图。然而，人类引导的语音和机器引导的语音具有非常不同的特征。在这项工作中，我们建议将一种在语音助手背景下开发的方法应用于人与人语音交互中在线实时呼叫者意图检测的问题。我们使用双架构，其中两个 LSTM 联合训练：一个预测意图边界 (IB)，另一个预测 IB 处的意图类别。我们在我们的私人数据集上进行实验，其中包括来自电信客户支持领域的人与人电话交谈的记录。我们报告的结果分析了我们系统的准确性以及不同架构对整体准确性和预测延迟之间权衡的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种实时检测人与人之间客服对话中呼叫者意图的系统，以减少传统离线方法的延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需等待完整语音输入处理后才能预测意图，导致响应延迟；而客服场景需要在通话过程中实时检测意图以提升用户体验。
AI.method: 采用双LSTM架构，一个LSTM预测意图边界（IB），另一个在IB位置预测意图类别，结合实时增量预测机制。
AI.result: 在电信客服对话数据集上验证了系统准确性，并分析了不同架构对准确率与预测延迟的权衡效果。
AI.conclusion: 将语音助手的增量预测方法迁移至人机对话场景有效，双LSTM架构在实时性与准确性间实现了平衡。

authors_text: Yinfeng Li,Chen Gao,Quanming Yao,Tong Li,Depeng Jin,Yong Li
title: DisenHCN: Disentangled Hypergraph Convolutional Networks for Spatiotemporal Activity Prediction
title_zh: DisenHCN：用于时空活动预测的解缠结超图卷积网络
comment: Accepted as a research track paper in ICDE 2022
comments: Accepted as a research track paper in ICDE 2022
abstract: Spatiotemporal activity prediction, aiming to predict user activities at a specific location and time, is crucial for applications like urban planning and mobile advertising. Existing solutions based on tensor decomposition or graph embedding suffer from the following two major limitations: 1) ignoring the fine-grained similarities of user preferences; 2) user's modeling is entangled. In this work, we propose a hypergraph neural network model called DisenHCN to bridge the above gaps. In particular, we first unify the fine-grained user similarity and the complex matching between user preferences and spatiotemporal activity into a heterogeneous hypergraph. We then disentangle the user representations into different aspects (location-aware, time-aware, and activity-aware) and aggregate corresponding aspect's features on the constructed hypergraph, capturing high-order relations from different aspects and disentangles the impact of each aspect for final prediction. Extensive experiments show that our DisenHCN outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by 14.23% to 18.10% on four real-world datasets. Further studies also convincingly verify the rationality of each component in our DisenHCN.
summary: Spatiotemporal activity prediction, aiming to predict user activities at a specific location and time, is crucial for applications like urban planning and mobile advertising. Existing solutions based on tensor decomposition or graph embedding suffer from the following two major limitations: 1) ignoring the fine-grained similarities of user preferences; 2) user's modeling is entangled. In this work, we propose a hypergraph neural network model called DisenHCN to bridge the above gaps. In particular, we first unify the fine-grained user similarity and the complex matching between user preferences and spatiotemporal activity into a heterogeneous hypergraph. We then disentangle the user representations into different aspects (location-aware, time-aware, and activity-aware) and aggregate corresponding aspect's features on the constructed hypergraph, capturing high-order relations from different aspects and disentangles the impact of each aspect for final prediction. Extensive experiments show that our DisenHCN outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by 14.23% to 18.10% on four real-world datasets. Further studies also convincingly verify the rationality of each component in our DisenHCN.
abstract_zh: 时空活动预测旨在预测特定位置和时间的用户活动，对于城市规划和移动广告等应用至关重要。现有的基于张量分解或图嵌入的解决方案存在以下两个主要限制：1）忽略用户偏好的细粒度相似性； 2）用户建模纠结。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 DisenHCN 的超图神经网络模型来弥补上述差距。特别是，我们首先将细粒度的用户相似性以及用户偏好和时空活动之间的复杂匹配统一到异构超图中。然后，我们将用户表示分解为不同的方面（位置感知、时间感知和活动感知），并在构建的超图上聚合相应方面的特征，捕获不同方面的高阶关系，并分解每个方面对最终预测的影响。大量实验表明，我们的 DisenHCN 在四个真实数据集上的性能比最先进的方法高出 14.23% 到 18.10%。进一步的研究也令人信服地验证了我们的 DisenHCN 中每个组件的合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DisenHCN的解耦超图卷积网络，用于时空活动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于张量分解或图嵌入的方法在预测用户特定时间和地点的活动时，忽略了用户偏好的细粒度相似性，并且用户建模是纠缠的。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种超图神经网络模型DisenHCN，将用户偏好与时空活动的复杂匹配统一到一个异构超图中，并将用户表示解耦为不同方面（位置感知、时间感知和活动感知），在构建的超图上聚合相应方面的特征。
AI.result: 在四个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，DisenHCN在性能上优于现有最先进的方法，提升了14.23%到18.10%。
AI.conclusion: 进一步研究表明，DisenHCN的每个组件都是合理的，有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

search_text: DisenHCN: Disentangled Hypergraph Convolutional Networks for Spatiotemporal Activity Prediction DisenHCN：用于时空活动预测的解缠结超图卷积网络 Spatiotemporal activity prediction, aiming to predict user activities at a specific location and time, is crucial for applications like urban planning and mobile advertising. Existing solutions based on tensor decomposition or graph embedding suffer from the following two major limitations: 1) ignoring the fine-grained similarities of user preferences; 2) user's modeling is entangled. In this work, we propose a hypergraph neural network model called DisenHCN to bridge the above gaps. In particular, we first unify the fine-grained user similarity and the complex matching between user preferences and spatiotemporal activity into a heterogeneous hypergraph. We then disentangle the user representations into different aspects (location-aware, time-aware, and activity-aware) and aggregate corresponding aspect's features on the constructed hypergraph, capturing high-order relations from different aspects and disentangles the impact of each aspect for final prediction. Extensive experiments show that our DisenHCN outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by 14.23% to 18.10% on four real-world datasets. Further studies also convincingly verify the rationality of each component in our DisenHCN. 时空活动预测旨在预测特定位置和时间的用户活动，对于城市规划和移动广告等应用至关重要。现有的基于张量分解或图嵌入的解决方案存在以下两个主要限制：1）忽略用户偏好的细粒度相似性； 2）用户建模纠结。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 DisenHCN 的超图神经网络模型来弥补上述差距。特别是，我们首先将细粒度的用户相似性以及用户偏好和时空活动之间的复杂匹配统一到异构超图中。然后，我们将用户表示分解为不同的方面（位置感知、时间感知和活动感知），并在构建的超图上聚合相应方面的特征，捕获不同方面的高阶关系，并分解每个方面对最终预测的影响。大量实验表明，我们的 DisenHCN 在四个真实数据集上的性能比最先进的方法高出 14.23% 到 18.10%。进一步的研究也令人信服地验证了我们的 DisenHCN 中每个组件的合理性。 本文提出了一种名为DisenHCN的解耦超图卷积网络，用于时空活动预测。 Yinfeng Li,Chen Gao,Quanming Yao,Tong Li,Depeng Jin,Yong Li cs.LG,cs.AI

title: HDR-Plenoxels: Self-Calibrating High Dynamic Range Radiance Fields
title_zh: HDR-Plenoxels：自校准高动态范围辐射场
abstract: We propose high dynamic range (HDR) radiance fields, HDR-Plenoxels, that learn a plenoptic function of 3D HDR radiance fields, geometry information, and varying camera settings inherent in 2D low dynamic range (LDR) images. Our voxel-based volume rendering pipeline reconstructs HDR radiance fields with only multi-view LDR images taken from varying camera settings in an end-to-end manner and has a fast convergence speed. To deal with various cameras in real-world scenarios, we introduce a tone mapping module that models the digital in-camera imaging pipeline (ISP) and disentangles radiometric settings. Our tone mapping module allows us to render by controlling the radiometric settings of each novel view. Finally, we build a multi-view dataset with varying camera conditions, which fits our problem setting. Our experiments show that HDR-Plenoxels can express detail and high-quality HDR novel views from only LDR images with various cameras.
summary: We propose high dynamic range (HDR) radiance fields, HDR-Plenoxels, that learn a plenoptic function of 3D HDR radiance fields, geometry information, and varying camera settings inherent in 2D low dynamic range (LDR) images. Our voxel-based volume rendering pipeline reconstructs HDR radiance fields with only multi-view LDR images taken from varying camera settings in an end-to-end manner and has a fast convergence speed. To deal with various cameras in real-world scenarios, we introduce a tone mapping module that models the digital in-camera imaging pipeline (ISP) and disentangles radiometric settings. Our tone mapping module allows us to render by controlling the radiometric settings of each novel view. Finally, we build a multi-view dataset with varying camera conditions, which fits our problem setting. Our experiments show that HDR-Plenoxels can express detail and high-quality HDR novel views from only LDR images with various cameras.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了高动态范围 (HDR) 辐射场 HDR-Plenoxels，它可以学习 2D 低动态范围 (LDR) 图像中固有的 3D HDR 辐射场、几何信息和不同相机设置的全光函数。我们基于体素的体渲染管道仅使用从不同相机设置以端到端方式拍摄的多视图 LDR 图像来重建 HDR 辐射场，并且具有快速收敛速度。为了处理现实场景中的各种相机，我们引入了色调映射模块，该模块可以对数字相机内成像管道（ISP）进行建模并解开辐射设置。我们的色调映射模块允许我们通过控制每个新颖视图的辐射设置来进行渲染。最后，我们构建了一个具有不同相机条件的多视图数据集，这适合我们的问题设置。我们的实验表明，HDR-Plenoxels 可以通过各种相机仅从 LDR 图像中表达细节和高质量 HDR 新颖视图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HDR-Plenoxels方法，通过多视角低动态范围（LDR）图像重建高动态范围（HDR）辐射场，实现无需相机校准的高质量HDR新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理真实场景中相机参数变化导致的HDR重建问题，且依赖复杂校准流程。
AI.method: 基于体素的体积渲染管道结合色调映射模块，建模相机ISP流程以分离辐射参数，通过端到端训练实现多视角LDR图像到HDR辐射场的重建。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能从多相机条件下采集的LDR图像中生成细节丰富、质量高的HDR新视角，收敛速度优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HDR-Plenoxels通过自校准机制和色调映射模块，实现了无需先验相机参数的高效HDR重建，为真实场景应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haibin Zheng,Haiyang Xiong,Haonan Ma,Guohan Huang,Jinyin Chen
title: Link-Backdoor: Backdoor Attack on Link Prediction via Node Injection
title_zh: 链路后门：通过节点注入对链路预测进行后门攻击
abstract: Link prediction, inferring the undiscovered or potential links of the graph, is widely applied in the real-world. By facilitating labeled links of the graph as the training data, numerous deep learning based link prediction methods have been studied, which have dominant prediction accuracy compared with non-deep methods. However,the threats of maliciously crafted training graph will leave a specific backdoor in the deep model, thus when some specific examples are fed into the model, it will make wrong prediction, defined as backdoor attack. It is an important aspect that has been overlooked in the current literature. In this paper, we prompt the concept of backdoor attack on link prediction, and propose Link-Backdoor to reveal the training vulnerability of the existing link prediction methods. Specifically, the Link-Backdoor combines the fake nodes with the nodes of the target link to form a trigger. Moreover, it optimizes the trigger by the gradient information from the target model. Consequently, the link prediction model trained on the backdoored dataset will predict the link with trigger to the target state. Extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets and five well-performing link prediction models demonstrate that the Link-Backdoor achieves the state-of-the-art attack success rate under both white-box (i.e., available of the target model parameter)and black-box (i.e., unavailable of the target model parameter) scenarios. Additionally, we testify the attack under defensive circumstance, and the results indicate that the Link-Backdoor still can construct successful attack on the well-performing link prediction methods. The code and data are available at https://github.com/Seaocn/Link-Backdoor.
summary: Link prediction, inferring the undiscovered or potential links of the graph, is widely applied in the real-world. By facilitating labeled links of the graph as the training data, numerous deep learning based link prediction methods have been studied, which have dominant prediction accuracy compared with non-deep methods. However,the threats of maliciously crafted training graph will leave a specific backdoor in the deep model, thus when some specific examples are fed into the model, it will make wrong prediction, defined as backdoor attack. It is an important aspect that has been overlooked in the current literature. In this paper, we prompt the concept of backdoor attack on link prediction, and propose Link-Backdoor to reveal the training vulnerability of the existing link prediction methods. Specifically, the Link-Backdoor combines the fake nodes with the nodes of the target link to form a trigger. Moreover, it optimizes the trigger by the gradient information from the target model. Consequently, the link prediction model trained on the backdoored dataset will predict the link with trigger to the target state. Extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets and five well-performing link prediction models demonstrate that the Link-Backdoor achieves the state-of-the-art attack success rate under both white-box (i.e., available of the target model parameter)and black-box (i.e., unavailable of the target model parameter) scenarios. Additionally, we testify the attack under defensive circumstance, and the results indicate that the Link-Backdoor still can construct successful attack on the well-performing link prediction methods. The code and data are available at https://github.com/Seaocn/Link-Backdoor.
abstract_zh: 链接预测，推断图形中未发现或潜在的链接，在现实世界中得到广泛应用。通过将图的标记链接作为训练数据，人们研究了许多基于深度学习的链接预测方法，与非深度方法相比，这些方法具有显着的预测精度。然而，恶意制作的训练图的威胁会在深度模型中留下特定的后门，因此当一些特定的例子被输入到模型中时，它会做出错误的预测，定义为后门攻击。这是当前文献中被忽视的一个重要方面。在本文中，我们提出了链路预测后门攻击的概念，并提出了 Link-Backdoor 来揭示现有链路预测方法的训练漏洞。具体来说，链路后门将假节点与目标链路的节点组合起来形成触发器。此外，它还根据目标模型的梯度信息优化触发。因此，在后门数据集上训练的链接预测模型将预测具有目标状态触发的链接。对五个基准数据集和五个性能良好的链路预测模型的大量实验表明，链路后门在白盒（即目标模型参数可用）和黑盒（即目标模型参数不可用）场景下均实现了最先进的攻击成功率。此外，我们在防御情况下验证了攻击，结果表明链路后门仍然可以对性能良好的链路预测方法构造成功的攻击。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Seaocn/Link-Backdoor 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对链接预测模型的后门攻击方法Link-Backdoor，通过节点注入在训练数据中植入触发器，使模型在特定输入下产生错误预测。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习链接预测方法在训练数据中可能被恶意构造的图数据植入后门，导致模型在特定触发下产生错误预测，但这一安全威胁尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过将伪造节点与目标链接节点组合形成触发器，并利用目标模型的梯度信息优化触发器，使训练后的模型在遇到触发器时输出预设的错误链接预测结果。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集和五种主流链接预测模型上验证，Link-Backdoor在白盒和黑盒场景下均达到最先进的攻击成功率，且在防御机制下仍能成功攻击。
AI.conclusion: Link-Backdoor揭示了现有链接预测方法的训练漏洞，证明了通过节点注入实施后门攻击的有效性，为模型安全研究提供了新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种针对链接预测模型的后门攻击方法Link-Backdoor，通过节点注入在训练数据中植入触发器，使模型在特定输入下产生错误预测。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度学习链接预测方法在训练数据中可能被恶意构造的图数据植入后门，导致模型在特定触发下产生错误预测，但这一安全威胁尚未被充分研究。
ai_content.method: 通过将伪造节点与目标链接节点组合形成触发器，并利用目标模型的梯度信息优化触发器，使训练后的模型在遇到触发器时输出预设的错误链接预测结果。
ai_content.result: 在五个基准数据集和五种主流链接预测模型上验证，Link-Backdoor在白盒和黑盒场景下均达到最先进的攻击成功率，且在防御机制下仍能成功攻击。
ai_content.conclusion: Link-Backdoor揭示了现有链接预测方法的训练漏洞，证明了通过节点注入实施后门攻击的有效性，为模型安全研究提供了新视角。

search_text: Link-Backdoor: Backdoor Attack on Link Prediction via Node Injection 链路后门：通过节点注入对链路预测进行后门攻击 Link prediction, inferring the undiscovered or potential links of the graph, is widely applied in the real-world. By facilitating labeled links of the graph as the training data, numerous deep learning based link prediction methods have been studied, which have dominant prediction accuracy compared with non-deep methods. However,the threats of maliciously crafted training graph will leave a specific backdoor in the deep model, thus when some specific examples are fed into the model, it will make wrong prediction, defined as backdoor attack. It is an important aspect that has been overlooked in the current literature. In this paper, we prompt the concept of backdoor attack on link prediction, and propose Link-Backdoor to reveal the training vulnerability of the existing link prediction methods. Specifically, the Link-Backdoor combines the fake nodes with the nodes of the target link to form a trigger. Moreover, it optimizes the trigger by the gradient information from the target model. Consequently, the link prediction model trained on the backdoored dataset will predict the link with trigger to the target state. Extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets and five well-performing link prediction models demonstrate that the Link-Backdoor achieves the state-of-the-art attack success rate under both white-box (i.e., available of the target model parameter)and black-box (i.e., unavailable of the target model parameter) scenarios. Additionally, we testify the attack under defensive circumstance, and the results indicate that the Link-Backdoor still can construct successful attack on the well-performing link prediction methods. The code and data are available at https://github.com/Seaocn/Link-Backdoor. 链接预测，推断图形中未发现或潜在的链接，在现实世界中得到广泛应用。通过将图的标记链接作为训练数据，人们研究了许多基于深度学习的链接预测方法，与非深度方法相比，这些方法具有显着的预测精度。然而，恶意制作的训练图的威胁会在深度模型中留下特定的后门，因此当一些特定的例子被输入到模型中时，它会做出错误的预测，定义为后门攻击。这是当前文献中被忽视的一个重要方面。在本文中，我们提出了链路预测后门攻击的概念，并提出了 Link-Backdoor 来揭示现有链路预测方法的训练漏洞。具体来说，链路后门将假节点与目标链路的节点组合起来形成触发器。此外，它还根据目标模型的梯度信息优化触发。因此，在后门数据集上训练的链接预测模型将预测具有目标状态触发的链接。对五个基准数据集和五个性能良好的链路预测模型的大量实验表明，链路后门在白盒（即目标模型参数可用）和黑盒（即目标模型参数不可用）场景下均实现了最先进的攻击成功率。此外，我们在防御情况下验证了攻击，结果表明链路后门仍然可以对性能良好的链路预测方法构造成功的攻击。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Seaocn/Link-Backdoor 获取。 本文提出一种针对链接预测模型的后门攻击方法Link-Backdoor，通过节点注入在训练数据中植入触发器，使模型在特定输入下产生错误预测。 Haibin Zheng,Haiyang Xiong,Haonan Ma,Guohan Huang,Jinyin Chen cs.SI,cs.AI

authors_text: Medhini Narasimhan,Arsha Nagrani,Chen Sun,Michael Rubinstein,Trevor Darrell,Anna Rohrbach,Cordelia Schmid
title: TL;DW? Summarizing Instructional Videos with Task Relevance & Cross-Modal Saliency
title_zh: TL；DW？总结具有任务相关性和跨模式显着性的教学视频
abstract: YouTube users looking for instructions for a specific task may spend a long time browsing content trying to find the right video that matches their needs. Creating a visual summary (abridged version of a video) provides viewers with a quick overview and massively reduces search time. In this work, we focus on summarizing instructional videos, an under-explored area of video summarization. In comparison to generic videos, instructional videos can be parsed into semantically meaningful segments that correspond to important steps of the demonstrated task. Existing video summarization datasets rely on manual frame-level annotations, making them subjective and limited in size. To overcome this, we first automatically generate pseudo summaries for a corpus of instructional videos by exploiting two key assumptions: (i) relevant steps are likely to appear in multiple videos of the same task (Task Relevance), and (ii) they are more likely to be described by the demonstrator verbally (Cross-Modal Saliency). We propose an instructional video summarization network that combines a context-aware temporal video encoder and a segment scoring transformer. Using pseudo summaries as weak supervision, our network constructs a visual summary for an instructional video given only video and transcribed speech. To evaluate our model, we collect a high-quality test set, WikiHow Summaries, by scraping WikiHow articles that contain video demonstrations and visual depictions of steps allowing us to obtain the ground-truth summaries. We outperform several baselines and a state-of-the-art video summarization model on this new benchmark.

Creating a visual summary (abridged version of a video) provides viewers with a quick overview and massively reduces search time. In this work, we focus on summarizing instructional videos, an under-explored area of video summarization. In comparison to generic videos, instructional videos can be parsed into semantically meaningful segments that correspond to important steps of the demonstrated task. To overcome this, we first automatically generate pseudo summaries for a corpus of instructional videos by exploiting two key assumptions: (i) relevant steps are likely to appear in multiple videos of the same task (Task Relevance), and (ii) they are more likely to be described by the demonstrator verbally (Cross-Modal Saliency). We propose an instructional video summarization network that combines a context-aware temporal video encoder and a segment scoring transformer. Using pseudo summaries as weak supervision, our network constructs a visual summary for an instructional video given only video and transcribed speech. To evaluate our model, we collect a high-quality test set, WikiHow Summaries, by scraping WikiHow articles that contain video demonstrations and visual depictions of steps allowing us to obtain the ground-truth summaries. We outperform several baselines and a state-of-the-art video summarization model on this new benchmark.
abstract_zh: 寻找特定任务说明的 YouTube 用户可能会花费很长时间浏览内容，试图找到符合他们需求的正确视频。创建视觉摘要（视频的删节版本）可以为观看者提供快速概览，并大大减少搜索时间。在这项工作中，我们专注于总结教学视频，这​​是视频摘要的一个尚未探索的领域。与一般视频相比，教学视频可以被解析为与所演示任务的重要步骤相对应的语义上有意义的片段。现有的视频摘要数据集依赖于手动帧级注释，这使得它们主观且大小有限。为了克服这个问题，我们首先利用两个关键假设为教学视频语料库自动生成伪摘要：（i）相关步骤可能出现在同一任务的多个视频中（任务相关性），以及（ii）它们更有可能由演示者口头描述（跨模态显着性）。我们提出了一种教学视频摘要网络，该网络结合了上下文感知时间视频编码器和分段评分转换器。我们的网络使用伪摘要作为弱监督，为仅给出视频和转录语音的教学视频构建了视觉摘要。为了评估我们的模型，我们通过抓取包含视频演示和步骤视觉描述的 WikiHow 文章来收集高质量的测试集 WikiHow 摘要，从而使我们能够获得真实的摘要。我们在这个新基准上优于多个基线和最先进的视频摘要模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于任务相关性和跨模态显著性的指令视频摘要方法，通过弱监督学习生成视觉摘要。
AI.motivation: 用户在YouTube上寻找特定任务的指令视频时耗时较长，现有视频摘要数据集依赖主观标注且规模有限，需探索更高效的指令视频摘要方案。
AI.method: 利用任务相关性（相同任务中重复出现的步骤）和跨模态显著性（演示者口头描述的步骤）生成伪摘要，结合时序视频编码器和分段评分Transformer网络进行弱监督训练。
AI.result: 构建了WikiHow Summaries数据集，在新基准测试中优于多个基线模型和最先进的视频摘要方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱监督学习有效捕捉指令视频的关键步骤，为指令视频摘要任务提供了新思路和高质量数据集。

title: Flow-Guided Transformer for Video Inpainting
title_zh: 用于视频修复的导流变压器
abstract: We propose a flow-guided transformer, which innovatively leverage the motion discrepancy exposed by optical flows to instruct the attention retrieval in transformer for high fidelity video inpainting. More specially, we design a novel flow completion network to complete the corrupted flows by exploiting the relevant flow features in a local temporal window. With the completed flows, we propagate the content across video frames, and adopt the flow-guided transformer to synthesize the rest corrupted regions. We decouple transformers along temporal and spatial dimension, so that we can easily integrate the locally relevant completed flows to instruct spatial attention only. Furthermore, we design a flow-reweight module to precisely control the impact of completed flows on each spatial transformer. For the sake of efficiency, we introduce window partition strategy to both spatial and temporal transformers. Especially in spatial transformer, we design a dual perspective spatial MHSA, which integrates the global tokens to the window-based attention. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method qualitatively and quantitatively. Codes are available at https://github.com/hitachinsk/FGT.
summary: We propose a flow-guided transformer, which innovatively leverage the motion discrepancy exposed by optical flows to instruct the attention retrieval in transformer for high fidelity video inpainting. More specially, we design a novel flow completion network to complete the corrupted flows by exploiting the relevant flow features in a local temporal window. With the completed flows, we propagate the content across video frames, and adopt the flow-guided transformer to synthesize the rest corrupted regions. We decouple transformers along temporal and spatial dimension, so that we can easily integrate the locally relevant completed flows to instruct spatial attention only. Furthermore, we design a flow-reweight module to precisely control the impact of completed flows on each spatial transformer. For the sake of efficiency, we introduce window partition strategy to both spatial and temporal transformers. Especially in spatial transformer, we design a dual perspective spatial MHSA, which integrates the global tokens to the window-based attention. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method qualitatively and quantitatively. Codes are available at https://github.com/hitachinsk/FGT.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种流引导变压器，它创新地利用光流暴露的运动差异来指导变压器中的注意力检索，以进行高保真视频修复。更具体地说，我们设计了一种新颖的流完成网络，通过利用局部时间窗口中的相关流特征来完成损坏的流。完成流程后，我们在视频帧之间传播内容，并采用流程引导变压器来合成其余损坏的区域。我们沿着时间和空间维度解耦变压器，这样我们就可以轻松地整合局部相关的完整流程来仅指导空间注意力。此外，我们设计了一个流量重新加权模块来精确控制已完成的流量对每个空间转换器的影响。为了提高效率，我们向空间和时间转换器引入窗口分区策略。特别是在空间变换器中，我们设计了一个双视角空间 MHSA，它将全局标记集成到基于窗口的注意力中。大量的实验定性和定量地证明了该方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/hitachinsk/FGT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光流引导的Transformer模型，用于实现高保真度的视频修复。
AI.motivation: 现有视频修复方法难以有效利用光流中的运动差异信息，导致修复区域与周围内容不协调。
AI.method: 设计了光流补全网络完成局部时序窗口中的损坏光流，通过时空解耦的Transformer结构结合流重权模块，采用窗口划分策略提升效率，并引入双视角空间MHSA融合全局信息。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 光流引导的Transformer框架有效提升了视频修复质量，验证了运动信息在修复过程中的关键作用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光流引导的Transformer模型，用于实现高保真度的视频修复。
ai_content.motivation: 现有视频修复方法难以有效利用光流中的运动差异信息，导致修复区域与周围内容不协调。
ai_content.method: 设计了光流补全网络完成局部时序窗口中的损坏光流，通过时空解耦的Transformer结构结合流重权模块，采用窗口划分策略提升效率，并引入双视角空间MHSA融合全局信息。
ai_content.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有先进方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 光流引导的Transformer框架有效提升了视频修复质量，验证了运动信息在修复过程中的关键作用。

search_text: Flow-Guided Transformer for Video Inpainting 用于视频修复的导流变压器 We propose a flow-guided transformer, which innovatively leverage the motion discrepancy exposed by optical flows to instruct the attention retrieval in transformer for high fidelity video inpainting. More specially, we design a novel flow completion network to complete the corrupted flows by exploiting the relevant flow features in a local temporal window. With the completed flows, we propagate the content across video frames, and adopt the flow-guided transformer to synthesize the rest corrupted regions. We decouple transformers along temporal and spatial dimension, so that we can easily integrate the locally relevant completed flows to instruct spatial attention only. Furthermore, we design a flow-reweight module to precisely control the impact of completed flows on each spatial transformer. For the sake of efficiency, we introduce window partition strategy to both spatial and temporal transformers. Especially in spatial transformer, we design a dual perspective spatial MHSA, which integrates the global tokens to the window-based attention. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method qualitatively and quantitatively. Codes are available at https://github.com/hitachinsk/FGT. 我们提出了一种流引导变压器，它创新地利用光流暴露的运动差异来指导变压器中的注意力检索，以进行高保真视频修复。更具体地说，我们设计了一种新颖的流完成网络，通过利用局部时间窗口中的相关流特征来完成损坏的流。完成流程后，我们在视频帧之间传播内容，并采用流程引导变压器来合成其余损坏的区域。我们沿着时间和空间维度解耦变压器，这样我们就可以轻松地整合局部相关的完整流程来仅指导空间注意力。此外，我们设计了一个流量重新加权模块来精确控制已完成的流量对每个空间转换器的影响。为了提高效率，我们向空间和时间转换器引入窗口分区策略。特别是在空间变换器中，我们设计了一个双视角空间 MHSA，它将全局标记集成到基于窗口的注意力中。大量的实验定性和定量地证明了该方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/hitachinsk/FGT 获取。 本文提出了一种基于光流引导的Transformer模型，用于实现高保真度的视频修复。 Kaidong Zhang,Jingjing Fu,Dong Liu cs.CV

title: MAFNet: A Multi-Attention Fusion Network for RGB-T Crowd Counting
title_zh: MAFNet：用于 RGB-T 人群计数的多注意融合网络
abstract: RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) crowd counting is a challenging task, which uses thermal images as complementary information to RGB images to deal with the decreased performance of unimodal RGB-based methods in scenes with low-illumination or similar backgrounds. Most existing methods propose well-designed structures for cross-modal fusion in RGB-T crowd counting. However, these methods have difficulty in encoding cross-modal contextual semantic information in RGB-T image pairs. Considering the aforementioned problem, we propose a two-stream RGB-T crowd counting network called Multi-Attention Fusion Network (MAFNet), which aims to fully capture long-range contextual information from the RGB and thermal modalities based on the attention mechanism. Specifically, in the encoder part, a Multi-Attention Fusion (MAF) module is embedded into different stages of the two modality-specific branches for cross-modal fusion at the global level. In addition, a Multi-modal Multi-scale Aggregation (MMA) regression head is introduced to make full use of the multi-scale and contextual information across modalities to generate high-quality crowd density maps. Extensive experiments on two popular datasets show that the proposed MAFNet is effective for RGB-T crowd counting and achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) crowd counting is a challenging task, which uses thermal images as complementary information to RGB images to deal with the decreased performance of unimodal RGB-based methods in scenes with low-illumination or similar backgrounds. Most existing methods propose well-designed structures for cross-modal fusion in RGB-T crowd counting. However, these methods have difficulty in encoding cross-modal contextual semantic information in RGB-T image pairs. Considering the aforementioned problem, we propose a two-stream RGB-T crowd counting network called Multi-Attention Fusion Network (MAFNet), which aims to fully capture long-range contextual information from the RGB and thermal modalities based on the attention mechanism. Specifically, in the encoder part, a Multi-Attention Fusion (MAF) module is embedded into different stages of the two modality-specific branches for cross-modal fusion at the global level. In addition, a Multi-modal Multi-scale Aggregation (MMA) regression head is introduced to make full use of the multi-scale and contextual information across modalities to generate high-quality crowd density maps. Extensive experiments on two popular datasets show that the proposed MAFNet is effective for RGB-T crowd counting and achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) 人群计数是一项具有挑战性的任务，它使用热图像作为 RGB 图像的补充信息，以解决基于单峰 RGB 的方法在低照度或相似背景的场景中性能下降的问题。大多数现有方法都提出了用于 RGB-T 人群计数中跨模式融合的精心设计的结构。然而，这些方法难以在 RGB-T 图像对中编码跨模态上下文语义信息。考虑到上述问题，我们提出了一种称为多注意融合网络（MAFNet）的双流RGB-T人群计数网络，其目的是基于注意机制从RGB和热模态中充分捕获远程上下文信息。具体来说，在编码器部分，多注意力融合（MAF）模块被嵌入到两个特定模态分支的不同阶段，以在全局级别进行跨模态融合。此外，引入了多模态多尺度聚合（MMA）回归头，以充分利用跨模态的多尺度和上下文信息来生成高质量的人群密度图。对两个流行数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 MAFNet 对于 RGB-T 人群计数是有效的，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多注意融合网络MAFNet，用于解决RGB-T人群计数中跨模态上下文语义信息编码不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-T人群计数方法难以有效编码跨模态的全局上下文语义信息，导致低照度或相似背景场景下性能下降。
AI.method: 设计包含多注意融合模块（MAF）的双流网络结构，在编码器阶段实现跨模态全局融合，并引入多模态多尺度聚合（MMA）回归头提升密度图生成质量。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，MAFNet达到当时最先进的RGB-T人群计数性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态注意力机制与多尺度信息聚合，MAFNet有效解决了RGB-T人群计数中的上下文建模难题。

authors_text: Md Moniruzzaman Emon,Tareque Rahman Ornob,Moqsadur Rahman
title: Predicting skull fractures via CNN with classification algorithms
title_zh: 通过 CNN 和分类算法预测颅骨骨折
comment: ef:ICCA 2022: 2nd International Conference on Computing Advancements
comments: ef:ICCA 2022: 2nd International Conference on Computing Advancements
abstract: Computer Tomography (CT) images have become quite important to diagnose diseases. CT scan slice contains a vast amount of data that may not be properly examined with the requisite precision and speed using normal visual inspection. A computer-assisted skull fracture classification expert system is needed to assist physicians. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are the most extensively used deep learning models for image categorization since most often time they outperform other models in terms of accuracy and results. The CNN models were then developed and tested, and several convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures were compared. ResNet50, which was used for feature extraction combined with a gradient boosted decision tree machine learning algorithm to act as a classifier for the categorization of skull fractures from brain CT scans into three fracture categories, had the best overall F1-score of 96%, Hamming Score of 95%, Balanced accuracy Score of 94% & ROC AUC curve of 96% for the classification of skull fractures.
summary: Computer Tomography (CT) images have become quite important to diagnose diseases. CT scan slice contains a vast amount of data that may not be properly examined with the requisite precision and speed using normal visual inspection. A computer-assisted skull fracture classification expert system is needed to assist physicians. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are the most extensively used deep learning models for image categorization since most often time they outperform other models in terms of accuracy and results. The CNN models were then developed and tested, and several convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures were compared. ResNet50, which was used for feature extraction combined with a gradient boosted decision tree machine learning algorithm to act as a classifier for the categorization of skull fractures from brain CT scans into three fracture categories, had the best overall F1-score of 96%, Hamming Score of 95%, Balanced accuracy Score of 94% & ROC AUC curve of 96% for the classification of skull fractures.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描（CT）图像对于诊断疾病变得非常重要。 CT 扫描切片包含大量数据，使用普通目视检查可能无法以所需的精度和速度正确检查这些数据。需要计算机辅助颅骨骨折分类专家系统来协助医生。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 是图像分类中使用最广泛的深度学习模型，因为它们在准确性和结果方面通常优于其他模型。随后开发并测试了 CNN 模型，并对几种卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构进行了比较。 ResNet50 用于特征提取，结合梯度增强决策树机器学习算法，作为分类器，将脑部 CT 扫描的颅骨骨折分为三个骨折类别，其颅骨骨折分类的最佳总体 F1 分数为 96%，汉明分数为 95%，平衡准确度分数为 94%，ROC AUC 曲线为 96%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和分类算法的计算机辅助系统，用于从脑部CT扫描中准确分类颅骨骨折。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检查CT图像存在效率低、易遗漏等问题，需开发自动化系统辅助医生快速精准诊断颅骨骨折。
AI.method: 比较多种CNN架构，采用ResNet50进行特征提取，结合梯度提升决策树分类器，对CT图像中的颅骨骨折进行三分类。
AI.result: ResNet50与梯度提升决策树组合模型在颅骨骨折分类中取得最佳性能：F1分数96%、Hamming分数95%、平衡准确率94%、ROC AUC曲线下面积96%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过高精度的深度学习模型有效提升了颅骨骨折分类的准确性，可为临床诊断提供可靠辅助。

Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are the most extensively used deep learning models for image categorization since most often time they outperform other models in terms of accuracy and results. The CNN models were then developed and tested, and several convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures were compared. ResNet50, which was used for feature extraction combined with a gradient boosted decision tree machine learning algorithm to act as a classifier for the categorization of skull fractures from brain CT scans into three fracture categories, had the best overall F1-score of 96%, Hamming Score of 95%, Balanced accuracy Score of 94% & ROC AUC curve of 96% for the classification of skull fractures. 计算机断层扫描（CT）图像对于诊断疾病变得非常重要。 CT 扫描切片包含大量数据，使用普通目视检查可能无法以所需的精度和速度正确检查这些数据。需要计算机辅助颅骨骨折分类专家系统来协助医生。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 是图像分类中使用最广泛的深度学习模型，因为它们在准确性和结果方面通常优于其他模型。随后开发并测试了 CNN 模型，并对几种卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构进行了比较。 ResNet50 用于特征提取，结合梯度增强决策树机器学习算法，作为分类器，将脑部 CT 扫描的颅骨骨折分为三个骨折类别，其颅骨骨折分类的最佳总体 F1 分数为 96%，汉明分数为 95%，平衡准确度分数为 94%，ROC AUC 曲线为 96%。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和分类算法的计算机辅助系统，用于从脑部CT扫描中准确分类颅骨骨折。 Md Moniruzzaman Emon,Tareque Rahman Ornob,Moqsadur Rahman cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Sharp Frequency Bounds for Sample-Based Queries
title_zh: 基于样本的查询的尖锐频率界限
abstract: A data sketch algorithm scans a big data set, collecting a small amount of data -- the sketch, which can be used to statistically infer properties of the big data set. Some data sketch algorithms take a fixed-size random sample of a big data set, and use that sample to infer frequencies of items that meet various criteria in the big data set. This paper shows how to statistically infer probably approximately correct (PAC) bounds for those frequencies, efficiently, and precisely enough that the frequency bounds are either sharp or off by only one, which is the best possible result without exact computation.
summary: A data sketch algorithm scans a big data set, collecting a small amount of data -- the sketch, which can be used to statistically infer properties of the big data set. Some data sketch algorithms take a fixed-size random sample of a big data set, and use that sample to infer frequencies of items that meet various criteria in the big data set. This paper shows how to statistically infer probably approximately correct (PAC) bounds for those frequencies, efficiently, and precisely enough that the frequency bounds are either sharp or off by only one, which is the best possible result without exact computation.
abstract_zh: 数据草图算法扫描大数据集，收集少量数据——草图，可用于统计推断大数据集的属性。一些数据草图算法采用大数据集的固定大小的随机样本，并使用该样本来推断大数据集中满足各种标准的项目的频率。本文展示了如何有效且足够精确地统计推断这些频率的大概正确 (PAC) 界限，使频率界限要么锐利，要么仅偏离 1，这是无需精确计算的最佳可能结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于样本数据高效准确估计大数据集频率范围的方法
AI.motivation: 大数据集直接计算频率成本高，现有方法精度不足，需更高效精确的估计方法
AI.method: 采用固定大小随机抽样结合统计推断技术，通过概率分析确定频率的近似范围
AI.result: 高效计算出频率的PAC界，误差不超过1，达到无精确计算的最佳精度
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需精确计算的前提下提供了最优频率估计，适用于大数据分析场景

authors_text: Sevcan Turk,Kaya Oguz,Mehmet Orman,Emre Caliskan,Yesim Ertan,Erkin Ozgiray,Taner Akalin,Ashok Srinivasan,Omer Kitis
title: Machine Learning Based Radiomics for Glial Tumor Classification and Comparison with Volumetric Analysis
title_zh: 基于机器学习的放射组学用于神经胶质瘤分类以及与体积分析的比较
abstract: Purpose; The purpose of this study is to classify glial tumors into grade II, III and IV categories noninvasively by application of machine learning to multi-modal MRI features in comparison with volumetric analysis. Methods; We retrospectively studied 57 glioma patients with pre and postcontrast T1 weighted, T2 weighted, FLAIR images, and ADC maps acquired on a 3T MRI. The tumors were segmented into enhancing and nonenhancing portions, tumor necrosis, cyst and edema using semiautomated segmentation of ITK-SNAP open source tool. We measured total tumor volume, enhancing-nonenhancing tumor, edema, necrosis volume and the ratios to the total tumor volume. Training of a support vector machine (SVM) classifier and artificial neural network (ANN) was performed with labeled data designed to answer the question of interest. Specificity, sensitivity, and AUC of the predictions were computed by means of ROC analysis. Differences in continuous measures between groups were assessed by using Kruskall Wallis, with post hoc Dunn correction for multiple comparisons. Results; When we compared the volume ratios between groups, there was statistically significant difference between grade IV and grade II-III glial tumors. Edema and tumor necrosis volume ratios for grade IV glial tumors were higher than that of grade II and III. Volumetric ratio analysis could not distinguish grade II and III tumors successfully. However, SVM and ANN correctly classified each group with accuracies up to 98% and 96%. Conclusion; Application of machine learning methods to MRI features can be used to classify brain tumors noninvasively and more readily in clinical settings.
