Methods; We retrospectively studied 57 glioma patients with pre and postcontrast T1 weighted, T2 weighted, FLAIR images, and ADC maps acquired on a 3T MRI. The tumors were segmented into enhancing and nonenhancing portions, tumor necrosis, cyst and edema using semiautomated segmentation of ITK-SNAP open source tool. We measured total tumor volume, enhancing-nonenhancing tumor, edema, necrosis volume and the ratios to the total tumor volume. Training of a support vector machine (SVM) classifier and artificial neural network (ANN) was performed with labeled data designed to answer the question of interest. Specificity, sensitivity, and AUC of the predictions were computed by means of ROC analysis. Differences in continuous measures between groups were assessed by using Kruskall Wallis, with post hoc Dunn correction for multiple comparisons. Results; When we compared the volume ratios between groups, there was statistically significant difference between grade IV and grade II-III glial tumors. Edema and tumor necrosis volume ratios for grade IV glial tumors were higher than that of grade II and III. Volumetric ratio analysis could not distinguish grade II and III tumors successfully. However, SVM and ANN correctly classified each group with accuracies up to 98% and 96%. Conclusion; Application of machine learning methods to MRI features can be used to classify brain tumors noninvasively and more readily in clinical settings.
abstract_zh: 目的;本研究的目的是通过将机器学习应用于多模态 MRI 特征并与体积分析进行比较，将胶质瘤无创地分为 II 级、III 级和 IV 级。方法;我们回顾性研究了 57 名神经胶质瘤患者，并通过 3T MRI 获取了对比前和对比后 T1 加权、T2 加权、FLAIR 图像和 ADC 图。使用 ITK-SNAP 开源工具的半自动分割将肿瘤分割为增强和非增强部分、肿瘤坏死、囊肿和水肿。我们测量了总肿瘤体积、增强-非增强肿瘤、水肿、坏死体积以及与总肿瘤体积的比率。使用旨在回答感兴趣的问题的标记数据对支持向量机 (SVM) 分类器和人工神经网络 (ANN) 进行训练。通过 ROC 分析计算预测的特异性、敏感性和 AUC。使用 Kruskall Wallis 评估组间连续测量的差异，并使用事后 Dunn 校正进行多重比较。结果;当我们比较各组之间的体积比时，IV级和II-III级胶质瘤之间存在统计学上的显着差异。 IV级胶质瘤的水肿和肿瘤坏死体积比高于II级和III级。体积比分析无法成功区分II级和III级肿瘤。然而，SVM 和 ANN 对每个组进行了正确分类，准确率高达 98% 和 96%。结论;将机器学习方法应用于 MRI 特征可用于无创地对脑肿瘤进行分类，并且在临床环境中更容易。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在通过机器学习分析多模态MRI特征，非侵入性地对胶质瘤进行分级（II、III、IV级），并与容积分析方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 胶质瘤的准确分级对临床治疗至关重要，传统容积分析在区分II级和III级肿瘤时存在局限性，需探索更有效的非侵入性分类方法。
AI.method: 回顾性分析57例胶质瘤患者的多模态MRI数据，使用ITK-SNAP进行半自动分割，计算肿瘤各部分体积及比值。采用支持向量机（SVM）和人工神经网络（ANN）分类器进行训练，并通过ROC分析和Kruskal-Wallis检验评估结果。
AI.result: 容积比分析显示IV级肿瘤的水肿和坏死体积比显著高于II-III级，但无法区分II与III级。SVM和ANN分类器准确率分别高达98%和96%。
AI.conclusion: 基于MRI特征的机器学习方法可有效实现胶质瘤的非侵入性分类，优于传统容积分析，尤其在区分II-III级肿瘤时表现突出。

title: Jacobi Set Driven Search for Flexible Fiber Surface Extraction
title_zh: 雅可比集驱动的柔性纤维表面提取搜索
abstract: Isosurfaces are an important tool for analysis and visualization of univariate scalar fields. Earlier works have demonstrated the presence of interesting isosurfaces at isovalues close to critical values. This motivated the development of efficient methods for computing individual components of isosurfaces restricted to a region of interest. Generalization of isosurfaces to fiber surfaces and critical points to Jacobi sets has resulted in new approaches for analyzing bivariate scalar fields. Unlike isosurfaces, there exists no output sensitive method for computing fiber surfaces. Existing methods traverse through all the tetrahedra in the domain. In this paper, we propose the use of the Jacobi set to identify fiber surface components of interest and present an output sensitive approach for its computation. The Jacobi edges are used to initiate the search towards seed tetrahedra that contain the fiber surface, thereby reducing the search space. This approach also leads to effective analysis of the bivariate field by supporting the identification of relevant fiber surfaces near Jacobi edges.
summary: Isosurfaces are an important tool for analysis and visualization of univariate scalar fields. Earlier works have demonstrated the presence of interesting isosurfaces at isovalues close to critical values. This motivated the development of efficient methods for computing individual components of isosurfaces restricted to a region of interest. Generalization of isosurfaces to fiber surfaces and critical points to Jacobi sets has resulted in new approaches for analyzing bivariate scalar fields. Unlike isosurfaces, there exists no output sensitive method for computing fiber surfaces. Existing methods traverse through all the tetrahedra in the domain. In this paper, we propose the use of the Jacobi set to identify fiber surface components of interest and present an output sensitive approach for its computation. The Jacobi edges are used to initiate the search towards seed tetrahedra that contain the fiber surface, thereby reducing the search space. This approach also leads to effective analysis of the bivariate field by supporting the identification of relevant fiber surfaces near Jacobi edges.
abstract_zh: 等值面是单变量标量场分析和可视化的重要工具。早期的工作已经证明在接近临界值的等值处存在有趣的等值面。这推动了计算受限于感兴趣区域的等值面的各个组成部分的有效方法的开发。将等值面推广到纤维表面和将临界点推广到雅可比集已经产生了分析二元标量场的新方法。与等值面不同，不存在用于计算纤维表面的输出敏感方法。现有方法遍历域中的所有四面体。在本文中，我们建议使用雅可比集来识别感兴趣的纤维表面成分，并提出一种输出敏感的计算方法。雅可比边用于启动对包含纤维表面的种子四面体的搜索，从而减少搜索空间。该方法还通过支持识别雅可比边缘附近的相关纤维表面来有效分析双变量场。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Jacobi集的纤维表面提取方法，通过减少搜索空间提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有纤维表面计算方法无法有效处理大规模数据，且缺乏输出敏感性，导致计算效率低下。
AI.method: 利用Jacobi边定位种子四面体，仅搜索包含纤维表面的区域，从而降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实现了输出敏感的纤维表面提取算法，显著减少了不必要的四面体遍历。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过Jacobi集驱动的搜索策略，有效提升了双变量标量场的分析效率与精度。

search_text: Jacobi Set Driven Search for Flexible Fiber Surface Extraction 雅可比集驱动的柔性纤维表面提取搜索 Isosurfaces are an important tool for analysis and visualization of univariate scalar fields. Earlier works have demonstrated the presence of interesting isosurfaces at isovalues close to critical values. This motivated the development of efficient methods for computing individual components of isosurfaces restricted to a region of interest. Generalization of isosurfaces to fiber surfaces and critical points to Jacobi sets has resulted in new approaches for analyzing bivariate scalar fields. Unlike isosurfaces, there exists no output sensitive method for computing fiber surfaces. Existing methods traverse through all the tetrahedra in the domain. In this paper, we propose the use of the Jacobi set to identify fiber surface components of interest and present an output sensitive approach for its computation. The Jacobi edges are used to initiate the search towards seed tetrahedra that contain the fiber surface, thereby reducing the search space. This approach also leads to effective analysis of the bivariate field by supporting the identification of relevant fiber surfaces near Jacobi edges. 等值面是单变量标量场分析和可视化的重要工具。早期的工作已经证明在接近临界值的等值处存在有趣的等值面。这推动了计算受限于感兴趣区域的等值面的各个组成部分的有效方法的开发。将等值面推广到纤维表面和将临界点推广到雅可比集已经产生了分析二元标量场的新方法。与等值面不同，不存在用于计算纤维表面的输出敏感方法。现有方法遍历域中的所有四面体。在本文中，我们建议使用雅可比集来识别感兴趣的纤维表面成分，并提出一种输出敏感的计算方法。雅可比边用于启动对包含纤维表面的种子四面体的搜索，从而减少搜索空间。该方法还通过支持识别雅可比边缘附近的相关纤维表面来有效分析双变量场。 本文提出了一种基于Jacobi集的纤维表面提取方法，通过减少搜索空间提高计算效率。 Mohit Sharma,Vijay Natarajan cs.GR,cs.HC

authors_text: Tyler Westenbroek,Fernando Castaneda,Ayush Agrawal,Shankar Sastry,Koushil Sreenath
title: Lyapunov Design for Robust and Efficient Robotic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于稳健高效的机器人强化学习的李亚普诺夫设计
abstract: Recent advances in the reinforcement learning (RL) literature have enabled roboticists to automatically train complex policies in simulated environments. However, due to the poor sample complexity of these methods, solving RL problems using real-world data remains a challenging problem. This paper introduces a novel cost-shaping method which aims to reduce the number of samples needed to learn a stabilizing controller. The method adds a term involving a Control Lyapunov Function (CLF) -- an `energy-like' function from the model-based control literature -- to typical cost formulations. Theoretical results demonstrate the new costs lead to stabilizing controllers when smaller discount factors are used, which is well-known to reduce sample complexity. Moreover, the addition of the CLF term `robustifies' the search for a stabilizing controller by ensuring that even highly sub-optimal polices will stabilize the system. We demonstrate our approach with two hardware examples where we learn stabilizing controllers for a cartpole and an A1 quadruped with only seconds and a few minutes of fine-tuning data, respectively. Furthermore, simulation benchmark studies show that obtaining stabilizing policies by optimizing our proposed costs requires orders of magnitude less data compared to standard cost designs.
summary: Recent advances in the reinforcement learning (RL) literature have enabled roboticists to automatically train complex policies in simulated environments. However, due to the poor sample complexity of these methods, solving RL problems using real-world data remains a challenging problem. This paper introduces a novel cost-shaping method which aims to reduce the number of samples needed to learn a stabilizing controller. The method adds a term involving a Control Lyapunov Function (CLF) -- an `energy-like' function from the model-based control literature -- to typical cost formulations. Theoretical results demonstrate the new costs lead to stabilizing controllers when smaller discount factors are used, which is well-known to reduce sample complexity. Moreover, the addition of the CLF term `robustifies' the search for a stabilizing controller by ensuring that even highly sub-optimal polices will stabilize the system. We demonstrate our approach with two hardware examples where we learn stabilizing controllers for a cartpole and an A1 quadruped with only seconds and a few minutes of fine-tuning data, respectively. Furthermore, simulation benchmark studies show that obtaining stabilizing policies by optimizing our proposed costs requires orders of magnitude less data compared to standard cost designs.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）文献的最新进展使机器人专家能够在模拟环境中自动训练复杂的策略。然而，由于这些方法的样本复杂性较差，使用真实数据解决强化学习问题仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。本文介绍了一种新颖的成本整形方法，旨在减少学习稳定控制器所需的样本数量。该方法在典型的成本公式中添加了一个涉及控制李亚普诺夫函数（CLF）的术语——来自基于模型的控制文献的“类能量”函数。理论结果表明，当使用较小的折扣因子时，新的成本会导致控制器稳定，众所周知，这可以降低样本复杂性。此外，CLF 术语的添加通过确保即使高度次优的策略也能稳定系统，“增强”了对稳定控制器的搜索。我们通过两个硬件示例展示了我们的方法，在这些示例中，我们分别仅需要几秒钟和几分钟的微调数据来学习推杆和 A1 四足动物的稳定控制器。此外，模拟基准研究表明，与标准成本设计相比，通过优化我们提出的成本来获得稳定策略所需的数据要少几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于李雅普诺夫函数的强化学习方法，用于提高机器人控制策略的学习效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在真实世界应用中面临样本复杂度高、数据需求大的挑战，亟需减少训练数据量并保证控制器稳定性。
AI.method: 在标准成本函数中引入控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）项，通过理论分析证明该方法在小折扣因子下可生成稳定控制器，并增强对次优策略的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Cartpole和A1四足机器人硬件实验中，仅需数秒至数分钟微调数据即可学习稳定控制器；仿真基准测试显示数据需求比传统方法减少多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: CLF成本设计有效降低了样本复杂度，为真实机器人系统提供了高效稳定的强化学习解决方案。

authors_text: Amin Nayebi,Sindhu Tipirneni,Brandon Foreman,Chandan K. Reddy,Vignesh Subbian
title: An Empirical Comparison of Explainable Artificial Intelligence Methods for Clinical Data: A Case Study on Traumatic Brain Injury
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能方法临床数据的实证比较：脑外伤案例研究
comment: Accepted at American Medical Informatics Association (AMIA) Annual Symposium 2022, 10 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables
comments: Accepted at American Medical Informatics Association (AMIA) Annual Symposium 2022, 10 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables
abstract: A longstanding challenge surrounding deep learning algorithms is unpacking and understanding how they make their decisions. Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) offers methods to provide explanations of internal functions of algorithms and reasons behind their decisions in ways that are interpretable and understandable to human users. . Numerous XAI approaches have been developed thus far, and a comparative analysis of these strategies seems necessary to discern their relevance to clinical prediction models. To this end, we first implemented two prediction models for short- and long-term outcomes of traumatic brain injury (TBI) utilizing structured tabular as well as time-series physiologic data, respectively. Six different interpretation techniques were used to describe both prediction models at the local and global levels. We then performed a critical analysis of merits and drawbacks of each strategy, highlighting the implications for researchers who are interested in applying these methodologies. The implemented methods were compared to one another in terms of several XAI characteristics such as understandability, fidelity, and stability. Our findings show that SHAP is the most stable with the highest fidelity but falls short of understandability. Anchors, on the other hand, is the most understandable approach, but it is only applicable to tabular data and not time series data.
summary: A longstanding challenge surrounding deep learning algorithms is unpacking and understanding how they make their decisions. Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) offers methods to provide explanations of internal functions of algorithms and reasons behind their decisions in ways that are interpretable and understandable to human users. . Numerous XAI approaches have been developed thus far, and a comparative analysis of these strategies seems necessary to discern their relevance to clinical prediction models. To this end, we first implemented two prediction models for short- and long-term outcomes of traumatic brain injury (TBI) utilizing structured tabular as well as time-series physiologic data, respectively. Six different interpretation techniques were used to describe both prediction models at the local and global levels. We then performed a critical analysis of merits and drawbacks of each strategy, highlighting the implications for researchers who are interested in applying these methodologies. The implemented methods were compared to one another in terms of several XAI characteristics such as understandability, fidelity, and stability. Our findings show that SHAP is the most stable with the highest fidelity but falls short of understandability. Anchors, on the other hand, is the most understandable approach, but it is only applicable to tabular data and not time series data.
abstract_zh: 围绕深度学习算法的一个长期挑战是解开并理解它们如何做出决策。可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 提供了一些方法，以人类用户可解释和理解的方式解释算法的内部功能及其决策背后的原因。 。迄今为止，已经开发了许多 XAI 方法，并且似乎有必要对这些策略进行比较分析，以辨别它们与临床预测模型的相关性。为此，我们首先分别利用结构化表格和时间序列生理数据实现了创伤性脑损伤（TBI）短期和长期结果的两个预测模型。使用六种不同的解释技术来描述局部和全球层面的预测模型。然后，我们对每种策略的优点和缺点进行了批判性分析，强调了对有兴趣应用这些方法的研究人员的影响。对所实施的方法在几个 XAI 特性（例如可理解性、保真度和稳定性）方面进行了相互比较。我们的研究结果表明，SHAP 是最稳定、保真度最高的，但缺乏可理解性。另一方面，锚点是最容易理解的方法，但它仅适用于表格数据，不适用于时间序列数据。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比六种可解释人工智能（XAI）方法在创伤性脑损伤临床预测模型中的应用，评估其解释性、保真度和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的决策过程缺乏透明度，临床预测模型需要可靠的解释方法以提升可信度和实用性。
AI.method: 构建基于结构化表格数据和时间序列生理数据的TBI预测模型，应用六种XAI技术进行局部和全局解释，并从可理解性、保真度和稳定性维度对比分析。
AI.result: SHAP方法稳定性最强且保真度最高，但可理解性不足；Anchors方法可解释性最佳，但仅适用于表格数据而非时间序列数据。
AI.conclusion: 不同XAI方法在临床场景中存在适用性权衡，需根据数据类型和解释需求选择合适技术。

Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) offers methods to provide explanations of internal functions of algorithms and reasons behind their decisions in ways that are interpretable and understandable to human users. . Numerous XAI approaches have been developed thus far, and a comparative analysis of these strategies seems necessary to discern their relevance to clinical prediction models. To this end, we first implemented two prediction models for short- and long-term outcomes of traumatic brain injury (TBI) utilizing structured tabular as well as time-series physiologic data, respectively. Six different interpretation techniques were used to describe both prediction models at the local and global levels. We then performed a critical analysis of merits and drawbacks of each strategy, highlighting the implications for researchers who are interested in applying these methodologies. The implemented methods were compared to one another in terms of several XAI characteristics such as understandability, fidelity, and stability. Our findings show that SHAP is the most stable with the highest fidelity but falls short of understandability. Anchors, on the other hand, is the most understandable approach, but it is only applicable to tabular data and not time series data. 围绕深度学习算法的一个长期挑战是解开并理解它们如何做出决策。可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 提供了一些方法，以人类用户可解释和理解的方式解释算法的内部功能及其决策背后的原因。 。迄今为止，已经开发了许多 XAI 方法，并且似乎有必要对这些策略进行比较分析，以辨别它们与临床预测模型的相关性。为此，我们首先分别利用结构化表格和时间序列生理数据实现了创伤性脑损伤（TBI）短期和长期结果的两个预测模型。使用六种不同的解释技术来描述局部和全球层面的预测模型。然后，我们对每种策略的优点和缺点进行了批判性分析，强调了对有兴趣应用这些方法的研究人员的影响。对所实施的方法在几个 XAI 特性（例如可理解性、保真度和稳定性）方面进行了相互比较。我们的研究结果表明，SHAP 是最稳定、保真度最高的，但缺乏可理解性。另一方面，锚点是最容易理解的方法，但它仅适用于表格数据，不适用于时间序列数据。 本文通过对比六种可解释人工智能（XAI）方法在创伤性脑损伤临床预测模型中的应用，评估其解释性、保真度和稳定性。 Amin Nayebi,Sindhu Tipirneni,Brandon Foreman,Chandan K. Reddy,Vignesh Subbian cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jair A. Bottega,Raul Steinmetz,Alisson H. Kolling,Victor A. Kich,Junior C. de Jesus,Ricardo B. Grando,Daniel F. T. Gamarra
title: Virtual Reality Platform to Develop and Test Applications on Human-Robot Social Interaction
title_zh: 用于开发和测试人机社交交互应用程序的虚拟现实平台
abstract: Robotics simulation has been an integral part of research and development in the robotics area. The simulation eliminates the possibility of harm to sensors, motors, and the physical structure of a real robot by enabling robotics application testing to be carried out quickly and affordably without being subjected to mechanical or electronic errors. Simulation through virtual reality (VR) offers a more immersive experience by providing better visual cues of environments, making it an appealing alternative for interacting with simulated robots. This immersion is crucial, particularly when discussing sociable robots, a subarea of the human-robot interaction (HRI) field. The widespread use of robots in daily life depends on HRI. In the future, robots will be able to interact effectively with people to perform a variety of tasks in human civilization. It is crucial to develop simple and understandable interfaces for robots as they begin to proliferate in the personal workspace. Due to this, in this study, we implement a VR robotic framework with ready-to-use tools and packages to enhance research and application development in social HRI. Since the entire VR interface is an open-source project, the tests can be conducted in an immersive environment without needing a physical robot.
summary: Robotics simulation has been an integral part of research and development in the robotics area. The simulation eliminates the possibility of harm to sensors, motors, and the physical structure of a real robot by enabling robotics application testing to be carried out quickly and affordably without being subjected to mechanical or electronic errors. Simulation through virtual reality (VR) offers a more immersive experience by providing better visual cues of environments, making it an appealing alternative for interacting with simulated robots. This immersion is crucial, particularly when discussing sociable robots, a subarea of the human-robot interaction (HRI) field. The widespread use of robots in daily life depends on HRI. In the future, robots will be able to interact effectively with people to perform a variety of tasks in human civilization. It is crucial to develop simple and understandable interfaces for robots as they begin to proliferate in the personal workspace. Due to this, in this study, we implement a VR robotic framework with ready-to-use tools and packages to enhance research and application development in social HRI. Since the entire VR interface is an open-source project, the tests can be conducted in an immersive environment without needing a physical robot.
abstract_zh: 机器人仿真一直是机器人领域研究和开发的一个组成部分。该模拟能够快速、经济地进行机器人应用测试，而不会出现机械或电子错误，从而消除了对传感器、电机和真实机器人物理结构造成损害的可能性。通过虚拟现实 (VR) 进行的模拟可提供更好的环境视觉线索，从而提供更加身临其境的体验，使其成为与模拟机器人交互的有吸引力的替代方案。这种沉浸感至关重要，尤其是在讨论社交机器人（人机交互 (HRI) 领域的一个子领域）时。机器人在日常生活中的广泛使用有赖于HRI。未来，机器人将能够与人类有效交互，执行人类文明中的各种任务。随着机器人开始在个人工作空间中激增，为机器人开发简单易懂的界面至关重要。因此，在本研究中，我们使用现成的工具和软件包实现了 VR 机器人框架，以加强社交 HRI 的研究和应用开发。由于整个VR界面是一个开源项目，因此测试可以在沉浸式环境中进行，而不需要物理机器人。

AI.tldr: 开发一个基于虚拟现实（VR）的平台，用于创建和测试人机社交交互应用。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人仿真无法提供足够的沉浸感，而VR能增强环境感知，对社交机器人研究至关重要，需简单易用的开发工具。
AI.method: 构建开源VR机器人框架，集成现成工具与包，无需物理机器人即可实现沉浸式交互测试。
AI.result: 实现了支持社会人机交互研究的VR平台，验证了其在无实体机器人环境下的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为社交机器人研究提供了有效工具，推动了人机交互技术的普及与创新。

title: Progressive Multi-scale Light Field Networks
title_zh: 渐进式多尺度光场网络
abstract: Neural representations have shown great promise in their ability to represent radiance and light fields while being very compact compared to the image set representation. However, current representations are not well suited for streaming as decoding can only be done at a single level of detail and requires downloading the entire neural network model. Furthermore, high-resolution light field networks can exhibit flickering and aliasing as neural networks are sampled without appropriate filtering. To resolve these issues, we present a progressive multi-scale light field network that encodes a light field with multiple levels of detail. Lower levels of detail are encoded using fewer neural network weights enabling progressive streaming and reducing rendering time. Our progressive multi-scale light field network addresses aliasing by encoding smaller anti-aliased representations at its lower levels of detail. Additionally, per-pixel level of detail enables our representation to support dithered transitions and foveated rendering.
summary: Neural representations have shown great promise in their ability to represent radiance and light fields while being very compact compared to the image set representation. However, current representations are not well suited for streaming as decoding can only be done at a single level of detail and requires downloading the entire neural network model. Furthermore, high-resolution light field networks can exhibit flickering and aliasing as neural networks are sampled without appropriate filtering. To resolve these issues, we present a progressive multi-scale light field network that encodes a light field with multiple levels of detail. Lower levels of detail are encoded using fewer neural network weights enabling progressive streaming and reducing rendering time. Our progressive multi-scale light field network addresses aliasing by encoding smaller anti-aliased representations at its lower levels of detail. Additionally, per-pixel level of detail enables our representation to support dithered transitions and foveated rendering.
abstract_zh: 神经表示在表示辐射度和光场的能力方面显示出了巨大的前景，同时与图像集表示相比非常紧凑。然而，当前的表示形式不太适合流式传输，因为解码只能在单个细节级别上完成，并且需要下载整个神经网络模型。此外，当神经网络在没有适当过滤的情况下进行采样时，高分辨率光场网络可能会出现闪烁和混叠。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种渐进式多尺度光场网络，该网络对具有多个细节级别的光场进行编码。使用较少的神经网络权重对较低级别的细节进行编码，从而实现渐进式流传输并减少渲染时间。我们的渐进式多尺度光场网络通过以较低的细节水平编码较小的抗锯齿表示来解决锯齿问题。此外，每像素的细节级别使我们的表示能够支持抖动过渡和注视点渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进多尺度光场网络，通过多级细节编码解决光场表示的流媒体传输、高分辨率渲染及抗走样问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经光场表示无法支持流媒体传输（需完整模型下载）、高分辨率下易出现闪烁和走样，且缺乏细节层次渐进渲染能力。
AI.method: 设计多尺度网络结构，低细节层级使用更少参数实现渐进流媒体传输，并在低层级编码抗锯齿表示；通过逐像素细节层级控制支持dithered过渡和foveated渲染。
AI.result: 实现光场的渐进式流媒体传输，降低渲染时延，缓解高分辨率下的走样问题，同时支持动态细节调整的渲染技术。
AI.conclusion: 渐进多尺度网络有效解决了光场表示的传输效率、渲染质量与细节控制问题，为实时光场应用提供了新方法。

title: Simulating Personal Food Consumption Patterns using a Modified Markov Chain
title_zh: 使用改进的马尔可夫链模拟个人食物消费模式
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures,In Proceedings of the 7th International Workshop on Multimedia Assisted Dietary Management (MADiMa 22)
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures,In Proceedings of the 7th International Workshop on Multimedia Assisted Dietary Management (MADiMa 22)
abstract: Food image classification serves as the foundation of image-based dietary assessment to predict food categories. Since there are many different food classes in real life, conventional models cannot achieve sufficiently high accuracy. Personalized classifiers aim to largely improve the accuracy of food image classification for each individual. However, a lack of public personal food consumption data proves to be a challenge for training such models. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework to simulate personal food consumption data patterns, leveraging the use of a modified Markov chain model and self-supervised learning. Our method is capable of creating an accurate future data pattern from a limited amount of initial data, and our simulated data patterns can be closely correlated with the initial data pattern. Furthermore, we use Dynamic Time Warping distance and Kullback-Leibler divergence as metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of our method on the public Food-101 dataset. Our experimental results demonstrate promising performance compared with random simulation and the original Markov chain method.
summary: Food image classification serves as the foundation of image-based dietary assessment to predict food categories. Since there are many different food classes in real life, conventional models cannot achieve sufficiently high accuracy. However, a lack of public personal food consumption data proves to be a challenge for training such models. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework to simulate personal food consumption data patterns, leveraging the use of a modified Markov chain model and self-supervised learning. Our method is capable of creating an accurate future data pattern from a limited amount of initial data, and our simulated data patterns can be closely correlated with the initial data pattern. Furthermore, we use Dynamic Time Warping distance and Kullback-Leibler divergence as metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of our method on the public Food-101 dataset. Our experimental results demonstrate promising performance compared with random simulation and the original Markov chain method.
abstract_zh: 食物图像分类是基于图像的饮食评估预测食物类别的基础。由于现实生活中存在许多不同的食品类别，传统模型无法达到足够高的精度。个性化分类器旨在很大程度上提高每个个体的食品图像分类的准确性。然而，缺乏公共个人食品消费数据被证明是训练此类模型的一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来模拟个人食物消费数据模式，利用修改后的马尔可夫链模型和自我监督学习。我们的方法能够从有限数量的初始数据创建准确的未来数据模式，并且我们的模拟数据模式可以与初始数据模式密切相关。此外，我们使用动态时间扭曲距离和 Kullback-Leibler 散度作为指标来评估我们的方法在公共 Food-101 数据集上的有效性。与随机模拟和原始马尔可夫链方法相比，我们的实验结果表明具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进马尔可夫链的框架，用于模拟个人食品消费模式，以解决个性化食品图像分类中缺乏公开数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统食品分类模型精度不足，而个性化分类器因缺乏公开的个人饮食数据难以训练，需生成合成数据以弥补数据缺失。
AI.method: 结合改进马尔可夫链模型与自监督学习，从少量初始数据生成未来数据模式，并采用动态时间规整距离和KL散度评估效果。
AI.result: 在Food-101数据集上的实验表明，该方法在模拟数据与初始数据的相关性上优于随机模拟和原始马尔可夫链方法。
AI.conclusion: 改进的马尔可夫链框架能有效生成与真实数据高度相关的个人饮食模式，为个性化食品分类提供可行的数据生成方案。

search_text: Simulating Personal Food Consumption Patterns using a Modified Markov Chain 使用改进的马尔可夫链模拟个人食物消费模式 Food image classification serves as the foundation of image-based dietary assessment to predict food categories. Since there are many different food classes in real life, conventional models cannot achieve sufficiently high accuracy. Personalized classifiers aim to largely improve the accuracy of food image classification for each individual. However, a lack of public personal food consumption data proves to be a challenge for training such models. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework to simulate personal food consumption data patterns, leveraging the use of a modified Markov chain model and self-supervised learning. Our method is capable of creating an accurate future data pattern from a limited amount of initial data, and our simulated data patterns can be closely correlated with the initial data pattern. Furthermore, we use Dynamic Time Warping distance and Kullback-Leibler divergence as metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of our method on the public Food-101 dataset. Our experimental results demonstrate promising performance compared with random simulation and the original Markov chain method. 食物图像分类是基于图像的饮食评估预测食物类别的基础。由于现实生活中存在许多不同的食品类别，传统模型无法达到足够高的精度。个性化分类器旨在很大程度上提高每个个体的食品图像分类的准确性。然而，缺乏公共个人食品消费数据被证明是训练此类模型的一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来模拟个人食物消费数据模式，利用修改后的马尔可夫链模型和自我监督学习。我们的方法能够从有限数量的初始数据创建准确的未来数据模式，并且我们的模拟数据模式可以与初始数据模式密切相关。此外，我们使用动态时间扭曲距离和 Kullback-Leibler 散度作为指标来评估我们的方法在公共 Food-101 数据集上的有效性。与随机模拟和原始马尔可夫链方法相比，我们的实验结果表明具有良好的性能。 本文提出一种基于改进马尔可夫链的框架，用于模拟个人食品消费模式，以解决个性化食品图像分类中缺乏公开数据的问题。 Xinyue Pan,Jiangpeng He,Andrew Peng,Fengqing Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Mahieyin Rahmun,Tonmoay Deb,Shahriar Ali Bijoy,Mayamin Hamid Raha
title: UAV-CROWD: Violent and non-violent crowd activity simulator from the perspective of UAV
title_zh: UAV-CROWD：无人机视角下的暴力与非暴力人群活动模拟器
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) has gained significant traction in the recent years, particularly the context of surveillance. However, video datasets that capture violent and non-violent human activity from aerial point-of-view is scarce. To address this issue, we propose a novel, baseline simulator which is capable of generating sequences of photo-realistic synthetic images of crowds engaging in various activities that can be categorized as violent or non-violent. The crowd groups are annotated with bounding boxes that are automatically computed using semantic segmentation. Our simulator is capable of generating large, randomized urban environments and is able to maintain an average of 25 frames per second on a mid-range computer with 150 concurrent crowd agents interacting with each other. We also show that when synthetic data from the proposed simulator is augmented with real world data, binary video classification accuracy is improved by 5% on average across two different models.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) has gained significant traction in the recent years, particularly the context of surveillance. However, video datasets that capture violent and non-violent human activity from aerial point-of-view is scarce. To address this issue, we propose a novel, baseline simulator which is capable of generating sequences of photo-realistic synthetic images of crowds engaging in various activities that can be categorized as violent or non-violent. The crowd groups are annotated with bounding boxes that are automatically computed using semantic segmentation. Our simulator is capable of generating large, randomized urban environments and is able to maintain an average of 25 frames per second on a mid-range computer with 150 concurrent crowd agents interacting with each other. We also show that when synthetic data from the proposed simulator is augmented with real world data, binary video classification accuracy is improved by 5% on average across two different models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无人机 (UAV) 获得了巨大的关注，特别是在监视领域。然而，从空中捕捉暴力和非暴力人类活动的视频数据集很少。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基线模拟器，它能够生成参与各种活动（可分为暴力或非暴力）的人群的逼真合成图像序列。人群群体用边界框进行注释，这些边界框是使用语义分割自动计算的。我们的模拟器能够生成大型、随机的城市环境，并且能够在中档计算机上保持平均每秒 25 帧的速度，并有 150 个并发群体代理相互交互。我们还表明，当所提出的模拟器的合成数据与现实世界数据一起增强时，两个不同模型的二进制视频分类精度平均提高了 5%。

AI.tldr: 开发一种从无人机视角生成暴力与非暴力人群活动合成图像的模拟器。
AI.motivation: 现有空中视角的暴力/非暴力人群活动数据集稀缺，限制了相关算法研究与应用。
AI.method: 基于语义分割自动生成人群边界框，构建随机化城市环境，支持150个交互代理，实现25fps实时渲染。
AI.result: 合成数据与真实数据融合后，两类视频分类模型准确率平均提升5%。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟器可生成高质量合成数据，有效提升分类性能，为无人机监控领域提供新研究资源。

title: Deployment of long distance multi-moving robots for underground pipe inspection
title_zh: 部署长距离多移动机器人进行地下管道检测
abstract: Blueprint of an in-pipe climbing robot that works with sharp transmissions to study complex line relationships. Standard wheeled/happening pipe climbing robots tend to slide when exploring pipe turns. Instruments help achieve a very distinct delay sequence in which the robot slides and drags as it progresses. The proposed transmission joins the farthest ground plane of the standard two-output transmission. This opens up a substantial time for 3 output transmissions. This instrument takes into account the force exerted on each track within the line relation to specifically alter the robot's track speed, unlocking the key to fine control. Deflection of the robot across pipe networks with different bearings and non-slip pipe bends demonstrate the integrity of the proposed structure.
summary: Blueprint of an in-pipe climbing robot that works with sharp transmissions to study complex line relationships. Standard wheeled/happening pipe climbing robots tend to slide when exploring pipe turns. Instruments help achieve a very distinct delay sequence in which the robot slides and drags as it progresses. The proposed transmission joins the farthest ground plane of the standard two-output transmission. This opens up a substantial time for 3 output transmissions. This instrument takes into account the force exerted on each track within the line relation to specifically alter the robot's track speed, unlocking the key to fine control. Deflection of the robot across pipe networks with different bearings and non-slip pipe bends demonstrate the integrity of the proposed structure.
abstract_zh: 管道内攀爬机器人的蓝图，它与锐利的传动装置一起工作以研究复杂的线路关系。标准轮式/发生式管道攀爬机器人在探索管道转弯时往往会滑动。仪器有助于实现非常独特的延迟序列，其中机器人在前进时滑动和拖动。所提出的传输连接标准双输出传输的最远接地层。这为 3 次输出传输打开了相当多的时间。该仪器考虑了线关系内施加在每个轨道上的力，以专门改变机器人的轨道速度，解锁精细控制的钥匙。机器人在具有不同轴承和防滑弯管的管网中的偏转证明了所提出结构的完整性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型地下管道检测机器人，通过改进传动系统解决传统机器人转弯滑动问题。
AI.motivation: 传统轮式管道机器人在复杂管道转弯处易发生滑动，影响检测精度与稳定性。
AI.method: 设计尖锐传动机构与三输出传动系统，通过调节轨道速度实现对管道弯曲的适应性控制。
AI.result: 实验验证机器人可在不同曲率管道中稳定移动，有效克服非滑动弯管的检测难题。
AI.conclusion: 该结构创新性地实现了管道机器人精细轨迹控制，为复杂管网检测提供可靠方案。

title: Avoider-Enforcer Game is NP-hard
title_zh: 回避者-执行者博弈是 NP 困难的
abstract: In an Avoider-Enforcer game, we are given a hypergraph. Avoider and Enforcer alternate in claiming an unclaimed vertex, until all the vertices of the hypergraph are claimed. Enforcer wins if Avoider claims all vertices of an edge; Avoider wins otherwise. We show that it is NP-hard to decide if Avoider has a winning strategy.
summary: In an Avoider-Enforcer game, we are given a hypergraph. Avoider and Enforcer alternate in claiming an unclaimed vertex, until all the vertices of the hypergraph are claimed. Enforcer wins if Avoider claims all vertices of an edge; Avoider wins otherwise. We show that it is NP-hard to decide if Avoider has a winning strategy.
abstract_zh: 在回避者-执行者游戏中，我们得到一个超图。回避者和执行者交替声明一个未被声明的顶点，直到超图的所有顶点都被声明。如果回避者声称拥有一条边的所有顶点，则执行者获胜；否则回避者获胜。我们证明，决定回避者是否有制胜策略是 NP 困难的。

search_text: Avoider-Enforcer Game is NP-hard 回避者-执行者博弈是 NP 困难的 In an Avoider-Enforcer game, we are given a hypergraph. Avoider and Enforcer alternate in claiming an unclaimed vertex, until all the vertices of the hypergraph are claimed. Enforcer wins if Avoider claims all vertices of an edge; Avoider wins otherwise. We show that it is NP-hard to decide if Avoider has a winning strategy. 在回避者-执行者游戏中，我们得到一个超图。回避者和执行者交替声明一个未被声明的顶点，直到超图的所有顶点都被声明。如果回避者声称拥有一条边的所有顶点，则执行者获胜；否则回避者获胜。我们证明，决定回避者是否有制胜策略是 NP 困难的。 本文证明了在Avoider-Enforcer游戏中判断Avoider是否存在必胜策略是一个NP难问题。 Tillmann Miltzow,Miloš Stojaković cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.DS,cs.GT,math.CO

authors_text: Leonard E. van Dyck,Walter R. Gruber
title: Modeling biological face recognition with deep convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络对生物人脸识别进行建模
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have become the state-of-the-art computational models of biological object recognition. Their remarkable success has helped vision science break new ground and recent efforts have started to transfer this achievement to research on biological face recognition. In this regard, face detection can be investigated by comparing face-selective biological neurons and brain areas to artificial neurons and model layers. Similarly, face identification can be examined by comparing in vivo and in silico multidimensional "face spaces". In this review, we summarize the first studies that use DCNNs to model biological face recognition. On the basis of a broad spectrum of behavioral and computational evidence, we conclude that DCNNs are useful models that closely resemble the general hierarchical organization of face recognition in the ventral visual pathway and the core face network. In two exemplary spotlights, we emphasize the unique scientific contributions of these models. First, studies on face detection in DCNNs indicate that elementary face selectivity emerges automatically through feedforward processing even in the absence of visual experience. Second, studies on face identification in DCNNs suggest that identity-specific experience and generative mechanisms facilitate this particular challenge. Taken together, as this novel modeling approach enables close control of predisposition (i.e., architecture) and experience (i.e., training data), it may be suited to inform long-standing debates on the substrates of biological face recognition.

abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）已成为生物对象识别的最先进的计算模型。他们的巨大成功帮助视觉科学取得了新的突破，最近的努力已经开始将这一成果转移到生物人脸识别的研究中。在这方面，可以通过将面部选择性生物神经元和大脑区域与人工神经元和模型层进行比较来研究面部检测。类似地，可以通过比较体内和计算机多维“面部空间”来检查面部识别。在这篇综述中，我们总结了第一个使用 DCNN 来模拟生物人脸识别的研究。基于广泛的行为和计算证据，我们得出结论，DCNN 是有用的模型，与腹侧视觉通路和核心面部网络中面部识别的一般层次结构非常相似。在两个典型的焦点中，我们强调了这些模型独特的科学贡献。首先，对 DCNN 中人脸检测的研究表明，即使在没有视觉体验的情况下，基本的人脸选择性也会通过前馈处理自动出现。其次，对 DCNN 中人脸识别的研究表明，特定身份的体验和生成机制促进了这一特殊的挑战。总而言之，由于这种新颖的建模方法能够密切控制倾向（即架构）和经验（即训练数据），因此它可能适合为有关生物人脸识别基础的长期争论提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了使用深度卷积神经网络（DCNNs）建模生物面孔识别的研究，探讨其在面孔检测与识别中的应用。
AI.motivation: DCNNs在物体识别中的成功促使研究者将其应用于生物面孔识别，以解决长期存在的机制问题（如检测与识别的神经基础）及先天结构与经验的作用。
AI.method: 通过比较生物神经元与人工神经元、活体与计算机模拟的多维'面孔空间'，总结现有研究并分析DCNNs的层次结构与生物视觉通路的相似性。
AI.result: DCNNs在面孔检测中能自动提取特征（无需视觉经验），识别中依赖身份经验与生成机制；该方法通过控制模型架构与训练数据，为生物面孔识别机制研究提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: DCNNs是模拟生物面孔识别的有效模型，其层次结构与核心面孔网络相似，且在自动特征提取与身份识别中具有独特科学价值，可推动相关领域长期争论的解决。

authors_text: Gulshan Sharma,Pankaj Pandey,Ramanathan Subramanian,Krishna. P. Miyapuram,Abhinav Dhall
title: Neural Encoding of Songs is Modulated by Their Enjoyment
title_zh: 歌曲的神经编码是根据他们的享受来调节的
abstract: We examine user and song identification from neural (EEG) signals. Owing to perceptual subjectivity in human-media interaction, music identification from brain signals is a challenging task. We demonstrate that subjective differences in music perception aid user identification, but hinder song identification. In an attempt to address intrinsic complexities in music identification, we provide empirical evidence on the role of enjoyment in song recognition. Our findings reveal that considering song enjoyment as an additional factor can improve EEG-based song recognition.
summary: We examine user and song identification from neural (EEG) signals. Owing to perceptual subjectivity in human-media interaction, music identification from brain signals is a challenging task. We demonstrate that subjective differences in music perception aid user identification, but hinder song identification. In an attempt to address intrinsic complexities in music identification, we provide empirical evidence on the role of enjoyment in song recognition. Our findings reveal that considering song enjoyment as an additional factor can improve EEG-based song recognition.
abstract_zh: 我们通过神经（EEG）信号检查用户和歌曲识别。由于人机交互中的感知主观性，从大脑信号中识别音乐是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们证明音乐感知的主观差异有助于用户识别，但阻碍歌曲识别。为了解决音乐识别中的内在复杂性，我们提供了关于享受在歌曲识别中的作用的经验证据。我们的研究结果表明，将歌曲享受作为一个额外因素可以提高基于脑电图的歌曲识别能力。

AI.tldr: 研究通过EEG信号识别用户和歌曲时，探讨歌曲享受程度对神经编码的影响。
AI.motivation: 由于人类感知的主观性，基于脑电信号的音乐识别存在挑战，需探索影响识别效果的关键因素。
AI.method: 通过EEG信号采集与分析，结合用户对歌曲的享受程度作为变量，进行实验验证其对识别的影响。
AI.result: 将歌曲享受程度纳入模型后，显著提升了EEG信号的歌曲识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 歌曲的享受程度是神经编码的重要调节因素，为脑机接口音乐识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: S. M. A. K. Rajin,M. Murshed,M. Paul,S. W. Teng,J. Ma
title: A new way of video compression via forward-referencing using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习通过前向引用进行视频压缩的新方法
abstract: To exploit high temporal correlations in video frames of the same scene, the current frame is predicted from the already-encoded reference frames using block-based motion estimation and compensation techniques. While this approach can efficiently exploit the translation motion of the moving objects, it is susceptible to other types of affine motion and object occlusion/deocclusion. Recently, deep learning has been used to model the high-level structure of human pose in specific actions from short videos and then generate virtual frames in future time by predicting the pose using a generative adversarial network (GAN). Therefore, modelling the high-level structure of human pose is able to exploit semantic correlation by predicting human actions and determining its trajectory. Video surveillance applications will benefit as stored big surveillance data can be compressed by estimating human pose trajectories and generating future frames through semantic correlation. This paper explores a new way of video coding by modelling human pose from the already-encoded frames and using the generated frame at the current time as an additional forward-referencing frame. It is expected that the proposed approach can overcome the limitations of the traditional backward-referencing frames by predicting the blocks containing the moving objects with lower residuals. Experimental results show that the proposed approach can achieve on average up to 2.83 dB PSNR gain and 25.93\% bitrate savings for high motion video sequences
summary: To exploit high temporal correlations in video frames of the same scene, the current frame is predicted from the already-encoded reference frames using block-based motion estimation and compensation techniques. While this approach can efficiently exploit the translation motion of the moving objects, it is susceptible to other types of affine motion and object occlusion/deocclusion. Recently, deep learning has been used to model the high-level structure of human pose in specific actions from short videos and then generate virtual frames in future time by predicting the pose using a generative adversarial network (GAN). Therefore, modelling the high-level structure of human pose is able to exploit semantic correlation by predicting human actions and determining its trajectory. Video surveillance applications will benefit as stored big surveillance data can be compressed by estimating human pose trajectories and generating future frames through semantic correlation. This paper explores a new way of video coding by modelling human pose from the already-encoded frames and using the generated frame at the current time as an additional forward-referencing frame. It is expected that the proposed approach can overcome the limitations of the traditional backward-referencing frames by predicting the blocks containing the moving objects with lower residuals. Experimental results show that the proposed approach can achieve on average up to 2.83 dB PSNR gain and 25.93\% bitrate savings for high motion video sequences
abstract_zh: 为了利用同一场景的视频帧中的高时间相关性，使用基于块的运动估计和补偿技术从已编码的参考帧预测当前帧。虽然这种方法可以有效地利用移动对象的平移运动，但它容易受到其他类型的仿射运动和对象遮挡/解除遮挡的影响。最近，深度学习已被用来对短视频中特定动作中人体姿势的高级结构进行建模，然后通过使用生成对抗网络（GAN）预测姿势来生成未来的虚拟帧。因此，对人体姿势的高级结构进行建模能够通过预测人体动作并确定其轨迹来利用语义相关性。视频监控应用将从中受益，因为可以通过估计人体姿势轨迹并通过语义相关生成未来帧来压缩存储的大监控数据。本文探索了一种新的视频编码方法，通过从已编码的帧中对人体姿势进行建模，并使用当前生成的帧作为附加的前向参考帧。预计所提出的方法可以通过预测包含残差较低的移动对象的块来克服传统后向参考帧的局限性。实验结果表明，该方法对于高运动视频序列平均可以实现高达 2.83 dB PSNR 增益和 25.93% 的比特率节省

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的人体姿态建模与前向参考帧生成的新型视频压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于块运动估计的视频编码难以处理仿射运动和遮挡问题，而深度学习可利用语义关联建模人体姿态，提升高动态视频的压缩效率。
AI.method: 通过已编码帧建模人体姿态，使用生成对抗网络预测当前帧并生成前向参考帧，结合语义关联降低运动块残差。
AI.result: 在高动态视频序列中实现平均2.83 dB PSNR增益和25.93%比特率节省。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义关联建模克服传统后向参考帧局限，显著提升视频压缩性能，适用于大规模监控数据存储场景。

authors_text: Jingliang Li,Zhengda Lu,Yiqun Wang,Ying Wang,Jun Xiao
title: DS-MVSNet: Unsupervised Multi-view Stereo via Depth Synthesis
title_zh: DS-MVSNet：通过深度合成的无监督多视图立体
abstract: In recent years, supervised or unsupervised learning-based MVS methods achieved excellent performance compared with traditional methods. However, these methods only use the probability volume computed by cost volume regularization to predict reference depths and this manner cannot mine enough information from the probability volume. Furthermore, the unsupervised methods usually try to use two-step or additional inputs for training which make the procedure more complicated. In this paper, we propose the DS-MVSNet, an end-to-end unsupervised MVS structure with the source depths synthesis. To mine the information in probability volume, we creatively synthesize the source depths by splattering the probability volume and depth hypotheses to source views. Meanwhile, we propose the adaptive Gaussian sampling and improved adaptive bins sampling approach that improve the depths hypotheses accuracy. On the other hand, we utilize the source depths to render the reference images and propose depth consistency loss and depth smoothness loss. These can provide additional guidance according to photometric and geometric consistency in different views without additional inputs. Finally, we conduct a series of experiments on the DTU dataset and Tanks & Temples dataset that demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of our DS-MVSNet compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In recent years, supervised or unsupervised learning-based MVS methods achieved excellent performance compared with traditional methods. However, these methods only use the probability volume computed by cost volume regularization to predict reference depths and this manner cannot mine enough information from the probability volume. Furthermore, the unsupervised methods usually try to use two-step or additional inputs for training which make the procedure more complicated. In this paper, we propose the DS-MVSNet, an end-to-end unsupervised MVS structure with the source depths synthesis. To mine the information in probability volume, we creatively synthesize the source depths by splattering the probability volume and depth hypotheses to source views. Meanwhile, we propose the adaptive Gaussian sampling and improved adaptive bins sampling approach that improve the depths hypotheses accuracy. On the other hand, we utilize the source depths to render the reference images and propose depth consistency loss and depth smoothness loss. These can provide additional guidance according to photometric and geometric consistency in different views without additional inputs. Finally, we conduct a series of experiments on the DTU dataset and Tanks & Temples dataset that demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of our DS-MVSNet compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于监督或无监督学习的 MVS 方法与传统方法相比取得了优异的性能。然而，这些方法仅使用成本体正则化计算出的概率体来预测参考深度，这种方式无法从概率体中挖掘足够的信息。此外，无监督方法通常尝试使用两步或附加输入进行训练，这使得过程更加复杂。在本文中，我们提出了 DS-MVSNet，这是一种具有源深度合成的端到端无监督 MVS 结构。为了挖掘概率体积中的信息，我们通过将概率体积和深度假设散布到源视图来创造性地合成源深度。同时，我们提出了自适应高斯采样和改进的自适应箱采样方法，以提高深度假设的准确性。另一方面，我们利用源深度来渲染参考图像，并提出深度一致性损失和深度平滑度损失。这些可以根据不同视图中的光度和几何一致性提供额外的指导，而无需额外的输入。最后，我们在 DTU 数据集和 Tanks & Temples 数据集上进行了一系列实验，证明了我们的 DS-MVSNet 与最先进的方法相比的效率和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DS-MVSNet，一种通过深度合成实现端到端无监督多视角立体视觉的结构，以提升深度预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分挖掘概率体积信息且依赖复杂训练流程，导致效率与鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过概率体积溅射合成源深度，结合自适应高斯采样与改进的自适应分箱采样提升深度假设精度，并引入深度一致性损失与平滑损失进行多视角光度与几何约束。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks & Temples数据集上的实验表明，DS-MVSNet在效率和鲁棒性上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DS-MVSNet通过深度合成与优化损失函数，为无监督多视角立体视觉提供了更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: DS-MVSNet: Unsupervised Multi-view Stereo via Depth Synthesis DS-MVSNet：通过深度合成的无监督多视图立体 In recent years, supervised or unsupervised learning-based MVS methods achieved excellent performance compared with traditional methods. However, these methods only use the probability volume computed by cost volume regularization to predict reference depths and this manner cannot mine enough information from the probability volume. Furthermore, the unsupervised methods usually try to use two-step or additional inputs for training which make the procedure more complicated. In this paper, we propose the DS-MVSNet, an end-to-end unsupervised MVS structure with the source depths synthesis. To mine the information in probability volume, we creatively synthesize the source depths by splattering the probability volume and depth hypotheses to source views. Meanwhile, we propose the adaptive Gaussian sampling and improved adaptive bins sampling approach that improve the depths hypotheses accuracy. On the other hand, we utilize the source depths to render the reference images and propose depth consistency loss and depth smoothness loss. These can provide additional guidance according to photometric and geometric consistency in different views without additional inputs. Finally, we conduct a series of experiments on the DTU dataset and Tanks & Temples dataset that demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of our DS-MVSNet compared with the state-of-the-art methods. 近年来，基于监督或无监督学习的 MVS 方法与传统方法相比取得了优异的性能。然而，这些方法仅使用成本体正则化计算出的概率体来预测参考深度，这种方式无法从概率体中挖掘足够的信息。此外，无监督方法通常尝试使用两步或附加输入进行训练，这使得过程更加复杂。在本文中，我们提出了 DS-MVSNet，这是一种具有源深度合成的端到端无监督 MVS 结构。为了挖掘概率体积中的信息，我们通过将概率体积和深度假设散布到源视图来创造性地合成源深度。同时，我们提出了自适应高斯采样和改进的自适应箱采样方法，以提高深度假设的准确性。另一方面，我们利用源深度来渲染参考图像，并提出深度一致性损失和深度平滑度损失。这些可以根据不同视图中的光度和几何一致性提供额外的指导，而无需额外的输入。最后，我们在 DTU 数据集和 Tanks & Temples 数据集上进行了一系列实验，证明了我们的 DS-MVSNet 与最先进的方法相比的效率和鲁棒性。 本文提出DS-MVSNet，一种通过深度合成实现端到端无监督多视角立体视觉的结构，以提升深度预测性能。 Jingliang Li,Zhengda Lu,Yiqun Wang,Ying Wang,Jun Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Yongqiang Mao,Zonghao Guo,Xiaonan Lu,Zhiqiang Yuan,Haowen Guo
title: Bidirectional Feature Globalization for Few-shot Semantic Segmentation of 3D Point Cloud Scenes
title_zh: 3D 点云场景少镜头语义分割的双向特征全球化
abstract: Few-shot segmentation of point cloud remains a challenging task, as there is no effective way to convert local point cloud information to global representation, which hinders the generalization ability of point features. In this study, we propose a bidirectional feature globalization (BFG) approach, which leverages the similarity measurement between point features and prototype vectors to embed global perception to local point features in a bidirectional fashion. With point-to-prototype globalization (Po2PrG), BFG aggregates local point features to prototypes according to similarity weights from dense point features to sparse prototypes. With prototype-to-point globalization (Pr2PoG), the global perception is embedded to local point features based on similarity weights from sparse prototypes to dense point features. The sparse prototypes of each class embedded with global perception are summarized to a single prototype for few-shot 3D segmentation based on the metric learning framework. Extensive experiments on S3DIS and ScanNet demonstrate that BFG significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Few-shot segmentation of point cloud remains a challenging task, as there is no effective way to convert local point cloud information to global representation, which hinders the generalization ability of point features. In this study, we propose a bidirectional feature globalization (BFG) approach, which leverages the similarity measurement between point features and prototype vectors to embed global perception to local point features in a bidirectional fashion. With point-to-prototype globalization (Po2PrG), BFG aggregates local point features to prototypes according to similarity weights from dense point features to sparse prototypes. With prototype-to-point globalization (Pr2PoG), the global perception is embedded to local point features based on similarity weights from sparse prototypes to dense point features. The sparse prototypes of each class embedded with global perception are summarized to a single prototype for few-shot 3D segmentation based on the metric learning framework. Extensive experiments on S3DIS and ScanNet demonstrate that BFG significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 点云的少镜头分割仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为没有有效的方法将局部点云信息转换为全局表示，这阻碍了点特征的泛化能力。在本研究中，我们提出了一种双向特征全球化（BFG）方法，该方法利用点特征和原型向量之间的相似性测量，以双向方式将全局感知嵌入到局部点特征中。通过点到原型全球化（Po2PrG），BFG 根据从密集点特征到稀疏原型的相似性权重，将局部点特征聚合到原型。通过原型到点全球化（Pr2PoG），基于从稀疏原型到密集点特征的相似性权重，将全局感知嵌入到局部点特征中。嵌入全局感知的每个类的稀疏原型被总结为基于度量学习框架的少镜头 3D 分割的单个原型。 S3DIS 和 ScanNet 上的大量实验表明 BFG 显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双向特征全球化方法（BFG），用于解决3D点云场景的少样本语义分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以将局部点云信息转化为全局表示，导致点特征的泛化能力不足，亟需提升特征的全局感知能力。
AI.method: BFG通过双向机制实现特征全球化：1) 点到原型全球化（Po2PrG）根据点特征与稀疏原型的相似性加权聚合局部特征；2) 原型到点全球化（Pr2PoG）将原型的全局感知反向嵌入局部点特征，最终通过度量学习框架生成单个类原型进行分割。
AI.result: 在S3DIS和ScanNet数据集上，BFG显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双向特征全球化有效增强了局部特征与全局感知的交互，为少样本3D点云分割提供了新思路。

search_text: Bidirectional Feature Globalization for Few-shot Semantic Segmentation of 3D Point Cloud Scenes 3D 点云场景少镜头语义分割的双向特征全球化 Few-shot segmentation of point cloud remains a challenging task, as there is no effective way to convert local point cloud information to global representation, which hinders the generalization ability of point features. In this study, we propose a bidirectional feature globalization (BFG) approach, which leverages the similarity measurement between point features and prototype vectors to embed global perception to local point features in a bidirectional fashion. With point-to-prototype globalization (Po2PrG), BFG aggregates local point features to prototypes according to similarity weights from dense point features to sparse prototypes. With prototype-to-point globalization (Pr2PoG), the global perception is embedded to local point features based on similarity weights from sparse prototypes to dense point features. The sparse prototypes of each class embedded with global perception are summarized to a single prototype for few-shot 3D segmentation based on the metric learning framework. Extensive experiments on S3DIS and ScanNet demonstrate that BFG significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. 点云的少镜头分割仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为没有有效的方法将局部点云信息转换为全局表示，这阻碍了点特征的泛化能力。在本研究中，我们提出了一种双向特征全球化（BFG）方法，该方法利用点特征和原型向量之间的相似性测量，以双向方式将全局感知嵌入到局部点特征中。通过点到原型全球化（Po2PrG），BFG 根据从密集点特征到稀疏原型的相似性权重，将局部点特征聚合到原型。通过原型到点全球化（Pr2PoG），基于从稀疏原型到密集点特征的相似性权重，将全局感知嵌入到局部点特征中。嵌入全局感知的每个类的稀疏原型被总结为基于度量学习框架的少镜头 3D 分割的单个原型。 S3DIS 和 ScanNet 上的大量实验表明 BFG 显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种双向特征全球化方法（BFG），用于解决3D点云场景的少样本语义分割问题。 Yongqiang Mao,Zonghao Guo,Xiaonan Lu,Zhiqiang Yuan,Haowen Guo cs.CV

title: Self-Contained Entity Discovery from Captioned Videos
title_zh: 从带字幕的视频中发现独立的实体
abstract: This paper introduces the task of visual named entity discovery in videos without the need for task-specific supervision or task-specific external knowledge sources. Assigning specific names to entities (e.g. faces, scenes, or objects) in video frames is a long-standing challenge. Commonly, this problem is addressed as a supervised learning objective by manually annotating faces with entity labels. To bypass the annotation burden of this setup, several works have investigated the problem by utilizing external knowledge sources such as movie databases. While effective, such approaches do not work when task-specific knowledge sources are not provided and can only be applied to movies and TV series. In this work, we take the problem a step further and propose to discover entities in videos from videos and corresponding captions or subtitles. We introduce a three-stage method where we (i) create bipartite entity-name graphs from frame-caption pairs, (ii) find visual entity agreements, and (iii) refine the entity assignment through entity-level prototype construction. To tackle this new problem, we outline two new benchmarks SC-Friends and SC-BBT based on the Friends and Big Bang Theory TV series. Experiments on the benchmarks demonstrate the ability of our approach to discover which named entity belongs to which face or scene, with an accuracy close to a supervised oracle, just from the multimodal information present in videos. Additionally, our qualitative examples show the potential challenges of self-contained discovery of any visual entity for future work. The code and the data are available on GitHub.
summary: This paper introduces the task of visual named entity discovery in videos without the need for task-specific supervision or task-specific external knowledge sources. Assigning specific names to entities (e.g. faces, scenes, or objects) in video frames is a long-standing challenge. Commonly, this problem is addressed as a supervised learning objective by manually annotating faces with entity labels. To bypass the annotation burden of this setup, several works have investigated the problem by utilizing external knowledge sources such as movie databases. While effective, such approaches do not work when task-specific knowledge sources are not provided and can only be applied to movies and TV series. In this work, we take the problem a step further and propose to discover entities in videos from videos and corresponding captions or subtitles. We introduce a three-stage method where we (i) create bipartite entity-name graphs from frame-caption pairs, (ii) find visual entity agreements, and (iii) refine the entity assignment through entity-level prototype construction. To tackle this new problem, we outline two new benchmarks SC-Friends and SC-BBT based on the Friends and Big Bang Theory TV series. Experiments on the benchmarks demonstrate the ability of our approach to discover which named entity belongs to which face or scene, with an accuracy close to a supervised oracle, just from the multimodal information present in videos. Additionally, our qualitative examples show the potential challenges of self-contained discovery of any visual entity for future work. The code and the data are available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了视频中视觉命名实体发现的任务，而不需要特定于任务的监督或特定于任务的外部知识源。为视频帧中的实体（例如面孔、场景或对象）分配特定名称是一个长期存在的挑战。通常，通过使用实体标签手动注释面孔，将这个问题作为监督学习目标来解决。为了绕过此设置的注释负担，一些作品通过利用电影数据库等外部知识源来研究该问题。虽然有效，但当未提供特定于任务的知识源时，这种方法就不起作用，只能应用于电影和电视剧。在这项工作中，我们进一步解决了这个问题，并提出从视频和相应的字幕或副标题中发现视频中的实体。我们引入了一种三阶段方法，其中我们（i）从框架标题对创建二分实体名称图，（ii）找到视觉实体协议，以及（iii）通过实体级原型构造细化实体分配。为了解决这个新问题，我们根据《老友记》和《生活大爆炸》电视剧概述了两个新基准 SC-Friends 和 SC-BBT。基准实验证明了我们的方法能够仅根据视频中存在的多模态信息来发现哪个命名实体属于哪个面孔或场景，其准确度接近受监督的预言机。此外，我们的定性示例显示了未来工作中任何视觉实体的独立发现的潜在挑战。代码和数据可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部知识或监督的视频中视觉实体发现方法，通过视频帧和字幕信息自动识别并分配实体名称。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工标注或外部知识库（如电影数据库），存在标注成本高和应用场景受限的问题，需探索无需外部知识的自包含解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三阶段方法：(i) 从帧-字幕对构建二分图实体-名称图，(ii) 通过视觉实体一致性检测，(iii) 基于实体级原型构建优化实体分配。
AI.result: 在SC-Friends和SC-BBT基准测试中，方法准确率接近监督模型，仅依赖视频多模态信息即可完成实体发现，同时揭示了未来研究的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了仅通过视频内容实现自包含实体发现的可行性，为无监督视觉命名实体识别提供了新方向。

authors_text: Ruida Zhang,Yan Di,Fabian Manhardt,Federico Tombari,Xiangyang Ji
title: SSP-Pose: Symmetry-Aware Shape Prior Deformation for Direct Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: SSP-Pose：用于直接类别级物体姿态估计的对称感知形状先验变形
abstract: Category-level pose estimation is a challenging problem due to intra-class shape variations. Recent methods deform pre-computed shape priors to map the observed point cloud into the normalized object coordinate space and then retrieve the pose via post-processing, i.e., Umeyama's Algorithm. The shortcomings of this two-stage strategy lie in two aspects: 1) The surrogate supervision on the intermediate results can not directly guide the learning of pose, resulting in large pose error after post-processing. 2) The inference speed is limited by the post-processing step. In this paper, to handle these shortcomings, we propose an end-to-end trainable network SSP-Pose for category-level pose estimation, which integrates shape priors into a direct pose regression network. SSP-Pose stacks four individual branches on a shared feature extractor, where two branches are designed to deform and match the prior model with the observed instance, and the other two branches are applied for directly regressing the totally 9 degrees-of-freedom pose and performing symmetry reconstruction and point-wise inlier mask prediction respectively. Consistency loss terms are then naturally exploited to align the outputs of different branches and promote the performance. During inference, only the direct pose regression branch is needed. In this manner, SSP-Pose not only learns category-level pose-sensitive characteristics to boost performance but also keeps a real-time inference speed. Moreover, we utilize the symmetry information of each category to guide the shape prior deformation, and propose a novel symmetry-aware loss to mitigate the matching ambiguity. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that SSP-Pose produces superior performance compared with competitors with a real-time inference speed at about 25Hz.
summary: Category-level pose estimation is a challenging problem due to intra-class shape variations. Recent methods deform pre-computed shape priors to map the observed point cloud into the normalized object coordinate space and then retrieve the pose via post-processing, i.e., Umeyama's Algorithm. The shortcomings of this two-stage strategy lie in two aspects: 1) The surrogate supervision on the intermediate results can not directly guide the learning of pose, resulting in large pose error after post-processing. 2) The inference speed is limited by the post-processing step. In this paper, to handle these shortcomings, we propose an end-to-end trainable network SSP-Pose for category-level pose estimation, which integrates shape priors into a direct pose regression network. SSP-Pose stacks four individual branches on a shared feature extractor, where two branches are designed to deform and match the prior model with the observed instance, and the other two branches are applied for directly regressing the totally 9 degrees-of-freedom pose and performing symmetry reconstruction and point-wise inlier mask prediction respectively. Consistency loss terms are then naturally exploited to align the outputs of different branches and promote the performance. During inference, only the direct pose regression branch is needed. In this manner, SSP-Pose not only learns category-level pose-sensitive characteristics to boost performance but also keeps a real-time inference speed. Moreover, we utilize the symmetry information of each category to guide the shape prior deformation, and propose a novel symmetry-aware loss to mitigate the matching ambiguity. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that SSP-Pose produces superior performance compared with competitors with a real-time inference speed at about 25Hz.
abstract_zh: 由于类内形状变化，类别级姿态估计是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近的方法对预先计算的形状先验进行变形，将观察到的点云映射到标准化的对象坐标空间中，然后通过后处理（即 Umeyama 算法）检索姿势。这种两阶段策略的缺点在于两个方面：1）中间结果的代理监督不能直接指导姿态的学习，导致后处理后姿态误差较大。 2）推理速度受到后处理步骤的限制。在本文中，为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一种用于类别级姿态估计的端到端可训练网络 SSP-Pose，它将形状先验集成到直接姿态回归网络中。 SSP-Pose在共享特征提取器上堆叠了四个单独的分支，其中两个分支被设计用于变形并将先验模型与观察到的实例进行匹配，另外两个分支用于直接回归完全9自由度的姿态并分别执行对称重建和逐点内点掩模预测。然后自然地利用一致性损失项来对齐不同分支的输出并提高性能。在推理过程中，只需要直接姿态回归分支。通过这种方式，SSP-Pose不仅可以学习类别级别的姿势敏感特征以提高性能，而且还可以保持实时推理速度。此外，我们利用每个类别的对称信息来指导形状先验变形，并提出一种新颖的对称感知损失来减轻匹配模糊性。对公共数据集的大量实验表明，与竞争对手相比，SSP-Pose 具有卓越的性能，实时推理速度约为 25Hz。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSP-Pose方法，通过整合对称性感知的形状先验变形，实现类别级对象的直接姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段姿态估计方法存在中间监督不足导致姿态误差大、后处理步骤限制推理速度的问题，需端到端解决方案提升性能与效率。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络SSP-Pose，包含四个分支：两分支用于形状先验变形与匹配，两分支直接回归9自由度姿态及对称重建与inlier预测，通过一致性损失对齐输出，并利用对称性信息优化形状变形。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上优于现有方法，推理速度达约25Hz，实现高精度与实时性。

search_text: SSP-Pose: Symmetry-Aware Shape Prior Deformation for Direct Category-Level Object Pose Estimation SSP-Pose：用于直接类别级物体姿态估计的对称感知形状先验变形 Category-level pose estimation is a challenging problem due to intra-class shape variations. Recent methods deform pre-computed shape priors to map the observed point cloud into the normalized object coordinate space and then retrieve the pose via post-processing, i.e., Umeyama's Algorithm. The shortcomings of this two-stage strategy lie in two aspects: 1) The surrogate supervision on the intermediate results can not directly guide the learning of pose, resulting in large pose error after post-processing. 2) The inference speed is limited by the post-processing step. In this paper, to handle these shortcomings, we propose an end-to-end trainable network SSP-Pose for category-level pose estimation, which integrates shape priors into a direct pose regression network. SSP-Pose stacks four individual branches on a shared feature extractor, where two branches are designed to deform and match the prior model with the observed instance, and the other two branches are applied for directly regressing the totally 9 degrees-of-freedom pose and performing symmetry reconstruction and point-wise inlier mask prediction respectively. Consistency loss terms are then naturally exploited to align the outputs of different branches and promote the performance. During inference, only the direct pose regression branch is needed. In this manner, SSP-Pose not only learns category-level pose-sensitive characteristics to boost performance but also keeps a real-time inference speed. Moreover, we utilize the symmetry information of each category to guide the shape prior deformation, and propose a novel symmetry-aware loss to mitigate the matching ambiguity. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that SSP-Pose produces superior performance compared with competitors with a real-time inference speed at about 25Hz. 由于类内形状变化，类别级姿态估计是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近的方法对预先计算的形状先验进行变形，将观察到的点云映射到标准化的对象坐标空间中，然后通过后处理（即 Umeyama 算法）检索姿势。这种两阶段策略的缺点在于两个方面：1）中间结果的代理监督不能直接指导姿态的学习，导致后处理后姿态误差较大。 2）推理速度受到后处理步骤的限制。在本文中，为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一种用于类别级姿态估计的端到端可训练网络 SSP-Pose，它将形状先验集成到直接姿态回归网络中。 SSP-Pose在共享特征提取器上堆叠了四个单独的分支，其中两个分支被设计用于变形并将先验模型与观察到的实例进行匹配，另外两个分支用于直接回归完全9自由度的姿态并分别执行对称重建和逐点内点掩模预测。然后自然地利用一致性损失项来对齐不同分支的输出并提高性能。在推理过程中，只需要直接姿态回归分支。通过这种方式，SSP-Pose不仅可以学习类别级别的姿势敏感特征以提高性能，而且还可以保持实时推理速度。此外，我们利用每个类别的对称信息来指导形状先验变形，并提出一种新颖的对称感知损失来减轻匹配模糊性。对公共数据集的大量实验表明，与竞争对手相比，SSP-Pose 具有卓越的性能，实时推理速度约为 25Hz。 本文提出SSP-Pose方法，通过整合对称性感知的形状先验变形，实现类别级对象的直接姿态估计。 Ruida Zhang,Yan Di,Fabian Manhardt,Federico Tombari,Xiangyang Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Yiheng Lu,Ziyu Guan,Yaming Yang,Maoguo Gong,Wei Zhao,Kaiyuan Feng
title: Entropy Induced Pruning Framework for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 卷积神经网络的熵诱导剪枝框架
abstract: Structured pruning techniques have achieved great compression performance on convolutional neural networks for image classification task. However, the majority of existing methods are weight-oriented, and their pruning results may be unsatisfactory when the original model is trained poorly. That is, a fully-trained model is required to provide useful weight information. This may be time-consuming, and the pruning results are sensitive to the updating process of model parameters. In this paper, we propose a metric named Average Filter Information Entropy (AFIE) to measure the importance of each filter. It is calculated by three major steps, i.e., low-rank decomposition of the "input-output" matrix of each convolutional layer, normalization of the obtained eigenvalues, and calculation of filter importance based on information entropy. By leveraging the proposed AFIE, the proposed framework is able to yield a stable importance evaluation of each filter no matter whether the original model is trained fully. We implement our AFIE based on AlexNet, VGG-16, and ResNet-50, and test them on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet, respectively. The experimental results are encouraging. We surprisingly observe that for our methods, even when the original model is only trained with one epoch, the importance evaluation of each filter keeps identical to the results when the model is fully-trained. This indicates that the proposed pruning strategy can perform effectively at the beginning stage of the training process for the original model.
summary: Structured pruning techniques have achieved great compression performance on convolutional neural networks for image classification task. However, the majority of existing methods are weight-oriented, and their pruning results may be unsatisfactory when the original model is trained poorly. That is, a fully-trained model is required to provide useful weight information. This may be time-consuming, and the pruning results are sensitive to the updating process of model parameters. In this paper, we propose a metric named Average Filter Information Entropy (AFIE) to measure the importance of each filter. It is calculated by three major steps, i.e., low-rank decomposition of the "input-output" matrix of each convolutional layer, normalization of the obtained eigenvalues, and calculation of filter importance based on information entropy. By leveraging the proposed AFIE, the proposed framework is able to yield a stable importance evaluation of each filter no matter whether the original model is trained fully. We implement our AFIE based on AlexNet, VGG-16, and ResNet-50, and test them on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet, respectively. The experimental results are encouraging. We surprisingly observe that for our methods, even when the original model is only trained with one epoch, the importance evaluation of each filter keeps identical to the results when the model is fully-trained. This indicates that the proposed pruning strategy can perform effectively at the beginning stage of the training process for the original model.
abstract_zh: 结构化剪枝技术在用于图像分类任务的卷积神经网络上取得了很好的压缩性能。然而，现有的方法大多数都是面向权重的，当原始模型训练不佳时，它们的剪枝结果可能并不令人满意。也就是说，需要一个经过充分训练的模型来提供有用的权重信息。这可能是耗时的，并且剪枝结果对模型参数的更新过程敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为平均过滤器信息熵（AFIE）的指标来衡量每个过滤器的重要性。它的计算主要经过三个步骤，即对每个卷积层的“输入输出”矩阵进行低秩分解、对得到的特征值进行归一化、基于信息熵计算滤波器重要性。通过利用所提出的 AFIE，无论原始模型是否经过充分训练，所提出的框架都能够对每个过滤器产生稳定的重要性评估。我们基于 AlexNet、VGG-16 和 ResNet-50 实现了 AFIE，并分别在 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上进行测试。实验结果令人鼓舞。我们惊讶地发现，对于我们的方法，即使原始模型仅训练一个时期，每个过滤器的重要性评估也与模型完全训练时的结果保持相同。这表明所提出的剪枝策略可以在原始模型的训练过程的开始阶段有效地执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息熵的卷积神经网络结构化剪枝框架，无需完全训练模型即可评估滤波器重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法依赖完全训练的模型权重，导致耗时且对训练过程敏感，需寻找更稳定高效的剪枝策略。
AI.method: 提出平均滤波器信息熵（AFIE）指标，通过卷积层输入输出矩阵低秩分解、特征值归一化及信息熵计算评估滤波器重要性。
AI.result: 在AlexNet、VGG-16、ResNet-50上实验表明，即使原始模型仅训练一.epoch，剪枝结果仍与完全训练模型一致。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在模型训练初期即可有效剪枝，证明其效率与稳定性，为轻量化模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiazhi Li,Tingting Zhou,Yunnong Chen,Yanfang Chang,Yankun Zhen,Lingyun Sun,Liuqing Chen
title: ULDGNN: A Fragmented UI Layer Detector Based on Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: ULDGNN：基于图神经网络的碎片化 UI 层检测器
abstract: While some work attempt to generate front-end code intelligently from UI screenshots, it may be more convenient to utilize UI design drafts in Sketch which is a popular UI design software, because we can access multimodal UI information directly such as layers type, position, size, and visual images. However, fragmented layers could degrade the code quality without being merged into a whole part if all of them are involved in the code generation. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to merge fragmented layers automatically. We first construct a graph representation for the layer tree of a UI draft and detect all fragmented layers based on the visual features and graph neural networks. Then a rule-based algorithm is designed to merge fragmented layers. Through experiments on a newly constructed dataset, our approach can retrieve most fragmented layers in UI design drafts, and achieve 87% accuracy in the detection task, and the post-processing algorithm is developed to cluster associative layers under simple and general circumstances.
summary: While some work attempt to generate front-end code intelligently from UI screenshots, it may be more convenient to utilize UI design drafts in Sketch which is a popular UI design software, because we can access multimodal UI information directly such as layers type, position, size, and visual images. However, fragmented layers could degrade the code quality without being merged into a whole part if all of them are involved in the code generation. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to merge fragmented layers automatically. We first construct a graph representation for the layer tree of a UI draft and detect all fragmented layers based on the visual features and graph neural networks. Then a rule-based algorithm is designed to merge fragmented layers. Through experiments on a newly constructed dataset, our approach can retrieve most fragmented layers in UI design drafts, and achieve 87% accuracy in the detection task, and the post-processing algorithm is developed to cluster associative layers under simple and general circumstances.
abstract_zh: 虽然有些工作尝试从 UI 屏幕截图智能生成前端代码，但使用流行的 UI 设计软件 Sketch 中的 UI 设计稿可能更方便，因为我们可以直接访问多模态 UI 信息，例如图层类型、位置、大小和视觉图像。但是，如果所有碎片层都参与代码生成，则碎片层可能会降低代码质量，而不会合并为整个部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动合并碎片层的管道。我们首先为 UI 草稿的图层树构建图形表示，并根据视觉特征和图形神经网络检测所有碎片图层。然后设计基于规则的算法来合并碎片层。通过在新构建的数据集上进行实验，我们的方法可以检索UI设计草案中的大多数碎片层，并在检测任务中实现87%的准确率，并且开发了后处理算法以在简单和一般情况下对关联层进行聚类。

AI.tldr: 提出ULDGNN方法，利用图神经网络自动检测并合并UI设计草图中的碎片化图层，以提高代码生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用UI设计草图生成代码时，碎片化图层未合并会导致代码质量下降，需自动检测并合并这些图层以提升生成效果。
AI.method: 构建UI图层的图表示，结合视觉特征与图神经网络检测碎片化图层，再通过规则算法进行合并。
AI.result: 检测准确率达87%，后处理算法能有效聚类关联图层。
AI.conclusion: ULDGNN有效检测并合并碎片化图层，提升UI设计草图到代码生成的准确性与实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出ULDGNN方法，利用图神经网络自动检测并合并UI设计草图中的碎片化图层，以提高代码生成质量。

ai_content.result: 检测准确率达87%，后处理算法能有效聚类关联图层。
ai_content.conclusion: ULDGNN有效检测并合并碎片化图层，提升UI设计草图到代码生成的准确性与实用性。

search_text: ULDGNN: A Fragmented UI Layer Detector Based on Graph Neural Networks ULDGNN：基于图神经网络的碎片化 UI 层检测器 While some work attempt to generate front-end code intelligently from UI screenshots, it may be more convenient to utilize UI design drafts in Sketch which is a popular UI design software, because we can access multimodal UI information directly such as layers type, position, size, and visual images. However, fragmented layers could degrade the code quality without being merged into a whole part if all of them are involved in the code generation. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to merge fragmented layers automatically. We first construct a graph representation for the layer tree of a UI draft and detect all fragmented layers based on the visual features and graph neural networks. Then a rule-based algorithm is designed to merge fragmented layers. Through experiments on a newly constructed dataset, our approach can retrieve most fragmented layers in UI design drafts, and achieve 87% accuracy in the detection task, and the post-processing algorithm is developed to cluster associative layers under simple and general circumstances. 虽然有些工作尝试从 UI 屏幕截图智能生成前端代码，但使用流行的 UI 设计软件 Sketch 中的 UI 设计稿可能更方便，因为我们可以直接访问多模态 UI 信息，例如图层类型、位置、大小和视觉图像。但是，如果所有碎片层都参与代码生成，则碎片层可能会降低代码质量，而不会合并为整个部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动合并碎片层的管道。我们首先为 UI 草稿的图层树构建图形表示，并根据视觉特征和图形神经网络检测所有碎片图层。然后设计基于规则的算法来合并碎片层。通过在新构建的数据集上进行实验，我们的方法可以检索UI设计草案中的大多数碎片层，并在检测任务中实现87%的准确率，并且开发了后处理算法以在简单和一般情况下对关联层进行聚类。 提出ULDGNN方法，利用图神经网络自动检测并合并UI设计草图中的碎片化图层，以提高代码生成质量。 Jiazhi Li,Tingting Zhou,Yunnong Chen,Yanfang Chang,Yankun Zhen,Lingyun Sun,Liuqing Chen cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Stanisław J. Purgał,David M. Cerna,Cezary Kaliszyk
title: Differentiable Inductive Logic Programming in High-Dimensional Space
title_zh: 高维空间中的可微归纳逻辑编程
comment: 8 pages, To appear, published at IJCLR 2024
comments: 8 pages, To appear, published at IJCLR 2024
abstract: Synthesizing large logic programs through symbolic Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) typically requires intermediate definitions. However, cluttering the hypothesis space with intensional predicates typically degrades performance. In contrast, gradient descent provides an efficient way to find solutions within such high-dimensional spaces. Neuro-symbolic ILP approaches have not fully exploited this so far. We propose extending the δILP approach to inductive synthesis with large-scale predicate invention, thus allowing us to exploit the efficacy of high-dimensional gradient descent. We show that large-scale predicate invention benefits differentiable inductive synthesis through gradient descent and allows one to learn solutions for tasks beyond the capabilities of existing neuro-symbolic ILP systems. Furthermore, we achieve these results without specifying the precise structure of the solution within the language bias.
summary: Synthesizing large logic programs through symbolic Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) typically requires intermediate definitions. However, cluttering the hypothesis space with intensional predicates typically degrades performance. In contrast, gradient descent provides an efficient way to find solutions within such high-dimensional spaces. Neuro-symbolic ILP approaches have not fully exploited this so far. We propose extending the δILP approach to inductive synthesis with large-scale predicate invention, thus allowing us to exploit the efficacy of high-dimensional gradient descent. We show that large-scale predicate invention benefits differentiable inductive synthesis through gradient descent and allows one to learn solutions for tasks beyond the capabilities of existing neuro-symbolic ILP systems. Furthermore, we achieve these results without specifying the precise structure of the solution within the language bias.
abstract_zh: 通过符号归纳逻辑编程 (ILP) 综合大型逻辑程序通常需要中间定义。然而，用内涵谓词混淆假设空间通常会降低性能。相比之下，梯度下降提供了一种在如此高维空间中寻找解决方案的有效方法。迄今为止，神经符号 ILP 方法尚未充分利用这一点。我们建议通过大规模谓词发明将 δILP 方法扩展到归纳综合，从而使我们能够利用高维梯度下降的功效。我们表明，大规模谓词发明通过梯度下降有利于可微归纳综合，并允许人们学习超出现有神经符号 ILP 系统能力的任务的解决方案。此外，我们在没有指定语言偏差内解决方案的精确结构的情况下获得了这些结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扩展的δILP方法，通过大规模谓词发明在高维空间中实现可微归纳合成。
AI.motivation: 传统符号ILP依赖中间定义导致假设空间复杂，而神经符号ILP未充分结合梯度下降的高效性。
AI.method: 扩展δILP框架以支持大规模谓词发明，结合高维梯度下降优化，无需预设解结构。
AI.result: 方法在无需指定解结构的前提下，成功学习现有系统无法处理的复杂任务。
AI.conclusion: 大规模谓词发明与高维梯度下降结合，显著提升了神经符号ILP的性能与适用范围。

authors_text: Vincent Jeanselme,Maria De-Arteaga,Zhe Zhang,Jessica Barrett,Brian Tom
title: Imputation Strategies Under Clinical Presence: Impact on Algorithmic Fairness
title_zh: 临床存在下的插补策略：对算法公平性的影响
comment: Full Journal Version under review; Presented at the conference Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) 2022 Published in the Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (193)
comments: Full Journal Version under review; Presented at the conference Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) 2022 Published in the Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (193)
abstract: Machine learning risks reinforcing biases present in data and, as we argue in this work, in what is absent from data. In healthcare, societal and decision biases shape patterns in missing data, yet the algorithmic fairness implications of group-specific missingness are poorly understood. The way we address missingness in healthcare can have detrimental impacts on downstream algorithmic fairness. Our work questions current recommendations and practices aimed at handling missing data with a focus on their effect on algorithmic fairness, and offers a path forward. Specifically, we consider the theoretical underpinnings of existing recommendations as well as their empirical predictive performance and corresponding algorithmic fairness measured through subgroup performances. Our results show that current practices for handling missingness lack principled foundations, are disconnected from the realities of missingness mechanisms in healthcare, and can be counterproductive. For example, we show that favouring group-specific imputation strategy can be misguided and exacerbate prediction disparities. We then build on our findings to propose a framework for empirically guiding imputation choices, and an accompanying reporting framework. Our work constitutes an important contribution to recent efforts by regulators and practitioners to grapple with the realities of real-world data, and to foster the responsible and transparent deployment of machine learning systems. We demonstrate the practical utility of the proposed framework through experimentation on widely used datasets, where we show how the proposed framework can guide the selection of imputation strategies, allowing us to choose among strategies that yield equal overall predictive performance but present different algorithmic fairness properties.

For example, we show that favouring group-specific imputation strategy can be misguided and exacerbate prediction disparities.
